C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 星核引发的震荡依旧，裂界与它的造物仍在挣扎——为弥补被削弱的部分，它们将掠夺的视线投向同类。
E: The crisis brought on by the Stellaron has yet to quell, and the Fragmentum and its creations are still launching their death throes. In an effort to compensate for the weakened parts of themselves, they turned their predatory gaze toward their comrades.

C: 鹤运物流需要一位优秀的机巧鸟操作者，而你恰好是一位优秀的机巧鸟操作者。操作机巧鸟寻找鹤运物流丢失的货物。
E: Heron Express needs an outstanding cycrane controller, which you happen to be. Control the cycrane to find the shipment Heron Express lost.

C: 工造司出入口的停舟坪。常有大宗器械物资运输在此处堆放，故而比别处建的更气派。
E: The mooring platform at the entrance of the Artisanship Commission. It is built with more grandeur than other docks due to the large amounts of resources and the size of equipment that are transported and stored here.

C: 筑梦师们大展拳脚的地方：物理意义上的。当艺术家和工程师互相看不过眼时，此处随时可能上演聚众斗殴。
E: A place where Dreamweavers can show off their capabilities — in physical terms. This is a place where artists and engineers can set off group brawls at any time when they disagree with each other.

C: 自王座向下的连廊，栖息在树枝上的神识金蝶已在金血灼烧之下消陨，留下一簇蝶蜕的余火。
E: Along the corridor descending from the throne, the golden butterflies of divine consciousness that once perched upon the branches have perished in the searing golden blood, leaving behind only the embers of their cast-off husks.

C: 通向贝洛伯格裂界的深处，那里潜藏着古老的秘密和闻所未闻的危机。
E: It leads to the depths of the Belobog Fragmentum, where ancient secrets and unknown dangers lurk.

C: 阿合马曾被族人看作一个「无能」的步离狼卒，但现在，他是幽囚狱中最成功的企业家。也许每个所谓的「庸才」，都只是被困于不恰当的评价体系中。
E: Once deemed as a "useless" Borisin Wolftrooper by his clan, Arma has now risen to become the most successful entrepreneur in the Shackling Prison. Perhaps every so-called 'mediocrity' is merely ensnared in a dysfunctional system of judgment.

C: 「在遥远的造物世，天地初开，一切都很崭新。那时很多东西都没有名字，完全靠大家用手指指点点：所以羊未必是羊，人也未必是人。那时世界上应该还没有火这种东西，人们茹毛饮血，残忍起来或许还会同类相食。后来有一位英雄，他或者她，从本无此意的泰坦们那里偷来了火种——于是那些怕火的成为了羊，而不怕火的成为了人。但这位英雄还记得，过去人和羊是没有区别的；他从此带上了羊的面具，作为为人类带来了文明、却也分出了牧羊人和羊的一种惩罚。在深夜中的噩梦里，他或者她化身黑暗，不断地追杀自己。」
E: "In the distant Era Creatura, at the dawn of creation, the world was brand-new. Back then, many things had no names, and people relied solely on pointing: Sheep were not necessarily sheep, and humans were not necessarily human. At that time, there may not have even been fire. People ate raw flesh, and in their brutality, might even have resorted to cannibalism. Later, a hero or a heroine stole the Coreflame from the Titans, who had no such intention to give fire. Thus, those who feared fire became sheep, and those who did not become human. But this hero remembered that, in the past, there was no difference between humans and sheep. So they wore a sheep mask ever after, as a punishment for creating a divide between shepherd and sheep, even though they brought civilization to humanity. In nightmares deep in the night, he or she has become darkness itself, endlessly pursuing and hunting themselves."

E: "Try surpassing your mental boundaries." You feel a sense of déjà vu...

C: 黄泉本想拔刀将道路开拓…幸好她想起了什么。
E: Acheron was about to draw her blade to cleave open a path... But she thought better of it.

C: 你真是个小机灵鬼！
E: You sure are a smart one!

C: 螺中笑声毫无反应。
E: The Crackup Conch does not react at all.

C: 阿兰被理直气壮的你气晕。
E: Your obstinate stance exasperates Arlan.

C: 路过的阮•梅觉得你很可爱。
E: Ruan Mei, passing by, thinks you're cute.

C: 身体似乎产生了变化。
E: Something seems to have happened to your body.

C: 「克拉拉好！针坏坏！打它！」
E: "Clara good! Needle bad! Beat it!"

C: 求求家长给小孩买玩具。
E: Plead with the parent to buy her kid a toy.

C: 成果喜人。
E: It is an outcome worth commending.

C: 纠结什么？我来点外卖！
E: What are you conflicted about? I'll order takeout!

C: 你找到了…纯美骑士银枝。
E: You found... the Knight of Beauty, Argenti.

C: 米沙对垃圾桶印象深刻…
E: The trashcans leave a lasting impression on Misha...

C: 早就该打扫打扫空间站了。
E: Should have cleaned up the space station long ago.

C: 用于在地图上前进的进阶道具，可以指定任意骰面。
E: Item used for moving forward on the Cosmodyssey map. You can select which Dice Face you want.

C: 瓦尔特
E: Welt

C: 最适合做服装设计的人是谁？
E: Who is the best person to be a costume designer?

C: 银海先驱
E: Herald of the Sea of Stars

C: 时光哨卫
E: Sentinel of Time

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ
E: Jarilo-VI

C: 首领幻影施放【蚀心厉咒】，使我方角色<color=#f29e38ff>陷入【厉咒】状态</color>。【厉咒】状态下的我方角色及其召唤物离场。同时召唤【浴血人狼】，代替该离场角色继续战斗，并且【浴血人狼】的攻击能<color=#f29e38ff>造成较多的韧性削减</color>。
E: When the Boss Mirage uses "Soul-Shattering Malediction," causes ally characters to <color=#f29e38ff>enter the "Malediction" state</color>. Ally characters and summons in the "Malediction" state will Depart the field. At the same time, summons Bloodstained Lupine to replace the Departed character and continue the battle, and the "Bloodstained Lupine"'s attacks can cause <color=#f29e38ff>heavy Toughness Reduction</color>.

C: 我方目标生命值降低时，处于【死梦深度】状态的首领幻影会积累【濒死梦泡】，【濒死梦泡】达到上限时首领幻影进入【死亡的芬芳】状态，此时首领幻影和其召唤物的技能大幅强化。
E: When an ally target's HP decreases, the Boss Mirage in "Dream of Demise" state will accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches its maximum, Boss Mirage enters the "Fragrance of Death" state, greatly enhancing the abilities of Boss Mirage and its summons.

C: 应对策略：优先消灭【次蛰虫】，防止受到【引爆扩散】的攻击而陷入怒噪状态。
E: Strategy: Prioritize defeating "Lesser Sting" to prevent being attacked with "Bursting Detonation" and entering the Outrage state.

C: 每回合开始时，敌方处于【课堂频道】状态的单位的<color=#f29e38ff><u>切换计数</u></color>会扣减一定数值。
E: At the beginning of every turn, enemy units in "Classroom Channel" will lose a certain number in the <color=#f29e38ff><u>Switch Tally</u></color>.

C: 绝境逆转
E: Turn Back the Tide

C: 计数流失
E: Tally Loss

C: 朽株枯木
E: Withered Verdure

C: 银鬃铁卫的戍卫长。\n杰帕德会指挥麾下士兵集中攻击，并且能为士兵提供免疫一次攻击的屏障。
E: Captain of the Silvermane Guards.\nGepard can command his soldiers to focus their attacks, and provide each of them with a barrier that blocks one attack.

C: 无敌，怎么说，无敌。
E: Invincible. There's no other way to put it.

C: 以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，少见的人形机械，其右臂部分统一装置着链锯，似乎曾用于采集或建造作业。\n战斗中，自动机兵「齿狼」的链锯会造成裂伤，令对手持续损失生命值。
E: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. This rare type of humanoid automaton is equipped with a chainsaw on its right arm, presumably used for mining or construction operations.\nIn combat, Automaton Direwolfs will use their chainsaw to Bleed enemies, dealing DoT.

C: 旧世界的古老遗物，地髓开拓团的时代遗留下的自动控制单元。与大部分无智、只接受指令的机器不同，史瓦罗具有复杂的思考能力。\n在战斗中，史瓦罗会召来机械臂抓取和控制敌人，对目标进行沉重的打击。
E: An ancient relic from the Old World, that was originally used as an automated control unit by the Geomarrow Development Group. Unlike the vast majority of machines that lack intellect and can only act on command, Svarog is capable of much more complex thinking.\nIn battle, Svarog summons mechanical arms to grab and control his enemies, delivering devastating attacks.

C: 原本是搭载了谐乐学院教材的「十七分熟」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。舞台上的蕉燥之心酝酿炽焰的蕉响乐，誓要将不听从蕉诲的坏猴生烤为蕉碳。
E: Originally a Beyond Overcooked loaded with the Charmony Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. The banaxious heart on stage brews a banaphony of flames, vowing to barbeque bad banastudents who don't listen to banadvice to charbanas.

C: 美梦剧团中演奏谐乐的琴师。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献奏，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「未来」的剧目。来日是永恒的长歌，幸福的愿景汇于弦上，以琴声呼唤谱曲的君王。
E: A musician responsible for playing the harmonious tune in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be playing in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Future." The future is an eternal ballad, a vision of happiness strung together, calling to the composing sovereign with the melody of a harp.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n旁人的夸饰、弱者的攀附、佞臣的谄媚…无休的虚荣之心化作模因生命，寻求着贪求名利的宿主。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nThe boasting of bystanders, the clinging of the weak, the flattery of the servile... The endless vanity shifts into a memetic lifeform, seeking a host that covets both fame and fortune.

C: 「授勋」的雕塑：传言曾有一朵被女神亲吻过的玫瑰，它的美永不凋零。
E: A statue of "The Honored." Legend has it that there was once a rose kissed by the Beauty, imbuing it with everlasting appeal.

C: 在遥远的造物世，艾格勒打造黎明机器后，它又在刻法勒协助下创造了代表各种泰坦的奇兽。据信，月夜天马象征着它的老对手欧洛尼斯。
E: In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. The Moonlit Pegasus is believed to represent Aquila's eternal rival, Oronyx.

C: 裂界侵蚀的受害者们拼接成的奇怪造物。麻木的面孔循环罗列，无有思想，无有情绪，曾名之为人的部分已尽数流逝。
E: Victims of Fragmentum corrosion pieced together into one bizarre creature, their numb faces forming a sphere without thought or emotion. Any part that was once human has since vanished.

C: 虚构集合体
E: Fictional Ensemble

C: 成功挺受住湮灭效应的 「虚卒」，正反粒子以诡异的形态在其身上达成了短暂的平衡，比「掠夺者」拥有更加特殊的力量。\n「反物质军团」的基本作战单元，拥有智能，能够在小范围内控制「掠夺者」的行动。
E: A Voidranger that has successfully survived particle annihilation, the positive and negative particles in its body have temporarily achieved a strange balance, granting them more power than ordinary reavers.\nBasic combat units of the Antimatter Legion. They possess some intelligence and are able to control reavers within a small surrounding area.

C: 布洛妮娅
E: Bronya

C: 丰饶玄鹿（完整）
E: Abundant Ebon Deer (Complete)

C: 斯科特•量产型
E: Skott: Batch Produced
The Shield

C: 百眼之末
E: Shoot of Hundred Eyes

C: 黑潮蚀刃
E: Tide-Eroded Blade

C: 毁灭扑满（巨大）
E: Trotter of Destruction (Giant)

C: 召唤【银鬃近卫】或【银鬃射手】。
E: Summons Silvermane Soldiers or Silvermane Gunners

C: 召唤【无尽寒冬之槊】。
E: Summons Lances of the Eternal Freeze.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成大量物理伤害，并有大概率使受到攻击的我方目标防御力降低，该负面效果可叠加。
E: Deals massive Physical DMG to all targets, with a high chance to reduce their DEF. This debuff can stack.

C: 使自身攻击力小幅提高，速度大幅提高，弱点被击破后以上增益效果解除。
E: Slightly increases ATK and greatly increases SPD. This buff is dispelled upon Weakness Break.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入触电状态。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target, with a chance to Shock the target.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成风属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入风化状态。
E: Deals Wind DMG to the targeted and adjacent allies, with a high chance to cause Wind Shear.

C: 对我方全体造成少量风属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to all targets.

C: 强化自身获得额外行动。
E: Enhances self to gain additional action.

C: 当自身被弱点击破时将会击破所有除【王下一桶（投影）】外的敌方目标的弱点，同时自身离开战斗。当受到我方攻击时，将会被添加此次攻击对应的属性弱点。
E: When this unit's Weakness is Broken, Weakness will be Broken for all friendly units except Lordly Trashcan (Projection). At the same time, this unit will exit the battle. When attacked, Weaknesses corresponding to the attack's Type will be implanted.

C: 对我方单体及相邻目标造成少量火属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to a single target and adjacent targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a single target.

C: 进入战斗时，选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】，每回合可再次行动，并小幅提高其速度。当目标的弱点被击破时，使其行动延后，并重新选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】；如果此时所有「秩序的傀儡」都处于弱点击破状态，则会对自身造成伤害、额外延后所有「秩序的傀儡」的行动，并使其受到的伤害提高。当任意一名「秩序的傀儡」从弱点击破状态恢复时，会重新被选为【司律】。
E: When entering battle, chooses a Puppet of the Order to become Impresario, granting them an extra action each turn and a small increase to their SPD. When that friendly unit's Weakness is Broken, causes their action to be delayed and re-selects another Puppet of the Order to become Impresario. If all Puppets of the Order are Weakness Broken at this time, this unit will receive DMG and delay all Puppets of the Order's actions while also increasing the DMG they receive. When any Puppet of the Order recovers from being Weakness Broken, they will be designated as the new Impresario.

C: 在行动序列上添加【期末晚会】，每次【期末晚会】行动时，解除场上所有「蕉研组」成员的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，将全体「蕉研组」的【课间频道】状态转变为【课堂频道】状态，并施放【致博士：蕉学成果汇演】。
E: Adds "End-of-Semester Dinner" in the Action Order. Every time "End-of-Semester Dinner" takes action, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states on all "Banacademic Office" members on the field, switches the "Off-Class Channel" state on all "Banacademic Office" members to "Classroom Channel" states, and uses "To the Doctor: Banacademic Report."

C: 萨姆在【次级燃烧】下拥有【熔火能量】，被攻击时若此次攻击消耗了战技点则削减对应数量的【熔火能量】，【熔火能量】耗尽或被弱点击破时解除【次级燃烧】。解除【次级燃烧】时，萨姆受到的伤害提高，并恢复我方所有战技点。
E: While in Secondary Combustion, Sam possesses Molten Energy. When Sam is attacked and the attack consumed Skill Points, a corresponding amount of Molten Energy is reduced. When Molten Energy is depleted or when the Weakness is Broken, dispels Secondary Combustion. When Secondary Combustion is dispelled, Sam receives increased DMG, and recovers all Skill Points for targets.

C: 「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」拥有全属性弱点。「『哲学的胎儿』星期日」在处于【太初有力】状态时，将在我方目标每次行动后立即行动，并免疫来自我方目标造成的行动延后效果，自身受到弱点击破时行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday has weaknesses of all Types. While "Embryo of Philosophy" Sunday is in the "Im Anfang war die Kraft" state, it will immediately take action after every action taken by targets and becomes immune to action delay effects caused by targets. When it becomes Weakness Broken, its action is additionally delayed. Moreover, after one stack of its Toughness is Broken, it applies <u>Walk in the Light</u> to targets.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 对我方全体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 对随机我方3个目标造成量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" to 3 random targets.

C: 我方目标生命值降低时会积累【濒死梦泡】，当【濒死梦泡】达到上限时，使自身行动提前，下一次行动会进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态。解除<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态时，自身受到伤害并回复我方目标生命值。
E: When targets lose HP, they accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches the limit, this unit advances its action and enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state when it takes its next action. When <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> is dispelled, this unit will take DMG and restore targets' HP.

C: 对我方单体造成量子属性伤害，对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to one target. This DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" against targets with HP above a certain percentage.

C: 使自身和【哀悯长臂】初始受到的伤害降低，我方目标生命值降低时会积累【濒死梦泡】，当【濒死梦泡】达到上限时，使自身行动提前，下一次行动会进入<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态。在该状态下，移除自身和【哀悯长臂】的受到伤害降低状态。解除<u>【死亡的芬芳】</u>状态时，自身受到伤害并回复我方目标生命值。
E: Decreases the initial DMG this unit and "The Long Arms of Sorrow" receive. When targets lose HP, they accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches the limit, advances this unit's action and enters the <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> state in its next turn. Under that state, removes this unit's and "The Long Arms of Sorrow"'s DMG Reduction state. When <u>"Fragrance of Death"</u> is dispelled, this unit will take DMG and restore targets' HP.

C: 召唤【金血忆灵•雉形】，每个召唤物被消灭时，削减自身韧性。
E: Summons "Ichor Memosprite: Pheasant." For every summon eliminated, reduces this unit's Toughness.

C: 对指定我方单体造成伤害。
E: Deals DMG to a single target.

C: 扑满拔腿就跑，瞬间失去了踪影。
E: The Trotter flees in an instant.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成虚数属性伤害，造成伤害的次数与自身剩余【追忆刻度】层数一致。若没有【追忆刻度】则本技能施放失败。
E: Deals successive Imaginary DMG to a random target. The number of attacks is equal to the "Gauge Recollection" stacks remaining. If there is no "Gauge Recollection," this ability will fail.

C: 对处于风化状态的我方目标造成风属性伤害。若场上没有处于风化状态的我方目标，则本技能施放失败。
E: Deals Wind DMG to targets afflicted with Wind Shear. This ability fails if no one on the target team suffers Wind Shear.

C: 对处于风化状态的我方目标造成风属性伤害。若场上没有处于风化状态的我方目标，则本技能施放失败。
E: Deals Wind DMG to targets afflicted with Wind Shear. This ability fails if no one on the target team suffers Wind Shear.

C: 锁定我方随机单体，使其成为敌方全体的攻击目标。
E: Locks Onto a random unit on your team, making them the target for incoming attacks from all of their enemies.

C: 对敌方单体【灾虐的右手】施加强化状态，恢复该目标的韧性。
E: Enhances Disaster's Right Hand, restoring its Toughness.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量风属性伤害。如受到攻击的目标正处于风化状态，则直接造成1次风化伤害。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to a single target. If the target is currently suffering from Wind Shear, Wind Shear immediately causes DMG 1 time.

C: 召唤【「所有或一无所有」】并使我方单体进入赌局，每个【「所有或一无所有」】每次受到进入赌局的我方目标攻击时，会使其获得1个随机1到6的点数，并在生命值降为1后获得【<u>时来</u>】效果，首个【「所有或一无所有」】每次受到攻击时会使赌局的赔率翻倍。进入赌局的我方单体回合结束时，点数低于诡弈砂金视为输掉赌局并受到攻击；点数高于诡弈砂金视为赢得赌局且终结技被激活。同时使没有进入赌局的我方目标陷入【观局勿语】状态，赌局结束后解除。
E: Summons "All or Nothing" and makes a single target enter the Gamble. Every time an "All or Nothing" is attacked by a target in the Gamble, the target that launched the attack will receive a random number between 1 and 6. When HP is reduced to 1, gains <u>Influx of Fortuity</u>. Each time the first "All or Nothing" is attacked, doubles the odds of the Gamble. After a target that is in the Gamble has finished their turn, targets with numbers lower than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have lost the Gamble and will be attacked, while those with a number higher than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have won the Gamble and will have their Ultimate activated. At the same time, targets that have not entered the Gamble are afflicted with the "Look, Don't Speak" status, which is dispelled when the Gamble ends.

E: Icy Wind

E: The Creation's Prelude

E: Psychological Suggestion

E: Core Rupture

E: Pedicel: Marple Leaf

E: Plane Shred

E: Moonhowl Lupus

C: 狼群敕令，唤雷奔袭
E: Pack's Edict, Followed by Lightning

C: 因材施蕉
E: Appropriate Teachingnana

E: Flame-Forged Feast

C: 追随「负世之泰坦」的城邦，供奉庇护世间的刻法勒。在黑潮肆虐的永夜下，唯有此处安享黎明笼罩的安逸。
E: A city that worships Kephale, the Worldbearing Titan who protects this world. Under the eternal night brought by the black tide, this remains the only place where the comfort of dawn can be experienced.

C: 空间站的后勤核心，存储各类物资、管理能源核心，配备有完整的接引月台，系空间站运作与维系的关键节点。
E: The logistics hub of the space station. It has all manner of resources stored within its confines, supervises an energy core, and is equipped with a fully established railway platform. It stands as an essential junction for operations and maintenance aboard the space station.

C: 照雪灯炉·改
E: Snowshine Lamp (Modified)

C: 「放弃追问如同豪雨放弃星辰的虔诚，放任隐喻的洪流穿过你的身体。你将看到星空尽头的真相，空萦玫瑰色的迷霁。」 ——星之桂冠诗人（自称）沙伦•莱德 万物皆可体认乃是一派妄言，生命仅凭对规律的有限把握便开始推算未解之事，殊不知宇宙不可穷解，真理实是幻觉。 为防止智识的确定性毁灭可能的变量，迷思降下思想之雾和感官之雨，通过色相、叠嶂、谜语、幻象，向世人昭示不可概述的奥理。
E: "To stop questioning is to ask pouring rain to relinquish its faith in the glittering stars. Open yourself to the roaring river of metaphors, and you will find truth awaits, hiding at the end of the night sky, in the swirling rosy storm of a bygone age." —Sharon Leighton, Galactic Laureate Poet (Self-Proclaimed) It is a fallacy that all things can be experienced and recognized. The living seek to produce prophecies of the unknown based on their limited grasp of order, but little do they know that the universe has no end and that the truth is but a fevered dream. To prevent the certainty that Erudition brought about from destroying the possibilities championed by Mythus, Mythus conjured the Fog of Thought and the Rain of Sensation to reveal to the mortals the inexplicable truth through the four agents: Morph, Screen, Riddle, and Mirage.

C:
一场空前的浩劫降临群虫主宰的蠹星系，鞘翅目最终的遗孑飞升成神，而后化作席卷全银河的噩梦：在这场远古的「寰宇蝗灾」中，万物在祈祷和抗争中寻求存续，「繁育」命途抵达空前的鼎盛。

回望古琥珀纪：在那遮天蔽日的虫群面前，生命向最原始的本能服从——爱、孤独，生存的痛苦，对自我的迷茫，它们存在于所有个体中，成为塔伊兹育罗斯及其子嗣的「养料」。

寰宇蝗灾的始末，也如生命的诞生与终结一般荒诞：「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯于孤独和仇恨中登神，最终在列神的围剿下陨落。虫灾消散，凡人皆逝。

而「繁育」子嗣不绝，灾难不绝；凡人死后又生，轮转永无止境。
E:
An unprecedented catastrophe befell the Swarm-dominated Lepismat system, and the final remains of the Coleoptera ascended to godhood, then turned into a nightmare that swept across the galaxy. In this ancient "Swarm Disaster," all living things sought survival through prayer and struggle. The Path of Propagation has reached an unprecedented peak.

Looking back at the ancient Amber Era: In the face of the overwhelming Swarm, life obeyed the most primitive instincts — love, loneliness, the pain of survival, and the confusion of self. They exist in all beings and become "Nutrition" for Tayzzyronth and their spawn.

The beginning and end of the Swarm Disaster as absurd as the life and death: Tayzzyronth the Propagation ascended to godhood in loneliness and hatred, and finally fell under the hands of the Aeons. The Swarm Disaster dissipated, and all mortals perished.

But the Propagation's spawn are endless, and so, too, is the disaster. Mortals will be born again, and the cycle will never end.

C: 「即便『假面愚者』也会严肃地歌颂他们追随的星神——因为祂永远不会放弃你，永远不会令你沮丧，永远不会抛弃你，永远不会让你哭，永远不会同你道别，永远不会用谎言伤害你。」 ——艾斯•里克利，艾普瑟隆Ⅻ星系流行巨星 「假面愚者」以一则寓言诉说着他们崇奉的神明是如何降生的——当欢愉之主攀上存在之树的高枝，祂窥见真空冰冷可憎，星辰机械运转，万物意义让位于虚无。祂继续望去，直到目睹一名婴儿落地啼哭犹如受尽委屈，便忍不住纵声大笑。这清澈的笑声撕裂了冰冷死寂的宇宙，回荡诸界至今。 愚者们深信：世界的真相只是一个笑话，万物的终极意义存留于单纯的笑声。宇宙无情，却有欢乐可以消弭痛苦，冲淡悲戚，抵抗虚无，治愈创伤。笑，是智慧种族的天赋之权，是唯一的答案。 在所有欢愉信众之中，「假面愚者」的理念尤其激进，他们为了找寻乐子不惜一切代价，往往将所到之处搅得天翻地覆。笑英雄自以为是，笑王者权欲熏心，笑恋人痴缠纠葛，笑智者机关算尽……其所作一切都是为了搅动生命这潭死水，使之激荡变化，而愚者们自变化中解读出值得嘲弄的乐趣。若有人能戏弄他们，那更是求之不得的乐事。
E: "Even an organization like the Masked Fools sing praises of their Aeon. The Aeon will never give you up, never let you down, or run around and desert you. THEY will never make you cry, say goodbye, or tell a lie and hurt you." — Ast Rickley, super popstar of the Epsilon XII System The Masked Fools tell a parable of the birth of their beloved Aeon. When the Aeon of Elation climbed to the highest branch on the Tree of Existence, THEY saw the cold and despicable void, the stars operating like machinery, and how the meaning of all things bows before nothingness. THEY continued looking until THEY saw a baby fall to the ground and cry because it had been wronged. The Aeon burst into laughter, laughter so clear it tore through the cold universe and still reverberates through the universe today. The Fools believe that the truth of the world is a joke, and that the ultimate meaning of all things lies in mere laughter. The universe is merciless, but there is joy to eliminate pain, dilute sorrow, resist nihilism, and heal wounds. Laughter, the gift of intelligent races, is the only answer. Masked Fools are extremely radical when it comes to their beliefs among the followers of Elation. In their pursuit of pleasure, they do whatever it takes to find it, often causing havoc wherever they go. They laugh at heroes for self-righteousness, kings for their lust of power, lovers for their infatuation, and scholars for their overthinking. The Fools' objective is to stir the stagnant pool of life to create surges and change, because change is a source of mockery and amusement to the Fools. It would be a welcome sight if someone could turn the tables on them.

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

E: "The Hertadore" (Abbr.)

E: False Win

C: 「每根细嫩的枝条都是梦乡的筑材。」
E: "Every thin branch is the building material of dreams."

C: 在朝露公馆调查隐夜鸫的徽记
E: Investigate the Nightingale Family Crest at Dewlight Pavilion

C: 在朝露公馆调查猎犬家的徽记
E: Investigate the Bloodhound Family Crest at Dewlight Pavilion

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 逐鹿
E: Deerstalker

C: 加拉赫称星期日「当局者迷」，表示自己可以给星期日关于知更鸟之死的答案。随后，忆域迷因「死亡」刺穿星期日的胸膛。
E: Gallagher referred to Sunday as being "too in the thick of things," offering to provide Sunday with answers about Robin's death. Then, the Memory Zone Meme "Death" pierced through Sunday's chest.

C: 在庆典的热烈氛围中，花火突然出现，对你耳语。花火称她把炸弹放在了这艘船上，给你十分钟的时间，快去找吧。
E: During the celebration, Sparkle suddenly appeared and whispered in your ear. She claimed to have planted a bomb on this ship, giving you ten minutes to find it.

C: 芮克先生走入教室，请大家停止大声喧哗，不要随意走动，关闭录音录像设备。「做好准备，影片马上就要开始。」
E: Mr. Reca walked into the classroom. "Everyone, please quiet down and get back to your seats. Turn off all recording devices. Get ready, the film is about to begin."

C: 祭司号召纷争眷属对凯撒发动突袭。然而在刻律德菈一声令下之后，海瑟音将反抗力量尽数消灭。「我已至，我已见，我已征服。」
E: The priest called upon the Strife Titankins to launch a sudden assault on the Imperator. However, at Cerydra's command, Hysilens annihilated the entire resistance force. "I came, I saw, I conquered."

C: 你乘坐中央电梯一路向下，来到未曾踏足的神秘舱段。身后的电梯自你踏出后便离开当前楼层，令你无路可退。
E: You rode the central elevator down to a zone you had never set foot in. As soon as you stepped out, the elevator rose away, cutting off your path back.

C: 你奋力追赶，仍未能在呼雷出逃之前关闭幽囚狱大门。丹恒将手中长枪掷出，却只命中门间紧闭的缝隙。
E: You gave chase with all your might, but still failed to shut the gate of The Shackling Prison before Hoolay escaped. Dan Heng hurled his spear, but it only struck the narrow gap between the closing doors.

C: 符玄对卜测的结果感到难以置信，称卡芙卡与星核无关。符玄即刻动身向景元禀报讯问结果，而你的疑惑可以直接向卡芙卡寻求解答。
E: Fu Xuan professed disbelief at the result of the divination, declaring that Kafka had nothing to do with the Stellaron. Fu Xuan immediately set off to report the result to Jing Yuan, while you can directly seek answers to your queries from Kafka.

C: 黄泉谈及「似曾相识」的情感，共勉人生旅途中的存在价值。
E: Acheron mentioned a "familiar" sentiment and encouraged you about the purpose of human existence as people travel along the road known as life.

C: 远征之前，白厄来到创世涡心会见万敌。万敌讲述了「开山者」吉奥刻勒斯的故事，下定决心采取行动，背负「纷争」的命运。万敌向白厄透露自己的弱点，如果有一天「纷争」再度站到逐火的对立面，记得从背后刺入他的<color=#f29e38ff>第十节胸椎</color>，这是唯一能杀死自己的方法。
E: Before the expedition, Phainon visited the Vortex of Genesis to meet with Mydei. Mydei spoke of the Mountainbreaker, Geocles, and affirmed his resolve to take action and shoulder the fate of Strife. Mydei revealed his weak point to Phainon, instructing that should "Strife" ever oppose the Flame-Chase again, he must strike from behind. Target the <color=#f29e38ff>tenth thoracic vertebra</color>, for that was the only way to kill him.

C: 赛飞儿到达高塔顶端，再次与盗火行者遭遇。盗火行者重复念诵着「轮回」与「宿命」，赛飞儿发动「诡计」神力与盗火行者战斗、
E: Cipher reached the top of the tower and encountered the Flame Reaver once more, who chanted endlessly about "cycles" and "fate." Cipher unleashed her divine power of "Trickery" and charged into battle.

C: 知更鸟与她的从者音符小姐也来到同一家店，她们向你发出问候。
E: Robin and her Servant, Miss Note, showed up at the same restaurant and greeted you.

C: 受「律法」约束，刻律德菈与来古士无法消灭对方。刻律德菈以识刻锚联络黑塔与螺丝咕姆，来古士称自己仍有千般方法让「毁灭」降临。
E: Restrained by "Law," neither Cerydra nor Lygus could destroy the other. Cerydra used the Chronocognitive Anchor to contact Herta and Screwllum, but Lygus claimed he still had thousands of ways to ensure the Destruction's descent.

C: 藉由古树根系的疏导，丹恒以自身背负的火种与大地共鸣，自山峦层岩中感受、追寻你的所在。
E: Through the guidance of ancient tree roots, Dan Heng resonated with the Earth using the Coreflame he carried, sensing and seeking your location through mountains and rock layers.

C: 桑博向你们介绍「炉心」。那是连结上下层区的支撑柱，也曾是人员上下的通道，而其弃用原因说来话长。
E: Sampo introduced you to the Furnace Core, the central support column connecting the Overworld and Underworld. It once served as a passage for people, but its use was discontinued for reasons too complicated to explain in short.

C: 一些集装箱被驻守的士卒搬动，作为阻拦怪物的路障。停云请你寻找集装箱操作台，藉此开辟通路。
E: Some containers had been moved by stationed soldiers to serve as barricades against monsters. Tingyun asked you to locate the control terminal for the containers to clear a path.

C: 符玄请求你们帮忙重启「穷观阵」的阵基，顺道翦除太卜司中的星核邪祟。青雀会作为使者与你们同行。
E: Fu Xuan asked you to help restart the Matrix of Prescience's base terminals and remove the minions of the Stellaron from within the Divination Commission while you were here. Qingque would accompany you as a messenger.

C: 站在你面前的守卫十分沉着，看起来毫无破绽。也许你该在钟表把戏中使用<color=#f29e38ff>「激将法」</color>。
E: The guard before you appeared impenetrable and sturdy. Perhaps you should use your Clockwork for <color=#f29e38ff>"indirect psychological means."</color>

C: 砂金来到「扭蛋机」模型前，发现地上没有能操作的地方，请求真理医生给予场外援助。
E: Aventurine walked up to the "capsule machine," and noticed that there was nowhere to operate it on the ground. He requested for Dr. Ratio's help from the outside.

C: 你们一行人到达苏乐达广场，听取艾迪恩讲述他的创业往事。随后他为你们讲解了赛事规则，你们决定两两分组参赛。
E: Your group then reached SoulGlad Plaza and listened to Aideen recount his entrepreneurial journey. He then explained the competition rules, and you all decided to split into pairs to compete.

C: 你以愤怒演绎伙伴决裂场景，严苛评委不禁自我代入进去并大为震撼，最终给你最高评价。
E: With anger, you delivered the pain of a broken bond between comrades. The harsh judge couldn't help but see themself in the moment, shaken by the raw intensity, and ultimately gave you the highest rating.

C: 流萤发现警察沃克成功抓捕罪犯，却以自己全部记忆作为代价。
E: Firefly discovered that the policeman Walker successfully caught the criminal, but at the cost of losing all his memories.

C: 波提欧遇到一只睡蕉小猴，除此之外没有发现什么奇怪的地方。他香蕉的，这可真怪！
E: Boothill encountered a Slumbernana Monkey, but didn't notice anything else unusual. Fudgin' banana, how strange!

C: 「蕉授」声称，「潮流」即是公众欲望所向，其在「同谐」的美梦中与力量无异。你们使用弹球机追击「蕉授」。
E: Profnana claimed that popular trends were what the public desired, and they are no different from powers in the sweet dream of Harmony. You used the Pinball Machine to pursue Profnana.

C: 「蕉授」收集实验品的心愿，欲使其「物尽其用」，用来为之后的实验抹平障碍。你们使用弹球机追击「蕉授」。
E: Profnana's desire to collect experimental specimens and "make the most of them" was to clear obstacles for future experiments. You used the Pinball Machine to pursue Profnana.

C: 波提欧与知更鸟遇到睡蕉社的社员莫奈拉。莫奈拉是知更鸟的粉丝，激动地送出自己的小猴挂坠，这可以提醒考官不要刻意刁难。
E: Boothill and Robin met Monella, a member of the Slumbernana Association. As a big fan of Robin, Monella excitedly gave them her monkey charm, which served to remind the examiner not to be deliberately difficult.

C: 你们从怪物袭击中救下难民。缇宝向诺杜斯表明自己的真名，以大祭司的身份劝说诺杜斯带领同胞前往奥赫玛避难。
E: You helped save refugees from monster attacks. Tribbie told Noldus her real name and, using her authority as High Priestess, persuaded him to lead the people to Okhema for protection.

C: 你与丹恒在浴宫复盘降落后的经历，认为尽管疑团重重，但还算是取得了不错的开始。你觉得丹恒今天说的话比前三个世界加起来还多。
E: In the bath chamber, you and Dan Heng talked about everything that happened since you landed. Despite all the mysteries, you felt you'd made a good start. You noticed Dan Heng talked more today than in all three previous worlds put together.

C: 欧洛尼斯拒绝这样的配平结果，天秤的一端再度沉坠。左侧托盘放置着翁法罗斯的命运，你们需要找到<color=#f29e38ff>「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」</color>。
E: Oronyx didn't accept your balancing attempt, and one side of the scales sank again. The left tray contained Amphoreus's fate, and you had to find <color=#f29e38ff>"what weighs more than the fate of the world"</color>.

C: 你们成功将白厄带回。你得知「黑潮」是自纷争世起出现的灾厄现象，受其影响者将丧失理性，变得扭曲狰狞，连泰坦也无法幸免。
E: You fought your way through and recovered Phainon's soul. Only then did you learn the truth of the black tide was a calamity dating back to the Era Bellica. Those touched by it lose reason and twist into monstrous forms. Even the Titans are not immune.

C: 万敌在试炼中见到在流亡岁月中拱卫自己的战友们，他们全都战死于悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合之前。「纷争」带给他们荣耀，以及死亡。
E: Mydei's trial showed him visions of comrades who had shielded him through years of exile — all of whom perished before the Kremnoan Detachment joined forces with Okhema. To Mydei, Strife brought both glory and death.

C: 母亲说，会有许多勇敢的战士登上这艘船，来自王城或村庄。缇宝找到一个拿剑的娃娃，让名为「缇安」的伙伴与勇士们并肩作战。
E: Tribbie's mother said there'd be many brave warriors from cities and villages alike. Tribbie found a sword-holding doll, "Trianne," and decided to have her fight alongside the warriors.

C: 你改变了神殿中的时空。缇宁称当下的行为不会改变过往，但记忆把岁月塑造成这番模样，一定是因为它更接近心中的答案。
E: You altered the space-time fabric of the temple. Trinnon explained that your actions in the present could not change the past, but the memory was recreated in this way because it was closer to the answer within their heart.

C: 遐蝶向你讲述一首寓言诗——女王以死龙血肉和炼金术将公主复活，但失忆的公主化作另一头作恶的「龙」。遐蝶希望你平安度过试炼。
E: Castorice told you about an allegory in a book she read: A queen used an evil dragon's flesh and blood, along with alchemy, to revive the kingdom's princess. However, having lost memories of her previous life, the resurrected princess turned into an evil dragon herself. Castorice then wished you safety in your trial.

C: 那刻夏识破凯妮斯所埋伏的刺客，拒绝在被威胁的条件下谈判。凯妮斯确认那刻夏并不站在黄金裔一边，邀请他去无法监听之处密谈。
E: Anaxa sensed that Caenis had assassins deployed nearby, and refused to negotiate under duress. After Caenis confirmed that Anaxa was not on the side of the Chrysos Heirs, she led him to a place where nobody could listen in on their conversation.

C: 阿格莱雅花费重金雇佣赛飞儿，令其护送遐蝶，履行神谕所定的职责。赛飞儿赌上一屋子的财宝，认为遐蝶一定会放弃觐见塞纳托斯。
E: Aglaea had paid Cipher a hefty sum of money to escort Castorice and help her fulfill her duty according to the prophecy. Instead, Cipher bet all the riches in Aglaea's treasure room (along with another roomful) that Castorice would give up on seeking an audience with Thanatos.

C: 第<unbreak>67023</unbreak>次永劫回归，那刻夏余留的思想陪同白厄来到创世涡心。盗火行者迫近，那刻夏嘱托白厄，要让这可悲的刽子手血债血偿。
E: In the <unbreak>67,023</unbreak>rd Eternal Recurrence, the lingering thoughts of Anaxa accompanied Phainon to the Vortex of Genesis. As the Flame Reaver approached, Anaxa entrusted Phainon to make the executioner pay in blood.

C: 第<unbreak>33550334</unbreak>次永劫回归，阿格莱雅在涡心将「再创世」交由白厄完成。盗火行者迫近，阿格莱雅将亲自料理这位可悲的刽子手。
E: In the <unbreak>33,550,334</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence, at the vortex, Aglaea entrusted Phainon with completing the Era Nova. The Flame Reaver approached. Aglaea would deal with this wretched executioner herself.

C: 断锋爵与冬霖爵意识到，这场出征是凯撒设下的死局。断锋爵仍愿付出性命助凯撒成就伟业，冬霖爵则誓要在冥河中等着凯撒蒙羞到来。
E: Dux Fragoris and Dux Brumalis realized the entire campaign had been the Imperator's death trap. While Dux Fragoris remained willing to die for the Imperator's cause, Dux Brumalis swore to await the Imperator's shameful coming in the River of Souls.

C: 昔涟尝试向刻律德菈展现你在天外的经历，以此争取「律法」火种。「记忆」不能复现之处，昔涟会尽力用讲述来补充。
E: Cyrene tried to show Cerydra your journey beyond the sky, hoping to earn the Coreflame of Law. For moments memory could not recreate, Cyrene did her best to fill in the gaps through storytelling.

C: 藉由炼金术式，那刻夏得以融入来古士的意识中，翻阅其知识库。来古士称这场谈判即将被「记忆」介入，而昔涟已于不知何时消失。
E: Through an alchemical formula, Anaxa merged into Lygus's consciousness and combed through his knowledge base. Lygus claimed the Remembrance would soon intervene in the negotiation, and Cyrene had already vanished without a trace.

C: 无尽的轮回已被打破。姬子在创世涡心布下「开拓」的信标，尝试与外界联系。
E: The infinite cycle was destroyed. In the Vortex of Genesis, Himeko placed the Trailblaze beacon, attempting to establish contact with the outside world.

C: 你路过淋浴间，总觉得里面藏着什么东西。疑罪从无，当下先放过这个散发着一丝猫味的地方吧。
E: As you passed by the shower room, you couldn't shake the feeling that something was hiding inside. Innocent until proven guilty. Let's give this place that smells a bit... cat-like... a pass for now.

C: 你们击败看门的公司员工，对方不知何时悄悄溜走。希儿提醒大家提高警惕，矿区内部的家伙们更不好对付。
E: You defeated the IPC worker guarding the entrance, who had slipped away unnoticed at some point. Seele reminded everyone to stay sharp, warning that those deeper in the mines would be even harder to handle.

C: 你与虎克指认裁缝为犯人，遭到对方坚决否认。经过对证言的再次分析，你觉得真凶另有其人。
E: You and Hook accused the tailor of being the culprit, but she firmly denied it. After re-analyzing the testimonies, you believed someone else was the real perpetrator.

C: 帕斯卡变成了个大家伙，它和营地里的小家伙们都对你非常热情。帕斯卡的情感似乎共享给了所有个体——而史瓦罗并未拒斥这一结果。
E: Pascal had grown into a big fellow, and both it and the little ones at the camp were very enthusiastic about you. Pascal's emotions seemed to be shared among all individuals, an outcome Svarog did not reject.

C: 杰帕德向这对孤儿姐弟承诺铁卫将重建秩序，并教导弟弟未来要保护姐姐。希露瓦听后邀杰帕德谈心。
E: Gepard promised the orphaned siblings that the Silvermane Guard would restore order and teach the little boy to protect his sister in the future. After hearing this, Serval invited Gepard for a heart-to-heart talk.

C: 大毫称云璃是最大的嫌疑人，她具备动机且出入过犯罪现场。地衡司的调查结果显示，武库中只有「孤云」被窃走，且现场痕迹表明此处并无窃贼出入。据此排除了所有人的嫌疑后，大毫将矛头直指云璃。
E: Dahao declared Yunli the prime suspect. She not only had a motive, but was also present at the scene. According to the Realm-Keeping Commission's findings, only Guyun had gone missing from the weapons arsenal, and no signs of theft were found. With everyone else ruled out, Dahao turned his accusations squarely on Yunli.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒讨论仙舟的将军们。丹恒称每座仙舟在联盟内各有所长，而怀炎将军曾是朱明的巧匠之首。
E: You discussed the Xianzhou generals with March 7th and Dan Heng. Dan Heng mentioned that each Xianzhou ship had its own specialty within the Alliance, and General Huaiyan had once been the head of all the skilled craftsmen on the Zhuming.

C: 机巧鸟版雪衣称，一名曜青使者逃脱，另一人被挟持而去，此外还有看不见的入侵者。寒鸦拜托雪衣飞出幽囚狱，务必将消息递往外界。
E: The Xueyi cycrane reported that one Yaoqing messenger had escaped, another had been taken hostage, and there were other invisible intruders. Hanya asked Xueyi to fly out of The Shackling Prison to deliver this message to the outside world.

C: 椒丘回忆起自己担任战场医士的经历。在绵延的交火声中，伤患的哭喊与哀求不绝于耳，句句扎心。
E: Jiaoqiu reflected on his days as a combat medic. Through the persistent sound of gunfire, he could still hear the heartbreaking wails and pleas of the injured soldiers.

C: 瓦尔特提醒你，该使用<color=#f29e38ff>机巧鸟</color>查清现场情况。
E: Welt reminded you to use the <color=#f29e38ff>cycrane</color> to investigate the scene.

C: 听闻浮烟的要求，身为现任将军的景元决定亲赴绥园。
E: After learning about Cirrus's demand, Jing Yuan, the current General, decided to visit Fyxestroll Garden himself.

C: 在尾巴的救援下，藿藿终于苏醒。但此时众人得知，一切都是浮烟的调虎离山之计。听闻此报，你们立刻赶回绥园。
E: With Tail's help, Huohuo finally regained consciousness. But the group soon realized that it had all been a diversion orchestrated by Cirrus. Upon receiving the news, you rushed back to Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 连接上下层的缆车开通，你与虎克、克拉拉等人重回地面。在经历长期的隔绝之后，下层区民众终于得以重见天日。
E: The cable car linking the two worlds roared was reopened. With Hook, Clara, and the others, you stepped onto the surface once more. After a long age of isolation, the people of the Underworld could finally bask in the light of day.

E: Beep beep— <color=#f29e38ff>Pom-Pom Delivery</color> is here, make sure to hand over the goods to the correct assistant!

E: Turn around and leave. Don't bother her.

E: I'm... here to join you.

E: You obtain a flawless victory with the conservative approach. The adjutant crowns you with the title of "Cosmic Tactician."

C: 这样就不怕驾驶员肠胃不…舒…服…了？
E: So that the pilots can... relieve themselves while piloting?

C: 「你什么时候产生了尾巴可以编辫子的错觉。」
E: "What made you think tails could be braided?"

C: 每个琥珀纪，各大仙舟都会举办对外发布会，将这一年的机巧和其他创新成果罗列、展示。在这届展会上，罗浮仙舟发布了最新款星槎和金人司阍，供路人和各星球代表随意观赏。但身为无名客的你岂能满足于观赏？至少也得上手试一试才行。
E: Every Amber Era, all the Xianzhou will hold public expos, showcasing this year's ingenia and innovations. At this year's exhibition, the Xianzhou Luofu unveils its newest Starskiff and Aurumaton Gatekeeper, open for public viewing. But as a Nameless, merely looking isn't enough — you've got to test them out firsthand!

C: 巨构机械在旭光下静静地卧着，仿佛下一刻就会随朝阳一起冉冉升起。
E: The colossal machinery lies quietly under the morning light, as if it will rise with the sun at any moment.

C: 【照雪灯炉】<color=#f29e38ff>拾取热能核心后靠近灯炉底座便能启动「照雪灯炉」</color>；敌方目标在「照雪灯炉」的效果<color=#f29e38ff>范围内</color>时，会被赋予火属性弱点，且受到的<color=#f29e38ff>火属性伤害提高</color>。\n【雪暴】敌方全体造成的冰属性伤害提高。当敌人处于「照雪灯炉」的效果范围内时，<color=#f29e38ff>该增益效果将被移除</color>。
E: Snowshine Lamp: <color=#f29e38ff>After picking up the thermic core, approach the lamp base to activate the Snowshine Lamp.</color> When an enemy is <color=#f29e38ff>within the Snowshine Lamp's effective range</color>, the enemy unit gains Fire Weakness and receives <color=#f29e38ff>increased Fire DMG</color>.\nSnowstorm: Increases Ice DMG caused by all enemies. When enemies are within the Snowshine Lamp's effective range, <color=#f29e38ff>this buff is removed</color>.

E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by the Prophecy Tablet. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

E: You somehow ended up being a major suspect for assaulting Herta. Before you cooperate with the investigation, you need to prove your innocence by rewinding your memories.

C:
萨尔索图的空渔人围捕从沙地中飞出的燃素水母并非易事。面对的凌乱气流，乍看柔软贴身的束带，在强风吹拂的城外空域里成为了空渔人的生命纽带。

围捕从沙地中飞出的燃素水母绝不容易，佯动、驱赶、以及拦截捕获，在每一个环节上都伴随着陨落的风险。

未成年的空渔人需要取父母各自的一根发丝同金属支撑一同包裹在束带中，已婚的则由配偶提供，这样的翼装束带就会受到名为「家」的祝福，保护空渔人始终能回到家中。

在残酷的生存世界里，只有「家」能将空渔人轻轻托起。

这条束带中的发丝仍然完整，它来自一名女性，发根处微微发白。
E:
It was no easy feat for Salsotto's skyfishers to entrap and hunt phlogiston jellyfish that flew out of the sand. During turbulent flights, the seemingly tender and soft safety harness was the thread of life for a skyfisher.

Hunting phlogiston jellyfish was never easy. From trick moves to intense chasing, from precise blocking to the final capturing act, one wrong move in any one of these links in the chain could mean mortal danger.

It was customary for a young skyfisher to get one strand of hair from each parent and weave them into the harness with metal supports, while a married one should get one from their spouse. In this manner, the harness would be blessed by the power of "home" and ensure that the skyfisher always returned safely.

In this cruel world where all fought hard for survival, "home" was the only place that could offer comfort and support for a skyfisher.

The hair inside this harness was still intact, with a faint white at the root. It came from a female.

C:
一人高的青铜弩箭裹着烈焰刺破海雾，却在靠近海妖鳞甲瞬间裂作齑粉。那淡蓝色的腕足将人拦腰缠住，被斩断的腕足在船板上翻滚，啃噬着惊恐的船员。

「船员的手脚在空中挣扎，哭喊着我的名字，这是我航海生涯中最可怖的景象。」船长的声音带着唇齿颤抖，他并没有说谎。

巨大的海妖浮上海面，那虬结的触须将舰船紧紧抱住，它的背脊如移动的岛屿。大副将烧红的铁矛刺入那上千尖齿的口中，腥臭的黑血染黑了整个甲板。船员们侥幸从一次致命袭击中逃生，船长回首时看见，船尾塔楼被巨大的腕足拍碎，如同尼卡多利的天谴之矛砸碎一枚核桃壳。机会千载难逢，是冲刺，还是逃走，所有人望向船长——

「左满舵，桨手们，全速前进！帆面全开，以撞角迎敌！」

船长的斗篷在猎猎长风中舞动，船员们亦视死如归——钢铁与鳞甲纠缠在一起，龙骨折断，海妖哀嚎。它的身躯失去了曾经不可一世的伟力，缓缓沉入海底。
E:
A bronze ballista bolt, as tall as a man, tore through the sea mist wrapped in flames, only to shatter into dust the moment it neared the siren's scaled armor. The pale blue tentacles coiled tightly around sailors' waists, and even when severed, they writhed across the deck, gnawing at the terrified crew.

"The crewmate's limbs thrashed in the air, crying out my name. That was the most terrifying sight of my seafaring career." The captain's voice trembled between his lips and teeth. He was not lying.

The colossal sea siren surfaced, its gnarled tentacles coiling tightly around the ship. Its back loomed like a drifting island. The first mate drove a searing iron spear into its gaping maw, lined with a thousand razor-sharp teeth. A spray of foul black blood splattered across the deck, darkening the planks. The crew narrowly escaped a fatal attack, but as the captain turned back, he saw the stern tower crushed beneath a massive tentacle, shattered as easily as Nikador's Lance of Fury cracking open a walnut shell. This was a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Charge forward or retreat? All eyes turned to the captain—

"Hard to port! Rowers, full speed! Unfurl all sails, prepare the ram for impact!"

The captain's cloak billowed in the roaring wind, and the crew steeled themselves, ready to face death. Steel clashed against scales, the keel shattered, and the sea siren let out a wailing cry. Its once-mighty form, now drained of its former power, slowly sank into the depths of the sea.

C:
泰科铵星曾是公司的沉船港星球，定损业务员会被派去清理旧船残骸，发掘剩余价值。

业务员将「派驻泰科铵星」视作一去不返的流放。在这颗小行星上，成山的碳纤维与不锈钢描摹着巨船退役前的轮廓，钢筋废墟上投下虚无的阴影，渴望召回的欲望愈演愈烈。数年间，业务员们在甲板之下抢夺高规零件，穿着推进设备在沉船舱通道中疾速追逃，形成了一套阴影中的「地下法则」…即便如此，困兽们也未能得偿所愿，终究无人返航。

困兽们的「地下法则」从未躲过监视，被随身影像传回公司，化为高位者的饭后笑谈。「传统项目部」投资人颔首沉思，从中嗅到一丝「娱乐」的可能性。

按照规划，全银河首个以「泰科铵机动球」为主体的竞赛项目将在泰科铵星横空出世。数座星球改造机器降临这里，它们将废弃的星船连根拔起，不留一处阴影。默默无闻的小行星，围绕着「机动球」运动改头换面，转眼之间成为璀璨耀眼的竞技圣地。「届时，将无人会在乎荒诞的原型，留下的只有纯洁的运动精神、以及高额的商业合同」。

身着推进器护甲的运动员，变幻莫测的立体赛道，激荡火花的身体对抗…「机动球大赛」一经推出，便跻身银河焦点。终年夜色的泰科铵星上从此镭光四射，不见阴影。

大球馆内，球队主客攻防难解难分，声嘶力竭的观众座无虚席，他们高呼战队的名字，高呼球星的名字，山呼海啸的喝彩声经久不绝；大球馆外，泰科铵星也未曾安静片刻，转播授权、特许赞助、广告合同在交易市场上明争暗夺，地下世界的乐透式投注也常常暗潮汹涌，各自欢喜离愁…如同墨水一般的夜色阴翳早已化为镭光底板，默默衬托着竞技场的流光溢彩。

泰科铵大球馆从诞生起便一直夜如白昼，谁也不记得褪去的阴影究竟藏在何处了。
E:
Planet Taikiyan was once an IPC scuttle site for spaceships, where value assessors were dispatched to clean up old ship wreckage for any remaining value.

Assessors regarded an assignment to station in Planet Taikiyan as an exile with no return. On this tiny planet, mountains of carbon fiber and stainless steel traced the pre-decommissioned outlines of giant ships, casting a shadow of emptiness over the steel ruins. Out here, the exiles' desire to be recalled intensified to a boiling point. Assessors wearing propulsion equipment fought for high-quality parts below-deck for many years, their lightning-fast figures mutually fleeing from and in pursuit of each other in the corridors of sunken ships. They had formed their own underground rules in the shadows... And yet none of these trapped beasts had their wishes fulfilled. No one was ever able to return.

The rules established by these abandoned humans, reduced to caged animals, did not escape the IPC's surveillance. Footage from their wearable cameras were transmitted back to the IPC and passed as after-dinner laughingstock by the high and powerful. The investor of the Traditional Project Department, however, scented out the faint possibility for "entertainment" after some consideration.

With this new plan, the first competition in the cosmos featuring the Taikiyan Roboball would have its glorious debut on planet Taikiyan. Several planet terraforming machines descended to the surface and yanked out the decommissioned spaceships in their entirety, not leaving a single inch of their former shadows behind. The obscure little planet had been transformed by the sport of Roboball, becoming a dazzling athletic hub in the blink of an eye. "No one will care about its ludicrous beginnings by that time. There will only be pure sportsmanship and high-value commercial agreements."

The competition had athletes wearing propulsion equipment and armor, ever-changing three-dimensional race tracks, and physical clashes that sent sparks flying... The attention of the entire cosmos was thoroughly captured the moment the Roboball Competition was announced. From that moment forth, the planet once shrouded in darkness has never again seen a moment of night.

Both the home and visitor teams are evenly matched in the massive stadium, and the vociferous audience fills up the dome in countless multitudes. They roar the names of the team and the players, giving birth to a thunderous cacophony that does not end. Outside the dome, the planet is also bustling with activity as broadcast licenses, exclusive sponsorship, and advertising contracts are fought over in the trading market, while underground betting is rife as excitement and disappointment share the spotlight in equal measure... The inky shade of the night has long been transformed into a silent radium backdrop to the overflowing lights of the stadium.

The Taikiyan Stadium has been bright as day from the moment of its inauguration, and no one even remembers where the begone shadows are now hidden.

C: ……「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯！我不知道阮•梅为什么对祂这么感兴趣，也许是因为祂搞出的寰宇蝗灾动静太大。可这家伙又胆小，又愚钝，身为星神什么见识都没有：祂的头脑里除了繁殖外空空荡荡，就连祂的子嗣亦是如此。在塔伊兹育罗斯尚未陨落的年代，也曾有人试图培育虫群，让它们产生「繁育」以外的思维，但看起来失败得很彻底：那些虫子连给自己穿只鞋都做不到。但必须承认，祂在「繁育」这条路上走到了极致，光是发个抖就能让全宇宙的虫子开始疯狂的，没有尽头的自我复制——至于吗？祂陨落至今，宇宙中仍有数之不尽的虫群四处为害，它们实在令人生厌……
E: ...Tayzzyronth the Propagation! I don't know why Ruan Mei is so interested in THEM. Perhaps because THEY made such a ruckus with the Swarm Disaster THEY created. However, that creature is timid, slow-witted, and has no insight as an Aeon — THEIR mind is void of anything except reproduction, and even THEIR descendants are the same. In the days before the fall of Tayzzyronth, some had also attempted to breed the Swarm and make it think beyond mere propagation, but it seemed to have been a complete failure. They couldn't even put a shoe on themselves. Though, you have to hand it to Tayzzyronth. THEY went so far down the road of Propagation that just a little shiver could make the Swarm throughout the entire universe start a frantic, endless self-replication — seriously, why the overreaction? Since THEIR fall, there are still an endless number of the Swarm rampaging throughout the universe, and they are really annoying...

C: 关联条目 - 「毁灭」
E: Related Entry — The Destruction

C: ……迷思，毫无疑问，星神中最神秘的存在！这家伙和模拟阿哈一样，对模拟宇宙的破坏力极大。在少数被证实的记录中，祂的形象犹如身形碎裂的*水母*：就像是被肆意破坏的…人类大脑中掌管「认知」的区域。迷思的出现总是伴随着思想之雾和感官之雨，具象之物像颜料般在祂的阴影中融化，历史、知识、语言也被暴雨淋湿、冲刷、扭曲——为了对抗「智识」的确定性，祂不计一切代价——这真的值得吗？抹掉过去，篡改现在，为了一个…不确定的未来？我想，也许只有从「记忆」——「神秘」的诞生之地——入手才能得到更多祂的踪迹。又或者，我可以试试「终末」……
E: ...Mythus, undoubtedly the most mysterious among all the Aeons! This one is as destructive to the Simulated Universe as the simulated Aha. In the rare handful of authenticated accounts, Mythus' form is described as a broken and torn "jellyfish," akin to a deliberately destroyed version of... the "cognitive" center of the human brain. THEIR appearance is always accompanied by a fog of thoughts and rain of sensation. Symbolic objects dissolve like paint within THEIR shadow. History, knowledge, and language are soaked, drenched, and distorted in the deluge — Mythus wants to challenge the certainty of the Erudition regardless of the consequences — Is it truly worth it? To erase the past and distort the present all for the pursuit of an... uncertain future? Perhaps I can only hope to uncover more information about Mythus by digging into Remembrance, the birthplace of Enigmata. Alternatively, I can try Finality...

C: 战争是文明的痼疾，它消抹生命、摧毁历史，令世界归于虚无。混沌医师把异问魔的涎水与水魈的毛发混合，再献上自己的一滴鲜血，由此制成的药剂会干扰军官们的判断，令双方都避开所有的正确战略，从根源上断绝交火的可能。战争会因此结束吗？混沌医师们相信，只要坚持服药，总有治愈的一天。
E: Warfare is the plague of civilization. It erases lives, destroys history, and makes the world return to naught. The Doctors of Chaos mix the saliva of Inquisition Spirits with hair from Xenohydros, then offer a drop of their own blood. The potions made in this manner would interfere with the combat officers' decision-making, causing both sides to avoid all effective tactics, removing the possibility of armed conflict from its root. Will wars end because of this? The Doctors of Chaos believe that the plague will eventually be cured as long as people keep taking their medicine.

C: 觐见之骰•繁育
E: Audience Die: Propagation

C: 你看到，一举一动毫无差错地被预测，你理解，所作所为不过固定的轨迹。虚无的轮廓将你包裹，挣扎也好，接受也罢，终究都湮灭在写好的故事书上。\n\n你接受吗？只要忘却就好，在没心没肺的喜乐中度过一生。不！你要反抗！你要怒吼！你要向这悲哀的宇宙举起叛旗，将世人从写好的终结中拯救。杀戮，毁灭，你把炮口对准最爱的人们，没有犹豫，没有痛苦，仅是闭上一瞬间的眼睛，便能让他们逃离这生不如死的世界。但你仍要忍受活着的折磨，因为，还有更多人在等待毁灭的救赎。
E: You see that your every move is being predicted with flawless precision. You understand that everything you do is no more than a fixed trajectory. The silhouette of Nihility envelops you. You may struggle or accept it, but they will all eventually annihilate in a pre-written storybook.\n\nWill you accept this? All you have to do is forget, and spend the rest of your life in uncaring bliss. No! You must fight back! You must raise a battle cry! You must raise the flag of rebellion against this tragic universe and save the people from the prewritten conclusion. Massacre. Destruction. You point the mouth of the cannon at the ones you love the most. No hesitation. No suffering. Just close your eyes for a second and you can help them escape this world where life is worse than death. However, you must still bear the torture of staying alive, as there are many more that wait for Destruction's salvation.

C: 道高一尺，魔高一丈，星幕下，奸邪无处不在，正义却分身乏术。一副血肉之躯，怎么抵抗星际海盗的舰群？一架金属骨骼，如何战胜朽烂的跨星系帝国？若要涤清寰宇，就当超越身为个体的阻隔。\n\n培养舱里复制出无限的你，披上装甲，刻录进记忆，你以个人的名义向无限的星域进军。你会出现在银心的犯罪现场，在中弹后呼唤来更多的支援。你会走进遭难的边缘世界，凭借数量杀死巨兽，像一群咬死大象的蚂蚁。你会无限次死去，你已无限次死去，但永远会有新的浪人离开巢穴，将猎杀再度延续。
E: It takes constant vigilance to stave off evil. Beneath the canopy of stars, treachery and evil lurk in every corner, while justice is limited in reach. How can a body of flesh and blood withstand the onslaught of interstellar pirates? How can a metal skeleton overthrow a crumbling interstellar empire? If we seek to cleanse the universe, we must rise beyond the confines of individuality.\n\nThe incubator replicated infinitely "you," clad in armor, etching in memories. You march toward the infinite stars in your name. You'll arrive at the scene of Silverheart's crime, calling for reinforcements after bullets tear through you. You'll step into ravaged edge worlds, slaying huge monsters by sheer force of numbers, like a swarm of ants killing an elephant. You will die countless times. You have already died countless time. But new wanderers will always rise from the nest, and continue the hunt.

C:
让我来讲述一则骇人的梦魇吧，迷失在冥界的生灵。
当死亡漫上原野，冥河淹没人间，
本当分隔两界的河水，却传来渡客们的呼唤，
迎面走来的亡者向你微笑，宛如刺入骨髓的冰冷。
永夜遮蔽天空，故去的人们走进一座城邦的梦乡，
跟我们来吧，去往西风尽头，
和我们去吧，登上它的木船，
而后，河水悄无声息地没过又一片土地。
死者会诱惑生者共赴死亡吗？亦或是濒死前的美梦一场。
就此离开这里吧，迷途的诗人，
不要相信那些声音，更不要回头张望。
E:
Let me tell you a terrifying nightmare, souls that wander lost in nether realm.
As death floods the plains and the River of Souls drowns the mortal realm,
The water that should divide life and death now echoes with the calls of ferrymen.
The deceased who walk toward you smiles like a chill that cuts into your bones.
As the eternal night shrouds the sky, the deceased spirits walk into the dream of a city-state.
Come with us, to the end of the west wind.
Come with us, board their wooden ships.
And soon, the river silently swallows another piece of land.
Can the dead tempt the living into their realm? Or is this merely a sweet dream on the verge of death?
Leave this place now, lost poet.
Do not believe in those whispers, and never look back.

C:
你是来看表演的吗？可惜，戏偶师已经走远了。
男人的一只手用木头和钢铁组就，残存的上臂，
仍能看到累累伤痕。
他那神赐的罐子将泥水化作清泉，
还有只悬浮在半空的木鸟，供他来往飞行。
最厉害的，当属与他同行的人偶，
它们一个披着长袍，一个手握宝剑，
自称是宫廷里的魔法师和骑士。
他修好了坏掉的水车和乐器，治好了老人的病疾，
却没收下一枚硬币。
他坐在台下，和我们一起，可目光从不看向木偶，
仅是落在捧腹大笑的孩童身上，直到乘着木鸟离去。
E:
Do you come to watch the performance? What a shame, the puppeteer has already gone far.
The man had one arm assembled from wood and steel, with the upper arm
Still bearing scars upon scars.
He carried a divine jar that turned muddy water into clear springs
And a wooden bird that hovered in midair, allowing him to travel by flight.
Most impressive of all were the puppets that accompanied him,
One clad in a long robe, the other wielding a sword,
Claiming to be a court magician and a knight.
He repaired broken waterwheels and musical instruments, healed the ailments of the elderly,
Yet never accept a single coin.
He sat among the audience with us, though his gaze never fell on the puppets,
Only on the children laughing uproariously, until he departed on his wooden bird.

C: 天才俱乐部#56以利亚萨拉斯曾经有个美好的愿望：俱乐部里的天才们能够欢聚一堂，其乐融融地交流生活、爱情与梦想。为此，他发明了「俱乐部券」，并设计了一整套系统，保证即使在他死后，每位入会的新人都能得到这张能够即时传送到某个宴会位面的入场券。事实是，#56以后的每位会员都确实使用过「俱乐部券」，可时间从来没有重合过哪怕一次。
E: Genius Society #56, Elias Salas, once had a beautiful dream. He wished the geniuses of the Society could come together and happily converse about their lives, loves, and dreams. For that purpose, he invented "Society Tickets" and designed an entire system that ensured every new Society member would receive this ticket even after his death. This ticket would instantly teleport the user to a specific dimension decked with festivities. The truth is that every new member after #56 had indeed used their Society Ticket, but not a single one of them had used it at the same time as someone else.
