C: 她站在椅子上，擦着街机屏幕，打着圈，一遍又一遍，像是要擦掉每一粒灰尘。  她回到了那家快餐店，那间地下室。她打开门，一切一如既往，女主人为她保留了所有的布置。  粉色的灯光洒落在屏幕上，像是城市里的霓虹，让她想起那一夜看见的星空。  她不是第一个登上那座大厦顶端的人，也不是第一个眺望那片星空的人。  她知道「零号」的故事，网络战争年代最伟大的骇客、最可怕的玩家，他引起了第一次全球网络瘫痪，只为将星际和平公司的押送船叫来自家门口。  她又想起「先哲」，以太编辑技术的创造者，以死者为自己命名的怪人。为了离开星球，他甘愿抛弃肉身，攻入黑域，成为一个在星际互联网络中永远徘徊的幽灵。  她想起「石剑」，废品山的骄傲，他反抗绿洲区的故事在大荒野家喻户晓，有人说他最后追随巡海游侠而去，在银河中继续挥洒叛逆的火花。  还有他的挚爱「孪蛇」，绿洲区的红人。她的去向众说纷纭，人们只知出身没能阻止她和石剑走到一起，银河却让他们最终分道扬镳。  在朋克洛德，所有被称作「传奇」的骇客都走向了同一个终点。  而身为如今的传奇，她知道自己也已来到那扇门前。  哒、哒…她听见头顶传来脚步声，逐渐靠近、靠近……  一个人、两个人、三个人、四个人。  一个男人、一个女人、一个铁皮人，还有……  她坐下来，转过身，看向空空荡荡的地下室，看向门边的那个人——  「我加入。」  名为「朋克洛德」的游戏，在这一天结束了。
E: She stood on a chair and dusted the screen of the arcade machine in circular motions again and again, trying to wipe away each particle of dust on it. She returned to that fast food restaurant, to that basement. She opened the door, and everything was where they used to be. The proprietress kept all the arrangements for her. The soft pink light spilled on the screen like the neon lights in the city, reminding her of the starry skies she saw on that day. She was not the first to reach the top of that building, and not the first to have gazed upon those starry expanses. She knew the story of Zero, the greatest hacker and the most terrifying player in the era of Internet Wars. He caused the first global network paralysis just to summon the IPC's escort ship to his doorstep. She thought of Sage, the creator of the aether editing technology, a weirdo who named himself after the dead. To leave the planet, he was willing to discard his physical flesh, raid into the Dark Zone, and become a wraith eternally wandering the Interastral Network. She recalled Stoneblade, the pride of Mount Scrap. His tales of resisting the Oasis Zone were oft-told among families in the barren land. Some said he eventually left with the Galaxy Rangers, continuing his rebellious spark in the cosmos. His lover, Twinsnake, a celebrity in the Oasis Zone. Her whereabouts were widely disputed, and all people knew was that their birth could not stop them from being together, but the cosmos eventually parted them. On Punklorde, any hacker who can be called "legendary" has ended up with the same fate. As the legend of the current era, she knew that she has already arrived at that threshold. Clop, clop... She heard footfalls coming from above her, getting closer, closer... One, two, three, four people. A man, a woman, a metal humanoid, and... She sat down, turned around, and looked around the empty basement one last time, before turning to the person at the door... "I'll join." The game called Punklorde ended that day.

C:
致亲爱的爸爸妈妈：

近来可好？

请原谅我许久未能回信。下层区最近乱象频出，孤儿院内的伤员人满为患，我几乎抽不出空做任何疗伤救人之外的事。我不得不将年纪较小些的孩子送到镇上的寄养家庭，因为我不想让他们目睹孤儿院内的惨象。

关于你们之前的提问——我的确听到了风声，据说大守护者即将发布上下层区的封锁令。我理解二位心中的担忧，但从我的角度出发，我绝对不能在这个时刻抛弃下层区的民众。在这个人心惶惶的特殊时期，我只希望能用自己绵薄的力量给人们带去慰藉。

万幸，我知道你们一定会尊重我的选择。还记得我刚从学院毕业时，爸爸曾说过：「如果一个人走上从医的道路，目的只是为了获得一份体面的工作——那他迟早会后悔自己的选择。」我想我现在比过去任何时候都更能理解这句话的含义。

下次见面不知要等到何年何月，希望你们能一直保持健康、安乐。女儿已经长大了，可以照顾好自己的生活，你们不必操心挂念。

<align="right">爱你们的女儿，</align>
<align="right">娜塔莎</align>
E:
Dearest mother and father,

How have you been?

Please forgive me for replying so late. There's been lots of trouble in the Underworld, and the orphanage is overcrowded with the injured, so I haven't had time to do anything apart from treating the wounded. I even had to send some of the younger children to foster families in town, because I didn't want them to see the carnage inside the orphanage.

As for your previous question — yes, I've heard rumors about the Supreme Guardian about to order a blockade between the Over- and Underworlds. I understand your concerns, but from my point of view, there is no way I can abandon the people down here right now. During this extraordinary state of panic, I can only hope to use my modest skills to bring a modicum of comfort to the needy.

Fortunately, I know you'll respect my decision. I still remember when I was fresh out of college and Dad told me, "Anyone going into medicine to just get a decent job will come to regret their decision sooner or later." I think I understand more than ever what you meant back then.

I don't know when we'll ever be able to see each other again, but I hope you can be healthy and happy. Your daughter is a big girl now, and can take care of herself, so you don't have to worry about me.

<align="right">Your daughter, with love, </align>
<align="right">Natasha</align>

C: 因机缘巧合留在仙舟的化外民，如今是热情烂漫的街头艺人。\n本名「格妮薇儿」，「桂乃芬」是好友素裳为她起的仙舟名。\n面对「罗浮」的全新人生，凭着对仙舟文化的热爱，桂乃芬很快学到了安身立命的一技之长——倒立吃面条、胸口碎大石、徒手接子弹等等。
E: An outworlder who ended up residing on the Xianzhou by accident. She is now a passionate and vivacious street performer.\nWith her real name being Guinevere, Guinaifen is the Xianzhou name given to her by her good friend Sushang.\nFaced with a whole new life on the Luofu and relying on her adoration of Xianzhou culture, Guinaifen quickly learned skills that would keep her clothed and fed — such as slurping noodles in a handstand, smashing slabs without harming the people it was placed upon, catching bullets with bare hands, and so on.

C: 在白衣的判官耳旁，狐人嘶哑的笑声听来直如狼嗥。 男人带走了组织中最宝贵的丹药数十丸。而今看来，是他应敌经验不足，只服食一丸便已能将眼前判官轻巧捏碎。 「说到底，机巧终有上限…不如我们长生种的身体，潜力深不可测。」 狐人笑着想要抽回手，但却被牢牢拖住。数圈锁链彼此紧扣，犹如蛛丝纠缠着他的手臂。 披面的黑发间，判官的眸子闪闪发亮，那神情让狐人联想起了嗅到血味的猎食动物。「『五藏神』，吾的机巧器官被打坏了。负责同情的部分，弱了一些。」 「…不知所谓！」狐人撮指成爪猛力击凿，却被一枚三棱尖刺穿透掌心，他失声嚎叫。 「原本打算让汝全须全尾地入幽狱受审，少去皮肉之苦。但你打碎了吾的同情心。」 「少装模做样了！你忘了自己的锁链和我连在一起吗？」掉入陷阱的伤兽猛烈挣扎起来。狐人拖过锁链，将白衣判官拥入怀中，每一寸巨硕的肌肉都在回应他的愤怒，绞索般收缩，令人牙酸的错位声在空气中嘣嘣作响。 「诚如汝之所说，血肉的潜力深不可测…但败也只败在一处，会痛。」 白衣判官的声音嗡嗡作响，伴随男人撕心裂肺的呼号响彻夜空。 她撑起破碎的右臂，折断的手铁骨戟出，如锋利矛尖，锥入狐人已呈狼形的下颚。走火入魔的逃犯左冲右突，却无法甩开紧紧纠缠的判官，在剧痛中翻滚半晌，终至失去意识，瘫软如泥。 「无血无泪？」血衣判官自犯人巨硕的躯体上缓缓站起。「是汝等丰饶孽物…打碎了吾的同情心啊。」 她勉力将颅骨、脊椎和髌骨推回正确的位置，然后把怎么也接不上的断手系在腰间。 这一回，小妹和藿藿会如何唠叨呢？内心深处的某种习惯想让她叹一口气，可身体已没了这个功能。
E: The raspy laughter of the foxian next to the judge's ears sounds like the howling of a wolf. The man took away dozens of the most valuable pellets in the organization. Now, it appears that he is simply lacking in combat experience. Ingesting just one pellet is already enough to easily crush the judge before him. "At the end, ingenia have their limits... They are nothing compared to the immeasurable potential of the bodies of us long-life species." The foxian chuckles and tries to retrieve his arm, only to find several chains entangling it. The chains are interlocked and intertwined over his skin like spider silk. The judge's eyes are glowing through the gaps in her long black hair, which cascades down her face. Her expression reminds the foxian of a predator that had smelled blood. "My ingenium organ, 'Deities of the Five Organ Senses,' has been damaged. The part responsible for my sympathy has been reduced." "...That's ridiculous!" As the foxian curls his fingers into the shape of a claw and powerfully slams it down, a three-pronged spike pierces through his palm. He shrieks in pain. "I originally wanted to let you undergo interrogation in the Shackling Prison with your body intact, but you have shattered my sympathy." "Just drop your act! Have you forgotten that I'm tied to you through your chain?" The wounded beast caught in the trap starts struggling. The foxian pulls the chain and drags the white-robed judge into his arms. Every inch of his massive muscles contracts like coiled ropes in response to his anger. The unsettling sound of bones sliding out of their sockets and becoming misaligned pops loudly in the air. "Just like how you put it, body of flesh and blood holds unfathomable potential... But it has a crucial setback. It feels pain." The white-robed judge's voice hums as the man's agonizing screams resonate in the night sky. She props her shattered right arm up. Her broken iron bone protrudes out like the sharp tip of a spear, stabbing into the foxian's jaw that already appears like a wolf's. The twisted fugitive scrambles in all directions but fails to break free from the judge's relentless pursuit. He rolls around on the ground in excruciating pain, finally losing consciousness and going limp like a puddle of goo. "You say I am a tool that sheds no blood and cries no tears?" The judge, now dressed in a bloodstained robe, slowly rises from the massive body of the criminal. "It's Abominations of Abundance like you... that have shattered my sympathy." She tries her best to push her skull, spine, and patella back to the correct positions, then fastens to her waist the severed arm that cannot be re-attached no matter what. What will her sister and Huohuo say about this time? A habit slumbering deep in her mind makes her want to heave a sigh, but her body no longer has that function.

C: 棺材的另一侧，一名白衣判官盯着她，目不稍瞬。那张熟悉的脸因为不再有笑容而显得分外陌生。判官伸手，递来的掌中托着一盏金爵。 爵中盛着一汪碧如翡翠的酒液，在因果殿幽暗的殿宇中如同一只碧眼，怔怔瞧着她。 「又到了饮酒的时间了？我差点忘了。」她从棺中起身。「怎么不是夜魄来为我送酒，而是你亲自前来，姐姐？」 「夜魄…看来汝不记得了，是不是？」姐姐半闭眼帘，这是她表达自己担心时的表情——可惜塑成她身躯的机巧仍不够精致，让这幅表情显得犹如瞌睡。「她追击药王秘传的妖人，不幸伤势沉重，十王已恩准她入灭了。」 她急忙转开话题，「你今天对付的目标棘手么？」 「棘手。一照面就被废了一只手，髌骨也被劈碎了。那厮很熟悉机巧的构造，证实了他就是当年朱明仙舟上的那位能工巧匠。他的招式吾已录下了，反复观摩，总能破解的。」 她看着姐姐谈论起自己险死还生的过程，仿佛在说一件无关器物的损坏。「又要麻烦藿藿修理你了。」 「藿藿…已升任判官了，约莫是一旬前的事。如今负责整备机巧的是守灵。」 姐姐将金爵摆在棺材边沿她伸手够不到的地方，动作流畅精准，爵中酒液毫无波澜。 「忘川之酒，一饮成空。小妹，不必做到这一步的。吾的罪过，应当由吾亲手补赎。」像梦中一样，姐姐将手放在她的脑袋上，轻轻摩挲，但她感受不到一丝暖意。 「只是饮下忘川酒的小小副作用罢了。如果我当真记不得你了，那时候你我都可以安然入灭。蒙十王盛恩，这桩约定已被记录在了因果殿深处。」 「那是我们放下一切，永远入睡的时候。」她向前坐了一点，握住没有温度的手贴在自己脸颊一侧。 她从棺沿上取过酒爵，艰难地将浓稠的液体一点点喝下。虽名为酒，从中却尝不出半点辛辣刺激的味道，倒像是注入金人躯体的油液。 「在此之前，就让我为你、为十王、还有那位将军再多做一些吧。」
E: On the opposite side of the coffin, a white-robed judge stared at her with an unwavering gaze. In the absence of smiles, that once familiar face now looked particularly alien. The judge extended their hand, and a golden jug sat in their palm. Enclosed within the jug is a liquor as green as jade, an emerald eye that glares unblinkingly at her within the dark vaults of the Hall of Karma. "Is it time to drink again? I almost forgot." She rose from the coffin. "Why are you bringing me the wine instead of Yepo, sister?" "Yepo... You don't remember, do you?" Her sister's eyelids close halfway. That is how her sister expresses concern — However, the ingenium forming her sister's body lacks the finesse to convey this expression, rendering it instead akin to a gesture of drowsiness."Yepo pursued the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and suffered fatal injuries. The Ten Lords have granted her permission for demise." She hurriedly changed the subject."How was the target you pursued today? Were they difficult to deal with?" "Very difficult. He broke one of my hands and shattered my patella as soon as we met. The scoundrel seems to have knowledge over the composition of ingenia, indicating that he is indeed the skilled craftsman from the Zhuming all those years ago. I have recorded his moves. Through studies and contemplation, I will one day find a way to counter him." She watched her sister recount that narrow escape from death with apparent indifference, as if discussing the breaking of an inanimate object. "We will have to bother Huohuo again to repair you." "Well, Huohuo... She was promoted to judge about a dozen days ago. Currently, Shouling is in charge of maintaining the ingenia." With a smooth and precise motion, her sister placed the golden jug on the edge of the coffin beyond her reach. The wine within the jug sat still, without a ripple. "Drink this Wine of Oblivion, and you'll forget everything. You don't have to go this far, my dear sister. I should atone for my faults through my own efforts alone." Just like how it is in her dream, her sister's hands were placed on her head in a gentle caress, but she cannot feel even the faintest trace of warmth. "It's only a minor side effect of drinking the Wine of Oblivion. If I end up forgetting everything about you, then both of us can finally embrace our demise without any burdens. By the benevolence of the Ten Lords, this promise has been recorded in the depths of the Hall of Karma." "And at that moment, we shall relinquish all and enter eternal slumber." She leans forward slightly, pressing her sister's cold hand against her cheek. She takes the wine jug from the edge of the coffin and, with effort, consumes the viscous liquid sip by sip. Though called "wine," it lacks all pungent and invigorating flavor. Instead, it tastes like oil drained into the body of an aurumaton. "But before that fateful moment, please allow me to carry out a few more tasks for you, for the Ten Lords, and for that general."

C: 「…并非人选择刀，而是刀选中了人。正如人无法选择命运，而是命运选择人…那一日，看着『刀』经由我手锻成，再被交予少女手中，我意识到，在对抗『八百万神』的道路上，她选择了——或是被选中——踏上那条看似迈向明日的道路。我多么希望这是一个美好的时代，即便出云国依旧面临威胁，人们也依旧怀抱希望，相信恶神会被尽数斩落，天下将重获自由…可直到刀光消陨，我才明白，这是一条没有终点的死路，而踏上它的人们，再无回头的可能……」\n\n——古老的残卷
E: "...Warriors don't choose their blades, but rather their blades choose them. Just as people don't choose their fate, but rather their fate chooses them... On that day, as I witnessed the blade I had crafted being passed on to that girl, I realized that in the fight against Yaoyorozu no Kami, she had chosen — or been chosen — to embrace the path that seemingly led her toward a new tomorrow. How I wish that there would be a bright future, that despite the peril looming over Izumo, its people would hold onto hope, believing that the evil Kami shall one day be vanquished, and the world shall be liberated... However, it was only when the blade's light waned that I came to a realization: This is an impasse with no escape, and those who venture upon it have no recourse to turn back..."\n\n— An Ancient Scattered Manuscript

C: 「我用了『醒觉-310』制剂，它能让人沉入极深的睡眠，重历过去的回忆。一些患者能以此重拾对生活的信心，但她不同。在她以前，从未有人能主动从沉睡中醒来。我观察了她的梦…那实在难以被称作幸福的记忆：阴沉的天空、破败的城市、废土残垣，还有连绵不绝的细雨。 那雨仿佛永远不会停下，在高涨的潮水中，人们在溺亡中微笑。而在沉沦的黑夜，我总能听见遥远的雷声在迫近，直到某一刻，雷光乍现，将黑夜撕裂。在破碎的天空下，我又看见了她——在褪色成无的世界里，她轻轻挥出一刀，将整片梦境带走。 我必须承认，在这条路上她走得远比我们更深。那无可捉摸的『虚无』引领她走向自灭，她却在无形中将其执握于手。也许在旅途之初，她就已准备好面对真正的敌人…我曾向她提问，这一切有何意义？但她并未作答。是她不知晓如何回应，还是她心中早已有了答案？」 ——某位混沌医师的手记
E: "I used the 'Revitalization-310' tincture, which induces a profound slumber, enabling individuals to relive their past memories. While some patients found solace and rediscovered hope, she proved an exception. No one has ever awakened from their dream state, yet she defied the odds. I closely observed her dreams... and they can hardly be called happy moments: Gloomy skies, crumbling cities, ruined lands, and incessant rains. The rain never stopped. Amidst the swelling tide, individuals wore smiles even as they were drowned, and within the engulfing darkness, I heard the distant rumble of thunder, until, at a particular moment, lightning shattered the veil of night. Below the fractured sky, I saw her once more: Within a world fading into oblivion, she elegantly swung her blade, eradicating the entire realm of dreams. I must admit that she has ventured far beyond our progress on this path. The elusive Nihility beckons her toward self-annihilation, yet she subtly holds its reins. Perhaps she was prepared to confront the true enemy from the very beginning of her journey... Once, I asked her about the purpose behind it all, but she remained silent. Was she at a loss for words? Or did she already have an answer in mind?" — A Note from a Doctor of Chaos

C: 银河边境，寂寥无生命的星系中，一座神秘的高塔在漩涡中若隐若现。 「这么大的地方，我可不想被累死。」 她看了看空空荡荡的屋子，示意人偶向前。 咯咯哒，咯哒咯，哒咯咯，她们扭动身体，雀跃而来—— 「黑塔女士举世无双！」 「黑塔女士聪明绝顶！」 「黑塔女士沉鱼落雁！」 「好了好了，忙你们的去吧。」她不耐烦地挥挥手。 三个擦地，两个浇花，还有一个…… 「泡咖啡吧。天冷了，喝热的。」 棕色的豆子碾碎，沸水冲过，黑色液体咕嘟咕嘟冒泡。 「黑塔女士。您有一条来自博识学会的消息。他们质疑您……」 「又在抱怨我的『显然可证』了么，替我从自动回复列表中挑几句回复吧。」 「黑塔女士。您有一条来自星际和平公司的消息。他们邀约您……」 「跟他们说，我对那些发明不感兴趣。」 「黑塔女士，您有一条来自第一真理大学的消息。他们聘请您担任荣誉教授……」 「那是什么学校？」 …… 渐渐地，人偶替她处理所有世间琐事，她也从人们的视线中淡出。 在那高塔顶端，她不再关心外界，只用演算心中尚存的疑问。 「我想知道，█████████████？」 第一面镜由此诞生。 「我想知道，█████████████？」 第二面镜熠熠落成。 「我想知道，█████████████？」 第三面镜清脆有声。 「我想知道，█████████████？」 第四面镜毕恭毕敬。 无人知晓那名烁古今的天才如今在何处，又为何从不现身。唯有她提出的理论与猜想，仍不断引起经久不息的讨论。 漫长的时光过去，当她演算完毕时，看起来似乎并不满意。 「现在没有问题可解了——这才是最大的问题啊。」 「您是说……」镜子心领神会。 「不如，来创造更多的问题吧！」
E: On the edge of the galaxy, within a desolate, lifeless star system, a mysterious tower flickers in and out of view amid a swirling vortex. "I refuse to wear myself out in this sprawling mansion." She surveyed the vast, empty room, signaling the puppets to approach. With a series of cheerful clicks and whirls, they danced toward her — "Madam Herta is a peerless gem!" "Madam Herta is an unrivalled genius!" "Madam Herta is an inimitable beauty!" "Enough already, back to your tasks." She dismissed them with a wave of her hand. Three to scrub the floors, two to tend the gardens, and one... "Brew some coffee. It's chilly today, and I need something warm." The brown beans crunched under the grinder, hot water washed over them, and the dark liquid joyfully bubbled. "Madam Herta, you've received an inquiry from the Intelligentsia Guild. They're challenging your..." "Are they still fussing over my 'evident proof'? Just send them a few canned replies from the list." "Madam Herta, Interastral Peace Corporation has sent an invitation..." "Tell them their gadgets don't interest me." "Madam Herta, the University of Veritas Prime wishes to name you an honorary professor..." "Which institution is that again?" ... Gradually, the puppets handled all mundane affairs, allowing her to vanish from the public eye. Secluded at her tower's apex, she dismissed the external world to unravel the puzzles lingering in her thoughts. "I wish to know, ████ ███ ██ █████ ██████?" Thus, the First Mirror came into being. "I wish to know, ████ ██ ███ ███████ ██ ████?" Thus, the Second Mirror gleamed into existence. "I wish to know, ███ ███ █ ███ ████ ███████?" Thus, the Third Mirror chimed succinctly. "I wish to know, ███ ██ █ ███ ██████?" Thus, the Fourth Mirror was formed with reverence. Her whereabouts remained a mystery, as did her reasons for shunning the limelight. Yet, her provocative theories and speculations continued to stir endless discussions. A long time passes. After she has completed her extrapolations, she seems unsatisfied. "There are no more problems left to solve — this, in itself, is the greatest problem." "Are you saying..."The mirror understands perfectly. "Why don't we create more problems?"

C: 布洛妮娅及杰帕德受到的伤害降低。弱点击破后，行动额外延后，受到的伤害额外提高。
E: Bronya and Gepard take less DMG. After Weakness is broken, additionally delays action and additionally increases DMG taken.

C: 科普价值
E: Educational Value

C:
你心中盘算着三月七刚刚那句话：「反物质军团在空间站疯狗似地流窜……」看来，接下来的路况不容乐观。
你看了看身边的三月七，她自信地朝你点点头。
你又看了看手中的这根棒球棍，它同样散发着自信的光彩。
你也可以这么自信，试试看吧！
E:
You keep thinking about what March 7th said: "The Legion are rampaging through the space station like a pack of wolves..." It seems like the road ahead is going to be a hard one.
You look at March 7th beside you and she nods at you with confidence.
You then look at the baseball bat in your hand, which is glowing as if also full of confidence.
You can do it too, give it a try!

C: 为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。\n不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
E: You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.\nDespite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.

C: 三月七试图说服你，但结果呢？你突然不是那么在乎了，因为你在此时此刻遭到了小朋友的挑衅。\n这你可忍不了！——是时候让小朋友感受成年人世界的严酷了。\n用你无比精湛的躲猫猫技术，狠狠教训这群小鬼！
E: March 7th attempts to convince you but you no longer care for it as much anymore, because the kids have started taunting you.\nYou will not stand for this! It's time to show these children the cruelty of the grown-ups' world.\nUse your unrivaled and precise hiding skills to teach these kids a lesson!

C:
在亲眼见证朗道家姐弟二人在疆场上并肩作战的模样后，你才真正认识到坚韧与英勇究竟是为何物。
你们方才成功穿过杀声如雷的战场，却又立刻遁入沉默的裂界迷宫中——周遭的死寂使你不禁感到毛骨悚然。
三月七在此处表现出前所未有的灵敏：她注意到某些奇异的物件似乎不属于这异界，被遗弃在了路边。
尽管丹恒提示各位裂界中满是陷阱，但你的冒险天性告诉你：这里确实有前往查看的必要。
E:
After witnessing the Landau siblings fighting side by side, you truly understand what perseverance and bravery really mean.
You just made your way through a fierce battlefield and now you find yourself inside a Fragmentum maze deafened by silence — the deathly quiet of this place sends a chill down your spine.
Here, March 7th is showing excellent dexterity never before seen: She notices the strange objects discarded on the roadside that don't seem to belong to this dimension.
Although Dan Heng has reminded everyone that the Fragmentum is filled with traps, your nature for adventure tells you that it's necessary to take a closer look.

C: 巨大的机关门扉再次阻断了你们的进路。\n有了在铁卫禁区操作旋转栈桥的经验，你们很快意识到：要想解锁眼前的机关，必须找到与之相连的装置才行。\n这种装置通常不会设在更远的地方…就在附近找找看吧！
E: A giant mechanism gate stops your advance once again.\nArmed with the experience of dealing with the gear bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, you quickly realize that if you want to unlock the mechanism in front of you, you'll have to find the device linked to it.\nThese types of devices aren't usually set up very far... Try looking in the area!

C: 大守护者的回音幻象再次出现在你们面前——与此前不同的是，她的身旁不见了那位高贵守护者之女的身影。\n虽然此处已被裂界蚕食殆尽，其表征的一切都无比反常，但如今竟出现了更加反常的现象…\n这是否是某种不祥的预兆？又或者只不过是裂界万千错误的其中一个？问题的答案就藏在这人形的残影回响之中。
E: The echoing mirage of the Supreme Guardian has appeared in front of you once again — however, this time, the guardian's noble daughter is no longer by her side.\nAlthough this place has been devoured by the Fragmentum to its core and nothing is behaving the way it should, this is something even more peculiar...\nIs this a sign of misfortune? Or could it just be one error out of the tens of thousands taking place in the Fragmentum? The answer to this question lies in the echoing cadence of the humanoid.

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 迴星港深处，驭空正在督造用于「仪式」的星槎。为那些因建木灾异而遭逢不测的普通人，为那些殉身战场的云骑，你们放下旧日的赠礼，让它随星槎远去。
E: Deep in Stargazer Navalia, Yukong is overseeing the manufacture of the starskiff used for the soul-soothing ceremony. The two of you place the gifts of bygone days and let them depart with the starskiff, both for ordinary people who lost their lives during the Ambrosial Arbor's calamity and for the perished Cloud Knights.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 大堂近在眼前…你们究竟会在那里发现什么？
E: The lobby is just ahead... Just what will you discover there?

C: 你已经亲眼见证了砂金口中那「足以颠覆匹诺康尼」的事实——知更鸟小姐的身体自胸口的裂痕崩解，在这座美梦中化作了泡影。\n他似乎还有话要对你说，看看他的真实意图究竟为何吧。
E: You have witnessed the truth that can "result in the collapse of Penacony" as mentioned by Aventurine... Robin's body starts to disintegrate from the crack in her chest and is eventually reduced to nothingness in the dream.\nAventurine seems to have something to say. Let's see what he has got up his sleeves.

C: 你██ █ █ █这里发现了一个奇怪的██ █孩█子——他█ ███ █来自█ 埃维金██ █氏█族……\n可你们█ ██不是已经█灭███ █绝█了么？
E: You █████ ██ ██ █ ███ discovered a str█ng█ ch█ld — H█ s██ms t█ h██l fr█m th█ Avgin █r█g█ns...\nW█r█n't th█y █lr██dy w█p█d out?

C: 砂金似乎已在克劳克影视乐园中央的舞台上等候多时……\n…与这位疯狂的赌徒为全匹诺康尼带来一场震撼人心的完美共演吧。
E: Aventurine seems to have waited for quite some time on the stage in the center of Clock Studios Theme Park...\n...Join this crazed gambler for a perfect collaborative performance that will blow everyone in Penacony away.

C: 另一边，你，一位姗姗来迟的牛仔，为留守列车的丹恒和帕姆捎来了一个不好的消息——深入美梦的列车组如今很可能有危险——因为一位「虚无」的令使正在梦境中游荡。你很快成功说服丹恒一起深入梦境施以援手，可甫一步入酒店大堂便遭遇了严重挫折：由于酒店的严格规定，你们根本无法进入匹诺康尼。\n机敏的丹恒似乎从中察觉出一丝异常，提出先行独自调查。你非常认可他的观点，也为了让他放心，便同意暂时分头行动…而因常年身处险境锻炼出的直觉告诉你，现在闲着也是闲着，收集点情报也不是什么坏事。
E: Meanwhile, you, the cowboy who is a little late to the party, bring unfortunate news to Dan Heng and Pom-Pom who have stayed guard aboard the Express... There is a strong chance that the Crew members who have entered the dream are in danger, because an Emanator of Nihility is roaming the Dreamscape. You quickly succeed in convincing Dan Heng to accompany you into the Dreamscape and provide assistance, but run into a serious setback as you enter the hotel lobby: Due to strict hotel regulations, you are forbidden from entering Penacony.\nThe astute Dan Heng seems to notice something out of the ordinary and suggests that he goes ahead to investigate alone. You wholeheartedly agree with his view and suggest splitting up to reassure him... Now, the instincts you developed over your many years of being exposed to dangerous situations are telling you that as you have time on your hands, perhaps collecting some information couldn't hurt.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 黑天鹅向你揭示了一个令人毛骨悚然的事实：原来在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还。\n不过，事情还有转机。忆者表示，在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处致命的破绽。而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。\n现在，你已经看穿了太一之梦的迷障——但要想让整个阿斯德纳清醒，只有你们还远远不够……
E: Black Swan reveals a bone-chilling truth to you: It turned out the entire Express Crew, as well as everyone in Penacony, lost their lives in their battle against Sunday. There were no survivors.\nHowever, there is still a chance to turn this around. The Memokeeper points out that there is a fatal flaw in the story that you experienced. Behind this fatal flaw lies a glimmer of hope.\nNow, you have seen through the illusion of Ena's Dream... However, if you wish to awaken everyone in Asdana, you will need far more people on your side...

C: 与奥帝•艾弗法的会面令托帕和翡翠都暗吃一惊，她们没有料到对方竟然在筹划匹诺康尼集团的上市流程。\n她们必须在下半场的会谈中直击老奥帝的痛点，以确保公司入驻匹诺康尼的计划万无一失。\n翡翠发现知更鸟也登上了「晖长石号」，并打算上前和这位银河大明星打声招呼。
E: The meeting with Oti Alfalfa surprised Topaz and Jade. They didn't expect him to be preparing for the public listing of Penacony Conglomerate.\nThey have to go straight for Old Oti's sore spots during the second half of negotiations to guarantee the IPC's entry into Penacony goes off without a hitch.\nJade discovers Robin has also boarded the Radiant Feldspar, and plans to go up and greet this cosmic superstar.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 这群猴子小可爱搞的蕉皮玩意儿满地都是，这该死的地方也没有环卫工——所以，你不介意帮这儿的人们打扫卫生。\n扫帚就是你手里的枪。
E: These lil' fudgin' monkeys are tossing banana peels everywhere like it's nobody's business. Since there's no janitor in this dump, you might as well lend a hand in cleaning up.\nWith your pistols as your broom, of course.

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 在这段不存在的记忆中，{NICKNAME}竟得到了记忆星神浮黎的瞥视。也许是欧洛尼斯的馈赠，{F#她}{M#他}的身边出现了一个奇妙的生物。{F#她}{M#他}看上去有些…惆怅？好在{F#她}{M#他}很快就振作起来了。
E: In this nonexistent memory, {NICKNAME} actually received a glance from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance. A marvelous creature appeared next to {F#her}{M#him}, perhaps a gift from Oronyx. {NICKNAME} seems a little... despondent, but thankfully {F#she}{M#he} quickly regained composure.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n凯妮斯就像是条诡诈的毒蛇，想要获得她的信任并不容易。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nCaenis is like a cunning snake. Gaining her trust will not be easy.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。\n这灵魂的残留似乎与炼金术、与塞纳托斯都脱不开干系。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be fallen who lived during Era Chrysea.\nThe remains left by these spirits seem to have a connection with alchemy and Thanatos.

C: 塞涅俄丝的过往似乎与故事所述相差甚远，在她曾经的两名随伴奇兽陪同下，我们即将揭示被掩藏的古老真相。
E: Seliose's past seems to diverge greatly from what was told in bygone stories. Now, accompanied by her two mythical companion beasts from ages past, we stand poised to unveil the ancient and hidden truths.

C: 盗火行者再次出现在我们面前，这意味着…\n去吧，{NICKNAME}，去帮助白厄，完成「再创世」！
E: The Flame Reaver stands before us once more, which can only mean...\nGo now, {NICKNAME}, help Phainon complete the "Era Nova"!

C: 螺丝咕姆先生的现身无疑是一个转机，我们对翁法罗斯的状况有了新的认知。\n应他的请求，{NICKNAME}将留在翁法罗斯临机应变，而我会按照原定计划返回列车，与列车组的其他成员汇合后，商讨下一步的计划。
E: Mr. Screwllum's arrival marks a definite turning point, giving us fresh insights into Amphoreus's condition.\nFollowing his request, {NICKNAME} will stay behind in Amphoreus to adapt to changing circumstances, while I'll return to the Express as planned to regroup with the other Crew members and formulate our next course of action.

C: 当时本来想做从电视里钻出来的特效的，可惜，监狱里的拍摄条件不太允许——但我在重置版里把这个拍出来了！
E: Originally, I wanted special effects that seemed like they crawled right out of the TV screen, but the filming conditions in the prison didn't quite allow for that. What a shame... Don't worry, I got this in the remake!

C: 一路收集伙伴，然后和大魔王对决，是不是很王道的展开？不对，我拍的不是恐怖片吗？
E: Gather companions along the way and face off against the Demon King — isn't that a textbook setting for a heroic journey? Wait... wasn't this supposed to be a horror film?

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
E: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 当前舱段里出现了裂界化的征兆，监测本区域的设备却在混乱中意外被毁。艾丝妲拜托你在此区域收集残存的信标数据。\n收集呜呜伯们存起来的信标数据。
E: The current zone shows signs of the Fragmentum, but the device that monitors this area was accidentally destroyed in the chaos. Asta had asked you to collect the remaining beacon data in the area.\nCollect the beacon data saved by the Wubbaboos.

C: 老旧的机组竟然只能为终端机提供一天一查的算力，这样的结果令你十分恼火。但维修工程师向你保证，今天绝不会再出什么闪失了，你决定再信他一次。
E: The terminal units are so old that they can only provide enough computing power for one check a day. You're annoyed, but the engineer promises that nothing else will go wrong today. You decide to trust him one more time.

C: 辛克尔向你推荐了小阿德勒，据说他是界种科最了解奇物的人
E: Hinkel recommended little Adler to you — He apparently knows the most about Curios out of the entire Department of Ecology.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n交涉失败。可恶。下一步：还有下一步吗？
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nNegotiations failed. Shoot. Next step: Is there a next step?

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n结局圆满。人人都有光明的未来。完美。\n帕姆注：算了…我还是去看姬子的日报帕……
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHappy end. Everyone has a bright future. Perfection.\nPom-Pom's Notes: Never mind... I'm gonna go read Himeko's daily report...

C: 该做正事啦！虎克大人要找的宝贝就在铆钉镇矿区入口附近，希望不要出什么岔子。\n铆钉镇的居民们为了抵御怪物入侵设置了很多路障，小心谨慎地继续前进吧，争取早点儿忙完早点儿回去。
E: It's time to work! The treasure that Hook is looking for is near the mine entrance in Rivet Town.\nTo defend against the monsters, the residents here have set up many barricades. Advance ahead with caution. As soon as you get this over with, you can go back.

C: 完成史考特的委托后，他承诺给你「特殊礼遇」…可这「特殊礼遇」是什么？去找掘掘博士咨询详情吧。
E: After completing Scott's assignment, he says you'll get the "house special"... But what does that mean? Go find Dr. Dig for more details.

C: 行走在「开拓」命途上的人们，总会在旅途中遭遇各类奇人奇事。这些琐碎的故事不仅填满了开拓者们的日志，同时也加深了他们与各个世界之间的联系。
E: Those on the Path of Trailblaze will encounter all kinds of strange people and odd anecdotes during the journey. Not only do these trivial stories fill up trailblazers' journals, but they also deepen their connections to all worlds.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。\n「地火」的斯薇塔小姐似乎掌握了一些线索，和她谈谈，了解情况。
E: There has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.\nMiss Swetta from Wildfire seems to know something. Chat with her about the situation.

C: 隐秘的角落、神秘的黑衣人、被撕下的扉页…证据逐渐浮出水面，拼凑成了一张完整的图景。也许现在，需要的只是最后一块拼图…而净砚小姐刚刚掌握的新线索，是否就是那块关键的拼图呢？
E: An obscure corner, mysterious men in black, a torn-off title page... Pieces of evidence slowly emerged to put together the puzzle. Maybe you only need a final puzzle piece to complete the quest... Is the new piece of information Jingyan had come into the key puzzle piece you need?

C: 「触摸加热器」听起来是一个糟糕透顶的主意，但此处并非现实，现实中的常识也并不通用。\n三月七当然相信符玄不会让自己受伤…但要去摸这样一个滚烫的东西，心中难免还是有些抵触。
E: "Touch the heater" sounds like a terrible idea. However, this isn't reality, and real-life common sense doesn't apply here.\nMarch 7th trusts that Fu Xuan will not hurt her... but she still instinctively doesn't want to touch something as hot as this.

C: 说到贝洛伯格，人们总会想到风雪与酷寒。可真正留在三月七记忆中的，却是歌德旅馆气派的大堂。\n按三月七本人的说法，那是因为第二天她就沦为了通缉犯。但也许…也许在无尽的冬日中冒险时，反而是那一小堆篝火最让人印象深刻——无论那场冒险有多么壮绝。
E: People usually think about blizzards and freezing temperatures when it comes to Belobog, but the most profound memory March 7th have of that place is the impressive lobby of the Goethe Hotel.\nShe claims it is because she became a wanted criminal the day after she checked into the hotel. However... perhaps it is because a bright yet brief campfire is more memorable than even an epic in the dead of winter, no matter how magnificent the journey was.

C: 符玄留下一句警告，就彻底与三月七失去了联系。三月七觉得有些害怕，但这种恐惧又暗地里令她觉得好笑——明明是在自己的记忆当中，怎么会如此阴森且孤独呢？\n她不由得联想起了几日前做的噩梦——梦的内容早在醒来的一瞬间就忘光了，但那种孤立无援的恐惧感，却足足持续了一个小时。
E: Fu Xuan left a word of warning, then completely cut off communications with March 7th. March is a little scared, but this fear also made her feel a little ridiculous — why is everything so ominous and lonely when this is her own memory?\nShe can't help but recall the nightmare she had a few nights ago. She forgot the content of the dream as soon as she woke up, but that helpless and isolated feeling of fear lasted for well over an hour.

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 与进来时一样，一面铜镜中传出古怪的声音。也许是来救援你的十王司判官，也许是岁阳想要玩弄你们这些犹斗困兽。\n乐观一点，就算是怪物，也不能隔着镜子伤害你，对不对？去看看吧。
E: Similar to when you came in, there's a bronze mirror emitting a strange sound. Perhaps it's a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission coming to rescue you; perhaps it's heliobi toying with you like a cornered animal.\nOn the upside, not even monsters can hurt you through a mirror, right? Let's go check it out.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 你听到莱斯利•迪恩的粉丝正在急切地呼救，和她了解一下情况吧。
E: One of Lesley Dean's fans is crying for help. Talk to her to get more information.

C: 你收到了一封奢侈品商店的推广短信，关于详细的优惠内容，去问问店长柯柯娜吧。
E: You have received a promotional message from a luxury store. Ask the shopkeeper Cocona to get more information on the deals.

C: 柯柯娜似乎想好了自己的决定，是时候和父母讨论一下了。
E: Cocona seems to have made a decision. It is time to discuss with her parents.

C: 螺丝咕姆与你一同展开了对查德威克真实经历的调查。\n查德威克的客房内空空如也。四下调查一下，看看你能不能发现什么线索吧。
E: Screwllum joins you in the investigation of Chadwick's past.\nChadwick's room seems empty. Explore the area for any potential clues.

C: 在你、黑塔、螺丝咕姆三人的注视下，一生受尽外界和内心折磨的查德威克博士终于得以走向平静的终结。\n关闭维生装置，送他最后一程。
E: Under the watchful eyes of you, Screwllum, and Herta — Dr. Chadwick, who has endured external and mental struggles throughout his life, finally reaches a peaceful end.\nDeactivate all the life support devices and send him on to his final journey.

C: 见证查德威克生命中最后的时光。\n与查德威克交谈，弄清楚他在生命的最后究竟经历了些什么。
E: Witness the final moments of Chadwick's life.\nTalk with him to discover what he experienced during his final days.

C: 帮助巴罗击退了猎犬家系成员，该问问究竟是怎么回事了。
E: You've helped Barlow defeat the Bloodhound Family members. It's time to find out what is happening.

C: 翻翻看椅子上的报纸，或许能知道些新的信息。
E: Go through the newspapers on the chair. Maybe you can learn something new.

C: 青雀发来消息，她在梦境中似乎遭遇了一些…不测。\n作为她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，你决不能对她的求救坐视不理。通过入梦池入梦，开始营救青雀的行动吧。
E: Qingque has sent you a message, and it seems she has got herself into some... trouble in the Dreamscape.\nAs her trusted {F#sister-in-arms}{M#brother-in-arms}, you can't simply ignore her plea for help. Dive into the Dreamscape using the Dreampool and go to her rescue.

C: 演武仪典虽有曲折，不过最后也算是顺利结束了。\n彦卿希望当面向列车组表达感激之情，就和他见上一面吧。\n再说了，他愿意教小三月学剑，星穹列车也得好好感谢他才行。
E: Though there were some bumps in the road, the Wardance has successfully concluded.\nYanqing wants to personally express his gratitude to the Express Crew. It would be best to go and meet with him.\nSaying that, he has offered to teach March swordplay, so it would only be right for the Astral Express to thank him in return.

C: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——但这真的是她想做的吗？\n是否和你一样，只是被任务目标一样的命运牵着走呢？\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
E: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... But is this truly what she wants to do?\nIs she not the same as you, being blindly led along by fate towards her mission?\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

C: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n在做正事之前，先拜访一下前辈们吧。这个故事也应与他们分享。
E: Third stop, Penacony!\nLet's pay our seniors a visit before getting down to business. This story should be shared with them too.

C: 法政科的创始人古恩有事找你，他想让你来教导一名特殊的学生，授课的内容令你咂舌……
E: Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, comes to you. He wants you to teach a special student, and you're going to teach her some unique lessons...

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n为了交到朋友，他想出了一个策略——策略的第一步是为他拍摄一张照片。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe has a plan to make more friends, and the first step is to have a photo taken.

C: 完成「侵蚀隧洞」获取遗器
E: Complete a Cavern of Corrosion and claim the Relics

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 落枕的帕姆拜托你去空间站的医疗科，询问该如何治疗落枕。
E: Pom-Pom woke up with a stiff neck. They ask you to go to Herta Space Station's Medical Department and inquire about a way to treat a stiff neck.

C: 你清除了残响回廊里残余的所有威胁。\n去和奥列格汇报战果吧。
E: You cleared out all threats remaining in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.\nReport the situation to Oleg.

C: 铁墓之战暂时尘埃落定，银河诸文明终于从毁灭手中夺下自己的未来。作为身处事件核心的一方，星穹列车的工作还没停止，联军各势力先后与领航员姬子进行联络。这其中大多是礼尚往来的客套话，但也不乏暗流涌动的交锋与思量……
E: The Battle of Irontomb has temporarily settled, and the civilizations of the cosmos have finally wrested their future from the hands of the Destruction. As a key player at the heart of these events, the Astral Express's work isn't over yet, with various forces in the alliance reaching out to Navigator Himeko one after another. While most exchanges are merely courteous formalities, undercurrents of strategic maneuvering and careful deliberation flow beneath the surface...

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•甲虫」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Beetle combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了下层区的领导者娜塔莎。代她们前往磐岩镇诊所，了解娜塔莎是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Natasha, leader of the Underworld. Head to the Boulder Town clinic in their stead, and see whether Natasha is interested in the position.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 作为罗浮仙舟商业活动的主理人，驭空大人也来到了这小小金人巷，还说要给你一些建议，还不快说谢谢驭空姐？\n金人巷商户们对商会其实也有不满，但是你不是商会，你会展示另一种可能，也许能赢得商户的青睐。
E: As the overseer of the Xianzhou Luofu's commercial activities, Madam Yukong has also arrived in this humble Aurum Alley to give you some recommendations. Say "thank you" to Madam Yukong, quickly!\nSome of the Aurum Alley merchants are displeased with the merchant guild, but as you are an outside party, you can demonstrate new possibilities that might win their confidence.

C: 霄翰建议你们效仿学徒的方式接近霄老大，这些匠人大都是刀子嘴豆腐心，稍微让他们心软以后，对话也会变得顺利。\n但是这一切都建立在打白工的基础上，先修好一只机巧鸟吧，要是继续修下去就不礼貌了。
E: Xiaohan recommended that you pose as an apprentice to get close to Mr. Xiao. Most of these craftsmen are harsh of words but soft of heart. Maybe after you wear them down, the talks will get smoother as well.\nBut this method rests entirely on the foundations of you providing free labor. You should get a cycrane fixed first. If you keep trying to repair it, the whole thing might seem a bit rude.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 乔瓦尼先生说，只有完成每个决胜乐园的试炼、取得资格徽章才可以参加庆典赛事。\n「残响回廊」是你们的第一站。里面会有什么挑战在等待呢？
E: Mr. Giovanni says you can only participate in the matches in the festival by completing trials in every Victory Zone and obtain Mastery marks.\nCorridor of Fading Echoes is your first stop. What kind of challenges await within?

C: 你已经捕捉了足够的以太灵，是时候继续前进了。
E: You've already captured enough Aether Spirits. It's time to keep moving.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 你们驱除了依附在符玄身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
E: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Fu Xuan, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

C: 你应这古怪岁阳的邀请参战，但这根本不是棋局嘛——「寻径指津」怎么能算棋局？\n无论如何，你击败了这个弄玄作怪的岁阳。
E: You accept the challenge from the bizarre heliobus, but this is not a chess game — how can a Pathfinder challenge count as chess?\nRegardless, you manage to defeat the enigmatic heliobus.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 一份赃物，以及被隐去的故事。
E: Some stolen goods and a hidden story.

C: 原来米莫萨曾经是钟表小子的动画师，而且还是「钟表匠」收养的孩子。「钟表匠」似乎给米莫萨留下了一份遗物，去看看是怎么回事吧。
E: It turns out that Mimosa was Clockie's animator, as well as the Watchmaker's adopted child. The Watchmaker seems to have left behind a relic for Mimosa. Go and see what's going on.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。 三月七任命你为「剑术助教」，为她合理安排训练生活，你要和她二位师父一起，在短短十五日里将三月七培养成独当一面的剑术高手。 也许故事还能有其他的走向，请务必试试！ 「十五日后，罗浮之巅，双剑西来，天外飞仙。」
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days. March 7th makes you her "assistant swordplay instructor," leaving you in charge of her training schedule. Alongside her two masters, you have fifteen days to train March 7th into a swordswoman capable of holding her own in a duel. Perhaps the story can go in other directions. Please give them a try! "The ultimate Luofu duel begins in fifteen days. Watch a pair of swords whiz through the skies in a peerless swordplay."

C: 见习医师伦道夫已经准备好了今日的离散忆质收容计划，去帮伦道夫拍摄目标所在的位置吧。
E: Trainee Healer Randolph has prepared the retrieval plan for the scattered memoria today. Help him film the location of the target.

C: 卢卡回到了贝洛伯格，他的第一次域外冒险暂告一段，你和卡美丽也将回到各自的生活。\n去做个告别吧。很快你就该前往下一场冒险了，无名客。
E: Luka has returned to Belobog. His first adventure beyond the city ends for now, and you and Carmella must go back to your separate lives too.\nGo bid farewell. You will soon depart for your next adventure, Nameless.

C: 托帕——一个和贝洛伯格颇有因缘的人物。\n能有机会和她对决，卢卡心中充满了期待。\n「也许让她成为我面对的第一个强敌，也算是一种贝洛伯格人的宿命。」卢卡不由得想到。
E: Topaz — someone who has quite the history with Belobog.\nLuka is very much looking forward to this chance to fight her.\nLuka can't help but think "maybe it is the destiny of a Belobogian for me to fight her as my first powerful opponent."

C: 也许你会有疑惑：「卢卡怎么可能不认得彦卿的脸？他难道不看电视、不上网吗？」\n你说对了，他还真是不看电视也不上网——贝洛伯格压根没有这些大众传媒。
E: Perhaps you might think "how can Luka not recognize Yanqing? Doesn't he watch TV or go online?"\nYou'd be correct! He really doesn't watch TV or go online — Belobog doesn't have these popular media at all.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n观众们对演出的评价都很高！总算可以安心观赏演出了……
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe audience gave a high score to the performance! You can finally relax and watch the show...

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到折纸小鸟的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the origami birds' beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 「不可知域」，能让天才们都为之动摇的故障…希望黑塔没有遇到危险。
E: The Unknowable Domain. A malfunction that can shake even geniuses... Hopefully Herta isn't in any danger.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 冒险的尽头，怎么能没有宝藏呢？
E: How could there be no treasure at the end of an adventure?

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「预言算碑」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by the Prophecy Tablet. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 内部问题都解决好了，是时候继续工作了！
E: Now that all the internal issues are sorted out, let's get back to work!

C: 终于要与泡泡在决赛中相遇了…\n或许只有全力以赴赢得「胜利」，才是你和泡泡间羁绊的最好证明。
E: At last, you finally face Bubbles in the finals...\nPerhaps giving it your all and claiming "victory" is the best way to prove the bond between you and Bubbles.

C: 你在终端上完整测试了一遍「星芒启明」，这下可以跟布凯辛她们交差了。\n说起来，这次测试的奖励…艾丝妲应该打钱了吧？
E: You test the whole Morning Starlight once on the terminal. Now, you can submit your concluded task to Grumpy and the others.\nSpeaking of which, the reward for this test... Asta should have transferred the money, right?

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 找人聊聊，并告诉姬子自己的决定
E: Find someone to talk to and tell Himeko your decision

C: 取得三级认证
E: Collect Level 3 Certification

C: 调查仙舟港口的异常状况
E: Investigate the bizarre situation at the Xianzhou port

C: 追上卡芙卡
E: Chase Kafka

C: 与三月七交谈，讨论现状
E: Talk to March 7th and discuss the current state of affairs

C: 击败「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫
E: Defeat Tatalov the Garbage King

C: 继续前进
E: Continue forward

C: 前往沉思室，寻找弹珠机模型
E: Head to the Meditation Room and look for the pinball machine model

C: 前往筑梦边境，寻找加拉赫
E: Head to Dream's Edge to find Gallagher

C: 向加拉赫了解现状
E: Ask Gallagher about the situation

C: 踏上命途交锋的舞台
E: Take to the stage for the fated battle

C: （可选）向黄泉道别
E: (Optional) Say goodbye to Acheron

C: 前往艾迪恩公园
E: Head to Aideen Park

C: 找到比「世界命运」更沉重之物
E: Find something that has more weight than the "Fate of the World"

C: 前往观景车厢
E: Head to the Parlor Car

C: 与终端交互，尝试与博识尊对话
E: Interact with the terminal and try to speak with Nous

C: 跟随缇安，寻找「番红蕊」
E: Follow Trianne and look for "saffron"

C: 查看那刻夏展示的「记忆」
E: Check the memory shown by Anaxa

C: 继续探索龙骸古城，前往更高处
E: Continue exploring Dragonbone City and head higher

C: 与丹恒会合
E: Meet up with Dan Heng

C: 「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著。」
E: "You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks."

C: 跟随「符玄」
E: Follow Fu Xuan

C: 向注定的方向前进
E: Proceed toward the destined path

C: 找出葛瑞迪的真身
E: Find Grady's true body

C: 等待昔涟，再观赏一下哀丽秘榭的风光
E: Wait for Cyrene and take in the sights of Aedes Elysiae once more

C: 跟阿格莱雅和缇宝聊聊
E: Speak with Aglaea and Tribbie

C: 前进，搜觅隐秘的影事
E: Go forth. Pursue the shadows shrouded in secrecy

C: 去逐着水中的牧群，去仰望山峰
E: Go chase the herds in the water, go gaze upon the mountain peaks

C: 去为端坐在山上的太阳献歌——
E: Go sing a song for the sun sitting on the mountain—

C: 前往三月的房间
E: Head to March's Room

C: 深入错乱的记忆，寻找荒笛
E: Venture into the disordered memory and seek out Terravox

C: 与「大地」半神荒笛对话
E: Talk with Terravox, the Earth Demigod

C: 三月七拒绝了「赤龙血」，均衡饮食、作息和训练才是灵药。

C: （在我身体里的，这个叫星核的东西……）
E: (This "Stellaron" thing... in my body...)

C: （奇怪…是被丹恒反锁上了吗？）
E: (Hmm... Maybe Dan Heng locked it?)

C: 初步检测的结果已经出来了，异常的根源还是「星核」。
E: The results of the preliminary analysis are here — the anomaly stems from a Stellaron, as always.

C: 你们通缉犯想得还挺开……
E: You wanted criminals sure know how to look on the bright side of things...

C: 四对一，那么，列车团以多数票同意前往仙舟！
E: Four against one. Well, it looks like the Astral Express crew has a majority vote to head for the Xianzhou!

C: 裴迦纳吗？它在航线的终点哦，那是阿基维利的故乡……帕姆也想要回去那里，可惜旅途和人生一样，没法一蹴而就帕。
E: Pegana? That's the final stop — Akivili's home world... Pom-Pom wants to visit again too. Unfortunately, the journey's a lot like life — you don't always get where you're going right away.

C: 哎，我可没在抱怨啊！惊喜一个接着一个，这样的旅行节奏正合咱的胃口！
E: I—I'm not complaining by the way! One adventure after another, that's exactly what I signed up for!

C: 我想聊聊和可可利亚的决战。
E: I'd like to talk about the battle with Cocolia.

C: 三月七的果汁…
E: Need to get some juice for March.

C: 赞达尔•壹•桑原，天才俱乐部#1。我挂上他的画像纯粹为了敬意：若没有他，也就没有我们如今的天才俱乐部。
E: Zandar One Kuwabara, Genius Society member 1. I hung up his portrait purely out of respect. Without him, there would be no Genius Society today.

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 这是赞达尔。赞达尔•壹•桑原，历史上第一位天才。
E: This is Zandar. Zandar One Kuwabara. The first genius in history.

C: 谁知道追随「智识」的这帮人脑子里在想什么。
E: Who knows what's in the brains of those following the Erudition?

C: 「你怎么挂机了？？？」「开团你人没了几个意思？」「出去就举报你！」
E: "Are you offline???" "How dare you go offline during an engagement!?" "I'm gonna report you!"

C: 这植物旁边的气味不太好闻，它制造的可能不是氧气。
E: This plant doesn't smell very nice. It may not be an oxygen producer.

C: 他还记得多少？
E: How much does he remember?

C: 对呀，粉色头发，个子小小的，很可爱的女孩子。黑塔女士亲自任命的代理站长。
E: Uh-huh, a petite cutie with pink hair. Madam Herta appointed her to be the acting lead researcher.

C: 那快走吧。
E: Let's go then.

C: 这一路过来，小三月没给你添什么麻烦吧？
E: March hasn't been any trouble for you along the way, has she?

C: 潜在的风险在于科员们…他们非常信任黑塔女士，根本没想过空间站会被军团攻破。相较于肉体的伤势，精神上的恐慌更加可怕……
E: The real problem lies with the researchers... They trust Madam Herta wholeheartedly and never thought that the space station would be breached by the Legion. A broken spirit is far worse than a broken body.

C: 别管我们了，从那边走！
E: Don't worry about us. Leave from there!

C: 那我就先走了。
E: I think I should leave.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着娜塔莎：「<unbreak>32</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Natasha: "<unbreak>32</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 量产后变得平平无奇的勘星钎。
E: Astro Rods have become so common after being mass-produced.

C: （这里是…空间站？）
E: (Is this... the space station?)

C: 你可以走开啊。我在和——你叫什么来着？姬子？——讨论科学。科学是客观存在的，没什么好避讳。
E: You can leave. I'm discussing science with what's her face... Himeko? Science exists in objectivity, there's nothing to be secretive about.

C: 我能拿{M#他}{F#她}做点研究吗？
E: Can I bring {M#him}{F#her} in for some research?

C: 这小鬼，脾气还挺大。放心，不会让你受一丁点伤害。凭我的本事，抽血都伤不着你的血管。
E: This little twerp really has a temper. Don't worry, I won't hurt a hair on your head. With my skills, even surgery would be painless!

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think things over.

C: {NICKNAME}，我觉得你也做得不错。
E: I think you're not bad yourself, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不用那么正式啊，你也帮我们打败了那个大家伙，要是咱们还要讲客套话，聊到天黑都说不完了。
E: There's no need to be so formal. You helped us defeat that big fella, anyway. Plus, If we keep speaking pleasantries, we'll waste a whole day.

C: 即使是重走已有的航路，仍旧会有新的收获，这就是「开拓」的意义吧。
E: Walking the same path over and over will never be the same, there will always be something new. That's the meaning of trailblazing.

C: 再见，姬子女士。
E: So long, Himeko.

C: 唔呣，勇气可嘉，就是有点太鲁莽了。但这倒的确是有点开拓者该有的样子。
E: Mmm, very brave! Very foolhardy! But that is what a Trailblazer should be like.

C: 今天暂时就问到这里了。
E: That's all my questions for today.

C: 门像是和这个空间固定在了一起，纹丝不动。
E: The door doesn't even move an inch, as if it is glued in space.

C: 帕姆就像星穹列车上的小精灵。不管什么时候，只要列车上的人需要帮助，它都会立刻出现。但可不要因此而小觑它。
E: Pom-Pom is like the spirit of the Astral Express. Whenever anyone on the Express needs help, they will appear immediately. It would be ill-advised to underestimate them.

C: 你不是很理解三月七买这面镜子的目的。
E: You don't quite understand why exactly March 7th has bought this mirror.

C: 到了。
E: We're here.

C: 请帮助我们找到星核。
E: Please help us locate the Stellaron.

C: 这可真是稀客！来来来，加热器也好什么也好，姐姐都跟你们好好聊聊～
E: What an honor! Where are my manners — we can talk about heaters all day if you like. Let's have a chat~

C: 杰帕德大人？他可是出身高贵的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，那个出名的朗道家的公子！
E: What do I make of him? Why, he's a captain of the Silvermane Guards — not to mention of noble birth! I mean, he's a Landau!

C: 麻烦你了。
E: Sorry to trouble you.

C: 啊！我、我只是，有点着急…我不是故意的，希露瓦小姐！无意冒犯！
E: Oh! I—I'm just, a little anxious... I didn't mean to, Miss Serval! Sorry!

C: 是这样的——上次的事情之后，我请了个长假。我觉得自己需要别的事转移一下注意力……
E: The thing is... after what happened last time, I took a long vacation. I feel like I need to switch my mind to something else...

C: 哈哈，机械屋可是还在营业呢。只是最近都没生意……
E: Haha, the workshop is still open. It's just that there's been no business recently...

C: 铁卫的生活真是丰富多彩啊。
E: The Guards really live interesting lives

C: 可以是可以…那我们回机械屋详细说吧。
E: I mean, I could... Let's go back to the workshop and talk about it in detail.

C: 我们去找菲丝问问看吧。
E: Let's go and ask Fizz.

C: 真精神呀，要的就是这股劲！走吧——回列车之前，我还得多拍几张纪念照才行。
E: That's the spirit! Come on, we should take some more photos before we head back to the Express.

C: 上车测验…是考试的意思？这个我在行！原来你们的规矩跟贝洛伯格的学校也差不多嘛。
E: Boarding Exam? Like a test? I can do that! That sounds like the admission system that schools in Belobog use!

C: …雪人掌。
E: ...Snowman's palm.

C: 没什么，其实我们也才到不久。
E: Don't be, I only just arrived myself.

C: 这是悬疑剧《白衣之后》的宣传画。
E: This is an advertisement poster for the suspense drama Beneath the White Cloak.

C: 你拾起信封，将它投入邮箱。在内心深处，你感到某个崇高的存在冲你微微一笑，眨着眼睛竖起拇指——就像在用跳眼法测量爆炸距离。
E: You pick up the letter and put it in the mailbox. From deep in your heart, you feel a noble existence smile, wink, and give you a thumbs up — like a soldier trying to gauge an explosion radius.

C: 明信片背面粘着一枚硬币，看来这位国王挺懂规矩。
E: There is a coin glued to the back of the postcard. Seems like this king understands that you need to tip someone if you want them to pass on a message.

C: 想问有关桑博的事…
E: I want to ask about Sampo...

C: 银鬃铁卫不是「舒服」地待在地上。铁卫一直在与敌人战斗，从怪物手中保卫贝洛伯格…保护地上和地下的每个人。
E: The Silvermane Guards aren't "living the easy life." We are constantly engaged with the enemy — defending Belobog from the scourge of attacking monsters... and protecting all those above and below the surface.

C: 我明白了，出发吧。
E: Understood, let's go.

C: 你怎么在这儿睡觉，不要小命了吗？赶紧回休息区避难！
E: Have you got a death wish or something? How can you sleep here? Get back to safety and take shelter!

C: …看来奥列格首领应该就在前面。你赶紧去休息区找娜塔吧，别又被流氓缠上。
E: ...It seems like Chief Oleg must be up ahead. Hurry up and get back to safety — look for Nat. And try not to get into another scrap along the way.

C: 没人知道史瓦罗为什么要这么干…他平时很少离开炉心，但如果下层区哪里发生了骚乱，他总会掺一脚。
E: Nobody knows why Svarog did any of this... He usually doesn't leave the Furnace Core and interfere unless some kind of disorder breaks out in the Underworld.

C: 哈！没想到你们还在上面演了这么一出戏，真是精彩。
E: Ha! I didn't know you'd put on a show for the Overworld too. Impressive.

C: …咕，我还以为你肯定会上当。
E: ...*sigh* I thought I had you there.

C: 我桑博既然认了各位做朋友，就要帮人帮到底，不仅要把你们救下来，还要替你们的未来着想，全方位地安排妥当。这就是友情啊！但……
E: And, Sampo Koski stops at nothing to help his friends. Saving you was just the beginning — I have to consider your finances too! With me you get the full service, folks. That's friendship.

C: 娜塔莎医生说，虎克虽然吵吵闹闹的，但一直在照顾那些无家可归的小孩子，说不定是个心思细腻的小大人呢。
E: Dr. Natasha said that she's a handful, but that she also takes care of the homeless kids. Maybe she's more mature than she seems?

C: 守夜这事我当仁不让。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 我懂你的感觉，烦心事太多，总把恐惧转化为梦境。
E: I understand. The more that weighs on your mind, the more your fears become dreamscapes.

C: 哼，那……你别扯我的后腿！
E: *sigh* Well... just don't slow me down!

C: …可可利亚为什么要迫害我们。
E: ...Why does Cocolia have it in for us?

C: 我在那儿跟着大哥大姐们混，成天想的都是该去哪儿整下一顿。直到奥列格首领把我拎了出来，送到孤儿院。
E: My friends and I used to wander those streets thinking about where to find our next meal. That is, until Chief Oleg got me out and took me to the orphanage.

C: 说说希露瓦•朗道。
E: Tell me about Serval Landau.

C: 边缘通路的追捕失败以后，我和受通缉的「外来者」以某种方式被带到了下层区。
E: After the failed pursuit at Backwater Pass, the wanted outsiders and I were somehow taken to the Underworld.

C: ——他们不是泥渣！
E: —They are not scum!

C: 你和大家都道过别了？
E: Have you said goodbye to everyone?

C: 哈，说得冠冕堂皇的，你该不会是怂了吧？
E: Ha! You talk cocky, but is that just because you're scared you'll lose?

C: 你谁啊？我已经买了季票了，不想听票贩子推销。
E: I've already bought a season pass so that I don't have to deal with scalpers.

C: 你是「怪物盔甲」的粉丝吗？
E: Are you a fan of Monster Armor?

C: 我只是来看看盔甲的。
E: I just came to see the armor.

C: 干嘛，他都输成这副惨样了，不会还有人想找「怪物盔甲」要签名吧？大家都在围观五冠王，根本没空搭理那个小丑！
E: Monster Armor got beaten up so badly. You are not thinking about getting an autograph from him, are you? I mean, all eyes are on the five-time champ now, and no one cares about that Monster Armor clown anymore!

C: 史考特说我可以直接上。
E: Scott said I don't have to queue...

C: 让我们高呼赢家的名字——{NICKNAME}——恭喜{M#他}{F#她}在本场比赛中酣畅大胜！
E: Let me hear you say {M#his}{F#her} name— {NICKNAME}! Congratulations on a phenomenal win in the opening!

C: 您听说过「天梯排行榜」吗？也就是记录了每位拳手比赛积分的榜单。您的积分越高，在榜上排的位置也就越高。只要您在对战中取胜，就能获得一定积分。
E: Have you heard of the Ladder Leaderboard? It's a list recording every boxer's match points. The higher your points, the higher the rank. You will earn points for every battle you win.

C: 具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules?

C: 这分数具体怎么算，我们会负责搞定的，您只要专注于比赛本身就行。一旦您的排名发生变化，我们会立刻通知您。
E: As for the calculation of the points, we'll take care of that. All you need to do is focus on the fight itself. As soon as your ranking changes, we'll notify you.

C: 「灰背鲸」将其遥控支援系统从「轻骑兵」升级到了「龙骑兵」——听听，这名字多唬人啊！
E: Grayback Whale upgraded its remote control support system from Light Cavalry to Dragon Rider — listen to that. What a name!

C: 「自由地呼吸」…没错，那就是我们一直以来的愿望。
E: "Breathe freely..." That's been our wish all along.

C: 非常乐意。
E: Count us in.

C: 大家好像都一脸慌乱的样子，希望旅店那边没出什么事……
E: Why is everyone in such a hurry? I hope nothing's happened at the hotel...

C: 应、应该还有气儿！歌、歌蒂大婶，别、别慌……
E: H—He's still breathing! T—Try not to p—panic Aunt Gertie...

C: 空气中弥漫着自由的味道…
E: The smell of freedom's in the air...

C: 那么…也请容我提问——
E: If that's the case, I've got a question for you:

C: 在我看来，「地火」作为民间组织，能够自发维持下层区十余年的秩序实属不易。诸位为了下层区的安定而倾注的决心，常人恐怕难以想象。
E: As a grassroots organization, Wildfire did an extraordinary job maintaining order for over a decade in the absence of the Guards. I can only imagine how much work you put in to protect the Underworld.

C: 大人一点儿想象力都没有吗？冒险的舞台当然可以是虚构的嘛。
E: Do grownups have no imagination? The adventures can be fictional, you know.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，你看<color=#dbc291ff>目录上提到的大矿区</color>，也许在那里会有什么发现呢？
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, look, the <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color> is mentioned in the table of contents. Maybe there's something there?

C: 你不想看看整本书的故事吗？
E: Don't you want to read the whole book?

C: 我想把《冒险鼹鼠队：隐形的宝藏》整理之后出版。虽然你不是作者，我没法支付你稿费，不过这是我的一点心意，请你收下。
E: I do want to put together and publish The Adventurous Moles: Hidden Treasure. I know you're not the author, so I can't pay out any royalties to you, but here's a little something for you. Take it.

C: 两只垃圾桶紧紧地并排站着，仿佛世界上没有任何力量能将它们分开。
E: The two trashcans stood tightly side by side as if no force in the world could separate them.

C: 垃圾桶认为你说得对，它同意这确实不公平，谁会没事去数垃圾桶的数量呢？因此，这个游戏就到此为止吧，太幼稚了！它太幼稚了！
E: The trashcan thinks you're right, this isn't fair. Who would count the number of existing trashcans? So, let's stop this game right now. It's too childish! Childish!

C: 这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
E: Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.

C: 那个停云好像非常狡猾…
E: That Tingyun is a sly one...

C: 又不是去对付她，放心。我们行事光明磊落，没有什么可怕的。
E: It'll be alright, we're not trying to stand in her way. We have nothing to hide from her.

C: 此乃驱虎吞狼之计也！
E: The Stellaron Hunters want to use you to take us out!

C: 若非太卜司捕捉到了加密通信，恐怕此人还能隐藏更久。
E: Had the Divination Commission not intercepted her encrypted transmission, she would have remained undetected for much longer.

C: 啊！对，没错，就是这里！违和感就出自这里……
E: Yes! There's something about this point...

C: 这下日子怎么过啊…
E: How am I going to make ends meet...

C: 若有身体不适的朋友，请速速前往地衡司公廨登记。我们请来丹鼎司的医师会在此逗留，为各位免费看诊。
E: If you feel unwell, please report to the Realm-Keeping Commission as soon as possible. We have doctors from the Alchemy Commission here who will see you free of charge.

C: 三位好啊！一看三位面带贵气，就知道你们准是太卜司的贵客！
E: Hi there! I can tell just by looking at you that you're the Divination Commission's guests.

C: 隔壁这位素裳姑娘是云骑军人，去问她吧。
E: Miss Sushang here is a member of the Cloud Knights. You can try asking her.

C: 我这人或许有些惹祸上身的本事吧，本来寻思到了罗浮总该安全了，可又出了这样的事情……
E: Perhaps I simply attract problems... I thought I would be safe at the Luofu, but now...

C: 你很熟悉流云渡的操纵机制吗？
E: Are you familiar with the operational mechanisms in Cloudford?

C: 「迴星港」是工造司治下之地，报备许可花了些时间。因此我顺路打听了点情况。
E: Stargazer Navalia is governed by the Artisanship Commission — it took me a while to sort out our paperwork. I got a sense of the situation on my way back.

C: 首先，把它设置成能嗅探某人留下的气味～
E: To begin with, let's set him to scent detection mode~

C: 要「谛听」启动追踪，得先找些线索为引。
E: Before Diting can start tracking, you'll have to feed him some leads.

C: 久等了，诸位。我已查明「药王秘传」的玄虚。
E: I have kept you waiting, but the deceit of the Disciples is laid bare to me now.

C: 除非能闭气行军，不然云骑军将不战自溃。因为没人知道身边的战友会在什么时候堕入魔阴身。还有什么比猜忌能更好地瓦解一支军队的士气？
E: Unless the Cloud Knights were able to march with their breath held, they would be doomed to fall into disarray. Moreover, no one could know whether their comrade was about to be stricken with mara. Is there anything better than fear for destroying the morale of an army?

C: 做了什么？我们治好了自己的同胞啊。嘻嘻，被困在孱弱的血肉里，一定很痛苦吧……
E: What did we do? We cured our kin! Hehe, it must hurt to be trapped in such weak flesh and blood...

C: 等太卜回来，咱们可能要面对一场硬仗了…害得我都有些紧张了。
E: When the Master Diviner gets back, we might be in for tough times... It's making me a little nervous.

C: 更让人担心的是…还有多少反物质军团的卒子潜伏在仙舟之上？
E: What worries me more is... just how many more Antimatter saboteurs are at large?

C: 诸位，冷静！大敌当前，切不可乱了阵脚！
E: Keep calm, all of you! This is a formidable enemy — we have to stay together!

C: 唔，这里是……
E: Uh, this is...

C: 哈哈哈。
E: Haha.

C: 景元！你可算是来了！
E: Jing Yuan! Where have you been!?

C: 你知道吗？当初丹枫犯下重罪，十王司力主将你毁去。持明呢，半数赞同，半数反对。哈哈，因为化龙传承只完成了一半。持明长老恨极了你，却又不敢杀你。
E: Do you know something? When Dan Feng committed his great crime, the Ten-Lords Commission advocated strongly for him to be destroyed. The Vidyadhara, on the other hand, were split evenly in their favor and disfavor of the motion. Haha, the dragon transmutation inheritance was not intact, after all. The senior Vidyadhara hated you, yet did not dare to kill you.

C: 我担心你们的安全。
E: I was worried for your safety.

C: 哦，够了，够了。
E: Mm, enough.

C: 仙舟的将军，你那微不足道的力量，能否撑过这场浩劫？
E: General of the Xianzhou, can your feeble strength survive this calamity?

C: 这小盒子里别的没有，倒是装着一把植物种子。
E: There's nothing else... except a handful of seeds.

C: 是啊，被星核猎手们打乱的计划总算能重回正轨了。咱们的下一个目标是匹诺康尼，还记得吧？
E: Yes. No more Stellaron Hunter interruptions — it's time to get our original plan back on track. Our next stop is Penacony, remember?

C: 倒也不必如此着急，本座算到你还会回到罗浮仙舟很多次，而且一定会来继续麻烦我。
E: There's no need to be so anxious. I predict that you will return to the Xianzhou often, and you will definitely continue to trouble us when you do.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 没想到小娃儿你这么有心，专程来告诉老夫。
E: For a youngster to deliver a farewell to an old man like me is a rare occurrence in this day and age.

C: 不才「砂金」，隶属公司战略投资部，主管「钻石」手下的不良资产清算专家，此次受<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>邀请前来……
E: I am the humble Aventurine of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department, a Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialist and subordinate to supervisor Diamond. I was cordially invited by the <color=#dbc291ff>Watchmaker</color>...

C: 砂金先生与「橡木家系」有约，先行入住了。我代他向星穹列车的各位致歉，并期待将来与各位一同共事。
E: Mr. Aventurine has an appointment with the Oak Family, and has checked in prior. On his behalf, I extend his apologies to everyone of the Astral Express, and wish for an amicable partnership moving forward.

C: 感谢您愿意从中斡旋。不过单独为我们升级房型是否不妥？据我所知，一同收到邀请的派系来宾应该不在少数吧。
E: Thank you for stepping in to resolve this matter, but are you sure about the rooms? I wouldn't want your other guests to feel we were being given preferential treatment...

C: 暖意自其中传来，充盈全身。你们的旋律渐慢、渐弱，像一首摇篮曲。一道七色的幻象轻轻抚摸着你的头顶，为你阖眼，动作轻柔，满是怜爱。你感到惬意，沉沉睡去。
E: A gentle warmth emanates from within, saturating every inch of your being. Your melodies slow down, fade away, like a lullaby. A seven-colored illusion delicately caresses the top of your head and closes your eyes, its movements tender and compassionate. You feel contentment and drift into a deep slumber.

C: 你怎么知道我有什么需求？
E: How do you know what I want?

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 这就没了？
E: That's it?

C: 实在不好意思，让尊贵的客人看笑话了。
E: Sorry for all the trouble you went through back there.

C: 你怎么知道？
E: How do you know?

C: 没有没有！匹诺康尼是梦想汇聚的地方，盛大筵席永不落幕！只是大典将近，压力是会比较大……
E: No, it's not like that! Penacony is where people realize their dreams. There's always a festive atmosphere here! It's just that things can get a little crazy with the Charmony Festival drawing near...

C: 就是这儿啦。你听说过这种说法吗——在梦里，「饥饿」是最珍贵的香料。
E: We're here. Hey, have you ever heard of this saying that goes, "In a dream, hunger is the most precious spice?"

C: 不过，这些小东西也会受到危险的情绪或记忆影响，变成四处破坏的「惊梦剧团」…如果不小心撞上了，一定要向附近的安保人员求助哦。
E: Be careful, though — sometimes these animated objects can be affected by dangerous emotions or memories and transform into the destructive Dreamjolt Troupe... If you ever run into them, go ask the security guards nearby for help.

C: 真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
E: It's been such a long time, old friend!

C: 碰一下！！！
E: Touch it!!!

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 哈哈，当然——祝你旗开得胜，{NICKNAME}！
E: Haha, of course we will. Good luck, {NICKNAME}!

C: 什么塔塔洛夫，那不就是你…
E: The Garbage King? You're the real Garbage King!

C: 咦？米沙是谁？
E: Eh? Who's Misha?

C: 咦，你也能看到我吗？
E: Eh, can you see me too?

C: 我叫钟表小子，是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星！我和我的朋友们一起守护着这座小镇的和平——他们分别是哈努兄弟、汽水先生、折纸小鸟、仓鼠球骑士……
