E: My name is Clockie. I'm a famous celebrity in Penacony! My friends and I keep the peace in this small town. They are Hanu, Mr. Soda, Origami Bird, Hamster Ball Knight...

C: 我没有怀疑你，毕竟在梦里什么都有可能发生…我说的地方，晚点再去也没问题的……
E: I don't think you're lying, as anything can happen in a dream... We can just head to the place I mentioned later...

C: 你在和钟表小子说话？…嗯，我也很好奇发生了……
E: Are you talking to Clockie? ...Hmm, I'm really curious too...

C: 去忙吧去忙吧，谢谢你，灰色的朋友！
E: I'll let you get back to your beeswax. Thanks, my gray friend!

C: 这里是离梦中的天空最近的地方，远离城市的喧嚣，也没有筑梦师的争吵。可以不被任何人打扰，感受当下——当下的风景，人，还有梦……
E: This spot is the closest place to the sky in the Dreamscape. It's far from the hustle and bustle of the city and free from the bickering among the Dreamweavers. You can feel the moment — the scenery, the people, and the dreams — without being disturbed by anyone...

C: 我能够理解。
E: I know the feel.

C: 茄子——！
E: Say cheeeese!

C: 别担心，不是什么危险地带。你可以把这里理解为黄金时刻的边境，更往外的梦境，家族还在建设改造中。
E: Don't worry, this place isn't dangerous. Just think of this as the border of Golden Hour. The Family is still building and remodeling the Dreamscape beyond here.

C: 糟了？哪里糟了？我现在非常…开心！
E: Bad? How so? I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!

C: 二十年前的我究竟是吃错了什么药，才会做出这么愚蠢的决定，来阿斯德纳这种偏远星系，为该死的家族搬砖卖命？
E: Was I under some kind of spell <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago when I made that foolish decision to work for The Family on some far-flung planet in the Asdana system?

C: 啊！墙壁消失了…感觉应该快到终点了…吧？
E: Ah! The wall has vanished... Feels like we're reaching the end... right?

C: 去吧，异乡的来访者…使命在召唤着你。
E: Off you go, dream diver... Your mission is calling for you.

C: 当然，这就是垃圾桶的工作。你随便找了点什么扔进它漆黑而深不见底的洞口，一阵巨响随之传来……
E: Of course. That's the job of a trashcan. You chuck whatever random things you have on hand into its pitch-black and bottomless void. A series of loud sounds thundered back.

C: 嗯，请允许我纠正一下…这是我个人的请求，不代表忆庭。答案很简单，姬子小姐，我只是想做个交换…有关「记忆」的交换。
E: Hmm, let me rephrase then... this is my personal request, not the Garden of Recollection's. And the answer is simple. Miss Himeko, I simply wish to make an exchange... related to the Remembrance.

C: 还有别的证据吗？
E: Do you have any other evidence?

C: 哥哥，你看起来有些消沉…发生什么事了？是那些收到「钟表匠」邀请的宾客吗？
E: Brother, you seem to be in low spirit... What's happened? Is it because of the Watchmaker's guest list?

C: 尚不是时候。等到了命定的日子，我必按正直施行审判。
E: It's not yet time. When the fated day arrives, I shall mete out justice with unyielding righteousness.

C: 感觉很难受…
E: I don't feel so good...

C: 我的意思是，没问题。
E: I mean, no problem.

C: 但前方的忆域…似乎被严重扭曲了。各位，小心为好。
E: But the Memory Zone up ahead... appears to be severely twisted. Be careful, everyone.

C: …「星核猎手」萨姆。
E: ...Stellaron Hunter: Sam.

C: 案侦工作需要，敬请谅解。
E: It's detective work. Please understand.

C: 令人在意的事？…哦，没问题，那就拜托你了。
E: Worth focusing on? ...Oh, no problem. I'll leave it to you then.

C: 被这么盯着，我也是会感到为难的。
E: I'd be embarrassed too, getting stared at like that.

C: 这个名字怎么了？
E: ...Is there something about my name?

C: 有趣。那么最后一个问题……
E: Interesting. Now, the final question...

C: 这正是他准备用来欺瞒你的说辞。他不会告诉你：石心十人需以自身意志开凿基石，令其绽放独一无二的光辉。
E: This is the very ruse he intends to use to fool you. He won't reveal to you that the Ten Stonehearts chisel their own will into the Cornerstones, granting them an unparalleled radiance.

C: 这应当是你个人的义举，无需家族的援助。你的行李袋在那里，请便吧，相信你能用这袋低贱的珠宝换来一切。这是赌徒最擅长的事，不是么？
E: This is meant to be an act of personal virtue, not requiring The Family's support. Your bag is over there, do as you please. I believe you can trade this bag of worthless jewels for everything you need. That's what gamblers excel at, isn't it?

C: 请随意。
E: Take your time.

C: 我在那里看见一位智械，他准备的拍品是「自我」。一旦有人竞拍成功，在约定的期限和规则下，他会践行买家的一切指示，成为那人绝对的所有物。
E: I saw an Intellitron there who was preparing to auction himself. When someone wins a bid, under stipulated periods and rules, he would do the buyer's every bidding, becoming that person's very possession.

C: 他将世界上所有人的梦编织在一起，将人与人的梦境彼此连缀，再以己身背负，他由此创造出一名巨人，一位「精神的亚当」。
E: He wove together the dreams of everyone in the world, linking people's dreamscapes, and shouldered this burden himself. From this, he created a giant, a "Spiritual Adam."

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 谢谢您，这就够了。愿希佩保佑我们。
E: Thank you. This will make for a very juicy headline. May Xipe protect us.

C: 呃…你是要找我吗？抱歉，我还以为你在看我身后的什么东西。
E: Hmm... Were you wanting to talk to me? Sorry, I thought you were checking out something behind me.

C: 啊！我…没、没事，多放一会儿就好了…吧。
E: Uh-huh! I... Let's just leave it here for a while... and it'll be alright, right?

C: 投入「崇高道德的赞许」…
E: Give "Praise of High Morals"...

C: 这么说来，能把酒吧开在这片…到处都是怪物的地方，也挺不可思议的。舒翁姐姐肯定是个很厉害的人吧？
E: That being said, opening a bar in this place... filled with monsters... is quite a feat. Siobhan must have a lot of tricks up her sleeve, right?

C: {NICKNAME}，你先前施展过的「钟表把戏」…还能再试一次吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, can you do that clockwork trick of yours again...?

C: 怎么就连姬子也…
E: How come even you, Himeko...

C: 差不多了。来选个装饰吧，你喜欢什么风格？我这里都有。
E: Almost there. Let's pick a decoration. Which style do you prefer? Anything you need, I've got it.

C: …<color=#dbc291ff>米哈伊尔，家族的背叛者——他就是大名鼎鼎的「钟表匠」</color>啊。
E: ...<color=#dbc291ff>Mikhail, the betrayer of The Family... He's the Watchmaker</color>.

C: 如果这些动画角色在现实中都有迹可循，那钟表小子对应的，毫无疑问就是「钟表匠」了。
E: If all the characters in the animation are based on characters in reality, then Clockie's counterpart is definitely the Watchmaker.

C: 所以他才被称作「匹诺康尼之父」。
E: Thus he became known as the Father of Penacony.

C: 他是商人，不是慈善家，可眼下他正在街道上四处散财，又独自去往克劳克影视乐园的方向，不知打的是什么算盘……
E: He's a businessman, not some philanthropist. But right now, he's out there handing out his wealth on the streets, and he went to the Clock Studios Theme Park all by himself. Who knows what kind of scheme he's cooking up...?

C: 然后呢？
E: And then what?

C: 砂金、托帕、翡翠…三位{RUBY_B#石心十人}精英{RUBY_E#}，三块基石，为了小小的匹诺康尼，不惜押上自己的全部。你们比家族还团结一心啊。
E: Aventurine, Topaz, Jade... Three {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}elites{RUBY_E#}, three cornerstones who, for a measly Penacony, offered their everything. You're even more united than The Family.

C: …闭嘴吧。
E: ...Shut up.

C: 如此一来，公司便能获得上桌的资格。而你也能从无尽的漩涡中抽身，得到梦寐以求的解脱。
E: That way, the IPC will earn a place at the table. And as for you, you'll just happen to slip the leash, leave the rat race, extract yourself from this endless debacle. You'll have the freedom you've always dreamed of.

C: 如果演员和观众都到不了场，砂金那么多布置不就白费了吗？
E: Should both the performers and spectators fail to arrive, won't all of Aventurine's plans be for nothing?

C: 为什么我们要为了死亡而出生在这世上？
E: Why are we born into this world if it's just to die?

C: 这是哪儿？
E: Where is this?

C: 你很自信，但请记得——家族谦逊，可从不软弱。「同谐」的弦音遍及寰宇，若你不从，只要那把长刀出鞘分毫，你终其一生都无法逃离「无限夫长」的怒火。
E: You are confident, but be reminded: The Family is forgiving, but not weak. The chords of the Harmony extend across worlds — if you do not comply, when the blade is unsheathed for even a hair's breadth, you will never be able to escape the Eternal Centurion's wrath in all of your lifetime.

C: 橡木家系的访客值得注意。
E: That visitor from the Oak Family is worth learning more about.

C: 就是就是。听见了么？跟我念：流、梦、礁。
E: That's right. Did you hear that? Repeat after me: Dream— Flux— Reef.

C: 这种事很常见吗？
E: Do such things often happen here?

C: 但现在看来…源头并不在我。我的身边存在着与「同谐」不合的事物…失声也是美梦正在崩溃的信号之一。
E: But now it seems... the root of the problem goes way beyond me. There are elements around me that don't align with the Harmony... and losing my voice is just one of the signs of the sweet dream's collapse.

C: 我、我全心全意地向您忏悔…请务必原谅我！
E: I... I wholeheartedly confess to you... Please, pardon my sins!

C: 看看——这位可爱的小姐是谁呀？
E: Look who we have here? A lovely young lady.

C: 当然不觉得！谁会嫌快乐太多呢？
E: Nah, not at all! Who would get tired of having so much fun?

C: 那么，最后一个问题——
E: Then, a final question...

C: 在久远的过去，曾有一柱星神存在于世间。祂拨动指节，编织银河律法，祂的信众组成「天外合唱班」，向全宇宙传扬庄严、肃穆的圣歌。
E: In the distant past, there existed an Aeon. With one flick of the wrist, THEY crafted the laws of the cosmos. THEIR followers formed the Beyond the Sky Choir, spreading solemn and reverent hymns throughout the universe.

C: 希望在旅途的终点…每个人都能抵达向往的结局。
E: I hope that by the end of this journey... Everyone will have achieved the outcome that they hoped for.

C: 二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
E: Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.

C: 二位——准备好了吗？
E: You two, are you ready?

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这么酷的*哼*只有这么酷的你才能发出来，完美。
E: You make a cool *hmph*. Only someone as cool as you could produce such a cool *hmph*. Perfection!

C: 让我们期待{F#她们}{M#他们}在谐乐大典上的精彩亮相！
E: We look forward to their amazing entrance in the Charmony Festival!

C: 去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们！我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
E: Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim! I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

C: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
E: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

C: 最高分通过！
E: You pass with full marks!

C: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
E: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

C: 咦，他怎么消失了？
E: Huh, where'd he go?

C: 我想，在经历了共同的困境后，各位一定能够理解我的想法。
E: I believe after going through similar predicaments, you'll be able to better understand my thoughts.

C: 回到问题本身，我个人会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>。
E: Back to the question: I would personally choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build the little Charmony Dove a cage</color>.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>要采取最初的方案，用软垫在原地为小谐乐鸽打造鸟巢吗？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Stick to the original plan, and build a nest with soft net where the Charmony Dove fell?</color>

C: 两位，请接受「纯美」的考验！
E: Dear friends, please ready yourselves for this trial set forth by the Beauty!

C: 这个场景有点眼熟…
E: This place looks a bit familiar...

C: 「罗盘号」是开往新大陆的船！它带领钟表小子和伙伴们穿越层层迷雾，航向大海深处。每次遇到危险，钟表小子就会操作罗盘，把大家带往正确的方向！
E: The "Compass" is a ship bound for the New World! Clockie and his partners travel through layers of fog to the depths of the sea. Whenever there is danger, Clockie will use a compass and guide the ship in the right direction!

C: 「囚徒们啊！我命令你们学会自由，并教会你们的兄弟——为生而战！」
E: "Prisoners! This is my order! Learn the essence of freedom and teach your fellow prisoners to fight for their lives!"

C: 黑天鹅，你怎么也在？
E: Black Swan, how come you're here too?

C: 到了目的地，你要一起下车哦！
E: This time, you must disembark with us when we reach our destination!

C: 银狼
E: Silver Wolf

C: 银枝
E: Argenti

C: 雷电忘川守芽衣
E: Raiden Bosenmori Mei

C: 前星穹列车测绘师，一位充满活力与好奇心的少女学者。
E: An ex-surveyor aboard the Astral Express and a young scholar, brimming with enthusiasm and curiosity.

C: 看，他们和将军在那里！
E: Look, they're with the General!

C: 磋商地点就在酒店大堂。各位，随我来。
E: The negotiation will commence at the hotel lobby. Everyone, please follow me.

C: 既然分工完毕，咱们就出发去往各自的战场吧！准备好——大干一场！
E: Now that our roles are assigned, let's get to our battlefields and pose a grand finale!

C: 是啊。正是她最早发现了「死亡」的彼岸别有天地，又把这个信息传递给了我们所有人。
E: Indeed, she was the first to discover the world beyond the shores of "death" and shared this truth with all of us.

C: 还没有做好准备…
E: I'm not quite ready yet...

C: 离开这里吧，回到你来时的地方。然后…就让匹诺康尼从梦中苏醒吧。
E: Leave this place, return to where you belong, and... awaken Penacony from this dream.

C: 倘若你们的乐园能拯救更多的人，那就亲手为我断绝前路吧。
E: If your "paradise" can save more people, sever my path with your hands.

C: 哦，那你快点。等你准备好了，我们就走。
E: Oh, okay. Hurry up then. We'll leave when you're ready.

C: …我把你送回来，不是为了让你做这种事的。
E: ...I didn't bring you back to hear an answer like that.

C: 「剧本」里是不会有这些的，对吧？可是你看……
E: That's not written in the script, right? But as you see...

C: 真清晰——不过在雅利洛那桩案子里，你好像把顺序调换了呢。
E: Pretty clear, although you seem to have changed the order in the Jarilo case.

C: 如果匹诺康尼借机成功渡过难关…届时公司再想掺上一脚，我们的一举一动便会暴露在万亿公众的视野之下。
E: And if Penacony should seize this opportunity to overcome adversity... Even if the IPC tries to intervene, every move we make will be scrutinized by trillions of people.

C: 那…星期日呢？
E: And... what about Sunday?

C: 不必了，等会儿我一个人进去。你去接待我们的贵客吧，等我消息行动。
E: No need. I'll go it alone. Meanwhile, you can go greet our honored guest and wait for my message.

C: 那…那么……
E: So... so...

C: 你想说，公司有办法做到？
E: Are you suggesting that the IPC has a remedy?

C: 这家伙…和我在追查的某个大可爱有关。那句话怎么说的来着？「敌人的敌人就是朋友」。
E: This fella... is also tracking down that son of a gun. What's that saying again? "The enemy of my enemy is my friend."

C: 哼，敬谢不敏。
E: Hmph, then you'll excuse me.

C: 所以，经五大家系一致同意，匹诺康尼分家将代表全银河的家族成员为各位无名客献上一件礼物——
E: Thus, with unanimous consent from the five major lineages, Penacony's Family — on behalf of all family members throughout the cosmos, offer a token of appreciation to the Nameless.

C: 哦，乐子神在上，你竟然如此之快地识破了我的伪装！说真的，我亲爱的小灰毛{M#先生}{F#女士}，你简直就像是苏珊太太卧室里那只凶猛的穿山甲！
E: Oh, by the Laughter, to think you've seen through my disguise this quickly! Honestly, my dear {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Gray Hair, you're just like that ferocious pangolin in Madam Susan's bedroom!

C: 唉，小灰毛呀小灰毛，这么长时间过去了，你一点变化都没有，我好失望呀……
E: Oh Gray Hair, Gray Hair, it's been so long, but you haven't changed at all. I'm sorely disappointed...

C: 花火，吃我一棍！
E: Sparkle, eat my bat!

C: 那你呢？
E: What about you?

C: 这是我的荣幸。我经历过太多告别。很高兴，这一次能够笑着和各位说再见。
E: It is my honor. I've said many goodbyes. Yet I am glad, that this is the first time I speak those words with a smile.

C: 但那些事…全都过去了。
E: But those things... are all in the past.

C: 简单来说，我是一位受到「虚无」诅咒的自灭者。我的故乡在很久以前遭遇灭顶之灾，整个世界消亡在{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}祂{RUBY_E#}的倒影下。
E: Simply put, I'm a Self-Annihilator who was cursed by the Nihility. My hometown was destroyed a long time ago, and the whole world was erased beneath {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}THEIR{RUBY_E#} shadow.

C: 一个宇宙中绝大多数人都不知道其存在的世界……
E: A world that many across the universe don't even know exists...

C: 知更鸟…？
E: Robin...?

C: 嘘，有人闯进来了——你是什么人？
E: Shh! Someone else is here. Who are you?

C: （唱歌的猴子、唱歌的忍者…我是在做梦吗？）
E: (Singing monkeys and a singing ninja... Am I dreaming?)

C: 你将接过忍侠的遗业，清算邪忍的罪孽，终结忍之都的长夜，还百姓一个清平世界。
E: Inherit the legacy of the Ninja Hero and wipe clean the sins of Osaru. End the suffering wrought upon the Ninja Capital and bring peace back to its people.

C: 嘿嘿，本姑娘现在可是紧跟时事的女大学生啊。
E: Heehee~ Of course! I'm a college student who keeps up with the times.

C: CUT——几位演员，注意你们的台词。我现在饰演的是「客座教师」，而你们则是「学生」，切勿进行不合时宜的表演。
E: CUT! Cast members, please remember your lines. I'm currently playing the role of a guest lecturer and you are my students. Please stay in character.

C: 没问题，我尊重演员的意愿，你想扮演哪个学院的角色？
E: Of course. I respect my performers' wishes. Which academy would you like your role to be in?

C: 甜品社？这都是你一个人做的吗，真厉害！
E: Dessert Club? Did you make all these yourself? That's awesome!

C: 因为…睡蕉小猴特别火，连带着各种口味的香蕉料理也很流行…各位，请来试试看吧。
E: Because of Slumbernana Monkey's popularity, all kinds of banana dishes have become popular... Please, give it a try.

C: 心动不如行动，库存只剩一个了！只要八千八百苜蓿币，免税加半年质保，还支持信用点付款！
E: Well... I should let you know, there's only one left in stock, so act now and don't miss out! Only <unbreak>8,800</unbreak> Alfalfa credits! It's duty-free and has a six-month warranty. We also support payment with credits!

C: 哈哈，现在需求量太大，摊位上的都是预购的样品，距离正式发货还要等一阵子呢。
E: Haha, the demand is too high right now. The toys you see here are all pre-order samples. There's still some time before the products officially ship.

C: 我来！
E: I'll do it!

C: 那个…要不还是{NICKNAME}来？求求了，我比较想要自己的写真嘛。
E: What? Um... Can't you do it, {NICKNAME}? Please? I really want my own photoshoot! I'm begging you.

C: 忍者游戏玩的。
E: She's playing ninja games.

C: 但要让我说啊……
E: But if you ask me...

C: 虽然你学得很快，但这毕竟是种难度很高的唱法，得注意保护自己的嗓子才行呀。
E: You learn fast, but this is an advanced singing technique, after all. It won't do if you don't take good care of your throat.

C: 无论怎么捣鼓，球车都没有启动的迹象。
E: No matter how hard you try, the Spheroid gives no indication of being activated.

C: 哦，那还真他宝贝的棒，但我都说过几遍了……
E: Oh wow, that's muddle-fudgin' fantastic news! As if I haven't already told you that the last few times...

C: 这正是我要说的，对于这些追求自我的人们，我不相信他们愿意通过抹除自我来获得幸福。
E: That's exactly my point. These are people who seek their true selves. I don't believe they would seek happiness by erasing their individuality.

C: 我可不想错过开场，你最好也一样！
E: I'll do anything to catch the opening. Make sure you don't miss it too!

C: 我只是把一个你们没能想到的选择摆出来，至于要不要拯救自己，那也由你们。
E: I'm simply offering an option that has never crossed your minds. It's your choice if you want to give up on saving yourselves.

C: 在某些时刻，我会打心底里产生一部好片即将诞生的预感。而它们中的大部分，都是由一幕幕群像素材衔接而成。
E: Sometimes I get hit by sudden hunches that a great film is in the making. More often than not, these tend to be just scenes from different groups of people that are then edited together.

C: 那么，您准备从今天开始吗？
E: Are you going to change yourself from today?

C: 哥们，没事吧？
E: Bro, are you all right?

C: ——所以，你要自己决定。
E: So, the decision is yours to make.

C: 仔细想想，自打我们入学以来，这小猴的存在感是有点吓人。
E: Come to think of it, ever since we arrived here, the presence of that little monkey has been making me feel a little unsettled.

C: 蕉蕉蕉，别担心。模因颜料能感染观者的情绪，看来这幅画让这位同学更理解*蕉声*了啊！真不错！
E: Bana bana, don't worry. Memetic dye can affect the viewers' emotions. It seems this painting has helped you understand Banagibberish better! Great!

C: 蕉师！我们两个想试试！
E: BananAdvisor, we would love to try!

C: 哇，芮克先生果然没骗我，本姑娘真的是天才！
E: Wow, Mr. Reca was telling the truth! I truly am a genius!

C: 说得太过了吧
E: That is over the line!

C: 我是钟表小子的粉丝！
E: Nuh-uh, I'm Clockie's fan!

C: 百货•忍徒已身中邪术，一时无法再起了。
E: Ninja Initiate Merchant succumbed to their sorcery. He is expected to be out of action for a while.

C: 你们做好准备了吗？
E: Are you guys ready to start?

C: 在下得认真构思，该如何在念白中彰显缭乱•忍道呢……
E: I ought to sit down and conceptualize how to incorporate and play up the Way of the Dazzling Ninja in my narration...

C: 演员们，各就各位——3、2、1……
E: Actors, take your positions. 3, 2, 1—

C: 不及格！你的辱骂完全没有攻击性，像*撒蕉*一样！
E: Fail! I don't feel an ounce offended by your failure of a demeaning provocation! You're only coming off as a cutiebananapie!

C: 不及格！怎么能这样猴身攻击呢？小猴粉丝会生气的！
E: Fail! How can you launch into a personal attack on our monkeys! Monkey fans will go into a riot!

C: 加油啊，小演员，我很看好你。
E: Give it your best shot, fledgling actor. I see great potential in you.

C: 即便以实验动物的标准，你也远远不够资质啊，*大导演*。
E: Even if we were to need animals for our experiment, you're nowhere near qualified... "great director."

C: 哥们，有病是吧？
E: Hey brother, you ain't right in the head.

C: 喔，我懂你意思。
E: Uhm, yes. I totally agree.

C: 这不是个香蕉玩笑！换成公司狗，我现在就让他们排队等枪毙。
E: You're rufflin' my bananas now. That wasn't a joke! If it were the IPC lackeys, I'd have them lined up right this instant for a one-way ticket to other side!

C: 真的假的，难道他真的很有天分？
E: Really now? So he's actually talented?
...Bana?
...Dreams?

C: 而一颗星星，也将就此…可怜地熄灭。
E: And with that, a star will pitifully fizzle out.

C: 咦？意思是说，你把这东西打烂后，就立刻恢复正常了？
E: Huh? So you're saying everything went back to normal once you smashed this thing to pieces?

C: 我…不太清楚你在说什么。不过…你看上去挺有意思。
E: I... ain't quite sure what you're talkin' about. But... you sure seem mighty fascinatin'.

C: 因此，在找到了自己的宿敌之后，他的下场显而易见——和曾经为人的那些存在一样，就此变成猴子的样貌。
E: Thus, after finding his nemesis, his fate is clear — just like those who were once human, he too will transform into a monkey.

C: 此刻，球棒•忍者将大放光彩！
E: Watch Baseball Bat Ninja shine like a diamond!

C: 御猿屋的封印…不过如此。
E: That's all there is to Osaru's seal...? Hah.

C: 三号…服药……
E: No. 3... take medicine...

C: 怎么样，这段时间的校园生活还愉快吗？
E: How was it? Did you enjoy your time on campus?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 「物尽其用」，就拿这些成果来为今后的实验抹平障碍吧……
E: We should fully utilize what we have. These results will pave the way and eliminate any obstacles in our future experiments...

C: 那就令它们全部醒悟吧！
E: Then let us snap them all out of their disillusionment!

C: 够了，别扯这些没用的。身为「纷争」之神，何不以剑明志，让我们速战速决！
E: Enough of this nonsense. You should be wielding your weapon as the god of Strife! Battle me and put a swift end to this!

C: 再等我一下。
E: Hang on a minute.
Hehe...

C: 对，不仅外表可爱，还要走实力派路线！
E: Mm-hmm! Being adorable isn't enough. I need to be strong, too!

C: 哎呀，你喊那么大声干嘛啦！
E: Wah, you don't have to yell!

C: 也许阿格莱雅没提前知会他们？
E: Maybe Aglaea didn't give them a heads-up?

C: 不对，这不是仙女木……
E: No, it isn't a White Dryad...

C: 胜者是？
E: Who won?

C: 虽然败了…但必可活用于下次。
E: Although it failed... I'm sure I can put it to good use next time.

C: 但藏头露尾可不是谈合作该有的态度。
E: However, giving us half-truths is not the right attitude for cooperation.

C: 呼哇…小小灰，小小蝶！出事了，出大事了！
E: Waaaah... Little Gray, Little Cas! It's bad... It's very bad!

C: 糟了，阁下。我能闻到香味了。
E: Oh no, I'm starting to smell something delicious.

C: 我去找他。你们就当游戏已经结束，趁早回家吧。下次别在高温浴池区玩耍了。
E: Alright, I'll go look for him. You should consider the game over and head home for now. And don't play around the hot baths again!

C: 因为这里不是家。
E: Because this place is definitely not home.

C: 大人，息怒，好好说话……
E: Calm down, my lord. Play nice...

C: ——文字游戏！你对悬锋人的境遇心知肚明。
E: ...Enough with the word games! You, of all people, should understand the plight of the Kremnoans!

C: 你是在羞辱我吗，迈德漠斯？我是老了，但还没老到愚痴。我当然记得，欧利庞死于悬锋孤军的围剿……
E: Are you trying to shame me, Mydeimos? I may be old, but I haven't become so decrepit that I've forgotten it all. Of course, I remember that Eurypon died when the Kremnoan Detachment surrounded him.

C: 那就来看看…悬锋将落向谁的头颅吧。
E: We shall see who the Kremnoan blade strikes down.

C: 动手！动手！
E: Attack! Attack!
(...Forget it.)

C: 还记得某位老战士提及的，「歌耳戈猎狮」的传说吗？故事的主人…主狮公，其实并非一方之霸，还有一头剑羚能与之分庭抗礼。
E: Do you recall the legend of the "Gorgo Lion" mentioned by a certain veteran? The central figure — the "mane" character — was not the sole sovereign of that land. An oryx stood as its formidable rival.

C: 奥赫玛，你的球棒侠回来了！
E: Okhema, your baseballer is back!

C: 所以，你要将我呈给阿格莱雅复命么？
E: Are you going to bring me to Aglaea to fulfill your duty?

C: 那是我的义务。但我不想将您以俘虏或战利品的形式交给她。
E: That is indeed my duty, but I prefer not to present you to her as a captive or spoil of battle.

C: 不久前…你的父亲，去世了。
E: A few days ago... your father passed away.

C: …但愿你不会堕入「开拓」的黑暗面。
E: ...May you never succumb to the dark side of Trailblaze.

C: （它手里的是…剑？为什么……）
E: (It's holding a... sword? Why...)

C: 这样，大家就不会迷茫了！
E: This way, they'll always stay on course!

C: 许是那粗鲁的悬锋老兵让缇宁受了惊吓，也连带影响了你。若你有意，我现在就可以用金线荡破他的胸膛。
E: It must be that reckless Kremnoan soldier who startled Trinnon — and you as well. If you want, I can pierce through his chest with the golden thread right now.

C: 还是我去吧。你想吃些什么？
E: Please, let me do it. What would you like to eat?

C: 可惜，我对它也一无所知，能告诉你的：只有它身披黑袍，手持重剑…大概是重剑吧，形如半轮扭曲的太阳……
E: Unfortunately I, too, know nothing about it. I can only tell you that it is clad in a black robe and wields a greatsword... At least, it looks like a greatsword. It's shaped like a twisted half-sun...

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: ——拉冬人计划在山间布满暗雷和炸药，并诱敌深入。那代表山之民的家园将不再安全，从此会危机四伏。吉奥刻勒斯即刻返回村落，将消息告知族人。然而……
E: The Ladonians were planning to plant mines and explosives all over the mountain, and then lure their enemies within. With danger lurking with every step, the Mountain Dwellers' homes were no longer safe. Geocles quickly returned to his village to bring the news to his people, but...

C: 「两全其美」——这正是你我的天真之处。而吉奥刻勒斯…我告诉你他是如何做的。
E: "A solution that would make everyone happy," huh... That's how naive we are. Well, let me tell you what Geocles did.

C: 莫非在酝酿什么…感人的道别辞？
E: Are you drafting... a sentimental farewell speech?

C: 跟从您的指引。
E: Enlighten us with your guidance.

C: 你现在可是「翁法罗斯」的守护者。
E: You're now the Guardian of Amphoreus, after all.

C: 我还能…继续…
E: I can still... fight...

C: …是。相比旁观你们两个吵得不可开交，我认为这样更有效率。
E: ...Yes. It just seems much more efficient than letting you two go at it endlessly.

C: 这就是过去的命运三相殿……
E: So, this is how the Temple of the Three Fates looked back in the day...

C: 自听到{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的预言算起，到此时此刻即将出发，大约有十年左右。
E: It has been approximately ten years between {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s prophecy and this moment, when we are about to set out.

C: …走吧。
E: ...I should go.

C: 可是，什么都没发生。
E: But nothing happened.

C: 命运的箴言如此为缇里西庇俄丝揭示——<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将碎作千片，凋零在他乡的土壤。」</color>
E: Such is the maxim that unveils Tribios' fate: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall shatter into a thousand fragments and wither on the soil of foreign lands."</color>

C: 要是能有些喘息空间就好了，那样还能整理下黑潮的线索。但现在……
E: If only we had more time to sort through the clues about the black tide. But now...

C: 二位老师平安无事，已是不幸中的万幸。
E: That you're both safe is already a blessing.

C: 拜托各位了。{NICKNAME}，缇宝老师，我们走。
E: Thank you, everyone. {NICKNAME}, Tribbie, let's go.

C: 太棒了，我尤其喜欢您用「幸存者」而非「胜利者」去鼓舞参战者。没什么比「活下来」这个目标更能激起一个人的斗志了。
E: Terrific! I loved how you used the word "survivor" instead of "victor" to rally the contestants. Nothing stirs up a person's drive quite like the goal of simply staying alive.

C: 打从猴子在这儿大闹一场后，咱俩确实有好一阵子没见面了。经纪人怎么会放任你这样的大明星在这儿搞街边演出？
E: It sure has been a while since we last saw each other. Not since that monkey raised hell here. How'd your agent even let a big-time star like you put on a street performance like this?

C: 真想把你这个丢人现眼的时刻永远记录下来，当成传家宝子子孙孙传下去。
E: Oh, I wish I could capture this pathetic little moment of yours and pass it down as a family heirloom for generations.

C: 格妮薇儿，的哥哥…兰斯洛特？？？是那种…亲生的哥哥吗？
E: Guinevere's... brother... Lancelot? You mean like, biologically related?

C: …你是匹诺康尼历史上的谁来着？
E: Who exactly are you in Penaconian history?

C: 是三个。有三个来自其他世界的从者。
E: Make that three. There are three Servants from another world here.

C: 我创造过辉煌。我是谁？也许翻翻那些故纸堆里早已被遗忘的旧杂志会有答案。我记得他们曾称呼我「永恒的银幕美人」、「希佩遗落的金色音符」……
E: I was brilliant, once. Who was I? Well... maybe you'd find the answer buried in some old, forgotten magazine. They used to call me the Eternal Silver-Screen Beauty, the Golden Note of Xipe's Legacy...

C: 哈哈，不想暴露行踪对吧？放心吧，我懂，绝对不会出卖你的。
E: Haha, trying to stay low-key, huh? Don't worry, I won't sell you out.

C: 同意。
E: Agreed.

C: 辛苦了，老朋友。一眨眼这么多年过去了，我依然记得你在银幕上的每一场演出，跳过的每一段舞，唱出的每一支小调……
E: Well done, my old friend. So many years have passed, but I still remember every performance you gave, every dance you danced, every melody you sang...

C: 怎么可能…我为什么会出现在不列颠？
E: How... is this possible...? Why am I in Britain?

C: 既然你叫我「阿尔托利斯」…那么，你是艾登？
E: You're calling me Artorius...? Is it Aiden?

C: 我成为了我想成为的人。
E: I became the person I wanted to be.

C: 你看着我再说一遍？
E: Look at me in the eyes and say that again.

C: 打消念头了？我就说嘛，你没那么想离开这儿，对吧？
E: Changed your mind, huh? I knew it. You don't really want to leave, do you?

C: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}，在空间站过得还好吗？
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. How's life been on the space station?

C: （可我还是觉得，自己不应该属于这里。）
E: (But deep down? I still feel like I don't belong here.)

C: 下次还填非常简单。
E: I'll once again select "Too Easy" in the next survey.

C: 有个念头一闪而过…为什么我不召唤我自己呢？一个历经十个琥珀纪的争斗，如今依然屹立不倒的传奇人物，不就在镜子里吗？
E: That's when a thought crossed my mind... Why not summon myself? A person who's still standing strong after ten Amber Eras of business intrigue... Isn't this living legend staring back at me in the mirror?

C: 这场圣杯战争确实充斥着古怪。是我疏失了，未能尽从者的职责，让御主远离敌人的陷阱。
E: This Holy Grail War is strange indeed. It's my fault, I have failed as a Servant. I should've kept my Master away from this trap.

C: 御主？我看到你的字幕了，我这就想办法救你出来！
E: Master? I saw your subtitles! I'll find a way to get you out!

C: 不如和我们合作，就像以前那样。███，奥帝先生会实现你所有的愿望。
E: Then why not work with me again... like before? ███, Mr. Oti can grant you all your wishes.

C: 私人恩怨？我斯科特因为你从中作梗三番五次被迫学动物叫、被贬职调职的悲惨人生，竟然被你轻描淡写地概括成一句「私人恩怨」？
E: Private disagreements? You ruined my life! You made me bark and oink and face a demotion, moving from one puny post to another in the cosmos in despair and misery... And this is what you call it? "Private disagreements"!?

C: 今日我们欢聚于此，是为了深切缅怀牺牲的众多斯科特，纪念他们反复献出自己的生命……
E: We are gathered here today to commemorate the many Skotts, who have sacrificed their lives again and again...

C: 苏乐达？两瓶糖浆，就让你们心甘情愿地为恶魔卖命？你们身为怪物的尊严到哪儿去了？
E: Seriously? SoulGlad and two bottles of syrup, and you're all in for the devil? What happened to your pride as monsters?

C: 抱歉，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，我可不会听从你的指挥。我的御主目前还下落不明，没道理留在这儿帮你们照看这个裂成几瓣的孩子。
E: Sorry, {F#miss}{M#mister}, I don't take orders from you. My Master is still missing, so I've got no reason to babysit this shattered kid for you.

C: 跟它废话那么多干什么？一枪爱死它，什么都搞定了。
E: Why waste your breath on it? One bullet to fudge them up, and we're done here!

C: 竟敢戏弄你的好bro波提欧，来吧，{NICKNAME}，让这盗版货见识见识真正的钟表把戏。
E: Messing with your bro Boothill? Big mistake! Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's show this knockoff what actual Clockwork can do.

C: 绝望？要说绝望，我见过的绝望景象多得能淹没这座噩梦乐园。
E: Despair? Please. I've witnessed enough scenes of despair to submerge this entire playground of nightmare.

C: 星期日知道会杀了我的。
E: Sunday will absolutely kill me dead.

C: 那又如何？你难道会背叛自己的朋友，让我赢下圣杯战争？
E: And? Would you really betray your friends just to let me win the Holy Grail War?

C: 我能把这看作宣战吗？既然你已经不是知更鸟小姐的从者，我也没必要放任一位潜在的敌人逃走。
E: Is this a declaration of war? Since you're no longer Miss Robin's Servant, I have no reason to let a potential enemy walk away.

C: 魔鬼藏在镜头之外，让真正的怪物穿过荧幕，走进影院，这是我最得意的一场线下营销。没想到在几百年后，还有人能看穿我的把戏。
E: Having the devil lurking behind the lens and getting real monsters to step into the theater, that was my finest offline marketing campaign ever. Who'd have thought that someone could still see through my tricks hundreds of years in the future?

C: 我希望他不要受到惊扰。
E: I wanted him to rest undisturbed.

C: 在这呢，还挺会藏的。来吧，第一步是从它手里买瓶盖。
E: Oh, there it is! Found a good hiding spot, didn't ya? Come on, let's buy some bottle caps from it.

C: 稍等。
E: Just one moment.

C: 那我们试试看？就用这台扭蛋机。
E: Shall we give this capsule machine a try and see what happens?

C: 我无意冒犯，但二位最好不要接近那边。
E: I don't mean to meddle, but I'd advise you to stay away from that place.

C: 回答我的问题，你为何会出现在这里？
E: Answer me. What are you doing here?

C: 有机生命的历程总是充满变数，我常为此感到着迷。
E: Isn't it fascinating how variables never fail to find their way into the lives of organic lifeforms?

C: 下一次，也带上你一起去，好不好？
E: I'll take you next time. Pinky promise?

C: 就算您这么说，小女子也想不起任何事。似乎没什么能支持我作出决定。
E: Be that as it may, I don't remember anything. There's nothing to help me make a choice.

C: 身体…好怪……
E: My body... feels strange...

C: 在这世上，我们还能走得更远。
E: In this world, there are paths beyond waiting for us to explore.

C: 已经足够了。我本来只想在她身边静静待会儿。
E: It's enough. I only meant to stay quietly by her side for a bit.

C: 果然大家都倾向星图中不曾描绘的世界啊，列车真是吸引了一群意气相投的伙伴。
E: So, everyone's leaning toward the uncharted world? It seems we've got a crew of like-minded adventurers on the Express.

C: 我想此刻也是同理。三月小姐受到了某种来自外部的影响，可能是来自命途、星神…或是翁法罗斯本身。
E: I'm guessing this is something similar. Miss March appears to be affected by a certain external stimulus, perhaps a Path, an Aeon, or even... Amphoreus itself.

C: 三月七也需要有人照顾，我来搭把手吧。
E: Someone should be taking care of March 7th, too. I can do that.

C: 看呐，这里是哪？是黑塔空间站——天才的营地，科学的摇篮。
E: Ta-da! Recognize this place? Herta Space Station — the base of a genius and the cradle of science.

C: 呃…恕我直言，黑塔女士，您擅长的领域的确很多。但您确定「动手能力」还是自己的强项之一吗？
E: Um... Don't take offense to my candid words, Madam Herta. You may be proficient in many aspects, but... is hands-on work really one of your strong suits?

C: 自己的事情自己做，用手擦掉不就行了？
E: Clean up after yourself. Can't you just wipe it off with your hands?

C: 这么深入的地方，居然也有忆泡？
E: A Memory Bubble tucked away this far in?

C: …我申请旁边观战，行吗？！
E: ...C—Can I just be on the sidelines this time? Pretty please!?

C: 吧唧吧唧…好吃，好吃……
E: Omnomnom... Mmm, this is yummy...

C: 你刚才提到了「外面的家伙」？难道是……
E: Wait, did you say "those lads outside"? Could it be...

C: 拍摄远方的巨大球体
E: Take a photograph of the giant sphere in the distance

C: 能听懂他说话哎…
E: Hey, I can understand what he's saying...?

C: 我是哀丽秘榭的白厄。先前有所冒犯，请接受我的致歉。
E: I'm Phainon from Aedes Elysiae. Sorry if I offended you just now.

C: 很响亮的名字，但我猜这是个外号吧？初次见面，是不是报上真名更好？
E: That sounds mighty impressive, but I'm guessing it's a nickname? We're meeting each other for the first time, so shouldn't you tell me your actual name?

C: 泰坦是什么？
E: What are the Titans?

C: 动作张扬的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
E: A humanoid statue with a flamboyant pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

C: 预言已然昭示，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的威光将照拂一切……
E: The prophecy has already revealed that the light of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} will shine upon all...

C: 什么？！
E: What!?

C: {RUBY_B#缇宁，缇宝，缇安}雅努斯的三位祭司{RUBY_E#}，同面同心，耳目相连。你们的一举一动早已暴露在奥赫玛人的视线下。
E: {RUBY_B#Trinnon, Tribbie, Trianne}The three priests of Janus{RUBY_E#} share the same appearance and mind, and their senses are also interlinked. The Okhemans have long been aware of your presence and what you have been doing.

C: 嗯…这不由我决定，我能做的只是摒除障碍，领你去往{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的降临之所。
E: Well... that isn't for me to decide. All I can do is clear the obstacles and guide you to the place of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s descent.

C: 都说了我是个{F#暖女}{M#暖男}。
E: See, I told you that I'm a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.

C: 但奥赫玛刚刚脱离一场劫难，还有许多惊魂未定的民众需要安抚。阿格莱雅，能请你代劳吗？
E: However, given that Okhema has just barely survived a calamity, and there are still many shaken citizens who need comfort... Aglaea, would you mind taking care of this in my stead?

C: 你说我吗？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: 泰坦…黄金裔…我还是不太明白。
E: I still don't get what's going on with the Titans and Chrysos Heirs...

C: 二位是来自天外的贵客，我愿为你们破例，但一次携两人前往…还是有违传统。
E: I'm willing to make an exception, considering you're guests from beyond the sky. But if I were to bring both of you in at once... I'd be blatantly disrespecting our traditions.

C: 我偏不。
E: (Refuse to move.)

C: 往左靠一靠。
E: (Move a little to your left.)

C: 请答应我：无论如何，<color=#dbc291ff>不要向市民透露「天外之界」的存在</color>。
E: Promise me to <color=#dbc291ff>never tell the people of Okhema about the worlds beyond the sky</color>, no matter what may happen.

C: 我只关心你的断枪…
E: I can't stop thinking about your broken spear...

C: 对了，缇宝老师说你们也用石版，不如咱们交换个联络符吧？还有这些谢礼，也请一并收下。
E: Oh right, Tribbie mentioned that you two also use teleslates. Why don't we exchange contacts? Please also accept these gifts as a token of my appreciation.

C: 我来给你们跳一段吧。
E: Should I show off my dance moves?

C: …嗡嗡？
E: ...Grumph?

C: 眼前的大家伙发出了满意的叫声。
E: The big guy in front lets out a satisfied sound.

C: 爱好者和专家的差距…
E: This is the difference between hobbyists and professionals...

C: 它以夜作帷，一路长梦至醒，方知：我之无缺啊，是为创生而生。
E: With the night as their curtain, they dreamt until they awoke. Only then did they realize: My perfection was born for creation.

C: 缇安大人最爱的酸瓜糖，缇宝大人最爱的黄油饼干，还有您最中意的葡萄叶包饭，应有尽有呀！
E: Lady Trianne's favorite sour melon candies, Lady Tribbie's favorite butter cookies, and your favorite stuffed grape leaves. We have everything!

C: 它的嘴张着，也许可以把手伸进去试试？
E: Since its mouth is open, perhaps we can try putting our hands in it?

C: 哦…他对你们如此坦诚？
E: Oh... He's that candid with the two of you?
Hm...

C: 不知谁掉落的卷轴
E: A Scroll Dropped by an Unknown Person

C: 如果你们还想聆听世界的声音，也可以在涡心多停留片刻。
E: If you're interested in hearing more of the world's voices, feel free to prolong your stay in the Vortex.

C: 还来得及反悔吗？
E: Is it too late to bail out now?

C: 这句话听着有些矛盾。
E: That sounds a bit contradictory.

C: 她怎么像个小孩子一样？
E: Why does she act like a child?

C: 别看缇安老师贪玩，她可是翁法罗斯技艺最精湛的门匠，创造出的「百界门」万无一失。
E: It's true Trianne is very playful, but she's the best gatekeeper in Amphoreus. Her Century Gate never fails.

C: 请…以得胜的姿态归来。
E: Please, come back victorious.

C: 你害怕了？现在逃跑还来得及。
E: Are you scared? It's still not too late to run.

C: 赌注是什么？
E: What's the prize?

C: 顺便告诉你一声——六个。
E: And just so you know: I'm at six.

C: {NICKNAME}，这个你拿着吧？摇一摇就有声音，作为收集品还蛮有意思的。
E: Why don't you hold on to it, {NICKNAME}? It makes a sound when you shake it. Should make for an interesting collectible.

C: 真阴险啊，悬锋人！
E: Kremnoan people sure are cunning!

C: 那位泰坦已经殒落，但在世界各地留下了「蛊惑之手」。人们也会操作这些巨手来进行搬运，还有…咳，偷窃。
E: That Titan has fallen, but they left "Bewitching Hands" scattered all over the world. Now, people use these giant hands to move things around — and, well, to steal things, too.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，它的亡魂属于真正的强者。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul should be claimed by true warriors.

C: 所以，它就在前面了？
E: They're right up ahead, then?

C: 故地重游，感觉如何？
E: How does it feel to be home again after so long?

C: 呵…不愧是<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋的王储</color>。
E: Oh... As befitting of <color=#dbc291ff>the crown prince of Kremnos</color>.

C: 之前在创世涡心，听你们提起过她。
E: You guys mentioned her in the Vortex of Genesis earlier.

C: 「公正天秤」——我还是第一次目睹它的全貌。
E: The Scales of Justice. It's my first time seeing it in its full glory.

C: 看来是位不守信用的泰坦啊。
E: Looks like this Titan doesn't like to keep their promises.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 你什么时候变得这么不饶人了？
E: When did you become so ruthless?

C: …欧洛尼斯？
E: ...Oronyx?

C: 你大概也会遇到许多美妙的事情，拥有像家人一样的同伴——哪怕不再是我们，星核猎手。
E: You'll probably also experience many wonderful things and find companions who feel like family, even if it's no longer with us, the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 我的耐心并不多…对你，我永远不会吝惜。
E: Patience may not be my virtue... But toward you, it is something that I will never lack.

C: 酬劳…简单。
E: Payment... simple.

C: 这里，记忆，完整。交给我，碎片。
E: Here, memory, complete. Give me, fragments.

C: 那就是通向往世的门吗？
E: Is that the gate to the past?

C: 那，你需要*我们*帮什么忙吗？
E: Is there anything you'd like us to help with?

C: 嗯…污染的痕迹确实消失了。
E: Hmm... the traces of corruption have indeed disappeared.

C: 直接问问不就行了！
E: But we can just ask around!

C: 先在外围调查一番吧，或许能从只言片语中获取有用的信息。
E: Let's start with the city's surroundings. We might be able to gather some clues by listening and observing.

C: 请问，您是来参加竞赛的吗？
E: ...May I ask if you're here to join the competition?

C: 这一趟下来，接下来几天应该都不用捡剩饭填肚皮了吧？嘿嘿…真希望这祭典能多持续一阵啊。
E: After this haul, I shouldn't have to scrounge for leftovers for the next few days. If only this festival could go on longer...

C: 祭典怎么办？
E: What about the festival?

C: 「即便那黑潮如此强大、足以腐蚀神明的意志，它亦站立至今，对抗那浊世的阴霾……」
E: "No matter how powerful the black tide may be, enough to corrupt the wills of other gods, they stand tall and upright in defiance of the turbulent fog, even till today..."

C: 你和它已经连着交手几千个回合了…我猜只是你的耳朵还没习惯这清净吧？
E: You've exchanged thousands of blows with them... Your ears are probably just not used to this peace and quiet.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 真是一场…神秘的仪式。除了等待，我们真的什么都做不了吗？
E: What a... mysterious ritual. Is there really nothing we can do but wait?

C: 少年的他成了一副被挖空的躯壳，只有心中复仇的火焰驱使着他在大地上行走。
E: He became a hollowed shell in his youth, and the blazing flames of vengeance were the only thing sustaining him.

C: 必须…离开村子？
E: Do I... have to leave the village?

C: 我想知道，接下来，你对他有何安排？
E: With all due respect, I'd like to know what you plan to do with him.

C: 拥有资质的黄金裔稀世难寻，如果这条路走不通，我也只能放低标准。
E: It's exceedingly rare to find a capable Chrysos Heir. If this path proves unattainable, I am willing to lower my expectations.

C: 至于试炼…不用担心。那位岁月之泰坦…虽然有些任性，但从来没有伤害过我们。
E: As for the trial, you have nothing to fear... The Time Titan may be willful at times, but they never caused us any harm.

C: 真奇怪。人家也没有和它相处的经历，可是睁眼看到{NICKNAME}的那一刻，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的记忆就已经在脑海里了。
E: Oddly enough, I don't remember ever meeting them, but the moment I saw {NICKNAME}, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s memories were already in my head.

C: 老师向来只关心自己的研究，肯定也想逃离金线的监视，保全自身。如果这时，反对派向他递出了橄榄枝……
E: He has always been someone that is only concerned about his own research. I'm certain that he must want to escape from the monitoring of the golden thread and protect himself. If the opposition were to offer an olive branch at this time...

C: 那刻夏老师从不相信神谕，倒也没有「背叛」一说。但他教导过许多黄金裔，早已是奥赫玛重要的盟友。我实在不愿…眼睁睁看着同袍兵戈相向。
E: Anaxa has never believed in the prophecy, so technically it cannot be considered a betrayal. However, he has taught many Chrysos Heirs and has long been considered an important ally of Okhema. I truly do not wish to... see comrades turning on one another.

C: 和我的猜测一样，逐火之旅的困境不止来自外部。复杂的内政和人际关系也是问题的导火索。
E: It's just as I suspected. The troubles afflicting the Flame-Chase Journey aren't just external issues. The complex internal politics and interpersonal relationships are also exacerbating the problem.

C: 对不起，气氛似乎变得更沉重了。总之…祝你一切顺利，阁下。
E: Sorry, it seems like I've made the mood even heavier. In any case... May everything go your way.

C: 上次听到这句话，后续发展可不怎么顺利呢。
E: The last time I heard this, things didn't turn out that well.

C: 我们来找你，有重要的事。
E: We've come to you because of something important.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 记忆行者…我的力量…寄托予你……
E: Pathstrider of Remembrance... my strength... I shall entrust it to you...

C: 我不清楚浮黎的瞥视是否和这件事有关，按照泰坦的说法，你现在是以「记忆」的形式存活着，就像「欧洛尼斯神迹」中那些过去的事物一样。
E: I'm not sure whether the gaze of Fuli has anything to do with this matter, but according to the Titan, you are living in the form of a memory right now, just like those objects of the past in the miracles of Oronyx.

C: 也许迷迷就是将你维系在现世的锚绳。我一直以为是它没法离你太远，但事实…可能截然相反。
E: Perhaps Mem is the anchor rope that ties you to the present. I had assumed they couldn't stray too far from you, but the truth... might be the exact opposite.

C: （想起濒死体验，保持警惕…）
E: (Remembering the near-death experience... gotta stay on guard...)

C: 恰恰相反。就解明一道题而言，十五个日夜未免有些太长了。
E: On the contrary, fifteen days feel a little too long for solving a singular problem.

C: 那女人贵为半神，理应自重。就留着这些可怜的线头吧，让她好好听听我的声音，自取其辱。
E: The demigod should know better, for such is her station. Spare those poor threads, and just let her listen to my words. They shall serve only to unveil her own folly.
Oh...

C: 你想要一场战争？
E: So, you wish to start a war?

C: 连我都看得出她的人性所剩无几。难道阁下就能断言，她必定会按常理出牌？
E: Even someone like me can tell that only a sliver of her humanity remains. Surely you're not asserting that she will definitely act in a rational manner?

C: 我没有任何理由拒绝您，不是么？
E: I have no reason to refuse you, do I?

C: 与死者同行，敬爱他们如同你敬爱生命…你将再也听不见那些杂音。
E: Go walk with the dead, and love them as you love life... Then you'll no longer hear those noises.

C: 就算哀地里亚人再怎么不加思考，视死亡如儿戏，但…我做不到。
E: It doesn't matter how lightly the Aidonians take death, or how readily they accept it... I simply can't do it.

C: 咦？怎么了……
E: Hmm? What's wrong?

C: 好像也不是不行…
E: Maybe I should consider it...

C: …咳，我只是临走前突然有些发现，觉得高低该给你们递个话。
E: But... I just discovered some stuff before I left, and I reckon you should know about it.

C: 死者的世界需要安宁，必须剔除这些不和谐的噪音。
E: Since the realm of the dead must remain peaceful, it's imperative that we rid the place of such discordant noise.

C: 嗯，他永不会技差一筹，但凡出手，对方必然死去。
E: Yes. Since he can never be inferior to others in martial combat, death would be the inevitable outcome every time he strikes.

C: 求死不得的灵魂如潮水般席卷了斯缇科西亚。我的城邦、我的人民，如今已不复存在……
E: Unable to rest in peace, these departed spirits engulfed Styxia like a roaring tide. As a result, my city and its people no longer exist...

C: 那女婴是我唯一能救下的幸存者。她诞生在恶龙腹中，生来便怀有「死亡」的天赋。她一定是诸神赐给我们赎罪的机会……
E: That child is the only person whom I managed to save. Born within the evil dragon's abdomen, she has possessed the talent of "Death" since her birth. She must have been granted to us by the gods as a chance for us to atone for our sins...

C: 而我…自然就从未活过，更谈不上幸福。
E: And I... Would never have lived, let alone found happiness.

C: 就像奔赴冥界的蝴蝶，落在死亡的枝头。
E: Like a raven butterfly flying swiftly into the nether realm, perching on the twig of death.

C: 粉色松鼠…很机灵。
E: The pink squirrel... is very smart.

C: 所以，试炼的时刻已至，汝打算如何证明吾的问题哪？
E: The hour of the trial has come. Do you have an answer for me? And... how will you prove the veracity of your argument?

C: 来古士阁下…你身为最高贵的神礼观众，听到元老院遭到如此污蔑，还打算无动于衷吗…？！
E: Lord Lygus... As the esteemed Theoros, are you going to simply stand by and allow the Council of Elders to be dragged through the mud!?

C: 大局已定了…
E: The die is cast...

C: 真是…不可思议。冥冥之中，一种似曾相识的感觉涌上心头，难以言喻。
E: It's truly... incredible. Such a strange surge of familiarity... so hard to describe.

C: 或许，是命运再度完成了自我实现；又或许，是{NICKNAME}阁下所熟知的、那天外世界的法则，令我们的{RUBY_B#命途}命运{RUBY_E#}早已交错……
E: Perhaps it is fate, once again fulfilling its own design. Or perhaps it is the laws from beyond the sky, so familiar to you, {NICKNAME}, that intertwined our {RUBY_B#Paths}fates{RUBY_E#} long ago...

C: 看呐，已回归的，或仍在远眺的众神！今天，我等将这剖白了的灵魂带来给你。
E: O! Gods who have returned, and gods who are still watching! Today, we bring you a soul laid bare.

C: 我并非生物学家。听说翁瓦克有一种鱼类，记忆容量不足一秒，过目即忘。也许会发生类似的事？
E: I'm not a biologist, but I hear that there's of a species of fish on Vonwacq that has the memory span of less than a second. It forgets anything that occurs in the very next instant. Perhaps something similar will happen?

C: 怪不得我扫描了一圈都没找着后门。你身上的安全协议…倒是和螺丝不相上下，有意思。
E: No wonder I couldn't find a backdoor when I did a scan of our surroundings. The safety protocols on you... are comparable to Screwy's. How interesting.

C: 于十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}到来前…去夺回你的「未来」吧……
E: Before the passing of fifteen {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hours{RUBY_E#}... Go forth and reclaim your future...

C: …真安静啊。
E: ...The silence in here is near deafening.

C: 很形象的描述，我完全理解了。
E: A very illustrative explanation. Thank you.

C: …是要我站在那刻夏的立场作出回答吗？
E: ...Am I supposed to put myself in Anaxa's shoes and answer that?

C: 反对者自然对这个回答很不满意，于是便有了第二项控诉。
E: Needless to say, his critics didn't take kindly to his answer, so they followed up with a second allegation.

C: 这是自欺欺人。民众信奉{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的创世神话，祭司们说什么，他们就信什么。可是，你和我，我们已从蒙昧的洞穴里醒转。
E: Then they're just deluding themselves. People believe in {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s tale of genesis, accepting wholesale whatever the priests preach, but we're different. We've already walked out of the fire-lit cave of ignorance.

C: 七贤人就更是笑谈了，若真是在吾之树荫下蒙受庇护的贤人，吾必能发觉。汝不也对树庭的过去如指诸掌么？
E: And surely you jest. Don't you think I, of all people, would know if that were the name of one of the Seven Sages under the shade of my tree? Don't you claim to know the Grove's past like the back of your hand?

C: 呵，我早知道各位会这么说……
E: Heh, I knew you would say that.

C: 我…很抱歉。
E: I... I'm sorry.

C: 咱俩都没碰上过面。
E: But we've never met.

C: 我…没这么勇敢。我不知道该如何面对这么沉重的事情……
E: I... I'm not that brave. I don't know how I'm supposed to face such a serious affair...
Honor, Courage, Tenacity, Sacrifice...

C: 「拥抱阴云吧，『天象画壁』。」
E: "Embrace the clouds, Celestial Mural."

C: 说说看吧…让我听听那究竟是什么神奇的赌注。
E: Tell me... what kind of miraculous bet is that?

C: …你们，配得上一个崭新的黎明。
E: ...You are worthy of a new dawn.

C: 来点对抗运动，如何？
E: How about we spice things up with a bit of competition?

C: …白厄阁下！
E: ...Lord Phainon!

C: 奥赫玛危在旦夕，我必须尽快扛起半神的职责，以天空的力量庇佑大家。
E: Okhema is on the brink, and I must quickly embrace the role of demigod to protect everyone with the power of the Sky.

C: 一介冰冷的旁观者，将「中立」贯彻到底的安提基色拉人…怎就突然关心起了黄金裔的使命？
E: An indifferent observer, an Antikytheran who is neutral till the end... Why would you suddenly express concern for the Chrysos Heirs' mission?

C: 你也是这么想的，对吧？
E: You think so too, right?

C: 那还真是谢谢你啊。
E: Well, ain't I grateful for the reminder.

C: 在树庭，我找到许多有关天空泰坦的研究，也了解到翁法罗斯的学者大多把「天外之界」的禁忌归结于艾格勒降下的诅咒。
E: In the Grove, I discovered extensive research on the Sky Titan. It appears that many scholars from Amphoreus believe the taboo against the "world beyond the sky" stems from a curse cast by Aquila.

C: …无妨，请您试试吧。还请一定小心，列车的推进器是十分精密的装置。
E: ...By all means, please proceed. But be careful, the Express's thrusters are extremely delicate.

C: 奇怪，我一发言，话题总会变得沉重…我可不想被你们当成阴郁的家伙。
E: Huh... Every time I say something, things get so serious... I don't want to be the person who keeps bringing the mood down.

C: 你很庆幸丹恒不在场，这样就不会有人对你的阅读品味评头论足。
E: You're quite relieved that Dan Heng isn't around — no one will be there to judge your reading tastes.

C: 天空泰坦艾格勒？呵呵，不过如此。
E: Sky Titan Aquila? Heh, that's nothing.

C: …你的评论总是这么犀利，让我有点不好接话啊。
E: ...Your comments cut deep. It's tough to find a good comeback.

C: 不，一无所知。用卡牌、髀石预测命运，我从小就不怎么相信。
E: No, I know nothing about it. I've never really believed in using cards or bones to predict the future.

C: 那又如何？我们早已不再奢求能得到理解……
E: What does it matter? We've long since stopped expecting to be understood...

C: 缇宝老师说得有道理。不过…「昏光庭院」这个名字承载了天空后裔的悠久历史，我还是想让它延续下去。
E: Lady Tribbie makes a good point. But... "Twilight Courtyard" carries the long history of the descendants of the sky, and I'd like it to continue.

C: …啊，这不就想起来啦！《悬锋与苍穹》，第三卷第五节——
E: ...Ah, now we remember! Kremnos and the Firmament, Volume 3, Section 5 —

C: …我做得够吗？<color=#dbc291ff>若我就此拥抱那预言，在温热的池水中睡去……</color>
E: ...Have I done enough? <color=#dbc291ff>If I embrace that prophecy now and sink into the warmth of these waters...</color>

C: 你…刚才是在替她说话？
E: ...You're defending her?

C: 呵！多亏你还有油嘴滑舌这项技能，不然早被抓去给人当看门的宅灵了。
E: Ha! Good thing you've still got a sharp tongue, or you'd have been stuck guarding someone's front door ages ago.

C: 寻宝时间到了，小巴子！带路吧，找到的好东西咱们八二分成。
E: Time for treasure hunting, Bartho! Lead the way, and whatever we find, we'll split <unbreak>80</unbreak>-<unbreak>20</unbreak>.

C: …到！啊不是，吱！
E: ...Here! I mean, squeak!

C: 「千年以前，那个无知的我…曾因沉默失去生命中最悦耳的浪花。」
E: "A thousand years ago, out of foolishness... I let my silence steal away the most beautiful sound I'd ever known."

C: 我本将这场辩论视为惯常之事，以为仅凭在百年岁月中累积的民意与经验便能取胜。但我既低估了凯妮斯和其党羽的狡黠，也低估了自己通感力的退化。
E: I considered the debate a routine affair, assuming I could win merely with the support and experience we'd accumulated over centuries. But I underestimated Caenis and her party's cunning, and also the deterioration of my own senses.

C: 很正确，你的判断。现在，收下它吧。
E: Right, your assessment is. Now, here, take this.

C: 要背负创世的命运，我只需付出一样东西。那是她曾慷慨地赠予我的礼物，而我也会转交给你们每个人：<color=#dbc291ff>毫无保留的深信。</color>
E: To bear the burden of creation, I need only to give one thing. It's a gift she once gave me without hesitation, and now I share it with each of you — <color=#dbc291ff>unshakable faith.</color>

C: 现在…唔，变得好大一只，没那么可爱了？但还是很善良哇！
E: Now... hmm, you've grown so much. Maybe not as cute but still just as kind!

C: 回头见，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
E: See you around, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

C: …而是这个摇摇欲坠的世界。
E: ...but this crumbling world.

C: 猜不到吧？我一直盯着那家伙的行踪呢。而我得出的结论……
E: Bet you didn't expect that, huh? I've been tracking them all this time, and this is my conclusion.

C: 我希望自己的死亡平静而轻柔。我希望自己了无生机的死躯…不要曝光于众人的视线之下。
E: I wish for my death to be quiet and gentle. I hope that my lifeless body... will not be exposed to the eyes of the public.

C: 几乎每段史诗的结尾都以英雄的功业作结，却极少有人提到，在他们开创的时代里，芸芸众生如何度日，那些平凡的人们又走过了怎样的艰辛或苦难。
E: Almost every epic ends with a description of the hero's achievements, but few mention how the everyday people of that time lived. No one recorded the struggles and suffering the commoners endured.

C: …唔，我还有任务在身，先走一步了。
E: ...Anyway, I've got a mission to handle, so I'll get going.

C: 祝你成功，风堇姑娘——遇到什么难事，让那个救世小子顶在前面就行！
E: Good luck, Miss Hyacine. And if things get tough, just let that Deliverer take the lead!

C: 不对劲……
E: Something's not right...

C: 不知道它能听懂多少。
E: I wonder how much it understood.

C: 我也知道，她留下了谏言，令后人有朝一日重返天顶，取走艾格勒的火种。
E: And I also know that she left behind a message, calling on future generations to one day ascend to the heavens again and reclaim the Coreflame of Aquila.

C: …成功啦！
E: ...All done!

C: 真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
E: Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.

C: 咳…抱歉，我换个说法。看到两侧<color=#dbc291ff>那些泛着蓝光的大型结构了吗？</color>其中有几块突了出来，没有完整地嵌在槽中。
E: Ahem... Sorry, let me rephrase. Do you see the <color=#dbc291ff>two structures that are glowing blue on both sides?</color> Some of them are protruding out, not fully inserted into the slots.

C: 没准那台装置能帮到我们？有必要的话就去瞧瞧吧。
E: Hmm, maybe that device can help? Go check it out if you need to.

C: 只有二者同时醒来，我们的灵智才算完整。
E: Our consciousness will only become whole when both are awake at the same time.

C: 这里的眷属，似乎都被黑潮侵蚀了。
E: The Titankin here appear to have all been corrupted by the black tide.

C: 不愧是你，灰宝操作扎格列斯之手的样子也越来越熟练啦。
E: As expected, Grayie is getting more and more skilled at handling the Hand of Zagreus.

C: 那些「电路」似乎都被黑潮侵染了……
E: These "circuits" all seem to be corroded by the black tide...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在支付等价的报酬以前，你们可别先死了哪。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Need to make sure you don't die before you pay me."</color>

C: 你也要信任我们！
E: You have to trust us too!

C: 缇宁大人的百界门就开在奥赫玛的城外大道，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is open on the main street outside Okhema's walls, {NICKNAME}.

C: 哈？你的反应未免太冷静了，这和我设想的完全不一样嘛！
E: Huh? Your reaction's too composed. It's completely different from what I was anticipating!

C: 危急时刻，万敌、遐蝶、缇宝与缇宁、哈托努斯、圣城卫士、丹恒…所有人赌上性命，只为了救世主能够完成使命。最终，在安顿好我后，白厄独自踏入了创世涡心……
E: At this moment of crisis, Mydei, Castorice, Tribbie and Trinnon, Chartonus, the Holy City Guards, and Dan Heng... All lay their lives on the line so that the Deliverer would have a chance to complete his mission. After making sure that I would remain safe, Phainon enters the Vortex of Genesis alone...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>它从垂死的神经元，升格为了真正的「生命」。而赐予它新生的，是另一尊星神的瞥视。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>From a perishing neuron, it evolved into true "life," reborn through the gaze of another Aeon.</color>

C: 正好，最近正是农忙的时候，就算不上课还有别的事要做。
E: Besides, it's harvest season. There's plenty of other work to be done even without classes.

C: 我会尽己所能，帮助你们弥合裂隙，努力让阳光洒遍世界上的每一个角落！
E: I will do my best to help you mend all fractures and let sunlight shine on every corner of the world!

C: 这位…千金大小姐？说起话来让人背后一寒……
E: That... noble lady? The way she speaks... it's like ice in my veins...

C: 我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，将成为新世界的神明。我将以确凿无疑的学说，向人们证明：凡人的思想，也足以成就神的伟业。
E: I, Anaxagoras, shall become a god of the new world. Through irrefutable logic, I will prove that mortal wisdom can achieve divine greatness.

C: 真没想到将来会遇到这么多人，还有他们的心愿……
E: So many faces in my future... so many wishes...

C: 在顾虑什么？
E: What's weighing on your mind?

C: 既然这样……
E: In that case...

C: 难道「救世」还得靠我吗？
E: Don't tell me... I'm the one who has to deliver salvation?

C: 那声音如是说。男人未曾犹豫，只是坚定践行。
E: The words were few. But they gave him all the certainty he needed.

C: 这是神明计算中的时刻。此后的旅途，与您熟知的一切并无区别。有人到来，有人离去，逐火者们身负微光，在长夜中艰难向前。
E: This is a moment calculated by the gods. What comes after is no different from that which you already know. Some join, others leave, while Flame-Chasers bear their faint light forward through the long night.

C: 「它是一个愚人讲述的故事，充满喧哗与骚动，却找不到一点意义。」
E: "It is a tale, told by an idiot, full of sound and fury, signifying nothing."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>身为男人心中可望而不可及的存在，您已陪伴他走过不尽其数的岁月，自然也有权利纵观时间的长河，见证他抵达此地后迎来的，每一个荒谬而可悲的结局。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As an unattainable existence that has dwelled within his heart, beyond his reach, you have accompanied him through the march of years uncounted, you naturally have the right to view the river of time in its fullness, and to witness what he welcomed upon his arrival here, every absurd and tragic ending.</color>

C: 忘记裁缝女说的话了？我相信你拎得清孰轻孰重。
E: Hey, remember what the seamstress said? You know what really matters.

C: 你的沉默比过去每一次都更长，白厄阁下……
E: Your silence lasts longer than ever, Lord Phainon...

C: 告诉我，吕枯耳戈斯——谁才是输家？
E: So tell me, Lycurgus — who's the real loser here?

C: 你没说错，或许我该对这无尽的徒劳感到厌倦了。但即便如此，我也不会接受你施舍的解脱。
E: Perhaps you're right. Maybe I should have tired of this futile struggle long ago. But even so, I will never accept the mercy of your release.

C: 第十万次轮回，「毁灭」早已汇成烈阳，在这具脆弱的躯壳中翻涌，理智在纪元开端便燃烧殆尽…但，纵使只剩下这破碎的身躯，我依旧坚持了下来。
E: In the hundred-thousandth cycle, the Destruction had already fused into a blazing sun, surging within this fragile body. My rationality had been burned away at the dawn of the era... Yet even with only this shattered body remaining, I still endured.

C: 以欧洛尼斯的力量，应该无论如何都无法做到吧。
E: With just Oronyx's power, though, it should be impossible to achieve this, right?

C: 但，要让「岁月」从世上消失，也就意味着，你……
E: But to make "Time" vanish from this world, that would mean you...

C: 你们必须听我说，阿格莱雅，缇宝老师：此世的「白厄」尚未诞生。在遥远的未来，他会遵从神谕指引，出现在你们面前——
E: You must listen to me, Aglaea, Tribbie. The Phainon of this world has not yet been born. In a distant future, he will follow the prophecy's guidance and appear before you—

C: 第 <unbreak>134</unbreak> 次永劫回归
E: The <unbreak>134</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

C: 至于这两个概念，我也没法带给你准确的解释。
E: I can't give you an exact explanation of those two concepts either.

C: …独眼男孩，你这又是唱的哪一出？
E: ...One-eyed boy, what are you trying to pull now?

C: 于是，在第一百三十四次轮回的尽头……
E: And so, at the end of the <unbreak>134</unbreak>th cycle...

C: 罢了，想必这话你已听过无数次。所以你一定也明白，面对「纷争」的半神……
E: Enough, you've probably heard this thousands of times. So you must understand, facing the demigod of "Strife" means...

C: 你只活在我的心中。你…能去向何处？
E: You only exist in my heart. There's nowhere else for you to go.

C: 打得漂亮……
E: Well fought...

C: 我敬请你…安眠于此！
E: I ask you... to rest here!

C: 啊…啊啊…！
E: Ah... Ahhh...!

C: 当然，有关{NICKNAME}的一切都很好，人家全都会记下来。
E: Hey. Everything about you is good, {NICKNAME}. That's why I'll remember all of it.

C: 是呀。如今我们已经知道，封闭天空不是艾格勒的本意……
E: That's right. We now know that sealing off the sky wasn't Aquila's actual intention...

C: 人家说的是识刻锚。智械朋友不是说过吗：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
E: I'm talking about the Chronocognitive Anchor. Didn't that Intellitron friend say "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world"?

C: 给你看，日记本、羽毛笔，还有……
E: See? There's a journal, a quill pen, and...

C: 不如带上所有人吧，我相信你，{NICKNAME}。无论前方是什么，我们从不孤单。
E: Why don't we take everyone with us? I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. We'll never be alone, no matter what awaits us.

C: 以便我行地主之谊。
E: So I may demonstrate the full scope of my hospitality.

C: 铁墓降临，没人能毫发无损。
E: When Irontomb descends, no one will escape unscathed.

C: 什么动静，有人在吵架？
E: What's that noise? A dispute?

C: 缇宝预见了我们的到来？
E: Tribbie foresaw our arrival?

C: 天外之人已至，命运逐一应验。想来，「浪漫」的试炼也近在眼前了……
E: The one from beyond the sky has arrived, and destiny continues to be fulfilled. The Trial of Romance is also close at hand...

C: 好吧，请别让凯撒等太久。
E: Very well, just don't keep the Imperator waiting.

C: 部署棋局、左右下注，这运筹帷幄的游戏，反倒能为此世沉重的命运平添一抹亮色，就像统治和征服本就伴随着牺牲。
E: Moving chess pieces, placing wagers... this game of strategy adds a dash of color to our heavy fates, much like how rule and conquest are always accompanied by sacrifice.

C: 保护火种，还有「律法」…
E: Protect the Coreflames, and the "Law"...

C: 气氛有些紧张呢。城里满是流言，您一定很困扰吧？
E: The atmosphere is a bit tense. With rumors flying around the city, you must be troubled.

C: 抱歉抱歉，我们不是有意打扰您沐浴…我们这就离开！
E: Sorry, sorry! We didn't mean to disturb your bath... We'll leave now!

C: 对锋刃而言，狠毒是一种赞许。
E: Viciousness is a form of praise to the blade...

C: 我看到救世主了！
E: I saw the Deliverer!

C: 这次战争我们也一定能胜利！
E: We'll win this war too!

C: 小维吉妮娅想请二位浅浅「透露」一下她的未来，好找到提笔的灵感。
E: Little Verginia is wondering whether you can "let slip" a hint or two about her future, so she can find some inspiration to write about herself.

C: 自从他和欧洛尼斯的神谕一同降临，将群星的预言带给奥赫玛，逐火军就变了。他的低语难以抗拒，包藏祸心，令野心障目的人们一一踩入陷阱。
E: The Flame-Chase Army changed after he descended with Oronyx's divination and brought the prophecy of the stars to Okhema. His seductive whispers harbor something malicious within and will ensnare those of us blinded by ambition.

C: ——研发这个金血的原理是哀地里亚管！
E: The one behind the research and development of this golden blood principle is Aidonia's manager!

C: 为了与那谎言抗争…曾有一位化名白厄的青年踏上了三千多万次轮回，只为让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局。
E: To fight that lie... a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon lived through more than thirty million cycles of this world, all to save Amphoreus from the end of the Destruction.

C: 外面发生什么事了？
E: What's happening outside?

C: 啊，你终于来了呀……
E: Ah. You're finally here...

C: （可是，翁法罗斯无法从外界观测，如果没有丹恒转述，她不可能知道这些……）
E: (But Amphoreus cannot be observed from the outside. She couldn't possibly know about these things unless Dan Heng told her...)

C: （这到底是…怎么回事……）
E: (What exactly... is happening...)

C: 「这场战役中，共有九万青壮为奥赫玛英勇就义，其中也包括他们无畏的领袖——阿格莱雅。」
E: "Ninety thousand brave souls gave their lives for Okhema that day, including their fearless leader, Aglaea."

C: 我会把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。这样一来，它们就不再是我一个人的回忆。
E: I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.

C: 因为距离我们分别，真的…过去太久啦。
E: Because... it's really been far too long since we parted.

C: 前进吧，以我血为你铸就前路。
E: Keep moving forward. My blood will pave the road ahead for you.

C: 这份天真，就是苦难的因。
E: And that naivety... is the root of all suffering.

C: 于是，我开始漫无目的地游弋，在黑暗中摸索……
E: So I wandered, lost, groping through the dark...

C: 理由…无需赘述，这方寸池中的鱼儿，本就无法抗拒汹涌的命运。
E: I... don't need to explain myself. A fish in a pond has no hope against the surge of fate.

C: 她身侧的风暴逐渐停歇，眼角的泪伴血成滩，如金雨积作的浅潭。
E: The storm beside her slowly stills, tears and blood pooling at her eyes' corners like shallow ponds of golden rain.

C: 时间流速变慢了…
E: The flow of time has slowed down...

C: …而在它蕴含的无限中，一个不可预测，不受「智识」桎梏的新宇宙将在混沌中萌芽。
E: Then, within the infinity nurtured by that constant, a new universe shall bud in the chaos. A universe that cannot be predicted... and not shackled by the Erudition.

C: 现在，人家的手是不是很漂亮呢？
E: Aren't my hands pretty now?

C: 那，就请铭记下此刻的感受，把它写在名为「心」的书页中，保存起来吧。
E: Now, please remember what you're feeling right now, write it down in your "heart," and keep it there.

C: 但我理想中的乐园依旧遥远。或许，暂且与各位无名客同行，能令我的求索之路展现更多可能。
E: Yet the paradise of my dreams remains far away. Perhaps a brief journey with the Nameless can show me more possibilities in my search for paradise.

C: 伏龙…荒笛，那头愚蠢的地兽？它能做什么？
E: Walking dragon... You mean that stupid beast Terravox? What can they even do?

C: 不必为我惋惜：能杀死凯撒的人无穷无尽，但真正能毁灭她的……
E: Do not mourn for me. Anyone can kill the Imperator, but the only one who can truly destroy her...

C: 但现在，只有一件事，我十分清楚。
E: But I know one thing right now.

C: 就该轮到我出场了，对么？
E: It's my turn now, isn't it?

C: 当「再创世」无法顺利进行，你就会回想起我们的初遇。借此，我便能开启「记忆」的信道，抵达这里。
E: When the Era Nova fails to proceed, you will remember our initial meeting, and I'll be able to open the way for the Remembrance and reach this place.

C: 这也太强人所难了吧？
E: That's... gonna be tough to answer...

C: 翁法罗斯，一柄权杖，从某种意义上可以被视作一个微观的「宇宙」，这也是窃忆者们频繁光顾「黑塔」的缘由。
E: Amphoreus, as a Scepter, can be viewed as a mini "universe." This is why Memosnatchers have been frequenting the Herta Space Station.

C: 他们的一举一动，不都在你的监视下么？
E: And here I thought you were already watching my companions' every move.

C: 但忆域中，始终有一股力量将他们隔绝在外。
E: But there was always a power in the Memory Zone that kept them out.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>执行协议λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>：格式化对象█ ██ ███</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Execute Formatting Protocol λ<unbreak>003</unbreak>-<unbreak>097</unbreak>. (Object ███ ████ █████)</color>

C: 记忆戛然而止……
E: The memory stopped so suddenly...

C: 没有，我从不想这些。
E: I didn't miss you. I never think about these things.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>分支#1，已归档。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Branch #1, archived.</color>

C: 世界之外？
E: From beyond this world?

C: 唤醒所有尘封的「记忆」，让它们以更美的样子，被世界重新想起。
E: And awakens all the dust-covered "memories," so they can be recalled by the world in a more beautiful form.

C: 很可惜，那两位无名客已经来到了门外。你的计划…要出些小小的意外了。
E: But unfortunately, those two Nameless are already right outside the door. Your plan... is about to encounter a few mishaps.

C: 它的本质？终究是一串冰冷的数字。
E: Its essence is nothing but a string of zeros and ones.

C: 别想多了。我只是需要一点时间，来解决不必要的麻烦……
E: Don't get the wrong idea. I just need some time to deal with some unnecessary trouble...

C: 你偷换的概念可不止一条。
E: You're twisting more than just one concept here.

C: 可是你又不愿相信镜中的自己，如果总是想要替我扛下所有……那咱可真要变成花瓶，永远等不来主场啦？
E: But you don't even trust the you reflected in the mirror, and if you keep trying to shoulder everything for me... then I'll actually end up as a wallflower, waiting forever for my turn!

C: 这场「开拓」，有你在才算完整。
E: This Trailblaze journey wouldn't be complete without you.

C: 我绝对不能，让你成为下一个牺牲品。
E: Will not allow you to become this broken conspiracy's next sacrifice.

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 「做得真棒，{NICKNAME}！就像在冥界花海的时候……」
E: "Well done, {NICKNAME}... just like that time in the sea of flowers in the nether realm."

C: 所以<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：收下这份纲领，然后忘记它吧。以自己的意志扩写人生。
E: So <color=#dbc291ff>listen</color>: Take this guiding principle... then forget it. Let your own will be what expands your journey through life.

C: 呵，抵抗……
E: Hah, resistance...

C: 至于如何驯服它，将是你的问题。
E: As for how to tame it... I'll leave that to you.

C: 那道伤痕背后，就是它口中的「至深之地」。热汽告诉我，{NICKNAME}就在其中……
E: Behind that scar lies what they called the "deepest depths." The rising steam tells me that {NICKNAME} is in there...

C: 荒笛大人你在哪里？
E: Lord Terravox, where are you?

C: 那股名为「忘却」的力量…与令使无异。
E: That power called "Oblivion"... it's just like an Emanator's.

C: 若非在世界的尽头遇见了阁下，我还以为缇宁老师的预言出错了呢。
E: If I hadn't met you at the end of the world, I would've thought Lady Trinnon's prophecy was wrong.

C: 三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
E: March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.

C: 事关重大，做足准备吧。我等你，{NICKNAME}。
E: This is important, so make sure you're fully prepared. I'll be waiting for you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「那我们再把它偷过来，不就完事了？」
E: "Then we'll just steal it back. Simple."

C: 真是…诡异的光景。
E: What a... bizarre sight.

C: 「为什么没人告诉我们？！」
E: "Why did no one tell us!?"

C: 「那片长夜…那些黑色的忆灵…它们吞噬了一切……」
E: "That evernight... Those black memosprites... They swallowed everything..."

C: 翁法罗斯三千万世，英雄们从未屈服，也从未倒下……
E: The heroes never yielded and never fell during Amphoreus's thirty million cycles...

C: 凯撒的身躯在群星面前略显矮小，但足以成为世界的基石——成就最伟大的帝国。
E: Though the Imperator's figure may seem rather small against the stars beyond, she will suffice as the cornerstone of the world and become the foundation of the greatest empire.

C: 三，二，一…启动！
E: Three, two, one... Launch!

C: 「以{RUBY_B#背负混沌之人}卡厄斯兰那{RUBY_E#}之名，启程——向光前行！」
E: "In the name of {RUBY_B#Bearer of Chaos}Khaslana{RUBY_E#}, let us depart and march towards the light!"

C: 「赞达尔」那家伙，到底对权杖做了什么？
E: What did Zandar do to the Scepter...?

C: 提议：我们应当继续刚才的话题。
E: Suggestion: Let's get back to the topic at hand.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>黑塔，你该明白：银河不会坐视一位天才牺牲自己——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Herta, the cosmos won't just stand by and let a genius throw their life away...</color>

C: 合理的猜想。「长夜月」称其为「最初的智种」，也印证了这一观点。
E: It makes sense. "Evernight" calling it "the first Nouspore" confirms this viewpoint.

C: 当然。请借我些时间……
E: Of course. Just give me a second...

C: 准备好，要骇入了——
E: Buckle up. We're hacking in.

C: 有人化作世界的支柱，撑起「天空」和「海洋」；有人播撒「理性」，划定「律法」，再用双手将婴儿们轻轻捧起。
E: Some turning into pillars of the world, supporting the Sky and the Ocean. Others sowing Reason, laying down the Law, and with gentle hands lifting newborns into the light.

C: 我是「纷争」的神王，也是悬锋城的「万敌」。三千万世因果加诸此身——
E: I am the God of Strife, Mydei of Castrum Kremnos. In this body rests thirty million lifetimes of cause and effect.

C: 我听见了…白厄的心跳。很微弱，恐怕他只剩一息尚存。
E: I hear it... Phainon's heartbeat. It's so faint, like he's on his last breath.

C: 「然后，如人那般生……」
E: "And then, live as a human..."

C: 当然。
E: We will.

C: 「能力越大，责任越大。你肯定有办法指导{NICKNAME}他们吧？」
E: "With great power comes great responsibility. I'm sure you know just how to guide them, right?"

C: 这边，也有……
E: Over here, too...

C: 不过，*我*和缇安暂时还不能离开……
E: But... Trianne and I can't leave just yet.
Whoa...

C: 西风尽头，竟是一片狼藉的沙场啊。
E: So this is what lies at the end of the west wind... a ravaged battlefield.

C: 「却是另一片战场。」
E: "But it is a battlefield all the same."

C: 不错，我来回以最盛大的魔术！
E: Not bad. Let me respond with the greatest magic trick!

C: 记得，这不是你一人的「负世」。
E: Remember, this world is not a burden you bear alone.

C: …第一次终点。
E: ...Its first end.

C: 难道…你取回失去的记忆了？
E: You got your lost memories back?

C: 最初的光，照亮混沌吧。
E: Let the first light illuminate chaos.

C: 还有…多少记忆……
E: How many... more... memories...

C: 「鼓舞的话，就不必由我来说了。」
E: "You don't need me to give you words of encouragement."

C: 逐火的命路——由我们改写！
E: We will rewrite the Flame-Chasers' path!

C: 最后，我们「开拓」前路黎明……
E: At the end, we shall Trailblaze a dawn for the road ahead...

C: 哈哈，如果我不做选择，全都要呢？
E: Haha, what if I don't make a choice and take them all?

C: 去见见其他人吧，我会看好这两位黄金裔，保证讨论维持在「微醺」的状态。
E: Go meet the others. I'll keep an eye on these two Chrysos Heirs and make sure their discussion stays at a "pleasantly tipsy" level.

C: 对了，我听说，凯撒的逐火军喜欢在启蒙王座那儿办宴会？
E: By the way, I heard that the Imperator's Flame-Chase Army liked to hold feasts at the Luminary Throne?

C: 放松些，海瑟音。
E: Loosen up, Hysilens.

C: 你…不说些什么吗？
E: Aren't you... Going to say something?

C: 将{F#她}{M#他}留在生者世界的重任，就交给过去的遐蝶啦。
E: I'll leave {M#him}{F#her} to the Castorice of the past. She will keep {M#him}{F#her} here, in the world of the living.

C: 唔…不想那么多啦。还是，先把老爸安排的农活做完……
E: Hmm... I shouldn't think too much. Better finish the farm work Dad left me first...

C: 心中的英雄，自年幼时起便一直陪伴在我和他身边。
E: The Hero Within has been by our sides since we were little.
Memi!
Mem...?

C: 如此笃定，想必你心里已经有了某种猜想。
E: You sound pretty convinced. Surely you already have a theory.

C: 在这个古典的世界里，也有这样一座充满「未来」色彩的宫殿。
E: Even this classical world contains a "futuristic" palace like this.

C: 「只要我把故事的每一页都记录下来，为你讲述……」
E: "As long as I record every page of this story and tell it to you..."

C: >>>注释：小桃子。偷哭。小妖精。朋友。
E: >>> Note: Little Peach. Crying alone. Little fairies. Friends.

C: 「我就长成温柔的模样。」
E: "So I grew up to be gentle as well."

C: 学习
E: Learn

C: 学习
E: Learn

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要有两个「昔涟」，「空白」就一直在，桃子就一直在。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as there are two "Cyrenes," then there will always be "blank space," and Peach will always be here.</color>

C: 哀丽秘榭的女儿，真是名副其实呀。
E: The daughter of Aedes Elysiae... I am very true to my name.

C: 但我不是诗人，是不会长大的少女。我只讲述令人向往的故事，在那故事里，世界也会藏起伤痕，笑着被人们看见。
E: But I am no author. I'm a girl who'll never get to grow up. I only tell stories that people like to hear. In them, the world tucks away its scars and smiles for all to see.

C: 曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
E: Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.

C: 属于迷迷的记忆，属于「昔涟」的记忆，在同一颗心里兜兜转转，那么陌生，又那么熟悉。
E: Mem's memories and "Cyrene's" memories got all tangled up with each other in my one heart. It's all so strange... yet so familiar.

C: 唉，所以我最讨厌在剧本里设置形象过于夸张的角色了。
E: This is why I hate putting over-the-top characters into the script.

C: 少和我贫嘴。说，你此行的目的是什么？
E: Cut the chatter. What's your real reason for being here?

C: 准备完成█▄已增至最大输出功率！▄▄█▀▄█████████
E: Preparations complete█▄Maximum output capacity reached!▄▄█▀▄█████████

C: 阿格莱雅
E: Aglaea

C: 要给{M#他}{F#她}一个新的名字么？
E: Wanna give {M#him}{F#her} a new name?

C: 这一点已经有队员先一步提出，检查我们二人的瞳孔、汗腺、发声、体温。
E: We've done that already. The team here has checked our pupils, sweat glands, voice, and body temperature.

C: 检查落款字迹。
E: Check the signature.

C: 你什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 事已至此，我不愿继续放任水魈为害空间站。既然我们之中必有一人为假，不如牺牲我的个人自由，换来小队的安宁。
E: At this point, I must stop the Xenohydro from further harming the space station. To protect the whole team, I am willing to sacrifice my own freedom.

C: 我也相信，只要关押时长够久，水魈终会耐不住寂寞，现出原形。
E: I also think that, if we're locked up long enough, the Xenohydro will get bored eventually and show its true colors.

C: 你刚说什么？
E: What did you just say?

C: 哼，没错，难为你也发现了这底下的真相。
E: Humph, that's right. I am glad you can see the truth.

C: 咦，你今天不是轮休么？
E: Hey, aren't you off work today?

C: （上交备用电源）
E: (Hand over the backup power source.)

C: 哈哈，这叫「造谣」？这叫公开检举！
E: Rumors? More like a formal complaint!

C: 你是不是看了什么老掉牙的小说啊。还以为空间站里有什么隐世家族霸道总裁，动不动就是金库密钥的…少幻想多学习，好不好？
E: Have you been reading too many novels? You think there's some hidden heir on this space station with keys to the family coffers? Less fantasizing, more researching, got it?

C: 同步程序激活中…激活成功！确认坐标信息来源于<color=#dbc291ff>基座舱段</color>，坐标信号强，信号来源距离小于三百米！
E: Activating synchronization program... Activation successful! Beacon signal is coming from the <color=#dbc291ff>base zone</color>. The signal is very strong, and is within <unbreak>300</unbreak> meters!

C: 恋爱真好啊。
E: Sweet, sweet love.

C: 监控都拍到了。
E: It's been captured by the security footage.

C: 那时候，他们该怎么在一起？
E: When that time comes, how are they going to be together?

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: …我有什么好担心的！路是你们年轻人自己选的，遇到风险就得自己承担，我这种老头子，也只能在旁边干着急。
E: Not at all! You choose your own path and suffer your own consequences. An old man like me can do nothing but worry.

C: 那是因为我非常相信艾丝妲小姐！
E: That's because I have a lot of faith in Lady Asta!

C: 之前与那帮「军团」怪物对阵的时候，{NICKNAME}你保护了我，是值得信赖的同伴。
E: You protected me in the past when we battled those Legion monsters, {NICKNAME}. You are truly a trustworthy comrade.

C: 好事怎么没想起我…
E: How come you never have anything good for me?

C: 有志于修缮工作的科员，现在就到我这里熟悉流程。
E: Those who are interested in repair work, come to me now to learn the process.

C: 今天，今天我就要为阿尔弗雷德讨回公道！
E: T—Today I'm going to get justice for Alfred!

C: 那一定是钱还不够，发挥你的想象力，我满足你。
E: So it's not enough then. Fine, use your imagination, I will pay you whatever you want.

C: 一个人管着这么多资料啊。
E: You're responsible for all these archives?

C: 不，乔安科员，那绝对不是普通的自然遗忘，而是好像一夜之间，有人偷走了我的记忆……
E: No, Joanne, it's definitely not ordinary forgetfulness. It's like someone stole my memories overnight...

C: 据我所知，录像带都如实记录了某位所有者的亲身经历。你的意思是说，你看到的录像带，正是希拉科员的人生备份？
E: As far as I know, all those videos are records of someone's personal experience. You mean those videos you saw are backups of Researcher Sheila's life?

C: 你在胡言乱语些什么呀…不会是随便偷看录像带留下的后遗症吧？
E: What are you talking about... Is this another residual effect of watching those videos?

C: 你不要一副正经评论的样子啊！
E: Stop talking like an art critic!

C: 她的认知模块因为信息过载被烧毁了…看来将所有真相都告知她，是一个错误的选择。
E: Her cognitive module was burned due to information overload... It seems that telling her the truth was a bad decision.

C: （这个梅厄的表现似乎也不太对劲啊。）
E: (There's something strange about Mare.)

C: …你怎么知道我名字？天啊！难道你之前就在跟踪我，调查我的信息？你该不会……
E: ...How did you know my name? Oh, my goodness! Have you been following me and investigating me? Did you...

C: 嘿嘿，我之前为现在这种情况安排了紧急方案了。到这种时候，就要麻烦你跑一趟数据交换中心——也就是，终端机所在的机房。
E: Hehe, I've got an emergency plan for situations like this. Please visit the Data Exchange Center — where the terminal is located.

C: 除此以外便没有任何回应。
E: There are no other responses.

C: 终端机屏幕上跳动出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「查询失败，点击重新加载。」</color>
E: A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Query failed. Click to refresh."</color>

C: 波少之前承诺阿兰队长的时候，说的话和刚才一模一样、分毫不差。
E: He said the exact same thing when he promised Captain Arlan.

C: 去去去，你那个算什么线索？我这边这块地板才算好吧？你瞧瞧这个脚印——尺码符合，发力方式符合。这个才是大哥战斗的最佳证明！
E: Move aside. What kind of clue is that? This floor tile I found is way better! Look at the footprint — it's the right size, not to mention the angle of motion... This is proof of brother Arlan in combat!

C: 好啦好啦，误会解除。你们双方都应该反思反思才对啦！
E: Alright, alright — it's all a misunderstanding. You two should reflect on your actions!

C: 别害怕，亚伯拉罕。诡影目前尚未造成实质性伤害，防卫科也已针对此事展开了调查。
E: Don't be afraid, Abraham. The specter has yet to cause any substantial damage, and the Security Department has already begun an investigation.

C: 希望你们把知道的都说出来，协助防卫科早点侦破此事。
E: I hope you can tell us everything you know and help us crack the case as soon as possible.

C: 我确实对那奇物的行踪略知一二。它的学名叫做「呜呜伯」，是界种科收容的星灵。
E: I do know a little about the Curios. They're scientifically called Wubbaboo, a species of Astral Spirits collected by the Department of Ecology.

C: 正因如此，最近不少科员都拍到了诡异的照片，我想向你打听些消息。
E: And because of that, I would like to ask you about this rumor of staff members accidentally taking pictures of some eerie entities.

C: 所以才说是不幸中的万幸呀……黑塔女士的作风你也知道，她要真对什么东西感兴趣，就没别人什么事儿了。
E: Hence my "silver lining..." You know Madam Herta — if she's really interested in something, it doesn't matter what anyone else says.

C: 总之，就当是帮我个忙吧！不会占用你太多时间的。给，把镜头对准墙上的涂鸦就行了。
E: Ugh, just do me a favor! It won't take up too much of your time. Here — just point it at the graffiti on the wall.

C: 看，在前面——这家伙还标个问号，像是在拿我们寻开心。
E: Look — up there. Tsk, they even put down a question mark — they must be making fun of us.

C: 看时间，就是军团入侵那会儿，科员们应该都疏散了才对，所以是她？她没有马上离开，在把星核放入你体内后，还留在这里玩了一会儿定分枪？
E: It looks like the log time occurred during the Legion's invasion — the researchers would've already been evacuated by then. Could it have been her? In which case, she didn't leave immediately... She implanted the Stellaron inside you and then fiddled around with the rating pistol for a while?

C: 之前有科员没有报备，想偷偷用奇物做研究，全被她发现了。
E: Some researchers tried to gain access to the curios for research purposes once, but they didn't get proper authorization... She caught them all red-handed.

C: 支援舱段检修完了吗？这周必须得收工，不能再拖了。
E: Are the repairs in the supply zone finished? We have to wrap them up this week. No more delays.

C: 好像是有重要的客人来访……
E: An important guest coming...

C: 骇客？
E: Hacker?

C: 用黑塔的话说，那场对局没有输家。
E: In Herta's words, there was no loser in that fight.

C: 好啊，我很期待哦！这次你们准备怎么阻止我呢？把模拟宇宙当成黑匣子？联合公司进行跨星系包围？螺丝咕姆，我能见识到你真正的实力吗？
E: And I'm looking forward to it! How do you plan on stopping me this time? Are you going to turn the Simulated Universe into a black box? Or are you going to work with the IPC and put together a cross-galactic encirclement? Screwllum, will I be able to see your true strength this time?

C: 那…要是我当场摧毁模拟宇宙呢？
E: Then... What if I were to destroy the Simulated Universe right now?

C: 放心，这些「病毒」都是我编写的仿制品，绝对安全无害。
E: Don't worry, these "viruses" are all imitations written by me. They are absolutely safe and harmless.

C: 你之前是做什么的。
E: What do you do before this?

C: 我猜啊，她应该没什么朋友，而《太空大战争》是个多人协作游戏，只靠一个人玩不下去，所以才用这种方式找了一堆「帮手」。
E: I think she probably doesn't have many friends. Cosmic Warfare is a multiplayer collaborative game, so she couldn't play the game on her own, so she looked for a bunch of "helpers" in this way.

C: 你这家伙，是真听不进去话啊……
E: Were you even listening to me?

C: 之前的震荡是否导致列车哪里破损…让意想不到的东西溜进了列车？
E: Is it possible that the jolt just now damaged the Express? ...Did something manage to sneak in?

C: 都什么时候了，你还想着捉弄人？注意下气氛啊喂！
E: Ugh, read the room! Enough with the mean jokes!

C: 别分心噢！{NICKNAME}，得盯紧每个角落帕。
E: Stay focused! {NICKNAME}, you need to check every corner.

C: 翻阅智库中的「诸界异虫札记」时，我读到了一种仅存在于记述中的虫类——因为缺少实际的研究样本，作者仅将其暂名为「巨真蛰虫」。
E: When reading through the Chronicles of Interdimensional Insects in the data bank, I came across a species that had only been described in records. Due to the lack of research samples, the author gave it a tentative name: Giant Sting.

C: 为什么不直接跃迁走？
E: Why don't we just warp out of this place?

C: 你确实想得很美。
E: Haha, you have a wild imagination.

C: 看来星穹列车并无大碍，只是这追尾事件…有些稀奇了，连我也是头一次经历。
E: The Astral Express seems fine, but a collision like this in space is... a little unusual. Even for me, it's a first.

C: 我从没有想过，第一次和你们见面竟然就可能是拜拜。哎，看来现在也做不了什么，我维利特就把自己最后的时间，用来听你们说说列车的故事吧……
E: Who knew our first meeting would be our last... *sigh* It's hopeless. I'll just spend the rest of my short life listening to your ramblings about the Express, I suppose...

C: 什么，跟佩佩玩不带我是吧？
E: Huh? Invite me next time!

C: （回忆一下埃美丽当时说了些什么吧。）
E: (What did Emily say...?)

C: …边走边说吧。
E: ...Let's walk and talk.

C: 嗯嗯，好的好的，您有事儿说事。
E: Mm-hmm, sure. Can I help you with something?

C: 探索关联记忆【黑塔的委托】
E: Explore the related memory "Herta's assignment."

C: 怎么了，一副苦恼的样子，需要帮忙么？
E: A portrait of internal turmoil. You look troubled. Do you need help?

C: 黑塔关注的，应当不是奇物本身。
E: I doubt Herta is interested in the Curio itself.

C: 科员连续失踪…防卫科队长阿兰的任务，我也有所耳闻。
E: Researchers' disappearances you say... Yes, I've heard the responsibility of sorting out that mess has been thrust upon Arlan, head of the Security Department.

C: 只有我？
E: Just me?

C: 其次，是受害者的共同点，当然，这是个不怎么愉快的话题。
E: The next angle is what the victims have in common — distasteful as that discussion may be.

C: 抱歉，好像说了很难懂的话。别紧张，我并无敌意，我没有对你的语言中枢下手，那样太失礼了…我只是加了一点小调剂。
E: My apologies, it appears my words have left you perplexed. Please, don't be on edge — I bear no ill will. I haven't interfered with your linguistic faculties — such an act would be impolite... I merely made a minor adjustment.

C: 我喜欢「豆沙灰灰」！
E: I like Gray Bean Paste!

C: 鉴定通过，嘶嘶。
E: Permission granted, *buzz*.

C: 记忆…消散？
E: Memory... dissipate?

C: 螺丝咕姆还会继续留在空间站一段时间，他和黑塔还有问题没有解决。我很快就要走了，但不会特意跟大家道别。
E: Screwllum will stay on the space station for a while longer. He and Herta still have problems they need to solve. As for me, I'm leaving soon and won't bother with goodbyes.

C: 嘶嘶，黑塔女士，开启舱段。嘶嘶，用以接待，异界物种，银河访客。
E: *buzz* Madam Herta, open zone. *buzz* To welcome, alien species, galactic visitors.

C: （…咦，门外有动静？）
