E: (...Huh? What's that sound out there?)

C: 雷金先生，我虽然还是没听懂您的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，但我的直觉告诉我，这是一项震古烁今的发现。
E: Mr. Regin, though I still do not fully understand your "big universe time tunnel" theory, my intuition tells me that this is an era-defining discovery!

C: 我和{NICKNAME}是老熟人了，之前{F#她}{M#他}多次帮我向教育部递交过论文，虽然一次也没成功。
E: {NICKNAME} and I go way back. {F#She}{M#He} has helped me submit my papers to the Ministry of Education many times. Although, none of them were ever successful...

C: 我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
E: I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?

C: 检索到多条相关数据：「最近一次协助时间是▉▉」「星穹列车为鼹鼠党优化了运输路线」「累计完成▉▉次物资配送」。
E: I have found multiple related data items: "The most recent assistance was completed on ▉▉." "The Astral Express helped to optimize The Moles' transportation routes." "A total of ▉▉ cargo deliveries have been completed."

C: 你们驻扎在此多久了？
E: How long have you been stationed here?

C: 愿贝洛伯格的火焰永不熄灭…愿我们的人民永远…幸福……
E: May the flame of Belobog never die... May our people... enjoy eternal happiness...

C: 这样你以后再来，见到纪念碑，就等于见到这些叔叔了。只要你没有忘记他们，他们就永远不会消失。
E: That way, any time you come here and see the monument, it'd be like seeing these soldiers again. As long as they exist in your memory, they will never die.

C: 怎么样？是不是很特别。
E: What do you think? Isn't it special?

C: 有没有在海边捡到过怪东西？
E: Have you ever picked up something strange while you were down at the shore?

C: 干这行的有很多规矩，得好好教教你们：怎么潜行，怎么找货，怎么估价，怎么躲铁卫，那都是技术活……
E: There are ways of doing things in this profession, and you better get familiar with them. Moving in the shadows, finding the goods, pricing your stock, hiding from the Guards... there's an art to all of it.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样？你准备好出发了嘛？
E: Ready to go, {NICKNAME}?

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们是不是该去见见布洛妮娅？毕竟是她给咱们发的邀请函嘛。
E: {NICKNAME}, say, I think we should probably pay Bronya a visit. After all, she was the one who invited us here.

C: …有人给你发消息了？
E: Did someone send you a message?

C: 那…你后来又和托帕联系上了吗？其实我和{NICKNAME}一直很好奇，她提供的解决方案到底是什么……
E: Did you manage to get in touch with Topaz again? We're curious to know what solution she has in mind...

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 我…我应该想好了。
E: Okay, I think I've got it.

C: 看看那群黑衣人嚣张跋扈的样子，怎么能信任那种家伙？签了合同又如何，谁能保证他们不会毁约？
E: Just look at them — arrogant, stomping around here as if they own the place. How can such people be trusted? Who's to say they won't breach the contract?

C: 嗯，我也这么觉得。但是「出卖了人民的君主」什么的…一想到以后可能有人这么评价她，我就觉得很难受……
E: I think so too. But could you imagine having to hear names like "The Traitorous Ruler" for the rest of your life?

C: …那是当然！布洛妮娅的为人，可是有咱们列车组官方认证的。
E: You bet! The Express can vouch for Bronya. That says a lot about her character.

C: 他那样的属于极端个例啦，正常的入职流程才不会拉那么长。
E: You could say he's a special case. For most people the interview process is much shorter.

C: 报告——前方的道路已经畅通了，大守护者大人。您和同伴可以放心北上了。
E: The path ahead is clear, Madam Guardian. You and your companions can proceed north without hindrance.

C: （没想到这次又经历了…好困，该睡觉了……）
E: (I never thought this trip would be so... *yawn* ...tiring. Time for bed...)

C: 具体的操作细节我会稍后解释，先前进吧。
E: I'll explain later. Let's get moving.

C: 什么人都想救，就意味着谁也救不了——到头来只是折磨了患者，又累倒了自己。
E: She tries to save everyone, which means she can't save anyone... In the end, it's the patients who suffer, and she just tires herself out.

C: …瓦赫的事，我还没想好该怎么向你传达。我们之间的关系…还有他在下层区做过的事，这些旧事都说来话长。
E: ...I still haven't worked out how to convey it to you, the issues surrounding Vache. My relationship with him... the things he's done in the Underworld... it's a long story.

C: 这就是纯粹的毒药吧…
E: It just sounds like poison...

C: 也许真的和运气太差有关…
E: They were unlucky...

C: 于是，那位医生联络了自己在下层区的妹妹…声称他想来支援下层区的医疗工作。
E: As such, the doctor got in touch with his sister in the Underworld... claiming that he wanted to support the medical effort below ground.

C: 虽然不是很情愿，但……
E: Not my preferred course of action, but...

C: 我看那婆娘就是盯上了我们的药，特地派你来砸场子的吧？
E: She's after our medicine and sent you here to smash the place, right?

C: 哼，真是个偏执的家伙…在这方面，你跟你那疯子哥哥没什么两样。
E: Ugh... So stubborn... In that sense, you're no different from your crazy brother.

C: 搏击俱乐部正在为下一赛季作准备，敬请期待！
E: The Fight Club is now preparing for the next super league season, stay tuned!

C: 那些事是你干的？
E: You did all those things?

C: 它就在收容舱段。
E: It's in the storage zone.

C: …至于信上的其他内容，恕我愚笨，我实在是看不大懂。
E: As for the rest of the letter, please forgive my ignorance, but I really don't understand it.

C: 但你提醒了我，似乎一时间很难把这么多材料凑齐……
E: But you reminded me that it'll be difficult to gather all the materials quickly.

C: 我可以放过你和水魈。
E: I can let you and the Xenohydro go.

C: （不能用太强硬的态度对待这孩子。慢慢来吧，先顺着她的话问下去。）
E: (Don't be too tough on this child. Be patient, and go along with what she's saying for now.)

C: 你的姐姐，她没陪着你吗？
E: Your sister... why isn't she with you?

C: 我实在没办法，情急之下只好大声喊你名字…还好你听到了，谢天谢地。
E: There was nothing I could do. In a hurry, I called out your name... Fortunately, you heard me. Thank god.

C: 那就这么决定吧，{NICKNAME}。可以请你带路吗？
E: Flowers it is then, {NICKNAME}. Can you lead the way?

C: 侯爵夫人…这么名贵的花……
E: Marquises... Expensive...

C: 第三件事…我听说矿区有些小孩子也和这事有关联。这点我还没机会查证，你们不妨留意一下。
E: Thirdly, I heard there are children in the mines that might be involved. I haven't had a chance to look into it, but keep an eye out.

C: 克拉拉！
E: Clara!

C: 这事…这事你们必须答应帮我保密哦！克拉拉也是！
E: But... you have to promise to keep this a secret. You too, Clara!

C: 听好，以后我们也要坚持做好事，争取成为史瓦罗大佬最信任…啊，是除了克拉拉姐姐之外最信任的人！
E: Look, from now on we have to do good things only — that way we can become Mr. Svarog's most trustworthy... uh — second most trustworthy friends, after Clara of course.

C: 这你就不懂了，君子之交淡如水，大家都是有头有脸的人物，何必纠结这些琐碎杂事？
E: You wouldn't understand — friendship between gentlemen is as pure as water. We are all dignified people, why bother with such trivial matters?

C: …什么乱七八糟的？赶紧回家吧，我们在忙着交…咳，在忙着执行公务呢，闲杂人等别来捣乱！
E: ...Wh—What's that supposed to mean? You'd best turn around and go home — we're busy handling the delivery of— Ahem! B—Busy handlin— um... executing official business. No loitering!

C: 说回正事，你还记得上次抓到的那位诺尔伯特公子吧？铁卫从他嘴里打听出了新情报，我这次是特地来通知你的。
E: By the way, you remember that Norbert guy we captured? The Silvermane Guards have acquired new intel from him — I thought you might find it interesting.

C: …这才像话嘛！就知道你小子刚才又在跟我开玩笑，把我吓出一身冷汗。
E: Now that's more like it! You had me in a cold sweat with those jokes...

C: 那个，{NICKNAME}，你倒是多说两句啊，不然这场面多尴尬！
E: Ahem... So, kinda cold out, huh, {NICKNAME}? Man, this is getting uncomfortable...

C: 您也知道我们博物馆重启不久——虽然从贝洛伯格各地搜集来的展品已经基本能够满足展览需要，但我们的导览工作仍有大量职缺。
E: You know that our museum has only reopened just recently — and so while our exhibits from all over Belobog meet our standards, we're still severely short of tour guides.

C: 嗯…接下来我们需要进行一个简单的面试。不过，别担心，我们只是走个流程，不会问太多问题的。
E: Hmm... Next up, we need to conduct a quick interview. But don't worry. It's just a formality, and we won't ask too many questions.

C: 这个问题是否有点尖锐…
E: This question seems rather pointed...

C: 唔…谢谢{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！
E: Oh, thank you so much, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}!

C: 不知怎么，竟然感觉有点紧张……
E: For some reason, I feel a bit nervous...

C: 找到犯人之前，不许饿！
E: There won't be any eating until we find the culprit!

C: 费斯曼老爹是谁？
E: Who is Fersman?

C: 少废话，我说去你就去！
E: Stop talking nonsense and go to the clinic now!

C: …没错，这可是相当值钱的情报。
E: Yes indeed, it is quite a valuable piece of information.

C: 这四个嫌疑人都在避难所里。你们如果有自信的话，不妨再去问问看——说不定这回能找到真正的犯人。
E: All four suspects are at the shelter. If you're feeling confident, why not go give it a try? Maybe you can determine who the thief is.

C: 心虚了？我看你就有问题。
E: Feeling guilty or something? You seem a bit off.

C: 我觉得最可疑还是<color=#dbc291ff>厨子</color>还有<color=#dbc291ff>小贩</color>。虎克的直觉一向很准，真正的犯人肯定是他们中的一个。
E: I think the <color=#dbc291ff>cook</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>merchant</color> are the most suspicious. My gut tells me that one of them is the culprit.

C: 人生总是伴着意外，要习惯…
E: Life is full of disappointments, sorry kid...

C: （这么高调的颜色…等等，帽子上好像写了名字——「匹克」？）
E: (Such a high-profile color... Wait a minute, there seems to be a name written on the helmet — "Peak"?)

C: 我一直把它当压箱底的宝贝…我跟你说，这张藏宝图的前任主人，背后也有段曲折的经历——
E: I've been taking such good care of this precious of mine... You see, the former owner of this treasure map turned out to have quite the tragic story...

C: 光靠逃避解决不了问题。你离开家里这么久，一听到他的事却还是会生气——这说明你还没有完全放下。
E: Running away doesn't solve the problem. It's been ages since you two had those fights, but you still can't let it go... You need to walk out of his shadow.

C: 呃…你刚才击退了裂界怪物吗？
E: Hey... Did you just scare off a Fragmentum monster?

C: 她也不想告诉我们到底发生了什么。我们很担心她，想帮她的忙，但又实在毫无头绪。
E: And she won't tell us what happened. We're really worried and want to help, but we don't know where to start.

C: 我们就一起边走边看吧——当然，还得方便观测极光才行。
E: Well, we'll just keep moving and see. The place has to be convenient enough for us to observe the aurora, too.

C: 这个坡道的视野好像很好…观测极光感觉会很方便欸。
E: This slope has a good view... It'll be easy to watch the aurora.

C: 没错，这是雪地萝卜。味道甜甜的，很好吃……
E: Yep, that's a snow radish. They're really sweet and tasty...

C: 这附近应该搜索得差不多了…佩拉，我们回去吧？
E: I think we've searched through everything here... Let's head back, Pela.

C: 说到底，它根本不是食物吧……
E: I still don't believe this is supposed to be food...

C: 哎？
E: Huh?

C: 裂界影响的消除需要时间。
E: It takes time for the Fragmentum's influence to fade.

C: 两百冬城盾……
E: Uh... <unbreak>200</unbreak> shield...

C: 谢谢你，希儿。通常我陷进负面思绪的时候，旁边总是安抚的声音；从来没有一个人敢像你这样，直接把我敲醒。
E: Thank you, Seele. Usually when I feel sorry for myself, I am met with gentle consolation. Never has anyone dared to be tough and make me snap out of it.

C: 该做正事啦！虎克的宝贝就藏在孤儿院下边，矿区入口附近。
E: Time to get to work! Hook's treasure is hidden below the orphanage, near the mine's entrance.

C: 那是尤利安的东西…
E: But these marbles belong to Julian...

C: （脏兮兮的盔甲是到手了，现在该回去找史考特要尾款了……）
E: (Finally got this dirty armor. It's time to go back and ask Scott for the final payment...)

C: ——零件，收集，返回，工坊。
E: Collecting, parts, returning to, workshop.

C: 这应该是帕斯卡仔细维护的成果…不过，这个小家伙应该没有使用显示器的需要吧。
E: This must be the result of Pascal's meticulous repairs... but the little fella doesn't really need the monitor, does he?

C: 但是，不知道出于什么原因，帕斯卡频繁遭到同类的攻击…因为自动机兵们会把它识别为裂界生物。
E: However, for some reason, Pascal keeps getting attacked by his fellow robots, because the automatons think he's a Fragmentum creature.

C: 至少克拉拉觉得是这样。但帕斯卡究竟为什么会被当作裂界生物？我还找不到答案……
E: At least, that's my theory. Still, that doesn't explain why Pascal is being treated as a Fragmentum creature...

C: 那是最好。
E: That would be best.

C: 这是史瓦罗的老巢？我还以为是个冷冰冰的地方，居然这么热闹？
E: This is Svarog's lair? I thought it'd be cold and lifeless, turns out it's pretty busy!

C: 这是「内燃机」总冠军八十八度矿底，代表下层说唱的黎明，给你们带来震撼心灵的陷阱——
E: Internal Combustion Engine champion — <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock — reppin' the dawn of the Underworld rap. Here's something to wake up your soul, check it...

C: …{NICKNAME}，我能砸烂这货吗！
E: ...{NICKNAME}, can I smash this can opener already!?

C: 我亲眼瞧见过他把微晶导体单元接上逻辑控制中枢，点亮了一台振动钻头。
E: I saw him connecting a microcrystalline conductor unit to a logic control hub to get a vibrating drill to work.

C: …桑博？人呢？
E: ...Sampo? Where is he?

C: 它的意思是，工坊那里有怪物出现？克拉拉她……
E: Does it mean that a monster appeared over at the workshop? Clara, she...

C: 如果连她都说服不了…
E: If we can't even persuade Clara...

C: 想不明白……
E: Argh... I can't figure it out...

C: 这两处的线管部件，尺寸和磨损程度明显和设备本身有差别，应该是你刚刚替换掉的吧？
E: The dimensions and wear of these two roller components look very different from the rest of the unit. You must have only just replaced them.

C: 我们再聊聊史瓦罗的事吧。
E: On the issue of Svarog...

C: 我们是为「星核」而来的。
E: We're here about the Stellaron.

C: 娜塔？你们怎么……
E: Nat? How did you...

C: 这就结束了吗，娜塔？我们，「地火」，还有下层区…我们胜利了吗？
E: Is this it, Nat? Us, Wildfire, the Underworld... Did... did we win?

C: …你三句不离史瓦罗大佬，我听腻了。
E: ...Do you ever talk about anything else? I'm so tired of hearing about Svarog.

C: 抓紧时间休息吧，{NICKNAME}，地上的冒险可不会这么轻松了。
E: Take a good rest while you still can, {NICKNAME}. Your adventures on the surface won't be easy-going.

C: 这么多年了…我追随的，难道全都是谎言吗？
E: So many years... Have I been following lies this whole time?

C: 一见倾心，一锤定音！由「地火」组织的旧物拍卖会即将开幕！有意向的朋友，欢迎届时前往流浪者营地参加拍卖会！
E: Love at first sight, sold at first strike! The Wildfire used item auction is opening soon! If you're interested, head down to the vagrant camp and get involved!

C: 用真诚的爱感化。
E: Persuade them with true love.

C: 用花言巧语欺骗。
E: Deceive them with charismatic rhetoric.

C: 玩偶大熊，可可爱爱！
E: He sure is cute and cuddly!

C: …这就把我给忘了？好伤心啊…算了，不重要，我们还是聊正事吧。
E: ...You don't remember me? How saddening... Anyway, it doesn't matter. Let's get down to business.

C: 那也得有工钱拿啊！懂不懂什么叫志愿者，哎……
E: I don't have a salary to give! I'm a volunteer... *sigh*

C: 五百六十！
E: <unbreak>560</unbreak>!

C: 呜哇，{NICKNAME}，所有人都在看着我们！该怎么办！
E: Argh, {NICKNAME}! Everyone's looking at us! What should we do?

C: 我就说一遍，你听好了！
E: I'll say it once. Listen carefully!

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 费斯曼大叔收到你们准备的礼物，肯定会很开心的。
E: Fersman will be very happy with his gift.

C: 那他一定是「常量」史瓦罗了。
E: Nice haircut, Svarog.

C: 我是「地火」派来解决事件的。
E: The Wildfire has assigned me to solve the case.

C: 但克拉拉不这么认为…小机器人也有自己的想法，也会感受到疼痛……
E: But I disagree. Robots have their own thoughts and feelings...

C: 另外…我很好奇这个小家伙的来历。{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，如果可以的话…能请你之后再来这里一趟吗？
E: I'm also curious about where this little fella came from. Could you please come back later, {NICKNAME}?

C: 史瓦罗先生，我明白…只是，克拉拉觉得帕斯卡很特别。它身上有些其他小机器人不具备的东西……
E: Mr. Svarog, I understand, but I think Pascal is different. He possesses a quality that other small robots don't have...

C: 根据刚才的状况来看，它的核心应该还没完全报废，有修好的可能性。
E: Judging from how active the robot was, its core isn't just scrap metal. It should be repairable.

C: 我们快回去吧，不然史瓦罗先生和帕斯卡要等着急啦。
E: Let's head back, otherwise Mr. Svarog and Pascal will get worried.
█Back█back██. Back█back█back to Rivet██!█Rivet██Rivet██!

C: （问题的核心是什么？慎重思考，选择其中一种方法，然后说服另一人吧。）
E: (What is most important here? I need to think carefully and choose one solution, then persuade the other person.)

C: 你不是会努力实现她的愿望吗？
E: You said you'd try to make Clara's wish come true.

C: 「病毒」…
E: A virus...

C: 看起来没有…史瓦罗先生的保护程序非常有效。只是不知道以后会发生什么……
E: He's been doing great — Mr. Svarog's programs are extremely effective... It's just hard to know if it will last...

C: {NICKNAME}，好人！帕斯卡，高兴！
E: {NICKNAME}, good! Pascal, happy!

C: 「机械热潮」也要转型了吗…唉，摇滚已死，没有受众了啊。
E: Even Mechanical Fever is changing... *sigh* Rock 'n' roll's dead, there's no audience anymore.

C: 能不能有点出息，在后备队混吃等死能「存护」谁？我们铁卫是为了保护贝洛伯格人民而存在的！
E: Ahh, you make it sound terrible. Good luck "preserving" anything with those idlers in the reserve units. Our purpose as Silvermane Guards is to protect the citizens of Belobog.

C: 是我们干的？
E: Did we do this?

C: 希露瓦…为什么……
E: Serval... why...

C: 「应急消防疏散系统」…肯定不是这个……
E: Emergency Fire Evacuation System... Not that...

C: 「机关栈桥控制终端」——哈，还不是让我找到了！
E: Gear Bridge Control Terminal — ha, still found it!

C: 差不多了吧，杰帕德！看看你周围，只剩你还站着了！
E: That's enough, Gepard. Take a look around you! You're the last man standing!

C: 他是朗道家的人。
E: He's a Landau.

C: 我还有什么办法？看看这帮家伙，有一个算一个都是废物！
E: What else can I do? Look at these guys. All of them are useless scrubs!

C: 所以，你究竟是谁？
E: So who exactly are you?

C: …算了，当我没说。
E: ...Never mind. Forget I said anything.

C: 铆钉镇不过是裂界伸出的一根触角——而我们现在正深入心脏。
E: Rivet Town is only at the outstretched fingertips of the corrosion... Now, we're deep in the Fragmentum's heart.

C: 之前也没有人类能在体内容纳一颗「星核」。
E: Well, there's never been a human that could accommodate a Stellaron in their body.

C: 人类…总是软弱愚蠢，总是不自量力。
E: *vicious laughter* Humanity... so weak and foolish. Always overestimating their abilities.

C: 我明白。但…我必须保护相信筑城者的人民…
E: I understand, but... I must protect those that believe in the Architects...

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: {NICKNAME}本人也不清楚吧？这不是第一次了。在空间站面对末日兽的时候，也发生过类似的事——还记得纳努克的瞥视吗。
E: {NICKNAME} probably doesn't know what happened either. This wouldn't be the first time... Something similar happened when we faced the Doomsday Beast on the space station. Remember that glance from Nanook?

C: 我帮你，哪怕只是出于同情。
E: I'll help you, even if it's just out of sympathy.

C: 未必哦。
E: Not necessarily.

C: （这人真要命啊…还是先回到列车组报告吧。）
E: (Ugh, these non-stop messages are driving me nuts... *sigh* Guess I should head back to the Express to report first.)

C: 当然也不排除是你在说反话。
E: Of course, you might also just be sarcastic.

C: 白色的客运型通过了6艘。
E: You saw six white passenger starskiffs passing through.

C: 红色的货运型通过了1艘。
E: You saw one red passenger starskiff going past.

C: 请问还要测试一次吗？
E: Would you like to test again?

C: 这样吧，你留下来，我去追肇事者。
E: Let's split up. You stay here, I'll go after the perp.

C: 你别看她这个人和声细语的，但是她能调度好几百号人的拍摄现场，可有本事了。
E: She may be gentle and soft-spoken, but she can command a film set with hundreds of people working. She's so capable.

C: 西南口的机巧鸟。
E: Cycrane at the southwest entrance.

C: 船首附近的龙骨有着明显断裂，这似乎解释了「咔嚓」一声究竟由何而来。
E: The keel near the bow was broken, which seems to explain the crack sound.

C: 芦慧姑娘能让你丢了工作吗？
E: Are you worried that Ms. Luhui will fire you?

C: 呃，抱歉，我其实才被选入丹鼎司不久，方子我还没背熟呢。
E: Um, sorry, I just started working in the Alchemy Commission recently. I haven't even memorized the common prescriptions yet.

C: 丹士的表情突然紧张了起来。
E: The healer suddenly looks very nervous.

C: 那么，该谈谈报酬了？
E: Now, it's time to talk about payment.

C: 哦，太好了，去会会这位「小聪」吧，也许你能帮得上他呢？
E: Oh, that's great. Go and meet him then, and maybe you can help him?

C: 你明白了，我可没明白啊！
E: You get it better than me!

C: 可恨如今这罗浮交通便利，通讯方便。人们虽然乘舟离别，却不用担心归期何时，既没有殷殷的叮嘱，也没有深深的情谊呱……
E: I curse the convenience of modern-day transport and communications aboard the Luofu. People depart yet don't have to worry about when they'll return. There's no earnest pleading, no heartfelt emotion, croak...

C: 不知先生是否满意？
E: Are you satisfied, sir?

C: 你给我回来！
E: Come back here!

C: {NICKNAME}，快看，它在这儿。
E: {NICKNAME}, look! It's right here.

C: 可惜我是个机巧，没得选。主人要我学习，我就得吞下海量的诗作。
E: As an ingenium, I have no choice. If my master wants me to study poetry, I must read of them in spades.

C: 如果不是服下特殊的方剂，持明是不可能记得前世恩爱的。要不然，就是蜕生时候带着什么信物吧？
E: Without consuming a special potion, there's no way we can remember our lovers from our past lifetimes. Otherwise, one needs to carry something like a token during their hatching rebirth.

C: 小聪，你的诗写好了吗？
E: Cong, have you finished writing the poem?

C: 河对汉，绿对红。雨伯对雷公。烟楼对雪洞，月殿对天宫。
E: River contrasts with creek, green contrasts with red. The Rain God contrasts with the Thunder God. The Smoke Tower contrasts with the Snow Cave, and the Moon Pagoda contrasts with the Heavenly Palace.

C: 不能。
E: No.

C: 你知道「美丽狐仙聊天服务」吗？
E: Do you know about the Foxian Beauty Chat service?

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 你先说。
E: You first.

C: 你最好是这样。
E: You better not.

C: 等等，我备注一下，易燃易爆炸，易碎有液体…全部安全事项都给它勾上，这样的话，机巧鸟就会送得比较慢。
E: Wait, let me put in a note. Flammable, explosive, fragile, contains liquid... I'll check all the safety-related options. That way, the cycrane will travel at a slower speed.

C: 我出来，我出来还不行吗？
E: ...Alright, alright, I'll come out. Satisfied?

C: 我跑不了的，就待在这里。求求你，别告诉他「狐仙黛青」的真相。
E: I have nowhere to go. I'll be right here. Please, don't tell them the truth about the Foxian Beauty Daiqing.

C: 我们不会和她见面的，现在要回去了。
E: We won't be meeting her, so we're going home.

C: 随后，地衡司将赛博诈骗的案件公示，各种各样的受害者得到了相应的赔偿。
E: Later on, the Realm-Keeping Commission publically released information about the cyber fraud cases, and various victims received appropriate compensation.

C: 得亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。不愧是让太卜另眼相看的人，一股身经百战的气质，用来虚张声势再合适不过了。
E: Good work, {NICKNAME}. As expected of someone who gets special recognition even from the Divination Commission, your battle-hardened aura couldn't be more fitting for this charade.

C: 对呀，不然他们会一直问我。不过你来晚了，很显然经纪人也没在这附近。
E: Yup! Otherwise, they would have never stopped asking for it. But you're late, and obviously the manager isn't around here anymore.

C: 你简单讲述了自己的经历…
E: You talk about your experience briefly...

C: 最后好像还有个…呃，嗯…我很难描述的东西。他说那是一道<color=#dbc291ff>「龙形的光芒」</color>？是指「不朽」之龙留给后裔的神迹吗？
E: The last thing he saw was... umm... quite hard to describe. He said it was a <color=#dbc291ff>dragon-shaped ray of light</color>. Could it have been a miracle left behind by Long the Permanence for their descendants?

C: 你的老师见过龙尊吗？
E: Did your teacher ever meet the high elder?

C: 我知道。据说中间有些复杂的变故。可惜学会挖掘不出其中的秘密。
E: I know. Something complicated took place. It's a shame that the Guild is unable to unearth the secret.

C: 呃…呜…骨头……
E: Urgh... Ow... My bones...

C: 长生不老…仙舟联盟拥有所有短生种梦寐以求的奥秘，但他们藏珍自重。
E: Immortality... The Xianzhou Alliance possesses a secret which all short-life species crave, but they keep it to themselves.

C: 留在鳞渊境里的那些图案…
E: Those patterns left in Scalegorge Waterscape...

C: 这不是人手不足嘛。龙女大人狡猾得很，让她乖乖待在地衡司公廨里，肯定会趁我们不注意的时候偷溜出去，毕竟，这种事情也不是第一回了。
E: Like I said — we don't have enough people! The Dragon Lady is smart. If we try to keep her in the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery, she'll sneak out the first chance she gets. Trust me, it's happened before...

C: 这可由不得你们。
E: I'm afraid that's not your call to make.

C: 藏在鞋底，复古的藏物方式……
E: Hiding things in shoes... Such a classic method.

C: 是啊，不过据我了解，他们的「蜕生」是有极限的。
E: Yes. But so far as I know, their "rebirths" have a limit.

C: 孩子咂咂嘴，意犹未尽。
E: The boy smacked his lips, craving more.

C: 吃完了。接下来该去哪儿呢？我想…去长乐天瞧瞧！
E: All finished. Where should we go next? I wanna... go to the Exalting Sanctum!

C: 医护！冷静！
E: Nurse! Get a hold of yourself!

C: 拜托，别再说这些刺激人的话啦！
E: Hey, we've got company, remember!?

C: （提交捡到的留言）
E: (Hand over the note you picked up.)

C: 不，正是因为我非常清楚自己是个什么情况，我改主意了…我想再见他最后一面。
E: No, I know exactly how bad my condition is. That's why I've changed my mind... I want to see him one last time.

C: 应该算是见到了吧。
E: Seems likely.

C: 难道她不是你的爱人吗？
E: Isn't she your sweetheart?

C: 上次去过了，到现在还欠着老板娘六百镝左右的饭钱…
E: I think I still owe the owner about <unbreak>600</unbreak> strales in unpaid food bills...

C: 我正与丹恒大人对谈，无关人等还请退避。
E: I'm speaking with Master Dan Heng. I'm afraid this doesn't involve you — please take your leave.

C: 现实却是：自诞生起我就被羁押在幽囚狱中。就算获释离开仙舟，龙尊的过去与丹枫的{RUBY_B#刃}仇敌{RUBY_E#}仍如影随形。
E: ...but in reality, I was locked up in The Shackling Prison at birth. Even after I was released and left the Xianzhou, my high elder past and Dan Feng's {RUBY_B#Blade}enemies{RUBY_E#} pursued me like a haunting shadow.

C: 相请不如偶遇，我替各位参详参详这些人的来意，如何？
E: A chance meeting is a gift from fate. Why don't I help you to fathom their intent, then?

C: 中绝传承的罪人，不配踏入持明族的圣地。
E: A criminal who destroyed our succession is unworthy of setting foot in the sacred places of the Vidyadhara.

C: 告辞了各位。
E: Farewell, all of you.

C: 你曾经是我的英雄，我从小就梦想像你一样，能成为云骑军的大英雄，可是你、可是你为什么要背叛长老们的期许！
E: You were my hero — I dreamed of being just like you — of joining the Cloud Knights... But you betrayed the hopes and dreams of the elders!

C: 谢谢将军费心了，我还想和丹恒再聊聊。
E: Thank you, general. I'd like to talk more with Dan Heng first.

C: 简而言之，生物集群有可能做到个体无法做到的事。
E: In short, a group of organisms has the potential to achieve things that an individual creature cannot.

C: 你卖给我这么危险的东西，我们就算共犯了帕。为了保守秘密，只能委屈你永远闭上嘴了帕。
E: Selling a dangerous item to me makes you my accomplice, and I've got too many of those. To keep our little secret safe, I'm afraid I need to take special measures.

C: 「罗刹」。这个人叫罗刹。
E: Luocha. His name is Luocha.

C: 几位，这个事情还挺花时间的。如果准备好了就来找我吧。
E: This might take you some time. Come and find me when you're ready.

C: 别客气，我们是伙伴嘛。
E: No big deal, we're all on the same team after all.

C: 诶，原来净砚小姐是书友！…不过，作者苏芳好像是医馆的医助长，主角渔公也是个医士…你怎么不去丹鼎司呀？
E: *gasp* A fellow reader! But Miss Jingyan, the author — Su Fang — was the lead medical assistant in an apothecary, and the main character — the Angler — is a healer... Why didn't you want to join the Alchemy Commission instead?

C: 很遗憾，小三月，没有「返老还童」，也没有「渔公」。
E: Too bad, March. No de-aging, no Angler.

C: 问你小子话呢！你是来做什么的？
E: Hey, I'm talkin' to you! What's your business here?

C: （这样一来，罗刹就该跑路了，该跑到哪里去呢？我看看地图，喔，知道了！）
E: (And so Luocha has to make a break for it! But where to? Lemme have a look at the map... Aha, gotcha!)

C: 对不起！我一个坐办公室的，实在请不起你们吃大餐。
E: I'm sorry! I'm afraid I don't have the money for anything fancy.

C: 夕葵小姐建议我，将那个挂饰找回来还给妈妈，也借此修复一下和她的关系。
E: Miss Xikui suggested I find the trinket and return it to Mom — said it might help me get back in her good books.

C: 但这瓷瓶本身倒是很精致漂亮，这款式应该是「仙兽祥瑞纹」吧？
E: It's a beautiful vase though — what an intricate pattern. Isn't that the Divine Beast Fortune pattern?

C: 无论是驱驾斗舰，还是执掌火力，采翼都像一把冰刀，干脆利落，毫无多余的情绪。
E: Both at the controls and behind the turret — Caiyi was like a cold blade... efficient, decisive, unfeeling when she had to be.

C: 那么，我们就先告辞了。
E: Mm, we'll take our leave.

C: 这台确实可以用！好的…唔…我查查，历代司舵的私人档案归档于…找到了。我们过去看看吧。
E: We can use this one! Okay... hmm... lemme see — helm masters, personal archive... got it! Let's go take a look.

C: 采翼小姐的遗物，究竟放在了哪里呢？
E: Where are Miss Caiyi's possessions stored?

C: 我听说过，那场战役能安然结束，全都仰赖帝弓的庇佑。如果驭空大人始终还带着那枚飞行士的挂件，那么也许她其实也一直都眷恋着天空……
E: I heard the war that forged this object was only won thanks to the Reignbow Arbiter's blessing. If Madam Yukong still carries objects from that pilot, then perhaps she still longs for the sky...

C: 在星神的伟力之下，凡人的牺牲，都像是笑话一样…什么都不是…什么都不是……
E: Under the might of an Aeon, the sacrifices of ordinary creatures are but a joke... we are nothing... we mean nothing...

C: 您认为我该怎么做？
E: What do you think I should do?

C: 我的问题？
E: My questions?

C: 瞧…就是这样。这很简单，{NICKNAME}。
E: And there you have it. It's a pretty simple game, don't you think, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不知道呢，我猜不透哪个答案才是你的真心话。
E: After all, how can I know which answer is which?

C: 你们需要我活着。
E: You all need me alive.

C: （小声）还是不报真名了吧…
E: Best not to reveal our true names...

C: 呵呵，各位仗义相助时，小女子就知道恩公们是大大的善人！可惜…停云也无能为力呀！你们毕竟是外人，未经司舵驭空大人的授权，谁敢擅作主张。
E: Hehe, your actions have already revealed your kind hearts to me! Sadly... I can't make you any promises. You're outsiders, and only Madam Yukong has the authority to consider your offer.

C: 我的头脑足以打开这把锁！
E: Prepare to meet your maker, lock!

C: 青镞突然顿住语声，和她一样，你察觉到周遭的空气冷了下来。
E: Qingzu suddenly stops talking. Like her, you perceive a chill settling in the air around you.

C: 咱们可以启程了。唔…我打算重游几处故地，酹酒一杯，缅怀旧事。
E: We can head out now. Hmm... I would like to visit a few places from my memories, enjoy a glass of wine, and reminisce about the good times.

C: 白珩…白珩…这个名字，似乎在哪里见过……
E: Baiheng... I think I've seen that name somewhere before...

C: 你特意支走那个孩子，有何目的？
E: ...Why did you send him away?

C: 你可以一次次说服自己是丹枫的转世，与他所犯下的罪责无关。你也可以坚持自己已经遗忘了一切。
E: You can continue to convince yourself that you are merely the reincarnation of Dan Feng and have nothing to do with his sins... and you can keep insisting that you have forgotten everything.

C: …应星。
E: Yingxing...

C: （委婉地拒绝）
E: (Decline respectfully)

C: （直白地拒绝）
E: (Decline directly)

C: 实在对不住，打从药王秘传被铲除后，司里的一切都乱了套。
E: I'm sorry, ever since the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were expelled, things have been a mess around here.

C: 难道是刃…
E: Could it be Blade...?

C: 你说的没错，「饮月君」的一生已经结束了。现在站在你面前的是另一个人。
E: The life of Imbibitor Lunae ended. I stand before you a completely different person.

C: 帝弓巡猎，云骑景从，不计牺牲讨魔守正，确实令人敬佩，可惜…却不免狭隘。
E: Under the auspices of the Reignbow Arbiter, the faithful Cloud Knights continue The Hunt. Their devotion and sacrifices are indeed commendable... but their devotedness has made them close-minded.

C: 现在，该是我们付出代价的时候了。
E: Now, it is time we pay for what we have done.

C: 若是见到她，你们最好别靠近，立刻告诉我。
E: If you see her, be sure to keep your distance and notify me immediately.

C: 你们可真能脑补…
E: You've really got an active imagination...

C: 出什么事了？是发生什么意外状况了吗？
E: So, what happened? Did everything go as planned?

C: 若问出了药方的细节，欢迎随时来找我。
E: If you turn up any details about the prescription, feel free to come back and find me any time.

C: 好的。
E: Sure.

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 好啦，这一路总算是又做了一件好事。
E: We're glad we could help!

C: 三月小姐与卡芙卡的情况大不相同，她不记得过去发生的事情。
E: Miss March's predicament is very different from Kafka's situation, because she doesn't remember what happened in her past.

C: 另外，请允许我提醒您——过去的已经过去了，回想过去毫无意义，您能把握的只有未来。
E: Also, allow me to remind you — you cannot change the past. The future is all that's left for you.

C: 三月…得见吗……
E: March... Can you... me ...

C: 我相信小三月的直觉。
E: I trust your intuition.

C: 但我依旧还记得这把剑自出炉之日起所镌刻的字铭，孤云。它出自朱明仙舟焰轮铸炼宫的匠人「含光」之手。
E: I still remember the name engraved on this sword the day it was forged, Guyun. It was forged by Hanguang, a craftsman from the Zhuming's Flamewheel Forge.

C: 看来你听说过不少传说故事，但我说的「魔剑」并不是那样的。
E: You've clearly heard a lot of folk tales, but that's not the kind of "cursed sword" I'm talking about.

C: 刚才有个小姑娘气势汹汹地向我问路。她说她是工造司的，你认识吗？
E: Just a while ago, a girl came up to me, all fierce and demanding directions. She said she's a member of the Artisanship Commission. Do you know her?

C: 哦——这就不奇怪了，这就不奇怪了。
E: Oh, I see. That explains it then.

C: 而再后来的事你知道了——她的父母相继倒在血泊之中，焰轮铸炼宫的匠人们也多有死伤。云璃虽然侥幸逃过一劫，但她并没有从这段过去中逃出来。
E: And you know what happened next. That massacre took her parents' lives and the lives of many craftsmen in the Flamewheel Forge. Yunli managed to survive, but she couldn't escape the horrors of that day.

C: 孤云确实是含光铸造的魔剑之一。
E: Guyun is indeed one of the cursed swords forged by Hanguang.

C: 哎呀，排除了各种可能之后，只留下了一种可能，那么它就是「真相」。
E: Well, when you have eliminated the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.

C: 我感觉，我们还有思维盲区。
E: I think we might be missing something here.

C: 老夫什么都不知道，你问我也是白问。
E: I don't know anything else, so asking more questions won't help.

C: 用来封藏孤云的剑匣，它看上去很漂亮，这是它被盯上的原因吗？
E: The container used to seal Guyun is indeed a sight to behold. Its beauty is radiant. Perhaps it was this very beauty that has drawn unwanted attention.

C: 直到握住孤云，我才会感受到它的所思所想，不能言说的一切。
E: It wasn't until I held Guyun in my hands that I could sense its thoughts and unspoken words.

C: 云璃找了一处无人打扰的清静地方，将她与魔剑之间的纠葛和盘托出。
E: Yunli finds a quiet place where no one would disturb her and lays out the entanglement between her and the cursed sword.

C: 我是卡勒瓦拉守碑人的后裔。在下的家族世世代代负责看护着那位无名英雄留下的巨大石碑。
E: I come from a long line of Kalevalan monument keepers. For generations, my family has guarded the stone monument left behind by the nameless hero.

C: 「飘零他乡，身殒在即，幸不辱天职。」
E: "I have drifted far from my homeland and am on the brink of death. Yet, I take solace in having honorably fulfilled my duties."

C: 出示证人「公输师傅」
E: Present witness: Master Gongshu

C: 我在剑匣底部夹缝中，找到了这个。
E: I found this in the crevice at the bottom of the case.

C: 比起说明——你要亲自体验一下么？
E: Rather than hearing endless explanations, would you like to experience it for yourself?

C: 很害怕的表情呢。放心，既然此事与你无关，我不会为难你的。就当陪我走走吧。
E: What a frightened look you have. Don't worry. Since this has nothing to do with you, I won't be suspecting you of anything. Why don't you come take a stroll with me?

C: 如此看来，是三位勇士联手行凶？
E: So the three of them teamed up to kill her?

C: 但还有一些别的线索，被放在了更不碍事的地方……
E: But, there are still some other clues that were placed in other areas so they won't spoil the crime scene...

C: 很有她的风格，不是么？
E: This is so her style, isn't it?

C: 在我看来，这起案件应该不存在凶手。
E: In my opinion, there is no murderer for this case.

C: 最后是赌徒钟珊。他曾在一场赌局中输给花火大人，不得不交出自己的传家之宝，可能正因如此，他对花火大人怀恨在心。
E: Finally there is the gambler, Zhongshan. He lost a bet to Miss Sparkle, and he had to hand over his family heirloom. It's possible he harbored a grudge against her.

C: 我还以为你要把咱们拒之门外。
E: I thought you were going to have us escorted out.

C: 你们做得很好，我已感应到「穷观阵」的符箓重新被点亮了。
E: Well done, all of you. I can sense the Matrix of Prescience symbols re-illuminating.

C: …艾利欧说，他预见了三个问题，但本质上都是一回事。如果我听到了其中之一，就把此行的目的，一五一十地告诉你。
E: ...Elio said he foresaw three questions, but they would be the same in essence. If I were to hear one of them, I would then tell you the objective of this trip in all its detail.

C: 咦？这地儿聚了好些人呀。看来今天罗浮宜歇业，忌开工。
E: Huh? Look at all the people gathered here... Not a good day for commuting on the Luofu.

C: 要是你们找见了师傅，请一定平安把他带出来！他要有个三长两短——
E: If you find my master, please bring him out safe and sound! If anything happens to him...

C: 树灾？应该是「建木」吧……
E: "Botanical disaster"? It must be the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 老大，算了算了，条子不可怕，但你爹知道又要打你屁股了……
E: *sigh* Let's leave it, Boss. Detention's detention, but if your dad finds out, you'll get yelled at and start crying again...

C: 老大，人家说招一名战士，又没说是来招你。人家说不定是来招我的！
E: Boss, they said "hire a fighter," not "hire you." It might be me they're after!

C: 可是我…一想到自己给丹枢姐姐…给{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}添了这么多麻烦，拖累了两位，就觉得很惭愧……
E: But I... When I think about all the trouble I've caused you two... I feel like such a burden... I'm sorry...

C: 很抱歉…在下骗了你很多事，但在下只为骗你吃那副药的事道歉。至于其他的谎言，只是为了能和你平等地交流。
E: I lied to you about many things... but I reserve my apology only for deceiving you into taking the medicine. As for the other falsehoods, they were merely in aid of communicating as equals.

C: 但他们猜的没错，仙舟确实保留着转变为长生种的秘密。我很欣赏你，想把这样的机会留给你。
E: Their aspirations are well-founded. The Xianzhou does indeed harbor the secret to becoming immortal. I admire you, so I thought I'd give you the chance to obtain it.

C: 上来就谈钱？也太功利了吧？我重金放生那些小羊时可没想着问他们收费啊。
E: That's so mercenary of you. When I released the sheep, I never thought of asking them for my money back.

C: 行行行。我明白了，羊要吃草，人要吃好。既然有人愿意放弃功德，兑换成更直接、更冰冷的信用点数字，那么我就满足{F#她}{M#他}好了。
E: Fine, I get it. Both sheep and humans have to eat well to survive. Since someone is willing to give up merits in exchange for cold hard credits, I'll fulfill {F#her}{M#his} wish.

C: 不过您刚才这番举动不仅败坏了你的功德，也让某位放生者的一番善举化为乌有…
E: Your actions earlier not only undermined your own merit, but also nullified the good deeds of a member of the Unshackled...

C: 最左边那个女人叫做冬妮娅，是「放生帮」「野兽派」的代表人物，热衷于放生那些强而有力的猛兽。你打死的那些小狼就是她放生的。
E: The woman on the left is Tonya, the leading figure of the Beast Faction in the Unshackled and passionate about releasing powerful wild beasts. The wolves you killed were released by her.

C: 你那些狗屁苜蓿长起来漫山遍野，把那个星球的生态都破坏了，要不然红毛羊至于泛滥成灾吗？红毛羊不泛滥，也就不会被当地猎人捕杀！我也用不着千辛万苦地高价买来放生了！
E: Your annoying alfalfa grew all over the place and disrupted the entire ecosystem of that planet! If it hadn't been for your alfalfas, the Faunus Red Sheep population wouldn't have boomed, and they wouldn't have been hunted to near extinction by the local hunters, and I wouldn't have had to buy them at a high price and release them!

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们总结一下吧…看看能不能从这几个人的要求中找到共性……
E: {NICKNAME}, let's compile a summary and see whether there are similarities among these three...

C: 仙舟的机巧到底哪儿凶猛了？满大街飞来飞去的机巧鸟到底哪里濒危了！
E: What's ferocious about cycranes? Besides, people see them flying by all the time — they couldn't be endangered!

C: 我看看，应该怎么连接计算中枢呢…算啦，接上我带来的这些超控装置吧？
E: Let me see... How should I connect to the central processor? Forget it. I'll just connect them directly to the override modules.

C: 是啊，你们几位都是放生帮的成员，一方有难，总不见得大家都不闻不管吧？
E: Since we are all members of the Unshackled, surely they did something when you were in trouble, right?

C: 还是别靠太近吧…这希斯曼现在快要狗急跳墙了，别一会儿咬上咱俩……
E: Don't get too close to Heathmann... He seems desperate. He might sell us out soon.

C: 你按着钟珊消息的指示，获得了一一封信和几件小礼物。
E: Following the instructions in Zhongshan's message, you find a letter and several small gifts.

C: 帝弓保佑！帝弓保佑！
E: May the Arbiter protect us!

C: 闲话不多说了，快看，这就是我昨天在「绥园」直播时发生的诡异事情！
E: Enough chit-chat — look! This is the weird stuff that happened yesterday when I was streaming in Fyxestroll Garden!

C: 很有道理。不过观众不了解底细，岁阳和幽灵也没什么区别。
E: Yeah, I guess so... I still feel like my audience will see them as ghosts, to be honest.

C: 很遗憾，能帮你的只有我了。
E: Unfortunately, I'm the only one who can help you escape from here.

C: 那位代表罗浮出战岁阳的将军名唤「腾骁」。
E: The general who fought for the Luofu against the heliobus was named "Teng Xiao."

C: 决战之后，燎原再也不能融聚成形，散成不同的「分灵碎片」，被封进了造化洪炉之中。
E: We heliobi could never condense into physical form after that battle. We scattered into fragments and were sealed into the Creation Furnace...

C: 怕啥，这不是正巧吗？走，我们进去看看。
E: Less screaming, more thinking — this is an opportunity, is it not? Let's go in and check it out.

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 又是镜子…有完没完啊？
E: Mirrors again... what a surprise.

C: 笨蛋，这显然是个假货！
E: Stupid girl. This is obviously a fake!

C: 区区妖物，被我一口吞下才是最好的归宿。
E: An insignificant demon... I can't wait to devour it myself.

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 你好像很累…快去休息吧。
E: You look pretty tired... You should take a break.

C: 柯柯娜，是我呀。
E: Cocona, it's me.

C: 不过…您要是真的那么想帮忙的话，我的确有一件事想拜托您。
E: But... if you really wish to help, I do have a request to ask of you.

C: 这都被你发现了……
E: How did you even guess...

C: 他们不是那样的人。
E: They aren't like that.

C: 不是你想的那样…
E: It's not what you think...

C: 如果说谎就会遭惩罚，你猜那些游手好闲的富人能活到现在吗？
E: If lying is cause for punishment, you think those indolent rich folk would still be alive now?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 我头一次发现…原来现实中的匹诺康尼也那么美。梦境里的那些霓虹灯光…总是让我想起深海。我经常会感到迷失。
E: I'm noticing for the first time... that Penacony looks quite pretty in reality as well. The neon lights of the Dreamscape... makes me think of the unfathomable sea. I feel lost all the time.

C: 柯柯娜，是我。
E: Cocona, it's me.

C: 我已经无法忍受了。这已经是我的极限…放过我吧……
E: I can't take this anymore. This is my limit... Let me go...

C: 谢谢你，{F#女士}{M#先生}。谢谢你尊重我的意愿。
E: Thank you. Thank you for respecting my wishes.

C: …你知道自己的坚持没有白费。
E: ...You know your perseverance is not in vain.

C: 在人群的鼓励下，柯柯娜忘我地歌唱。她的歌声变得愈发动听、自信……
E: With the crowd's encouragement, Cocona loses herself in her song. Her voice becomes more euphonious and confident...

C: 你将莱斯利•迪恩的情况转述给了艾丽…当然，除去了一些对你不利的「细节」。
E: You explained Lesley Dean's situation to Alley... Naturally, you excluded a few "details," for your own sake.

C: 你们是谁？你们想要什么？这里…这里可是梦境，在梦里抢走的东西是带不回现实世界的。
E: Who are you? What do you want? This... This is a dream. You can't take things you steal in a dream back to reality with you!

C: 那位先生已经离开匹诺康尼了，他……
E: This gentleman has already left Penacony. He...

C: 谢谢你，哈里……
E: Thank you, Harry...

C: 罗伯特的嘴角微微上翘，似乎在尽力向镜头递交一个令人满意的笑容；但那双深邃空洞的眼眸轻易地出卖了他——他沈溺了。
E: Robert's mouth is slightly upturned at the corners, as if he is trying his hardest to give a satisfactory smile to the person behind the camera, but his empty eyes betray him... He is drowning.

C: 哈里…
E: Harry...

C: 她是莱…是我曾经的助理。
E: She's Les— my former assistant.

C: 放心吧——没有我在，他们是不会走的。你忘了我是谁了吗？
E: Relax, they will not leave without me. Have you forgotten who I am?

C: 希望您会喜欢这幅画像。
E: I hope you'll enjoy this painting.

C: 第一个需要改进的地方，是船员本身的培训。当然，这是上一任船长的遗留问题了。所以我想向您讨个方便，让我来负责招募与管理船员！
E: The first area for improvement: Crew member training. Of course, this is a legacy issue left behind by the previous captain. I'd like to ask for a favor of letting me be in charge of recruiting and managing the crew!

C: 我也没有反对的选项啊。
E: It doesn't look like I have the option to refuse...

C: …钟表小子。
E: ...Clockie.

C: 船长，我已经向您汇报了所有船务事项，我现在回去继续工作了，您要是有事，随时喊我，我就在外面值班。再见！
E: Captain, I'm done reporting about all the airship's tasks. I'm gonna head back to work. If something comes up, just gimme a holler! I'll be working outside. See ya!

C: 艾、艾弗法先生！您怎么来了？
E: M—Mr. Alfalfa! What are you doing here?

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！既然橡木家的家主缺席，我这个「后起之秀」也该多在人前露露面了。
E: Ohohoho! Since the Oak Family Head is absent, I have to meet with more people as an "up-and-coming talent."

C: 踢掉它的电源。
E: Kick out its power supply.

C: 麻烦您查一下我的预约记录：我的名字是罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔。
E: Please could you look up the name I booked under: Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell.

C: 真的吗？！太好了！奥帝叔叔果然靠谱！
E: Really!? That's amazing! Uncle Oti's the man!

C: 我再仔细瞅瞅…宝了个贝的，还真是你！匹诺康尼的大英雄，闲着没事跑到这儿来干嘛？
E: Let's take a closer look... holy forkeroni, it's actually you! The hero of Penacony... what are YOU doing here?

C: 我也随你同去，波提欧兄弟。
E: I'm coming with you, Boothill.

C: 欸，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！刚才我俩还聊起你了呢，好巧！
E: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}! We were just talking about you a moment ago. What a coincidence!

C: 离开？
E: Departure?

C: （不知道青雀那边到底出了什么情况，好像很紧急…但是大堂的工作怎么办？）
E: (I wonder how things are going on Qingque's side. It sounds pretty urgent... But what should I do with the work in the lobby?)

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 拜别飞霄将军。
E: Farewell, General Feixiao.

C: 我天，爱剑如命的彦卿居然…
E: Woah, Yanqing loves that sword more than his life, and yet...

C: 要是有符玄大人哪有这么多事！
E: If you were here, we would never have had so many issues!

C: 我得空去看了彦卿的守擂赛，打得不错。更难得的是对对手的敬意。
E: I managed to get time to go and see Yanqing's ringmaster match. You did very well. Your respect for your adversary was particularly commendable, too.

C: 啊，对了！那封公司的入职邀请函！
E: Ah, yes! That invite!

C: 你也说了，莱恩师傅本来是研究材料学的。但听你谈起他，说的都是他对星槎设计的热爱。想必他留下，也是因为对星槎的兴趣。
E: You even said it yourself. Master Ryan originally researched material science. But you've been talking about him and his passion for starskiff design. Presumably, he stayed because of his love for starskiffs.

C: …看起来种子要被包裹起来了。
E: ...Looks like this seed is about to be wrapped up.

C: 不行啊，要是对一项工作产生自豪感，那就不能毫无愧疚地摸鱼了……
E: Oh no, if I take pride in any of the work, then I can't just slack off without feeling guilty...

C: 再见了星槎！
E: Goodbye, starskiff!

C: 过去有很多工匠们做过这样的尝试，大多以失败告终。当时的星槎专家认为「轻型星槎的优势在真正的危险面前得不偿失」。
E: Most craftsmen who made similar attempts in the past ended up failing. Starskiff experts at that time opined that the advantages of lightweight starskiffs did not contribute much in the face of real dangers.

C: 我做了好长的一个梦…我记得我还在工造司的办公桌前……
E: I had a very long dream... Before that, I was sitting at my desk at the Artisanship Commission...

C: 看来咱这淳朴热情的民风给客人留下了不错的印象啊，哈哈哈。
E: Sounds like our rustic and friendly community left a good impression on the visitors, hahaha.

C: 让我再准备准备。
E: I might need some more prep time...

C: 顺路帮忙……
E: Came along to help, huh...

C: 「地火」的卢卡，不论你前来的动机是什么——
E: Luka of Wildfire, it does not matter why you came here...

C: 故地重游，本姑娘内心真是颇有一番感慨……
E: Coming back to this place brings back so many memories, you know...

C: 这一回咱们既没有被人半胁迫半诱骗，也不是为了追捕什么通缉犯，更不是从卸货码头登陆，如此一帆风顺……
E: This time, we're not being forced or enticed, or chasing after wanted criminals. And we didn't have to sneak in through the cargo dock. This trip has been incredibly smooth...

C: 真是难得啊！
E: Quite unusual, I must say!

C: 好久不见。
E: It's been a while.

C: （激烈的嘶吼）
E: (frantic roars)

C: 我们也不算入港啊！我们是遭遇了步离人的袭击，才不得不来罗浮的港口避难啊！
E: But we didn't officially enter your dock at all! We just sought refuge in your dock because we were attacked by the borisin!

C: 景元，这三位就是你之前提到的，助你弭平建木灾异的救星咯？
E: So, these three are the ones you mentioned, Jing Yuan? The heroes who helped you with the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis?

C: 恕我直言，你对助我等杀敌护身的剑器毫无尊重，配不上这柄剑。
E: With all due respect, you don't honor your sword, so you don't deserve it.

C: 丹恒啊，我还以为仙舟的将军个个都跟景元一样……
E: Hey, Dan Heng, I thought all the Xianzhou generals were like Jing Yuan...

C: 罗浮的演武仪典能得到您大驾光临，自然是罗浮的荣幸。
E: It is the Luofu's honor to have you in attendance at the Wardance.

C: {RUBY_B#建木灾异始末}罗浮上发生的一切{RUBY_E#}，元帅皆已知悉。而曜青的天击将军……
E: The Marshal knows {RUBY_B#The ins and outs of the Ambrosial Arbor Disaster}everything that has happened on the Luofu{RUBY_E#}. As for the Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing...

C: 也许是彦卿多心了。
E: Maybe I'm just overthinking things.

C: 给诸位介绍一下，这位是我的老朋友斯科特。他多才多艺，尤其擅长模仿动物朋友。
E: Hey, everyone! Meet my old friend, Skott. He's very talented, especially at imitating animals.

C: 你有你的规矩，人家有人家的规矩。我们在人家的地盘上，是不是应该守人家的规矩？
E: Everyone has their own set of rules. Now that you're on their turf, shouldn't you follow their rules, too?

C: 够了，我讨厌把同样的理由重复说上一百遍。
E: Alright, that's enough. I'm not going to repeat myself a hundred times.

C: 和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
E: Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.
Huh???

C: 有劳你了。
E: Thank you for your help.

C: 我在执勤，晚点再聊。
E: I'm on duty. Let's catch up later.

C: 抱歉，就算贵为将军，也要埋单付钱吧？何况，丹鼎司的医馆从来明码标价，概不赊欠。更何况问诊龙女大人的队伍早已排到了几十年后啦。
E: Sorry, but even a general needs to pay their bills. We don't do credit here. And let's not forget, you'd have been waiting decades for a chance to see the Dragon Lady if it weren't for me.

C: 给我乖乖趴下！
E: Just stay down!

C: 刚才那个从天而降的就是曜青的云骑将军吗？她真的好帅！
E: Hey, was that the Yaoqing General who just dropped in out of nowhere? She's so awesome!

C: 想必是为了商讨如何应付曜青和朱明将军的到来。
E: I bet it's about how to deal with the generals from the Yaoqing and the Zhuming.

C: 有些蠹虫怀疑你的忠诚，臆断你昏聩无智，他们乐见神策将军失策，是因为他们本性如此，身无建树，只渴望目睹他人的失败作为活下去的养料。
E: There are fools who doubt your loyalty. They're happy to see the Divine Foresight fail because it gives them some kind of sick satisfaction. They haven't achieved anything of their own, so they feed off the failures of others.

C: 演武仪典期间，大大小小比武与庆贺数不胜数。其中最重要的莫过于「守擂竞锋」。
E: There will be numerous contests and celebrations during the Wardance, and the main event will be the Ringmaster's Challenge.

C: 呵呵，要的就是知根知底。演武台上一招制敌，那多没劲啊！何况决定剑士生死的，可不是什么「绝招」，而是扎实的基本功。
E: Heh, the whole point is to know each other's moves. Defeating your opponent in just one move? How boring would that be! Plus, what really decides a swordsman's fate isn't some "special move" — it's the solid fundamentals.

C: 大人，犯人向那边逃去…
E: The fugitives fled that way...

C: 将军回答我，「入阵出剑，登擂示剑；以一剑出鞘，敛百剑锋芒」。
E: And this is how the general replied: "To unsheathe your sword in a ring is no different than on the battlefield, as your sword reveals the might of all Cloud Knights."

C: 他们似乎在捣鼓星槎制造线？
E: Looks like they were tampering with the starskiff production line, huh?

C: 我就觉得古怪，空气里总有贱畜的味道…
E: I knew something was off. There's always this stench of lowly beasts in the air...

C: 这些家伙怎么又折回来了？快退后！
E: Why are they coming back? Quickly, retreat!

C: 除开罗浮报告中的记述，「曜青」天舶司也搜罗了不少关于二位的见闻。本人一直想会会你们，原因…想必景元将军也解释过了吧？
E: Outside the reports from the Luofu, the Sky-Faring Commission of the Yaoqing has also gathered plenty of information about both of you. I've been eager to meet you face to face, for reasons that... I'm sure General Jing Yuan has explained, right?

C: 景元将军在呈递的报告中，将建木灾异的祸首归罪于{RUBY_B#反物质军团}烬灭军团{RUBY_E#}，警示众天将应当关注烬灭祸祖的动向。
E: According to General Jing Yuan's report, the {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}Ruin Legion{RUBY_E#} is to blame for the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, and all Arbiter-Generals should pay attention to the Ruin Author's movements.

C: 为此，我要委屈两位无名客前往幽囚狱一趟。
E: And for that, I'll have to ask the two Nameless to visit the Shackling Prison.

C: 我不相信。所以我来了，为了证明他看到的命运不存在。
E: No, I don't. That's why I'm here, to prove that the prophecy is not real.

C: 你果然像怀炎说的那般，是个特别的存在。
E: You're definitely a unique individual, just like Huaiyan said.

C: 一段时间后，一艘星槎将你和丹恒载至一处看起来颇为熟悉的地方……
E: Some time later, a starskiff carries you and Dan Heng to a place that looks strikingly familiar...

C: 怎么不好好施工？
E: Why keep the terrain so dangerous?

C: 「断狱轮钥」已打开了通路，希望我们来得还不算晚……
E: The Nether Key has been activated. I hope we're not too late...

C: 这就是长生种的生活方式吗？节奏如此之慢。我情绪中枢里「期待」的效用值空前高涨啊。不行，我得喝些冷却液给它降降温了。
E: Is this how long-life species live? Everything proceeds so slowly. The effectiveness of "anticipation" in my emotional center is at an all-time high. Oh, I need to drink some coolant.

C: 步离人千里迢迢潜入罗浮，试图用阴谋诡计救出他们的领袖…这整件事都太过蹊跷，不像步离所为，倒与此前建木灾异时药王乱党的行动有几分相似。
E: The borisin traveled all the way here to infiltrate the Luofu and attempt to rescue their leader with a crafty scheme... This is completely unlike them. To be honest, it reminds me of what the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did during the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis.

C: 灵砂挑开云骑的甲胄，探手摸索片刻。
E: Lingsha peels open the Cloud Knight's armor and stretches out her hands to search for a moment.

C: 我明白了。我听说曜青的狐人与步离人的血脉尤为相近，其中有些狐族子裔会像步离人一样，不可遏制地陷入名为「月狂」的疯症。
E: Well, I understand. I've heard that the foxians on the Yaoqing share a bloodline with the borisin, and just like the borisin, some of the foxians there experience an uncontrollable insanity called Moon Rage.

C: 哟，我这小星槎可坐不下这么多人…不过我有更大的星槎，如果客人有需要的话，不消一刻钟就能到港，客人是打算去哪里呢？
E: Well, my little starskiff can't accommodate that many... but I have a larger one that will arrive in less than fifteen minutes if you need it. So, where would you like to go?

C: 无关？我只是让你去港口看看情况…可从来没有允许你三心二意和人交谈啊。
E: Nothing to do? I told you to go to the port and check out the situation... but I never gave you permission to talk with others.

C: 椒丘，你强装镇定的外壳在我看来不堪一击，就像我随时能撕开你的皮肉，露出底下可悲的白骨。在我面前，你无所遁逃。
E: Your calm facade will soon crumble. I can tear through it and expose your pathetic bones anytime. There's no escape from me, Jiaoqiu.

C: 是什么错觉让你以为，你还有资格和我谈交易？
E: What makes you think you're still in a position to negotiate with me?

C: 迴星港被封锁了？
E: Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now?

C: 我是官方人员，被派来专门来排查一个古怪的问题。
E: I'm an official staff member assigned to investigate a peculiar issue.

C: 将军让你…救救那个孩子，她像疯了一样战斗，只为了把我们所有人都带回这里！
E: General asks you to... to save that kid. The girl fought desperately just to bring us all back here alive!

C: 你那颗流淌着毒血的心脏里…也会升起「尊重」这种情感吗？
E: Can you even feel "respect"... with your corrupted heart?

C: 如同「狼之古训」所说：赐狼以穷途，令其寻得前路。饲狼以死数，令其食能果腹。苟且偷安，无处得生；抵死鏖杀，万世长存。
E: As the Wolf's Creed goes: Gift the wolf a dead end, where new paths arise. Raise him to a doomed fate, where satiation lies. The cowards, in forgotten corners, meet their unworthy demise. Yet the valorous, in brutal battles, embrace their eternal prize...

C: 但今天真的登舰了，感觉没有我想象中的…那么大？
E: But now that I'm on board, it just doesn't seem as... big as I imagined?

C: 怎么了嘛，人还得是要有梦想的嘛！要我说啊，竞锋舰就是太小了！
E: What's wrong with that? People are supposed to dream big! If you ask me, the Skysplitter is far too small!

C: 消极比赛。
E: He just doesn't want to compete.

C: 我明白云璃师父让我「知己知彼」的用意了，没有刚才那么紧张了！
E: I understand why you wanted me to "know myself and know my enemy." I don't feel as nervous as I did before!

C: 云璃师父，我感觉我还没有准备充分……
E: Master Yunli, I don't think I'm completely ready...

C: 时刻戒备，一旦有可疑的异动，要在最短的时间内对其进行压制，避免事态扩散。
E: Remain vigilant at all times. Any suspicious movements must be suppressed as quickly as possible before the situation gets out of hand.

C: 大家太熟了，认真不起来。
E: We're too familiar with each other. It's hard to get serious.

C: 按照计划，我也该找竞锋舰上的云骑士兵问问，看看他们有什么发现。
E: According to the plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if they've discovered anything.

C: 别担心你的任务，还有我帮你。
E: Don't worry about your mission. I am here to help you.

C: 有请嘉宾主持叽米先生，为演武仪典正式揭幕——
E: Let us invite our special guest host, Mr. Owlbert, to the stage to formally open the Wardance—

C: 可这不代表你们能赢……
E: But that does not mean you can defeat me...

C: 我向天弓之神祈愿，请祂不要再让我目睹「流星」坠下。
E: I prayed to the God of the Skybow that I would never have to witness one of these "shooting stars" fall again.

C: 苟且偷安，无处得生！
E: Grow complacent and your life will be stolen!

C: …长老就是靠这个说辞，说动持明族中那些懵懂无知的人为你卖命吗？
E: So, you relied on this rhetoric to manipulate the ignorant members of the Vidyadhara into serving you?

C: …估计又是跑到哪里去玩了！这不是埃夫姆第一次搞砸这种事了！我为什么蠢到总会原谅他呢？不靠谱的废物！
E: ...He must have run off somewhere to have fun! Not the first time Ephraim's done something like that! Why am I so dumb to trust him every single time? That unreliable fool!

C: 唉哟，陛下，您来之前打个电话嘛，我们这都没来得及给您准备…嗯？{NICKNAME}？你怎么也在？
E: Oho, if it isn't Your Majesty! Why didn't you call in advance? We haven't prepared for your arrival at all... Hmm? {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?

C: …你们这些家伙啊…算了，说了也白说。没你事了，退下吧。
E: ...You scoundrels... So be it, my words fall on deaf ears anyway. My business with you is concluded. You're dismissed.

C: 谢主隆恩！
E: My deepest gratitude, Your Majesty!

C: 蒂索克二世生硬地转移了话题，开始讲述起自己和假面愚者们斗智斗勇的过程。仿佛是为了让你尽快忘记刚才那个她本不该提起的话题。
E: Tizocic II stiffly changes the subject, and begins to talk about her battles with the Masked Fools — as if she wants you to quickly forget the subject that she regretted bringing up in the first place.

C: 他们是谁？在哪里？
E: Who are they? Where?

C: 打一顿就好了？
E: Are you sure one beating is enough?

C: 你真的想不起来了？
E: You really can't remember?

C: 灰骑士，愣着干什么？快把酒给琳儿玛情报部长端过去。
E: Gray Knight, what're you waiting for? Hurry up and bring out the wine for Spymaster Lenamar.

C: 根据规定，猎犬不能在未经客人允许的情况下进入客房。我会在这里为两位守门。
E: The regulations prohibit the Bloodhounds from entering the hotel rooms without the guests' permission. So, I'll stay outside.

C: 突然到访多有失礼，卡尔德隆•查德威克博士，望您理解我们唐突闯入的缘由。
E: Dr. Calderon Chadwick, sorry for showing up here all of a sudden. We hope you don't mind our unexpected visit.

C: 那你呢？
E: What about you?

C: 对…这是其他人毕生难求的机会。一扇门算什么？我们是科学家，我们早就把一生献给了科学。
E: Right... This is an opportunity others could only dream of. That door is nothing! As scientists, we've long dedicated our lives to science.

C: …我不想再浪费口舌了，你刚刚浪费了最后一次机会。
E: ...I'm not going to say anything else. You've just wasted your final opportunity.

C: 「虚数坍缩脉冲」即将引爆。<size=28>五……</size>
E: Imaginary Implosion Pulse is about to be launched. <size=28>Five...</size>

C: 一开始，他们伪装得很客气。他们拿各种东西诱惑我，想用物质和承诺交换我的知识…但没有效果。
E: At first, they pretended to be friendly with me. They tempted me with valuables and promises in return for my knowledge... all to no avail.

C: 我会…留下……
E: I will... leave behind...

C: …我明白了，博士。
E: ...I understand, doctor.

C: 可惜，匹诺康尼的宾客与逐梦客很少有人对历史感兴趣…如果你需要，我这里还保留着关于那个年代的筑梦故事。
E: Alas, few guests and Dreamchasers in Penacony show an interest in history... If you're interested, I've got some dreamweaving stories of that era kept here.

C: …只可惜，这片梦境只铭记了他们的作品，而他们的名字却被慢慢遗忘。
E: ...Alas, it's a shame that this Dreamscape only has their works engraved, but left their names long forgotten.

C: 就因为他年龄小？凭什么，我也是小孩儿！
E: Just because he's young? How's that fair? I'm a child too!

C: 准备好，又要迎战了！
E: Get ready for another fight!

C: …油嘴滑舌的无名客，和「钟表匠」真是一模一样。
E: ...Smooth-talking Nameless. You're exactly like the Watchmaker.

C: 满意了。
E: Happy.

C: 好不容易聚在一起，应该留个纪念啾！
E: Now that we're finally together, we should record this occasion, tweet!

C: 奥尔拉与那些被牵连的筑梦师关系很好，也被卷进了这场风波。
E: Orla was good friends with those Dreamweavers who were affected, and he also got caught up in this mess.

C: 等等，冯恩先生。
E: Hold on, Mr. Vaughn.

C: 哼，「轻轻」摸了一把？我手下这些大地兽可都是被{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}祝福过的圣兽，十分娇贵！
E: Hmph, "lightly"? My dromases are sacred beasts blessed by {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. They are nigh priceless!

C: 那还用说？当然是吃苦耐劳、坚韧不拔、皮糙肉厚！
E: Need you even ask? It's earnest hardship, tenacity and a thick hide!

C: 这位小友，请不要急着离开。我还有些话要说。
E: Don't be in such a hurry to leave, young friend. I still have something to say.

C: 我准备好了，吾师。我们这便出发吧。
E: I'm ready, Master. Let us set off.

C: 至少这些外邦人已经挺过了最艰难的旅程，如今只要一点简单的帮助就可以活下去。对此，我有一个想法……
E: At least the worst of the journey is over for these outlanders. Now they just need some simple help to live on. I have an idea...

C: 此言差矣。我们总是要给弱者提供力所能及的帮助，不只是因为道德，哪怕是从功利角度来说，也应当因此。
E: You're asking the wrong question. We should always provide all the help we can to the weak, not just because it is moral. It is the correct action, even from a utilitarian perspective.

C: 怎么样？昨天刚到的货，非常新鲜！
E: How's about it? They just arrived yesterday. Fresh as it gets!

C: 我要买一箱食物。
E: I want a crate of food.

C: 你交出了落满灰尘的木箱，里面的菜叶似乎比之前更蔫了。
E: You hand over the dust-laden wooden crate — the leaves of the vegetables within look even more withered than before.

C: 应该无罪！
E: He is not guilty!

C: 那么，双方代表可以开始辩论了。
E: Now then, both parties can begin their debate.

C: <size=28>他们为奥赫玛带来的贡献，一万个外邦人都比不上！</size>
E: <size=28>The contributions they have made to Okhema... not even ten thousand outlanders can dream of garnering!</size>

C: 嘿，你怕是不知道什么叫战略物资。我可以不用，但不能没有！
E: Ha, you don't know the first thing about wartime supplies. I may not need to use them, but they must always be available!

C: 那你又为奥赫玛出过多少力？
E: And how much have you contributed to Okhema?

C: …另一方面，吾师在开场时已经说过，外邦人并不是一个身份，而是一种处境——我们都可能成为需要帮助的弱者。
E: ...On the other hand, my master has said from the start: Outlanders are not an identity, but a circumstance — we all have the possibility of becoming vulnerable individuals in need of aid.

C: 参与法庭讨论是塔兰顿赐予的权利。既然你接受了它，就应当站在城邦与公民的角度思考。这不叫小题大做，这叫权责对等。
E: To be able to participate in courtroom discussions is a right granted by Talanton. Since you've accepted it, you are obligated to consider the interests of the state and its citizens. This isn't an exaggeration — it's balancing power and responsibility.

C: 他选错了救人的手段。
E: He chose the wrong approach to save others.

C: 该怎么去阿卡迪亚呢？
E: How do we get to Arcadia?

C: 好，出发吧。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 那你是怎么维持生命的？
E: Then how do you sustain yourselves?

C: 是啊，但我为这样的幸福感到可悲。城外的纷争即将攻破城墙，你们的城民却还沉浸在虚假的平和中，恬不知耻地享受安逸。
E: It is. But I feel pity for this happiness that you feel. The strife of the outside world prepares to break through your city walls, yet your citizens are immersed in a false sense of peace. You enjoy this tranquility without any shame at all.

C: 好一个自适应包容性。
E: Such fickle inclusivity...

C: 身为纷争的使徒，你们过往的敌人，确实不该出现在此处打扰你们的欢宴，告辞。
E: As an envoy of Strife and your former enemy, I should not be here to disturb your celebrations. Farewell.

C: 为战而生的存在不愿为这庇护你的城邦而战，是不忍于往日的血亲厮杀、不敢面对自己造主的威能、还是不舍在这城中的某个人？
E: A being born for war refuses to fight to protect this city. Could it be that you can't bear to fight with your past relatives? Perhaps you don't dare face the might of your creator? Or maybe there is someone in this city that you cannot leave?

C: 神的行径有千模百样，神的行径不应众生期望。
E: The divine works in mysterious ways, and they care not for what a mortal man prays.

C: 啊，是已经回来了！英雄，您找回那宝物了吗？
E: Ah, they have returned already! Hero, did you recover the treasure?

C: 谢谢你，陌生人，那我就先回茧了！
E: Thank you, stranger. I shall return to the cocoon!

C: 第一场的记忆
E: The First Memory

C: 记住，这可不是人家要干的，都是你逼迫人家的哦。
E: Remember, doing this is not of Mem's own will, but by you forcing Mem's hands.

C: 自雅努斯陨落以来，命运泰坦们就一直以沉默应对祈求，我很难不认为，这正是它们对杀死血亲的人类的惩罚。
E: Since the fall of Janus, the Fate Titans have persistently answered our prayers with silence. This makes it hard for me not to believe that it's their punishment for humans who take the lives of their own kin.

C: 这些祭祀用的草药，有好多都已经枯死了——是从黑潮里带出来吗？
E: Most of these ritual herbs have withered and died. Were they brought from within the black tide?

C: 它是多么公平，艾格勒的信徒，瑟希斯的信徒，还有欧洛尼斯的信徒。所有人都平等地在死亡中迎来永眠。
E: It is truly fair. Aquila's disciples, Cerces' disciples and Oronyx's disciples — all are equally facing eternal slumber in death.

C: 走吧，帕西提亚，去见证你的命运，然后为它做出选择。
E: Go, Pasithea. Go witness your destiny, and make a choice for it.

C: 但只要成为圣女，你们都能活下来。
E: But if you become the Holy Maiden, you all will be able to survive.

C: （黑潮摧毁了一切，疲惫的人正等待死亡）
E: (The black tide destroys everything, and the exhausted linger in wait for death)

C: 我会将这本书一直传承下去，五百年、一千年…只要孩子们还会长大，孩子的孩子还有孩子，它就不会被遗忘。
E: I will pass this book down through generations, five hundred years, a thousand years... As long as children keep growing up, and children's children have children, it will never be forgotten.

C: 你背过黎明机器？那我还打得过史瓦罗大叔呢！
E: You carried the Dawn Device? Yeah right, and I could totally take on Uncle Svarog!

C: 决战铁墓那段时间，裂界造物的活动也愈发频繁了。我被派驻值守禁区，要是不买到《如我所书》的另一卷，晚上就只能在帐篷里无所事事地挨冻。
E: During the final battle with Irontomb, Fragmentum creations became increasingly active. I was assigned to guard duty at the restricted zone, and if I couldn't get my hands on another volume of As I've Written, I'd have nothing to do but freeze in my tent at night.

C: （叹息）。
E: (sigh)

C: 看来，最后还得由你做出决断——毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
E: Looks like it's up to you to make the final verdict. After all, you're the one who lives through this story.

C: 嘘，该讲十二金仙讨大君了！
E: Shh. It's time for the tale of the Twelve Golden Immortals challenging the Lord Ravager!

C: 我留下了难忘的回忆。
E: I made unforgettable memories.

C: 真的，老爹不骗你，哎唷，说着说着我这浑身上下就疼起来了……
E: Really, I am not lying to you. Ouch, I hurt all over...

C: 是这样的，我想请你给一位仿生人当老师，教她为人处世和一些做人的知识。
E: You see, I'd like you to be a teacher for an android. Teach her about life and how to handle her relationship with others.

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: 这有点傻吧？空间站的空气循环系统很厉害的，怎么可能感觉风有点大啊。不行不行。
E: It's kinda stupid, right? The AC aboard the space station is so amazing that the wind would never get too strong. This won't do.

C: 有种奇怪的亲切感，虽然每个字都没问题，但仔细听总觉得有种淡淡的嘲讽？
E: This one has a strange friendliness to it. It sounds okay overall — but there seems to be a bit of sarcasm deep down?

C: 机器人负责派送餐点，但我们等了好久都没等到。
E: A robot delivers our meals here, but it's late. We've been waiting for ages.

C: 那可不嘛。
E: Totally!

C: 你不已经得出结论了？
E: So you've already found your conclusion?

C: 小小的马桶。
E: A small toilet seat.

C: 但是在此之后，我再也没有见到那个神秘的马桶。它好像就此消失了。
E: But I have never seen that mysterious toilet seat again. It seems to have disappeared.

C: 这次的怪谈比较温馨，我觉得你应该会喜欢。在讲之前我先问一句：你有没有在空间站捡到过一些神秘的纸页？
E: The ghost story this time is pretty wholesome. I think you'll like it. Before that, let me ask: Have you ever picked up mysterious paper slips in the space station?

C: 怎么办啊，难道两个都不好看…{NICKNAME}，你是年轻人，你帮我看看哪个颜色更适合我？
E: What should I do? Maybe neither color looks good? {NICKNAME}, you're young and fashionable. Help me pick the color that suits me.

C: 就戴框架眼镜吧。
E: Stick with wired glasses.

C: 听说你又有事找我…
E: I heard you are looking for me again?

C: （这个颜色吧，以斯帖想找的是<color=#dbc291ff>金色</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>绿色</color>。）
E: (This color looks fine... Esther wanted <color=#dbc291ff>gold</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>green</color>.)

C: 不过无妨。以我自身的气质和镜头感，摄影师应该不需要太高的造诣就能捕捉到颇具风采的画面。
E: But it's okay. With my charisma and photogenic face, the photo will come out great even if the photographer is not an expert.

C: 哎哟，不行，我看见小孩就来气！你知道么，贝洛伯格三十岁往上的成年人每年近四成的收入都投入在了小孩身上——
E: Gosh, I can't, I can't stand the sight of children! Do you know that nearly forty percent of the annual income of adults over age thirty in Belobog is spent on children?

C: …这个人就是华劳斯？长相很普通嘛。倒是这车不错……
E: So, is that Wallace? He's just average-looking, but that car of his does seem pretty nice.

C: 摄影需要故事方能吸引人的眼球，而站在你眼前的恰巧是一个有故事的男人——你要做的就是把我散发魅力的瞬间捕捉下来。
E: A photo needs a story to attract attention, and you're looking at a man full of stories. All you have to do is capture the moment when I exude charm.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 「鼹鼠党」…？啊，我明白了，是奥列格之前提到过的……
E: The Moles...? Ah, I see, Oleg once told me about this...

C: …算了算了！看他睡得这么熟，肯定是采矿的工作太累了吧？
E: ...Never mind! He must have been tired from mining and needs a good rest.

C: 给你，一束「七彩虹」。欢迎下次光临！
E: Here you are, a bunch of rainbows. Hope to see you again soon!

C: 你就这么答应了？
E: So you've said yes?

C: 替一位父亲送给他久别的女儿。
E: The flowers are a gift to a daughter from her long-absent father.

C: 别出声！你管这叫话剧？这是科研！给我思路都打断了！
E: Shhhh! Do you think this is theater? This is research! Don't break my train of thought!

C: 质数。
E: Prime numbers.

C: 你也被他们刁难了？这下你知道我平时有多憋屈了吧！
E: Are they harassing you, too? Now you know how frustrating things usually are for me!

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 为了「大宇宙时间隧道」学说着想，你就再替我跑一趟吧！
E: For the sake of the big universe time tunnel theory, please help me do it once more!

C: 什么乱七八糟的！是「同舟共济」！和我这样的大科学家同舟共济，你应该觉得光荣才对。
E: No! I mean... The word is... um... The word is "boat"! You should feel honored that we are now in the same BOAT together!

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: 不对，没空说这些了！快，你赶紧回去，把正确答案告诉那个出题的家伙！
E: No, there's no time for this chitter-chatter! Hurry, go back and tell that examiner the correct answer to the question!

C: 唉，就这样吧！看来这个世界还没有准备好接受「大宇宙时间隧道」这种超前的理论。
E: Ah, so be it! It seems like the world's not quite ready for a theory as mighty as my big universe time tunnel theory.

C: …我来看看你最近在忙什么。
E: ...Let me see what you've been up to lately.

C: 等到波瓦老头退休，我马上就去敲教育部的门，让他们把「大宇宙时间隧道」编入贝洛伯格学院的科学教材！
E: Once Bova retires, I'll knock right on the door of the Ministry of Education and ask them to add my theory of big universe time tunnel into the science textbooks of Belobog!

C: 感谢你帮我这个忙，朋友！这些你拿去吧，等我攒够了钱再找你帮忙……
E: Thank you for helping me, my dear friend! Take these, and once I save enough money I'll come looking for you again...

C: 也许了解了这些喜好，小女子就能了解塔米拉小姐的灵魂了。
E: Perhaps if I can learn what those are, then I can understand a bit more about Tamila's soul.

C: 只是站在这里，我就感到自己对演技的理解更深了。
E: Just standing here helps me understand my art just a little bit deeper.

C: 是啊，我是会社派来的。
E: Yes, I'm from the Society.

C: 不过，现在你已经知道了「会社」和我的身份…这意味着我们已经准备好接纳你，现在只看你如何回应了。
E: However, since you know about my identity and the Society, we are now ready to accept you into our ranks. The choice is up to you.
Um...

C: 毕竟你平时就是做这个的…
E: I mean, this is what you do every day...

C: 我觉得自己真的很迷茫…每天拼死拼活推销…舍弃了家庭和生活…可我收获了什么…？
E: I feel really lost... I'm doing my best making sales day in, day out... I've given up on having a life or a family... What am I getting out of it?

C: 怎么会这样…！我、我得赶紧叫兄弟们过来支援……
E: How can it be...!? I—I need to call for support...

C: 总之——谢谢你啦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Thank you anyways!

C: 是啊。当年我年轻气盛，总觉得自己一定能在法务大臣手下谋高就，可我老爹不这么觉得。结果…我俩就闹掰了，老死不相往来。
E: Yeah. I was young, and was convinced I could get a great job under the Minister of Justice, but my Dad disagreed. Then... Then we fought and didn't speak to each other again.

C: 哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
E: Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?

C: 不对，他们就出来开始放生了。
E: No, they go back to their old act.

C: （这好像是…漂流瓶？波月古海也存在着洋流吗？漂流瓶又是从哪里来的？）
E: (Is this a... drift bottle? Is there an ocean current in the Lunarescent Depths? Where did this drift bottle come from?)

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: 做贼心虚的人都这么说！
E: That's exactly what a guilty person would say!

C: 到底什么是重量级知识啊？
E: What kind of knowledge could be this heavy?

C: 很好，你有什么愿望呢？
E: Very well. What is your wish?

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 这茶叫什么名字来着？
E: What's the name of this tea again?

C: 茶？什么茶？
E: Tea? What tea are you talking about?

C: 巨大的，紫色的…看周围的环境来猜测，这应该是颗大地兽的蛋。
E: Giant, purple... From your surroundings, you guess that this should be a dromas egg.

C: 虽说这么明显的改造…事实上也收效甚微。
E: It has been obviously modified... but to little effect.

C: 欧洛尼斯的祷言在你身旁环绕——命运未定，命运无定，但它眷恋于你。
E: The prayers of Oronyx swirl around you — destiny is undefined and ever-changing, yet it clings to you.

C: 泰坦、火种、黄金裔…初登列车时，你曾吐槽自己进入了科幻电影——现在变成奇幻电影了。
E: Titans, Coreflames, Chrysos Heirs... When you first boarded the Express, you had once complained that you'd fallen into a sci-fi movie... Now, it's suddenly a fantasy movie.

C: 公司对类似的智械危机具有丰富处理经验。经过和平协商，奥瑟顿星事件由「战略投资部」正式接手并进行善后工作。
E: The IPC has a wealth of experience dealing with similar Intellitron crises. After peaceful negotiations, the Strategic Investment Department officially took over on Oceton and is dealing with the aftermath.

C: 随着「铁墓」危机告一段落，一团由「记忆」造就的文明火种也在银河间悄然点亮。
E: Now that the Irontomb crisis has subsided, a kindling of civilization, nurtured by the Remembrance, has been lit in the cosmos.

C: 通过对权杖残片的逆向研究，{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#76}螺丝咕姆先生{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#83}黑塔女士{RUBY_E#}已初步复现部分数据。
E: Through reverse engineering of the scepter fragments, Genius Society members {RUBY_B#Genius Society #76}Mr. Screwllum{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Genius Society #83}Madam Herta{RUBY_E#} have successfully replicated a portion of the data.

C: 破败的征伐行道
E: Ruined Path of Conquest

C: 旧日的荣光，悬锋的王，荣耀是你的名。
E: Glory of the olden days, King of Kremnos, honor be your name.

C: 致求知的灵魂——
E: To the soul that seeks understanding —

C: 慈爱之庭
E: Courtyard of Storge

C: ——公民议会，万众瞩望的风向标，真理锤凿的淬炼场。
E: — The Citizens' Assembly, the beacon of public opinion, a crucible where truth is forged.

C: 你本应展开挂满白骨的双翼，向城邦吹送死亡的腥风，
E: You were meant to unfurl your wings of bones, and send the stench of death to the city-states,

C: …我明白了。我会遣赛飞儿去看看，如果她愿意的话。现在，我们就在奥赫玛静观其变吧。
E: ...I understand. I will send Cipher to take a look, if she is willing. For now, we shall have to sit and watch for any developments from inside Okhema.

C: 果然还是偷偷摸来了啊，万敌。你这副身躯实在显眼，别处也就算了，在云石天宫，不被人注意就怪了。
E: So you did come creeping in here after all, Mydei. I don't know about anywhere else, but that conspicuous body of yours is bound to be noticed in Marmoreal Palace.

C: 我比你更能忍耐苦楚，仅此而已。
E: I am simply more capable of enduring pain and suffering than you are.

C: 他将成为亡国的王储。
E: He will become the crown prince of a vanquished nation.

C: 你记住了「曾点燃过圣烛」
E: You remembered "Lighting the Holy Candle."

C: 树庭中每有灵感的火花乍现，巨木便为这思想的新生而悄然欢庆——露水凝聚、滴落池中，如丝雨润海、息吹入风。
E: Every spark of inspiration that arises within the Grove brings silent celebration from the giant tree toward this birth of thought — Dew gathers and drips into the pool, like silken rain nourishing the ocean, or breaths of wind infusing the air.

C: 不知怎的，沐浴在温暖的柔光里，一边享受下午茶一边倾诉，我感觉自己真的好了许多。
E: I don't know why, but while bathing in the warm sunlight and enjoying a cup of tea as I opened up about my worries, I really do feel much better.

C: …是真的。我本来也不信，在奥赫玛之外还能存有昼光。但是，在这个庭院里，真的有一束和煦的光从天井照下来……
E: ...There really is. I didn't believe that there were places outside of Okhema that still had daylight either. However, there really was a single ray of light that descended from the heavens in this courtyard.

C: 别…听我的，直接离开吧……
E: No... Listen to me. Just go...

C: 元老说自己代表民意，祭司说自己代表泰坦，富商说他在城里存了大把的利衡币，黄金裔则一身勇武力大无比——问题来了，在这四个人里，最后谁说了算的可能性更大呢？
E: The elder says they represent the people, the priest says they represent the Titans, the merchant claims to have a lot of Balance Coins in the city, and the Chrysos Heir is mighty and strong — so, who among these four is most likely to have the final say?

C: 似是感应你的注视，为首者向下探寻，直至与你的目光相遇——他脚边的大型沙漏，沙粒竟开始逆向流动——
E: Sensing your gaze, the leader of the group looks down, locking eyes with you. At his feet, the large hourglass begins to flow in reverse —

C: 你想起那笑对观众的贤人，以及他生命中最后的那场表演。他的理论曾被抨击成渎神，却也为世人解明了一大难题——我们究竟为何物？
E: You think of the Sage who smiled at his audience, and of his final performance. His theories were once branded as blasphemy, yet he unraveled one of the greatest mysteries of all — what exactly are we?

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是热爱智慧的异乡勇士啊！
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit this lion again? It's the wit-loving outsider!

C: 踪迹…需要<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>。
E: Traces... Need <color=#dbc291ff>"Memory Crystal Shards"</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者诚心追随那位红发的圣女。金丝带来消息，它仍守候在<color=#dbc291ff>圣女长大的房间</color>，兢兢业业地打扫整理呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who faithfully follows the red-haired saint. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's still <color=#dbc291ff>in the Holy Maiden's childhood room</color>, diligently cleaning and tidying.

C: 小心别把自己撕裂了…
E: Careful you don't rip yourself apart...

C: Σ(:３っ「请认准，『超级英雄』生发秘膏~~」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "Remember the name, Superhero Hair Balm~~" )∋

C: 不知过了多久——
E: How much time has passed, you wonder —

C: 记忆戛然而止，伴随着一丝凉意。
E: The memory ends abruptly, leaving only a cold chill.

C: 你看着达米亚诺斯骑上飞天坛递，向着断崖发起了冲锋，仿佛挑战巨人的骑士。
E: You see Damionis mount the Flying Amphora and charge toward the cliff, like a knight challenging giants.

C: 但无论这次尝试成功与否，他大概都不会再回到奥赫玛了。
E: Regardless of whether this attempt succeeds, he probably won't be coming back to Okhema.

C: 愚不可及愚不可及█不可及愚不可及愚█可及愚不可及<color=#eb4d3dff>愚不可及的念头</color>愚不可及████愚不可及愚不可及愚███愚不可及愚不可及███及愚不可及愚不可及！
E: Foolish beyond reach, foolish beyond reach, █eyond reach, foolish beyond reach, foolish █eyond reach, foolish beyond reach, <color=#eb4d3dff>the foolish, unreachable thought,</color> foolish beyond reach, ███lish beyond reach, foolish beyond reach, fooli██ foolish beyond reach, foolish beyond reach, ███ond reach, foolish beyond reach, foolish beyond reach!

C: 逐火的使命走到了尽头。刻法勒缄默，曾流向大地的金血也已枯竭干涸。
E: The Flame-Chase mission has come to an end. Kephale remains silent, and the golden blood that once flowed across the land has dried up.

C: 拱卫圣城步道的塔楼曾是瞭望敌情的哨站，现在仿佛被剥离，空余盘踞在石峦上的虚影。
E: The towers that once guarded the holy city's pathways stood as watchposts against approaching threats. Now, they seem detached from time, mere shadows lingering on the stones.

C: 我掉的是普通的怪物。
E: I dropped a regular monster.

C: 你弯下腰，试着拽了拽门，纹丝不动……
E: You crouch down and tug at the door. Not even a wiggle...

C: 木马没有回应，感觉有些古怪。但貌似你也没有别的选择——
E: The wooden horse doesn't respond — it feels a bit odd. But you don't really have a choice...

C: 致那些为了新世界而献身的黄金裔们——他们的命运谨如神谕所示，也许无论时空如何轮转，都会恰逢世界所需之时降世，只为行其职责、全其夙愿。
E: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives for a new world — Their fates, as foretold by prophecy, are to be born whenever the world needs them, irrespective of how time and space may shift, all to fulfill their duty and answer their calling.

C: 另外，在你们问我之前，我先解释，为什么是在这里授课而不是树庭——
E: And before you ask, allow me to explain why we're teaching here instead of at the Grove—

C: …叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。
E: ...Call me Anaxagoras.

C: 呵呵…若我知晓那是你家乡的服饰，一定不会说那样的话。
E: Hehe... Had I known that was your hometown's garment, I wouldn't have said that.

C: 我会选三月七。
E: I'll choose March 7th.

C: 诶哟，摔得我——
E: Ah, that really hurts—

C: 行至此地的旅者，与我一同展翅，拥抱新生与黎明吧嗡。
E: Traveler who has come this far, spread your wings with me and embrace Rebirth and Dawn, buzz.

C: （告诉它过去的故事）
E: (Tell it stories of the past)

C: 咖啡机似乎没什么异样。你试着做了杯咖啡，味道不错，至少比姬子请你喝的要好……
E: There doesn't seem to be anything wrong with the coffee machine. You make a cup of coffee, and it tastes good, at least better than Himeko's.

C: …没看见什么镜子啊。
E: I don't see a mirror...

C: 不行，我有话直说。
E: No, I have to tell them.

C: （替信使隐瞒。）
E: (Cover up for the Messenger.)

C: 但是忆庭…我们有自己的法则。
E: *sigh* We have our rules at the Garden of Recollection.

C: 他还说，如果您还没有离、离开贝洛伯格的话，也许会想继续参与铁卫的作战行动……
E: He said that if you haven't l—left Belobog yet, you might be still keen to keep fighting in our sorties...

C: 「明天」——它是你帮我们争取来的宝贝，{NICKNAME}。我们不会挥霍它的。
E: "Tomorrow" — now that's a luxury that you've won for us, {NICKNAME}. We certainly won't squander it.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof woof!

C: （这些千纸鹤是奇物的动态密保，它们会根据奇物的定位实时改变位置……）
E: (These origami cranes serve as the dynamic security for the Curio. They will change their location in real-time based on the Curio's position...)

C: 一个盒子散发着古怪的香味——
E: A box is emitting an odd aroma...

C: （那是人类社会的事，你又不是人类……）
E: (That's something for human society, and you're not human...)

C: 围观的「阮•梅」造物们大为震撼，这才发现自己被骗多时，怒不可遏。
E: The onlooking creations of Ruan Mei are extremely shocked — they are enraged at being lied to for so long.

C: 东西就在后面里间，你们去拿吧…那里有个怪物游荡，我不敢靠近。
E: The thing is in the back. You can go get it... There are monsters roaming back there, so I dare not go near.

C: 还要继续查下去吗？
E: Do you want to go on?

C: 汪？
E: Woof?

C: 我懂，睡前故事。
E: I get it. A bedtime story.

C: …对了，是名字！是不是该把咱们的名字也写上去？
E: ...Oh, right! Our names! Shouldn't we add our names?

C: 嗯！虽然还没有看见…但一定也像阿格莱雅的其他作品那样，金灿灿的，既美丽，又温暖……
E: Hmm! Though I haven't seen it yet... it must be just like Aglaea's other works — golden, beautiful, and warm...

C: 接收指令: 第<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>步，向后
E: Order Received: Step <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, Backward

C: 去一次就爆而无憾了…
E: I'll have no more regrets in my life after the trip...

C: 你敢打我？我可是梦主！
E: How dare you hit me!? I'm the Dreammaster!

C: 你下次再来罢，老夫的测试内容可不会一直这么简单。
E: Come back next time. My test won't always be so easy.

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 你准备好了吗？
E: Are you ready?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 不，付钱的是刑事犯受害者家属互助会的人。
E: Nope, this commission's from the Relatives of Criminal Victims Mutual Aid Society.

C: 是啊，我想你也知道我在接私活了。
E: Correct, I figured that you already knew it.

C: 随绘星一同前往了穷观阵。
E: You go with Huixing to the Matrix of Prescience.

C: 这能让你这么疑惑吗？
E: Does this really confuse you so much?

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 你吼那么大声干什么。
E: Why are you yelling?

C: 去去去，都什么时候了，老大都成什么样了，还在纠结这些事，不像话！
E: Oh, hush now! Have you any inkling the gravity of our situation? With the Boss in their current state, now's no time to be fussing over titles!

C: 我们四个加起来顶起了空艇的半片天，懂？我们是老大的手下，它老人家照看着整个空艇，还会抽空校准下我们。
E: We four make half the contribution that keeps this airship running, got it? We work for the Boss, who not only oversees the whole airship but also finds time to tweak our calibration while they're at it.

C: 简单来说，我们的老大受到不明重创倒下了，所以…之前我们几个就跟没了指针一样失魂落魄。
E: Long story short, for reasons unknown, our Boss became severely injured, and now they're down for the count. That's why we were so out of it earlier, as if we'd lost our hands.

C: 怪梦积木请交到我这里来！
E: Please hand over Eerie Building Blocks to me!

C: 我没什么事了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 哈哈，是不是有点普通？但能与你相遇，我和你就都已经不再平凡了。
E: Haha, was it a little too normal? But you and I are no longer normal, for I have met you.

C: 我努力过了，感觉如何？如果这个难度能得到你的认可，我会很开心。
E: I tried my best. How was it? If this difficulty has earned your acknowledgement, I would be more than glad.

C: 滴答！这叫摆脚开手舞！游客！这绝对会流行！
E: Tick-tock! This is the boogie-woogie! Guest! This will go viral for sure!

C: 希…希望你能满意，游客…啊哈哈……
E: I... I hope you are satisfied, guest... Ahaha...

C: 所以…会不会哪天，我们不再有「故障」，甚至都不再是「迷钟」？
E: So... Maybe one day, we will no longer be "malfunctioning." Perhaps, there will come a time when we are not even "Tickers"?

C: 我可以想象，把我们三个都找齐的过程一定无比艰辛。
E: I can imagine the ordeal it must be to gather the three of us together.

C: 我不是迷钟，别搞混啦。
E: I'm not a Ticker. Don't get it confused.

C: 你会读心术？
E: Can you read minds?

C: 就在奥赫玛遭受入侵前不久，我得到了一些预言。可惜那会儿诸事缠身，一直没空关注它。
E: Not long before Okhema was invaded, I received some prophecies. Unfortunately, I was too busy to pay attention to them at the time.

C: 让我看看…「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
E: Let's see... "In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."

C: 吼吼，要向我走过来吗…
E: Hoho, you dare approach me...?

C: 哎哟——投降，投降！再扯下去，我们兄弟俩就要骨肉分离了。
E: Ahh — I surrender, I surrender! If you keep pulling like that, we'll be split apart!

C: 怎么个合作法？
E: What kind of collaboration?

C: 的确…我不过是个初出茅庐的小贼，和真正的行家里手还差得远呢。
E: It's true... I'm but an amateur thief, a far cry from the true masters of the craft.

C: 正事暂且放到一遍，您要是有什么想聊的，咱陪你唠唠也无妨。
E: Let's leave that matter aside for now and tell me what you wanted to talk about. I'll banter with you.

C: 不过嘛，桀桀桀桀……
E: However, hehehehe...

C: 桀桀，所以偶尔死一死也没什么关系！但是啊，你说有没有这样一种可能……
E: Hehehe, so dying occasionally isn't the end of the world! But listen, what if...

C: 这里原本存放着「艾格勒的启目集」，然而如今只剩下意味不明的污言秽语。
E: "Aquila's Enlightenment" was once stored here, but now only vulgar nonsense remains.

C: …你在意的是这个？
E: ...That's what you care about?

C: 哼，葡萄们被残忍对待也就罢了，难道我巴特鲁斯竟然连被踩扁的资格都没有吗？我都站在这里半天了，从来都没有人正眼看过我！
E: Hmph! I could accept grapes getting cruelly crushed, but me, Bartholos, not even qualified to be stomped flat!? I've been standing here for ages, and not a single soul spares me a glance!

C: 搞的像是你赢了似的…
E: You act like you won...

C: 没…事……
E: It's... okay...

C: 桀桀桀…我一直怀疑这东西跟天外世界存在某种联系，既然是您的话，想必一定能够明白我说的是什么意思…其实我自己也不太明白。
E: Hehe... I've always suspected this thing has some link to a world beyond the sky. And since it's you, I figured you'd get what I meant... To be honest, I don't really get it myself.

C: 虽然由咱来提这个问题兴许有点奇怪，不过，作为漫长旅途中的小小一站……
E: I know it's a bit weird for me to be asking, but since this is just a little stop on your long journey...

C: 确实，即使是负责翻译这些文本的那位学者前辈，她自己也无法笃定这一点。
E: That's true. Even the scholar who translated this couldn't be sure about it.

C: …你说话怎么越来越离谱了。算起来，这好像还是我们第一次在正式场合见面啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...What you're saying is getting more and more exaggerated. Come to think of it, I believe this is the first time we've officially met, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我不会怪你。
E: I don't blame you.

C: …等等，我好像没在殿内见过你？圣殿把守严密，你是如何进到这里的？
E: Wait, I've never seen you in the sanctum before... The temple is well-guarded. How did you manage to get in?

C: 委托人是一位孩童，虔诚的信徒潘，内容是——「妈妈的灵魂在哪」。
E: The request comes from a child — a devout follower named Pam — and it reads: "Where is my mother's soul?"

C: 孩子拿出布袋，用力撕扯起来。很快你们发现，绸布的内壁上写着些文字。
E: The child pulls out the pouch and begins to tear it apart. Before long, you both notice writing on the inner silk lining.

C: 哗啦啦？！居然躲过了我的铁球？
E: *whoosh* You actually dodged my iron ball?

C: 门开啦，哗啦！你好厉害啊！不过…想了想，我给了你这么多提示，给我一枚利衡币也不算过分吧？
E: The door's open. *whoosh* You're amazing! But... now that I think about it, after giving you so many hints, don't you think I deserve a Balance Coin?
