C: 这个房间的主人似乎信奉{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}。在阳光明亮的黄金时代，海水曾经比现在更加澄澈。
E: The room's resident appears to follow the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. During the radiant Golden Age, the oceans were more pristine than today.

C: 没有时间了…
E: There's no time...

C: 怕死亡那一瞬间的痛苦，也怕死后漫长黑暗中的了无知觉。尽管也有人许诺了彼岸……
E: Afraid of the pain in that final moment, afraid of the endless dark that follows. Even if some promised salvation beyond...

C: 我去看看吧。
E: I'll check it out.

C: 这团由伊来内的生命换来的「余火」，就这样悄无声息地融入光芒，转瞬间消失不见。不知是否是错觉…一股暖流拂过你的面庞。
E: The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?

C: 逝者…你，你不是行商么？
E: The deceased... A—Aren't you a merchant?

C: …是魔阴身。
E: ...mara-struck.

C: 怎么说呢，我也不信任。每次有人跟我说他要做点有趣的事，我就会幻视一堆垃圾。
E: What can I say? I don't trust it either. For some reason, whenever someone tells me they're gonna do something interesting, I end up imagining a pile of trash...

C: 测试「模拟宇宙」有什么好处？
E: What do I get for testing the Simulated Universe?

C: 我想给你点更务实的东西，能够对你有帮助，你确实用得上的东西。所以形式上可能和你想象的不一样……
E: I want to give you something more practical and realistic, something that can really help you. So, it may be different from how you imagined...

C: {NICKNAME}，我要加快流程了：接下来你要连打三场——模拟宇宙不是这么运行的，但我没什么耐心。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to speed up the process. Now you're going to fight three times in a row. This is not how the Simulated Universe should operate, but I'm running out of patience.

C: 你屏气凝神，努力聚集精神。你好像能听到虚空深处不成语调的音节，这是祂的声音。
E: You hold your breath and try to stay focused. You seem to be able to hear toneless syllables deep in the void — it's THEIR voice.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 黑塔叹了口气：<color=#dbc291ff>「再往前走一点有个下载装置，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」</color>
E: Herta sighs. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's a Downloader just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."</color>

C: 好。
E: Alright.

C: 你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「你怎么不去打那个东西？」</color>
E: You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: <color=#dbc291ff>"Why didn't you hit that thing?"</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「嗯，嗯。」</color>黑塔敷衍地应和，<color=#dbc291ff>「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的宇宙碎片作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Mmm. Mmm."</color> Herta replies flippantly. <color=#dbc291ff>"As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of Cosmic Fragments. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」</color>黑塔流畅地回答，<color=#dbc291ff>「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的『位面饰品』。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Ah, okay, I see. Got it."</color> Herta replies smoothly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. Now you can immerse yourself deeper. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive Planar Ornament."</color>

C: 「是吗？可能还真是…阿基维利——你想到的比我更多！我忍不住想抱抱你了！」
E: "Is that so? It might be... Akivili, you're always more thoughtful than me. I feel like giving you a hug!"

C: 后来，在虫潮开始的第二十四夜，她将一只从破漏的窗里钻进来的虫子当作自己的小孩抚养；她会用尽所有心血教它走路、穿鞋，甚至教它说话；七天后，她的家里遍布子嗣…但没有一只能为自己穿鞋。
E: Later, on the twenty-fourth night of the Swarm Invasion, she raises an insect that comes in through a slit on her window as her own child. She teaches it how to walk, how to put on shoes, and even how to speak with all her heart and so. Seven days later, her house is flooded with her heirs... although none of them can put on shoes for themselves.

C: 你不情愿地回过头…却发现背后是空的。
E: You reluctantly turn around... only to find nothing behind you.

C: 你抓起它的尾巴，小心地爬到它的身上…但与它双目对视之时，一种奇怪的电流触动了你！
E: You grab its tail and carefully climb onto it... But when you lock eyes with it, an unusual electricity runs through your veins.

C: 只需要再等待一会儿，待到火柴闪烁三次后，一些戏剧性的情节就会发生……
E: Just wait a bit longer for the match to flash three times, and a dramatic scene will unfold...

C: 「见鬼，难道非要我亲自检查一遍所有的东西？阮•梅在干嘛？」黑塔一脸不悦，「这群家伙把模拟宇宙当成什么了？…算了，我也不在乎。你陪它玩吧。」
E: "As if! Do I really have to check every single detail myself? What is Ruan Mei doing?" Looking displeased, Herta continues, "What do they think they are doing with the Simulated Universe? Whatever, I don't care anymore. Do whatever."

C: 「褪去，对，塔伊兹育罗斯陨落后，虫潮就从宇宙各地消褪了！」黑塔听到关键词，音调高了起来，「听着，我们得弄明白：<color=#dbc291ff>这场『寰宇蝗灾』是怎么回事？</color>塔伊兹育罗斯似乎是在列神之战中陨落了，毕竟，除了祂们谁又能杀死星神？但研究没有『似乎』。我们得把它彻底搞明白。」
E: "Recedes... Indeed, the Swarm did recede across the universe following the fall of Tayzzyronth!" The excitement in Herta's voice is unmistakable upon hearing the keyword. "Listen, we need to figure out <color=#dbc291ff>why this Swarm Disaster happened.</color> It appears that Tayzzyronth was killed in a battle among Aeons. After all, who else could have killed an Aeon? However, there is no 'appears to be' in scientific research. We need to get a thorough understanding."

C: 啊？我还没有准备好！
E: Eh? I'm not ready yet!

C: 要是你还有好奇的事，也可以继续跑着——还有很多边角料没被发现呢。
E: If there's anything you're curious about, you can also keep it running — there are plenty of undiscovered pockets to be unearthed.

C: 往前去，试试看咯。我可不能保证你每次都会顺利见到祂们。
E: Keep going and try it out. I can't promise you'll manage to meet THEM every time.

C: （假装不知道他的真实身份…）
E: (Pretend not to know his true identity...)

C: 你屏气凝神，继续向前。你脑中的「忧郁」被拟人为一位闭目的女性，你看见了她。你知道她十分*古老*，她死去的时间或许比无机生命的存在更久。她侧躺着，倒在铸铁的王座上，四周散落着各种各样的东西：数之不尽的财富、象征权力的文字、保管时光的沙漏…还有一只骨瘦如柴的恶犬趴在地上，等待着自己的主人，但女人似乎长眠不醒。
E: You hold your breath and concentrate as you keep going. The melancholy in your mind is personified, and you see a woman with closed eyes. You can tell she is *ancient*, as she probably has been dead even longer than the time non-organic lives have existed. She lies on her side upon a cast iron throne with all sorts of things scattered around her: Untold riches, characters that represent power, an hourglass that manages time... and an emaciated, ferocious hound. The hound rests on the ground, waiting for its owner who seems to be in an eternal slumber.

C: 此刻，星际和平公司对星际贸易的垄断达到空前的高度：公司成为众多星系实质上的掌控者——各部门高速运作，在万千世界留下痕迹。
E: At this moment, IPC's monopoly on interstellar trade has reached an unprecedented level: IPC becomes the de facto controller of many galaxies. All divisions operate at a high speed, leaving their mark in countless worlds.

C: 判定有机：「不好念头」•其一
E: Judged as Organic: Bad Thought (I)

C: 再次切断。
E: Sever it again.

C: 他是你的同伴吗？你思考谁能对抗「智识」的计算…或许是「神秘」，或许是「记忆」，但没有人能保证。
E: Is he your companion? You contemplate who can counter the calculation of the Erudition... It can be the Enigmata or the Remembrance, but nothing is guaranteed.

C: 开满鲜花的植物信徒，他们将每天长出的第一颗果实埋进土里，献给药师。这些种子长大，成为盘踞星空的森林。他们祝福舰队的远行，送给你一朵小花，插在水里永远都不会枯萎。
E: Plant disciples covered in flowers bury the first fruit that they grow each day as an offering to Yaoshi. These seeds grow up into lush forests that blot out the night sky. They wish the fleet a successful voyage, and give you a wee flower that will never wither so long as it is planted in water.

C: 然后，你第十次把富豪们的钞票塞进自己的腰包里。
E: You then stuff the banknotes of the tycoons into your pockets for the tenth time in a row.

C: 你试图创造一场全新的灭绝。
E: You attempt to create a brand-new extinction.

C: 不要太宏大，你已看惯了星系的死亡，它们往往凋零于引力、坍缩和偶然路过的自然灾害，譬如军团与虫群。
E: You must not be too large in scale. You have seen the death of many star systems. The majority meet their end withering to their own gravity, implosion, or at the hands of a passing natural disaster like the Legion or the Swarm.

C: 你的计算单元涌现出一股悲悯。你开始期待，期待光再次出现，期待这段历史重见天日，期待证明他们曾经活过。
E: A surge of compassion runs through your calculation unit. You begin to grow excited, excited for the light to appear once more, excited for this period of history to be once again known to the world, and excited to prove that they once lived.

C: 「您心知肚明！」克丝黛拉拍案而起，「年轻学者需要宏观梦想！需要科学边界！需要狂热的信仰！而不是谨小慎微，把质能解构作为起点也作为终点。你们曾经逼走阿尔比拉德，很可能，我就是下一个。」
E: "You know us well!" Chrystella slams on her desk and rises to her feet. "Young scholars need tangible dreams! We need scientific boundaries! We need manic faith! What we don't need is this constant caution that sees the deconstruction of mass and energy as both the starting point and terminus of everything. You once chased Arblad out of this school, and I fear it is likely that I will be next."

C: 「我们了解你的诉求。」另一位老人叹了口气，「可是，我们没法扭转学派从上到下信奉了数十年的理念。我们只能一条道走到黑，在学派彻底断代之前，尽可能多地为中心命题做出贡献。」
E: "We understand your complaints." Another old man assures her with a sigh. "However, we cannot just overturn the ideals that our school has held for decades. All we can do is follow our chosen path to its end and, contribute as much as possible to our core proposition as we can before our school is completely eradicated."

C: 「假设我们能掌握取之不尽的虚数能量，所有人都将生活在天堂里。」学士拍了拍你的肩膀。
E: "Imagine that we are able to harness infinite Imaginary Energy, then all peoples would live in paradise." The scholar pats you on the shoulder.

C: 对该技术的前景表示悲观。
E: Express pessimism for the future of this technology.

C: 「只要再给我二十年，不，十年。我一定能完善能量捕捉技术。」齐奥尔科夫学士跺着拐杖。
E: "Just give me twenty years. No, ten. I promise you that I will perfect the energy containment technique." Scholar Cholkov slammed his cane into the ground.

C: 成为宇宙之王。
E: Become the king of the universe.

C: 那你呢？你如是反问眼前的学者。
E: "What about you?" You return the question to the scholar in front of you.

C: 丰饶永寿的身躯。
E: The Abundance's body of everlife.

C: 你默默祈祷，希望寂静领主拥有宽宏大量的美德，千万不要因为你们在背后讨论她的年龄而痛下杀手。
E: You mutely pray and hope that the Lord of Silence has magnanimous virtues, that you two won't be murdered for discussing her age behind her back.

C: 我能编一个。
E: I can make one up.

C: 算了，下次再来也不迟。
E: Forget it. I can always come back.

C: 「在玩家对战模式里作弊，简直是对游戏的亵渎！」他努力做出愤慨的表情，但气势仍带着一丝怯弱。
E: "Cheating in PvP is a blasphemy to games!" He tries his best to appear angry, but his poise is somewhat meek.

C: 「我看到了，我看到祂的演算了，」波尔卡的语调冰冷，「一个『时刻』，<color=#dbc291ff>一个天才们挣扎的『时刻』</color>来了。黑塔、斯蒂芬•劳艾德、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆…还有你，误入网中的虫儿，尽你们所能，挣扎吧！」她将破碎的面部转向你，你的直觉一阵毛骨悚然，她在微笑。
E: "I see it. I see THEIR extrapolations." Polka's tone is chilling. "An 'Instant,' <color=#dbc291ff>an 'Instant' where geniuses shall struggle</color> has arrived. Herta, Stephen Lloyd, Ruan Mei, Screwllum... and you, a little bug who stumbled into a web. Struggle with all your might!" She turns her shattered face towards you. Your instincts send your entire body into a hair-standing frenzy — She is smiling.

C: 黑塔？你还好吗？
E: Herta? Are you okay?

C: 在原地发呆。
E: Stay completely still.

C: 「加油，继续前进吧，{NICKNAME}。」黑塔说完，把画面关掉了。
E: "Keep going, {NICKNAME}." Herta says, turning the screen off.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 你挺起胸膛，想活动僵硬的肌肉，却发现自己无法动弹——侧腰传来冰凉触感。是的…你确信…你被枪管抵住了。
E: You puff your chest out and try to move your tense muscles, but you find yourself unable to move — You feel something cold pressed against the side of your waist. Yes... you're very sure... that it is a gun.

C: 「很抱歉给您带来了过于真实的体验。互动环节已经结束，请继续安心观赏剧目。」
E: "We're sorry for providing an overly realistic experience for you. The interactive part has now ended. Please continue enjoying the show."

C: 玩偶的脑袋炸开了花！<unbreak>500</unbreak>宇宙碎片掉落了出来。
E: The head of the doll has blown up! <unbreak>500</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments fall out from it.

C: 在汽车旅馆的地下室，你又一次遇到了萨里——它的脑袋上有红色*恶魔*触角，黏质身体正腐蚀吞噬旅馆里的地板、墙壁，它并不很想理你，看上去它正忙于不断膨胀。
E: In the motel basement, you run into Sal again. He has a pair of red devilish antennae on his head, and his sticky body is corroding the tiles and the walls of the motel. He doesn't pay you any attention, as he is too busy expanding his size.

C: 你望向他，只可惜并未看到他的面容便昏了过去…等你从昏厥中醒来，身边已被骑士众人围绕。
E: You turn to him but pass out before you can see his face... When you regain consciousness, you are surrounded by the knights.

C: 「这是一个神奇的空间。」他摆了摆手，把那些酸酸情诗掏出来扔掉，为你腾出空间。
E: "This is an incredulous space." He beckons. Then, he tosses out some collections of pitiful love poems from the trashcan to make some space for you.

C: 你靠近了那些孢夹——你触碰到了它！一些奇异的电流窜过你的脑海，你如同断电一般失足滑落。一些幼体虫群似乎被这声音惊扰，它们发出窸窸窣窣的声音！
E: You approach the Sporangium and touch them! A strange jolt of electricity shoots straight up to your head, causing you to lose your footing as if you were shocked. Startled by the noise, some Swarm larvae wriggle around, producing a rustling sound.

C: 你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你开始怀疑这是否是场骗局……
E: You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You begin to wonder whether this is a scam...

C: 「博识学会时常会开展有关『天才俱乐部』的议论与探讨，我也常在集会中论证自己是『天才』。我通过实验，将善与恶融为一体——我如此『善恶兼容』。」博士说，「更厉害的是，我尝试用药液分离两者！如果是你，你会选择哪一种？」
E: "The Intelligentsia Guild engages in discussions regarding the Genius Society from time to time, during which I often present arguments to prove myself to be a genius. Through experiments, I've blended good and evil into one to show that I'm compatible with both." Says the doctor. "Even better, I've also tried separating them using a potion! Which of the two would you choose?"

C: 你很想对它的脑袋来上狠狠一拳…但你忍住了这种欲望。
E: You feel like punching its head... but you manage to hold the urge back.

C: 霓虹辉映的地下斗兽场里，封闭的高墙逐渐升起，来自银河各地的两百支达达球队抛接着手里的粉色小球，跃跃欲试。
E: Beneath the neon lights of the underground boxing arena, high walls gradually rise up out of the enclosure as some two hundred Dahdah teams from all over the cosmos toss a pink ball in their hands, eager to give things a whirl.

C: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
E: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

C: 沿着毛发生长的轨迹，你的手指轻轻地掠过苍猿的尾巴，柔软的触感，还有下意识想要挣脱的摆动，都让你兴奋不已。
E: Your fingers lightly glide across the trail of fur and reach the ape's tail — it is soft to the touch, and its reflexive twitches in an attempt to escape your grasp evoke an inexplicable thrill within you.

C: 交易是双向的，付出越多，得到也越多。诗人期待地望着你的眼睛，等待你即将分享的故事。
E: Deals are mutually beneficial. The higher the price you pay, the more you should expect to receive. The poet looks at you with excitement, awaiting the story you will share.

C: 「博识学会联名限定版扭蛋，你，值得拥有。」真有人想要这种东西？你把头凑到扭蛋机上，想看看有没有熟人的周边产品。
E: "Limited-edition Intelligentsia Guild collab capsules, surely worthy of your possession." Do people actually want this thing? You plant your face against the capsule machine, peering into its contents, to see if it carries merchandise of those familiar to you.

C: 你站在观众席的外围，整张脸都因拥挤趴在防护窗上，真空中的飞船皆蓄势以待，为了在待会儿看清它们的轨迹，在十光年内的陨石圈都布满了传感器。
E: You stand along the exterior of the audience seating with your entire face planted on the reinforced screen due to the crowd's density. The ships linger in a ready state in vacuum, and to better follow their traces, all meteorites within <unbreak>10</unbreak> light-years have been filled with sensors.

C: 「军衔、武器、经费和实验室。所谓有用的东西，如果会带走欢愉，又算什么有用呢？我花了很多年才明白这个道理。」
E: "Military titles, weapons, funds, and research labs... Do so-called 'things of value' still have value when they take away joy? It took me many years to understand this."

C: 「我聆听你的悲伤，西风的尽头，如溪流般交织的泪水。我歌咏你的爱情，在那斯缇科西亚的海畔。」
E: "I have heard your sorrow, the ends of the westerly winds, tears intertwining like flowing streams. I sing a song of your love, upon Styxia's shores."

C: 在跨越阻隔的低吟中，万径之门的赐福向你们显现，原本紧闭的监狱洞开，被暴君锁在这里的所有人，都看到了动人的夜色。
E: Amidst low whispers that bridge the divide, the blessing of the Gate of Infinity reveals itself to you. The once-sealed prison opens itself, and all who were imprisoned here by the tyrant see the mesmerizing night sky.

C: 「哎，只要付给我一百个金币，好心的巴特鲁斯就能帮你把它们搬运到一起。当然，你不给，我也能偷走你身上的金币。」
E: "Give me a hundred gold coins, and the generous Bartholos will help you assemble them in the same place. Of course, if you refuse, I might just have to take the coins off you myself."

C: 悄然来到尘世的塞纳托斯，用它的小指轻掠世人的眉梢，伴他们安详入睡。
E: Thanatos quietly descended into the mortal world, gently brushing the brows of the weary with their pinky finger, guiding them into a peaceful slumber.

C: 它是一阵微风。
E: They may come as a breeze.

C: 宴会终将谢幕，奏响那曲海与风起舞之歌，颂唱人世的诸般享乐。
E: The banquet will eventually come to an end, its melody echoing the Waltz of Ocean and Winds, celebrating the countless pleasures of mortal life.

C: 在遥远过去的太古岁月中，无形无相的命运孤独地运转了无数年，但在那个空灵抽象的世界中，无法诞生任何具象的事物。
E: In the distant past of the primordial ages, for countless years, the formless and abstract fate moved alone, but in that ethereal and abstract world, no tangible things could be born.

C: 法吉娜最喜欢捉弄老实的吉奥里亚，有时捏好的泥塑还没硬化，一场暴雨便毫无预兆的砸下，让吉奥里亚的心血变成一摊烂泥。
E: Phagousa loved to tease the earnest Georios. Sometimes, before the clay sculptures were fully hardened, a sudden downpour would smash down without warning, turning Georios's hard work into a puddle of mud.

C: 艾格勒很快对这些作品失去了兴趣，任由它们在天上飘来飘去。
E: Aquila quickly lost interest in these creations and allowed them to float as they will in the sky.

C: 死亡亦是新生的萌芽。
E: Death is but the seed of new life.

C: 可是正如瑟希斯所言，无论他吃下什么，吃了多少，永恒的饥饿仍折磨着他。
E: But as Cerces had foretold, no matter what he ate or how much he consumed, eternal hunger continued to torment him.

C: 尼卡多利自负于武力和神兵，听了巨人的话早已满面不屑。它一手执矛，一手提盾，用尽全力，将二者撞在一起。
E: Proud of their unmatched strength and divine weapons, Nikador listened with scorn. Gripping their spear in one hand and shield in the other, they summoned all their might and clashed them together.

C: 「…就这样，故事结束了。王国边境的威胁得以平定，勇士的功绩将被传颂；而无人知晓，那传说中的『恶龙』，悄然成为了勇士身侧的少女……」
E: "...And so the story ends. The threat at the kingdom's borders was quelled, and the hero's deeds would be sung for ages to come. Yet none would know that the legendary 'evil dragon' had quietly become the maiden who stood by the hero's side..."

C: 体检结束，体检报告已生成，请在空间站内终端设备上查询。
E: Examination complete. The medical examination report has been generated. Please use a space station terminal to check the report.

C: 错误！根本没有<unbreak>35</unbreak>号效应，请诚实作答，诚实！
E: Wrong! There is no such thing as a type<unbreak>-35</unbreak> effect for alpha rays. Please answer honestly, honestly!

C: 音频播放器的界面很特殊，你阅读着旁边的文字：「原创音乐大赛已进入海选打榜投票阶段，得票数最高的选手将有机会获得晋级直通车！」
E: The speaker's interface is quite special, and you read the text beside it: "The Original Music Singing Contest has entered the audition voting stage. The contestant with the highest number of votes will have a chance to enjoy a direct promotion!"

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，居然有个假面愚者混在科员里，想搞点大事。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. There's even a Masked Fool in disguise among the researchers, trying to cook up something big.

C: 呃呃我有点晕…
E: Uhhh... I'm kinda dizzy...

C: 唷，这不是搏击俱乐部冉冉升起的新星{NICKNAME}吗！
E: Whew, if it isn't the Fight Club rising star, {NICKNAME}!

C: 告诉你吧，那位可是连续二十七届搏击擂主挑战赛的冠军，「熔锤镇的卢卡」！
E: Let me tell you, he's the <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time champion of the Fighting King Challenge, "Luka of Moltammerville"!

C: 呃…我不都说了吗，人家是连续蝉联二十七届的超级冠军！
E: Um... I did say Luka is a <unbreak>27</unbreak>-time super champion, no?

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：家族。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "The Family."

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：纯粹的信仰。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Pure faith."

C: 你环顾四周，发现自己正身处于一环形剧场当中。你的脑中十分清楚，此地无疑是哲学家联合的议事集会所，星系的中心，沉思者柱廊。
E: You look around and realize you are in an amphitheater. You are very sure that this is the gathering place of the parliament of the Philosopher Union. It is the center of the galaxy, the colonnade of the contemplators.

C: 「我们肩负使命——共同抵御凯尔萨斯星的灾难雨季！」联觉翻译官如是说。黏土国王慷慨激昂，而你正望向窗外，绞尽脑汁思考，泥巴羊究竟是怎样的口感。
E: The Synesthesia Interpreter says, "This mission rests upon our shoulders. Together, we will defend Kalsas from the calamity that is the wet season!" The Clay King is overcome with emotion. Meanwhile, you stare out the window, racking your brain as you ponder what kind of texture the meat of Claysheep would have.

C: 这些织者日后会成为圣城重要的助力。我为你准备了一点薄礼，还请收下。
E: The weavers will be an invaluable help to the holy city. I have prepared you a small token of my gratitude. Please, take it.

C: 欧洛尼斯的一丝力量已经为这只虫所有——以脚垫的形式。
E: A sliver of the power of Oronyx has already been bestowed upon this insect... in the form of a foot pad.

C: 他面容憔悴、双眼布满血丝，多半是太久没有得到充分休息了。即便如此，他仍背靠铁门喃喃自语，仿佛要将全身力气榨干一般咬牙切齿着。
E: His face is gaunt, his eyes bloodshot, most likely from a severe lack of much-needed rest. Even so, he leans against the iron gate, murmuring to himself, as if trying to exert every ounce of leftover strength through gritted teeth.

C: 出了一点小意外…
E: Something kind of unexpected happened...

C: …意外？
E: ...Unexpected?

C: …啊？这才没过半天——
E: ...Huh? You've barely been at it for half a day —

C: 不过，咳，这回我得收点押金…希望你能理解。
E: But, ahem, I will be taking a deposit... I hope you can understand.

C: 当然，当然！咱做生意讲的就是个诚信。您瞧瞧，这份才刚出锅——您拿好嘞，慢慢享用！
E: Of course, oh yes! We do business here with integrity. Look here, this one's fresh out of the pan — have a bite, and enjoy!

C: 但愿你能记住今天学到的东西。
E: May you always remember what you have learned today.

C: 还是不打扰她了。
E: Don't bother her.

C: 那、那个！不好意思……
E: Th—That's! Sorry...

C: 那不行，得按规矩办事…
E: That's not going to cut it. I do things by the book...

C: 包在我身上。
E: Leave it to me.

C: （还是按约定拍照吧……）
E: (Better fulfill my promise and get that picture...)

C: …若要抵达真实的对岸，必须先找到通往真实的路才行喀。
E: ...If you wish to arrive at the other side of truth, you must first find the pathway leading towards the truth.

C: 多亏了各位战士，我们才能生活在一个更加安全的世界喀。
E: Praise be to those warriors, who've provided a safer world for us to live in.

C: 就拿这个兜帽人来说吧——它根本没有脸喀。
E: Just take this hooded guy for example — it has no face whatsoever.

C: 前行吧，远道的来客——你将见证绝景喀！
E: Onward, guest from afar — behold the gorgeous view!

C: 等、等等，你怎么真过来了！我错了——刚刚是在开玩笑的喀！
E: W—Wait, you're actually coming over! I'm sorry — I was just joking, crrrk!

C: 用*十分*适中的力气敲下去。
E: You use an entirely appropriate amount of strength when striking down.

C: …我理解，你再好好想想吧。不过也别考虑太久…我做生意可不喜欢拖泥带水。
E: ...I get that. Feel free to think about it, but not for too long. I don't like to drag things out in business.

C: 恕我无礼！
E: With all due respect!

C: 让我看看你的能耐！
E: Show me what you've got!

C: 嘤嘤——我听过亡语蝶的故事，它们一定是应某人所托，将冥河彼岸的信息转述给生者嘤。
E: Chirp chirp — I've heard the story of the Eulogistic Butterflies. They must have been entrusted by someone to convey messages from the other side of the River of Souls to the living.

C: 打了这么久交道，你还不明白吗？这天底下就没有我巴特鲁斯钻不了的缝！
E: After all this time, you still don't understand? There's no crack in the world that Bartholos can't slip through!

C: 「Do」…这应该是第三个音。难道只有我能听见吗？
E: "Do"... this must be the third note. Am I the only one who can hear it?

C: 真可惜啊…
E: What a shame...

C: 啾！被你发现了~
E: Tweet! You found me~

C: 勇士啊，恭喜你顺利征讨了多目的盲者啾！我也该回去报告这个喜讯了啾！
E: Warrior, congratulations on defeating the many-eyed blind one! Tweet! I should return and report this joyous news, tweet!

C: …听上去都不像是一只忧郁的机巧鸟应该说出的话了。
E: ...That doesn't sound like something a depressed cycrane would say.

C: 杂货摊主货全还没有注意到你的购物动机，趁现在，好好看看这三只物流机巧鸟的成货质量。说不定跟货全讨价还价的时候，还能借此占据上风。
E: The grocery stall owner Salesby hasn't caught onto your motivation for making the purchase. You should take this opportunity to look closely at the ready-made quality of these three courier cycranes. Maybe you can use that to your advantage when haggling with Salesby.

C: 但是很快，你又从它那造型蠢萌的眼神中觉察到了一丝解脱感。这只机巧鸟也许是获得智能时间并不长，但是你能感觉到它考虑了很久。
E: Soon, however, you noticed a sense of relief from the gaze it gives out in its cute, dumb eyes. This cycrane may not have been sentient for a very long time, but you can feel it's been thinking things over for a long time.

C: 在它的双翼与长尾之下，那如同小山一样的快递包裹就像是堆满洞穴的金银珠宝，尚未铸造的黄金和宝石，经过精工雕琢的艺术品……
E: Beneath its wings and long tail, the package is like jewelry, unrefined gold, precious stones, and finely-crafted works of art piled into a hillock...

C: 我是小美，<color=#dbc291ff>我播种种子的速度是小帅的三倍。</color>
E: I'm Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>I can sow the seeds three times faster than Little Johnny.</color>

C: 再给我讲一遍题目。
E: Please repeat the question.

C: 我已经想到了。
E: I've got the answer.

C: 可是箱子就在那里啊！
E: But that's where the chest is!

C: 要说全宇宙最可怕的威胁是啥，那就是你们的好奇心。要说什么怪物最吓人，那榜单上反物质军团和丰饶孽物得往后稍稍，让你靠前……
E: If you ask me what the most terrifying threat in the entire universe is, it's gotta be your insatiable curiosity. As for the most fearsome creature, I'm afraid the Antimatter Legion and Abominations of Abundance both have to make way for you...

C: <size=36>外交！</size>
E: <size=36>Diplomacy!</size>

C: 也没有那么羞耻吧…
E: It's not that embarrassing...

C: 那我可更不能放水了——我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
E: Then I'm definitely not throwing — I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

C: 第一只回去之后你们就该发现了。
E: You must have realized that the first time one of them flew back.

C: 不许眺望天空！
E: Don't gaze at the sky!

C: 确实这些都是我的记忆。
E: They are indeed my memories.

C: 哪有什么剧本？别傻了，你的人生没有剧本——除了编剧，任何人的人生都没有剧本。
E: What script? Don't be silly. There is no script in your life. No one's life is scripted, except the scriptwriter's.

C: 哦？这是？
E: Oh, this is?

C: 我真的只是碰巧路过。
E: I really am just passing by.

C: 可这人偏要出来造谣生事，「无脑选工造司」？我说哥们儿，这种事骗骗自己就算了，坑害别人可不好。
E: But this person insists on spreading rumors, something about "Don't overthink, choose the Artisanship Commission." I mean, if you want to deceive yourself with such things, that's on you, but it's not good to harm others.

C: 争做哈努兄弟，传递哈努精神。快快行动起来吧！
E: Be the best Brother Hanu you can be, and spread the good word of Hanu. Get moving, pronto!

C: 钟表小子的手指指向了天空，但流梦礁的天空被美梦的灯火遮蔽。
E: Clockie's finger is pointing towards the sky, but the skies of Dreamflux Reef are obscured by the lights of dreams.

C: 这是广告牌，也可能是一把流落到原初梦境的忆域圣剑，哪怕像你这样的银河大侠也没法将它拔出。
E: This is a billboard, but it may also be a sacred Memory Zone sword that fell into the Primordial Dreamscape. Even a cosmic hero like yourself has no way of drawing it.

C: 凭什么我们走？要走的是那群贪得无厌的家伙！
E: Why should we leave? It's those insatiable thugs that should leave!

C: 现在还有事。
E: There are other things to do.

C: 右侧的卧碑属于博雷克林•铁尔南。这位常伴硝烟的牛仔燃烧自己至最后一刻。
E: The right flank of the stele belongs to Breukelen Tiernan. This cowboy, often accompanied by gunpowder smoke, burned bright till his final moments.

C: 你站在高高的坐垫上，睥睨车厢，发出了一声轻蔑的*哼*
E: Standing on the cushions up high, you look disdainfully at the carriage down below and let out a contemptuous snort.

C: 等会就去。
E: Soon.

C: 真好听！这是什么啊？
E: It was great! What's this?

C: 呼…呼…
E: Huff... Huff...

C: 又一篇「艾格勒的启目集」…
E: Another "Aquila's Enlightenment"...

C: 哈，还真是热闹…
E: Hah... quite the spectacle, huh?

C: （向玦轮下方投掷。）
E: (Aim below the jade wheel.)

C: 不能忘记的事是？
E: What was it again?

C: 以及…帕姆刚才的情况…请你千万别告诉其他乘客！那只是一次失误帕！
E: And... about what just happened to Pom-Pom... Please don't tell anyone! It was just a minor slip-up!

C: 当然是满分！
E: Full points, of course!

C: 帕姆…帕姆只是一时没想明白，现在帕姆感觉好多了。
E: Pom-Pom... was just at a loss there, but Pom-Pom's feeling better now.

C: 看样子你从悲伤中走出来了。
E: Seems like you're no longer depressed.

C: 算啦，「无名客」要是不向往外面的世界，那就不叫「无名客」了。
E: Forget it. If the Nameless didn't long for the outside world, then they wouldn't be called the Nameless.

C: 一张纸页被放在桌面上，上面似乎被某种橙红色的液体打湿过。
E: There's a sheet of paper on the table which seems to have had some kind of orange liquid spilled on it.

C: 让帕姆看看…哇！居然真的有增加，明明之前都没有变过！简直难以置信！
E: Let Pom-Pom see... Wowsers! Pom-Pom is taller now, and there's a definite change from last time! That's incredible!

C: 异变感觉很危险…
E: Mutations can be dangerous...

C: 啦啦啦～啦～啦啦啦～啦啦啦啦啦啦～
E: La, la, la! La... La, la, la! La, la, la, la, la, la~

C: 该不会是…强迫症！
E: You might have obsessive-compulsive disorder!

C: 帕姆，帕姆会好好反省自己的。
E: I—I'll reflect on my mistake.

C: 现在就把球球扔出去吧！帕姆已经做好准备啦！
E: Throw the ball now! I'm ready!

C: 哎，打扫起来就没完没了，要是能解放双手就好了……
E: Ugh, so much cleaning to do. If only I could free my hands...

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}乘客，你和空间站关系不是挺好的吗？既然你现在有空，帮我去问问吧？
E: By the way, passenger {NICKNAME}, aren't you close to the space station? Since you are free now, would you do me a favor and go borrow some robots for me?

C: 你在想什么奇怪的事？这可是星穹列车帕！
E: What are you thinking? This is the Astral Express!

C: 哦…我知道了，是和星穹列车相关的协议吧？我们密卷科的确弄到了一批有意思的文献……
E: Oh... I see, it's an agreement related to the Astral Express, right? The Department of Insight has indeed obtained a batch of interesting documents...

C: 不如禁止乘客上列车。
E: What about no passengers on the Express.

C: 还是直奔主题吧…
E: Let's cut to the chase...

C: （这下只能硬着头皮从正面突破了…上吧。）
E: (Guess I gotta bite the bullet and smash through them directly... Bring it on.)

C: 用力敲门。
E: Knock loudly on it.

C: （总之先解决掉怪物，抓住次元扑满！）
E: (Anyway, I should focus on the monsters and catch the Warp Trotter!)

C: …我不明白你的意思。
E: I don't understand what you mean.

C: *电波滤音*怎会如此？！
E: *electronic voice* How could this be!?

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 吉米正被他爸爸关在家里写作业呢，没办法出来玩……
E: Jimmy's dad won't let him out until he's done with his homework...

C: 出剪刀！
E: Scissors!

C: 这是一只造型古典的皮质手提箱，表面落了一层厚厚的灰尘。旅行箱会出现在车站，可以说是再正常不过…但它属于正常状况中相对异常的那种。
E: This leather suitcase has a vintage design, with layer upon layer of dust piling up on top of it. Typically, seeing such luggage at a transportation station is nothing unusual. So it can be said that this suitcase's lonely presence still falls within the realm of what is considered normal, even though it is still somewhat out of the ordinary.

C: 还好，我提前买了一堆太阳薄饼…咱就看看谁先耗得过谁——喔～双倍奶酪，真香……
E: Thankfully, I already bought a stack of suncakes... Let's just see who is gonna outlast the other... Mmm, extra cheese, yummy!

C: 往海洋的西南方看去，你发现一片巨大的黑色圆形。它一度象征着死亡和恐怖，漩涡会无情地吞没一切船只和生命。令人着迷。
E: You look to the southwest of the ocean and spot a colossal black circle. It once represented death and terror, a vortex engulfing all ships and lives. Truly fascinating.

C: 我找到了逻辑语言中枢…
E: I found the language module...

C: 你的刀？你叫一声，看刀应不应你？
E: Your blade? Call it, and see if it answers you.

C: （伸手进去。）
E: (Put your hand in.)

C: 你明白吗？刚才那句话实际上是一种暗示——意在提醒你可以随意掀起门帘，而不必承担任何道德或是法律上的责任。因为它只是一幢被遗弃的孤独商铺。
E: Do you get it? That last sentence was actually a hint — It means you could roll up the curtain over the door at any point without any moral or legal consequences, since it's just a lonely abandoned shop.

C: 「顷接惠书，未即奉答，歉意良深。方知尔身陷困厄，实在深感……」
E: "I received your letter but failed to promptly reply. Please accept my apologies. I know that you're in a difficult situation, and I really feel a deep sense of..."

C: 那多给点工钱吧…
E: How about you pay me a little more...

C: 这…这是…药王秘传？竟然藏在这种地方…咱们快走吧，不要打草惊蛇。我已经标记了这几个家伙的位置，神策府会来处理的。
E: Are... are they the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus? I can't believe they are hiding in such a place... Let's get out of here so as not to alert them. I've marked their location, and I believe those from the Seat of Divine Foresight will come and deal with them.

C: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
E: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

C: 以后一定。
E: Next time for sure.

C: 这个铁盒不会是和我这把钥匙完全匹配吧？请让我试一试。
E: Don't tell me this box matches my key exactly? Let me give it a try.

C: 喂，你不讲规矩啊。
E: Hey, you gotta play by the rules.

C: …呃呃，什么玩意儿？
E: ...Errr, what the heck?

C: …那是什么意思？
E: ...What is that supposed to mean?

C: 当时我觉得这种活法真不错，潇洒、快乐…于是我找到他，恳求他能带我一同旅行。
E: Back then I thought this kind of lifestyle was really cool, carefree, and happy... So I found him and begged him to take me traveling with him.

C: 拿出来啊！把更好玩的东西给我拿出来！
E: Give it to me! Give me something more fun!

C: 我抽了整整四十发，没有一次出现过像样的奖励——没、有、一、次！
E: I pulled forty times all up, and not once did a decent prize appear — Not. One. Single. Time.

C: 不瞒您说，除去方才受到的惊吓，我近来还时常被某种难以言说的疲惫感困扰……
E: Honestly — apart from the shock I just got — I've been having this indescribable feeling of fatigue lately...

C: 等等，谁…你说谁在找我？！
E: Hang on, who... Who did you say was looking for me!?

C: 你、你跟那家伙是一伙的？别过来，不然我要叫人了！
E: A—Are you in cahoots with that guy? Stay away, or I'll call out for someone!

C: 你将遇到姆利斯和*W*的事一五一十告知了阿然……
E: You spill the beans about Mullich and "W," and tell Ran the whole story...

C: …那是因为您还没有和他深入接触过！我认识很多精神异常者，他们中大部分都是好人，只是在不断遭受病痛的折磨…但是那家伙，完全不一样！
E: ...That's just because you haven't come into close contact with him yet! I know plenty of people with mental health issues and most of them are great people — they're just suffering from torturous pain... but this guy, he's completely different!

C: 嘘…您听到了吗？广场对面有人在哭…有人在笑。哭是因为心有渴望，笑是自嘲潦倒……
E: Shh... did you hear that? Someone is crying across the plaza... and someone's laughing. They cry because they still have desires, and they laugh out of ironic satire to their own despondency...

C: 打扰一下，紧急情况！
E: Excuse me, emergency!

C: 人这一生啊，可真是兜兜转转……
E: *sigh* Life... We just go round and round in circles...

C: 啊？我还没聊够呢……
E: Oh? But I'm still not done...

C: 奎茵看起来分外平静，你却莫名能够感受到她心中的怒气——就像是煤灰堆下隐约透出的暗火。
E: Quinn may look extremely calm, but you can feel a kind of rage deep in her heart — just like a smolder of flame burning dimly beneath a pile of soot.

C: 哟，你好啊。我是科琳，筑梦师中的点子王，脑袋里的梦境素材能堆满整个匹诺康尼——还不重样！
E: Yo, how is it going? It's me, Colleen — the idea hamster for the Dreamweavers. I've got enough Dreamscape material in my head to fill all of Penacony — you want it, I got it!

C: …咳，失礼了。既然你已经为我讲了这么多经历，作为回报，我也该给你讲讲我的。
E: ...*ahem* I'm sorry. Since you've told me so much about your experiences, I should offer up the same as thanks and tell you a little about myself.

C: 有一次，我开着飞船在宇宙中闲逛，阴差阳错地来到了一个不存在于星图上的地方：一片遍布小行星的太空垃圾场。
E: One time, I was piloting a spaceship and roaming the stars, when I accidentally came to a place that wasn't on the astral charts: A space junkyard filled with asteroids.

C: 多次警告无果后，星际和平公司找上了巡海游侠，提议联手铲除这个作恶已久的祸害。最后，双方各自派出精锐战力，计划对韦兰的旗舰发动一次斩首行动。
E: After multiple unheeded warnings, the Interastral Peace Corporation reached out to the Galaxy Rangers about building an alliance to wipe out this enduring scourge. In the end, both sides contributed crack troops and planned to launch an operation to lop the head off Wyland's main battleship.

C: 先不听了。
E: Not right now.

C: …怎么死的？
E: ...How did they die?

C: …好在信标的前进方向上有不少金属碎片。我可以从船上发射一个东西，与那些碎片碰撞、反弹，从而给信标施加一个往回来的力……
E: ...Luckily there were lots of metal scraps in the beacon's path. I could launch something from the ship to collide with the scraps and ricochet, thereby exerting a returning force onto the beacon...

C: 交还信标时，所有人都用诧异的目光看向我——原来的委托人早就老死了，是他徒弟的徒弟为我付了酬劳。
E: When I handed back the beacon, everyone looked at me as though I had two heads: The original manager for the task had long died. It was his apprentice's apprentice who paid me out.

C: 后来我又对这片星区做了些勘探，发现那些小行星并非自然形成。它们是一场爆炸产生的碎片，原本来自同一颗星球。
E: Later on, I did some digging around this star system and discovered those asteroids were not formed naturally. They were fragments from an explosion, and were all sourced from the same planet.

C: 你跟踪我？
E: Are you following me?

C: 这里面一定有什么误会。
E: There has to be some kind of misunderstanding here.

C: 咳咳，虽然这次的调查还没有上报本部，但公司肯定会对我们的行动表示支持……
E: *coughs* Although this investigation hasn't been reported to the HQ yet, the IPC will surely express support for our actions...

C: 别急，之后会付给你的。先听听我要说的秘密吧。
E: Relax. I'll pay you later. First, listen to the secret I'm about to tell you.

C: 大毛和我们一样，是拥有高级智慧的生物…我知道这说法有些奇怪，可当一头牛开始谈论灵魂与哲学时，真有人能把它单纯当作肉来看待吗？
E: Just like us, Hairy was a creature of high intelligence... I know it's strange to say, but when a cow starts talking about spirits and philosophy with you, how can anyone treat it as just a piece of meat?

C: 那肉估计确实好吃…
E: I bet it tasted really good though...

C: 这话真令人绷不住，我当场就笑了出来，身边人对我露出看怪物的表情。
E: Those words were so ridiculous that I burst out laughing, and the people around looked at me like a freak.

C: 于是我连忙解释说：这是人类历史上最古老的笑话之一——不管往哪儿走，你都是在向前啊！
E: So I hurried and explained to them that this was the oldest joke in the history of mankind — no matter where you're heading, you're walking forward!

C: 离开这里。
E: Leave this place.

C: ——其他孩子说的都是运动员、政客、商业大亨什么的，只有我说：「我要当虚拟现实设计师，打造所有人都能沉浸其中的完美体验！」
E: While most of them aspired to be athletes, politicians, or businessmen, I was the only one who wanted to be a virtual reality designer who could create a perfect and immersive world for everyone.

C: 不就是醉的人生、梦的人死吗…哈哈哈！
E: Having a good drink and failed dreams... Hahaha!

C: 可波奇说你是「想通过打压、污蔑他，好将他的成果据为己有」。
E: But Bocchi said that you wanted to take credit for his work by oppressing and throwing mud at him.

C: 嗬，你这人，身上穿的这叫啥…？有点意思，我在黄金的时刻还很少看到衣品这么…朴素的人。哦，为了体验生活刻意扮惨的家伙除外。
E: Heh, look at you! What's that you're wearing...? Funny, I've rarely seen anyone so... "plainly dressed" in Golden Hour. Oh, well, except for those guys deliberately trying to look miserable.

C: 咻咻…目前存在的风险：车前灯采用的配光镜使用了艾默里奇先生独创的超低能耗散光技术。该技术的商用规范目前暂不明确。
E: *Beep*... Current risk: The light distribution lenses in the car's headlights adopt Mr. Emmrich's exclusive ultra-low-energy diffraction technology. The commercial specifications for this technology are unclear at the moment.

C: 咻咻…目前存在的风险：家族筑梦师曾承诺将望远镜设计为可自动调节高度，以满足不同身型宾客的需求。显然，当下的望远镜并未配置高度调节功能。
E: *Beep*... Current risk: The Dreamweavers of The Family have promised that the telescope would adjust its height to accommodate guests of different sizes. However, the current telescope does not have that feature.

C: 咻咻…正在进行侵权风险分析……
E: *Beep*... Initiating infringement risk analysis...

C: 你感觉心情有些复杂。或许你可以留下来看看后续会发生什么…或是直接转头离开。
E: You feel a mix of emotions. Maybe you should stay for a while to witness others' reactions... or just walk away.

C: 在你眼前的可是匹诺康尼未来的首富，伟大的大发明家艾默里奇！
E: You're looking at the Great Inventor Emmrich, the future richest man in Penacony!

C: 你的喜好还挺特别。
E: You have some unusual tastes.

C: 关于匹诺康尼的娱乐产业…
E: About the entertainment industry in Penacony...

C: 可能是行业环境的错。
E: It could be the fault of the industry's culture.

C: 衣冠楚楚的男人掏出了一沓苜蓿币，递到了你的手中。
E: The well-dressed man takes out a wad of Alfalfa credits and presses it into your hands.

C: 声乐之星？
E: The planet of canticles?

C: 我不会辜负您的，即便是虚假的谎言，我也会让它们更加动听。
E: I won't let you down. Even if it's a fabricated lie, I will make it more melodious.

C: 嗯…我能理解，毕竟要用纯美女神与声乐之星的名声行骗，还要利用爱戴我的听众，这种事在您眼中很过分吧？
E: Well... I can understand that. After all, I'm using the reputation of the Beauty and the planet of canticles to deceive my adoring audience and take advantage of them. It's excessive in your eyes, isn't it?

C: 她没有表情，没有言语，但却像是在无声地质问我——凭什么？凭什么她死了，我却能好好活着？
E: She was expressionless and didn't utter a word, but she seemed to be confronting me in silence. Why? Why am I still alive when she's dead?

C: …难道是我眼花了吗？
E: ...Are my eyes failing me?

C: 你愣在这干什么？
E: Why are you standing around?

C: 没关系的，我并不在意那天发生的事；其实，我很感谢你能来救我。
E: I want you to know that I've never held it against you for what happened that day. In fact, I really appreciate you coming to my rescue.

C: 终有一天，我们会再次相遇。哪怕我们已经不再是这副形体，不再是警探与人质，不再是「卢•阿彻」与「诺卡」。
E: One day, our paths will cross again, even though we might not look the same, are no longer a detective and a hostage, and are no longer Lew Archer and Noka.

C: 梦是潜意识的海洋，往往反应了一个人最真实的想法。
E: Your dream is the ocean of your subconscious, and it reflects your genuine thoughts.

C: 如果一个人做梦时都不能把垃圾丢进桶里，那他在现实保护环境的概率也不会很高。
E: If someone can't even throw trash properly when dreaming, it's unlikely that person will care much about the environment in real life.

C: 而且，机器应该是不会哭的才对……
E: Also, a robot isn't supposed to cry...

C: 最后，我耗尽了燃料，搁浅在一颗小行星上……
E: At last, I used up my fuel and was stranded on an asteroid...

C: （呼…没想到还是要这么收场。还以为那家伙没什么攻击性……）
E: (Phew... Never thought things would wrap up like that. I didn't take that guy to be so aggressive...)

C: 我用…「家族的方式」，抹消了约翰和詹妮弗在梦中的存在——一劳永逸，不留痕迹。
E: I used... "The Family Way"... to wipe out the very existence of John and Jennifer from the dreamscape once and for all, without a trace.

C: 我的过去，一直纠缠着我。
E: My past has always haunted me.

C: 有天，我突然收到封邮件，是我学生时代最好的朋友寄来的，我们已经快十年没见面了。我非常激动，高价从别人那儿买了当天的跨星系船票。
E: Then one day, I suddenly got some mail from my high school bestie. It'd been ten years since we'd seen each other. I was so excited that I forked out top dollar for a same-day ticket on an interplanetary transport then and there.

C: 这么快？孩子，基金会里那些磨磨蹭蹭的办事员真该跟你学学。
E: That was quick. Those dithering schmucks at the foundation could really learn a thing or two from you, kid.

C: 猜猜这套说辞在演讲会上说了多少次？又骗到了多少投资？
E: Take a guess how many times she's given this spiel before? And how much investment she's swindled out of people?

C: 在战争爆发前，或许你可以<color=#dbc291ff>向伍尔西求助</color>。
E: Before war breaks out, perhaps you can <color=#dbc291ff>ask Woolsey for help</color>.

C: 因为有你的消息，我们封锁了整个白日梦酒店，除非她能在房间里凭空搓出一台超光速引擎。否则，就算是反物质军团来了也救不了她。
E: Thanks to your intel, we were able to cordon off the entirety of The Reverie. Unless she can somehow put together an FTL drive in her room out of thin air, not even the Antimatter Legion would be able to come and rescue her.

C: …你怎么还不走？我警告你啊，如果你敢在大庭广众之下，一时冲动做出什么蠢事来，明天的头条可就精彩了！
E: ...What are you still doing here? I'm warning you, if you dare show yourself in public again and do something rash, tomorrow's headlines will be a surefire hit!

C: 我完美的计划全都被打乱了，可恶——可恶啊啊啊！
E: My perfect plan has totally been disrupted, blast it... Blast it all!!!

C: 针对你？好笑，你都不先反省一下自己的所作所为吗？
E: Against you? You're kidding. Why don't you think about what you've done?

C: 尽管担心受怕去吧，我早晚会让你为自己的错误付出应有的代价。
E: You will lie awake at night, wondering what I'll do to you. I will make you pay for your mistakes sooner or later.

C: 之前我本来准备亲自接待各位，结果鸢尾花家系送来的那几台教学器材突然失控，给我抓了起来！
E: I was preparing to welcome all of you myself. However, the teaching devices that the Iris Family sent over suddenly went rogue and seized me!

C: 是不是以后上不了蕉师的课了？
E: So, we won't be able to attend a BananAdvisor's class ever again?

C: 行啊。
E: Sure.

C: 我可不是瞎掰。我那个爹，当初口口声声说要支持我实现梦想，结果只是为了让我做企业代言人，好帮他那些见不得人的生意打掩护！
E: I'm not making things up. Back then, my dad kept saying that he would support my dream. However, he was just paying lip service to me in order to convince me to take on the role of enterprise ambassador and help him cover up all of his shady businesses that couldn't see the light of day!

C: 建设家乡不好吗？
E: Is staying back and developing your home planet not a good thing?

C: 你向阿图罗先生如实复述了三位学生的回答，包括那些摆烂充满攻击性的语句。
E: You relay to Mr. Arturo the three students' answers as they were presented to you, including the phrasings where they've given up and the ones that felt like personal attacks.

C: 而且，哪怕短短十年的时间都足以让世界变一番模样，我们又怎能确定自己的处世经验会同样适用于年轻人呢？
E: Not to mention, ten years is enough time for the world to look completely different. How can we be sure our life experiences would still apply to the youths now?

C: 「美梦多彩，理想自由」。
E: "Color your dreams, free your ideals."

C: 学院里的每个人都是小鸟。
E: Everyone in the academy can be considered young fledglings.

C: 它的盖子被冻住了，或者干脆是从内向外开的。
E: Its lid is either frozen shut or opened from within.

C: 「星际决胜庆典」绝赞举办中。如果你也想成为以太战线大师的话，就赶快来报名参赛吧。
E: The Interastral Tournament Festival is on. Come and sign up for the contest if you want to become a master Aetherium Wars player.

C: 你亲手缔造的王座，在你的搀扶下，你将可爱的芝士流心——哦不，现在是尊敬的洞悉者——送了上去。
E: With your support, approaching the throne that you created with your bare hands, you thrust up the cute Molten Cheese Tart — ah, no, it's the esteemed Insighter, now.

C: 「救命呀！」会是虫子在求救吗？显然不是，这究竟是谁呢，你开始思索……
E: "Save me!" Is this insect asking for help? Obviously not. So, who could this be? You start to ponder deeply...

C: 也...不是没有道理。
E: You're not... entirely wrong.

C: 古老且传统的设计，不仅越野性能强大，而且还能够降低机体重心、避免因出力导致的侧翻和后仰。
E: An old and traditional design that not only allows it to perform well off-road, it can also lower the body's center of gravity to prevent rollover and backwards lean when using power.

C: 考虑到之前造物引擎就是使用双腿行走，我们还是按照原本的样子修复它更好些。
E: Considering that the Engine of Creation once walked on two legs, I think we should recreate it according to the original design.

C: 能量护盾。
E: An energy shield.

C: 好啊~好啊~真是辛苦你了。我就知道大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}不会让人失望。
E: Great, great! Oh thank you! I just knew that the great and celebrated {NICKNAME} wouldn't let me down!

C: 这些废料是你的了。
E: This scrap is yours.

C: 哈努兄弟！是哈努兄弟啾！
E: Brother Hanu! It's Brother Hanu, tweet!

C: 那个…人家准备回大树了，可以把你带到入口，要一起走吗啾？
E: Well... I'm going to return to the Great Tree. I can bring you to the entrance. Do you want to come along, tweet?

C: 啾！人家粗心大意，忘了给钟表装上指针，只能自己当指针了啾……
E: Tweet! I got careless and forgot to install the hands on the timepiece. Guess I'll have to stand in for them, tweet...

C: 我想！
E: Sure would!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个爱捣蛋的孩子总爱以恶作剧吸人眼球，那个<color=#dbc291ff>夸张的「茶杯先生」</color>就是它的作品~说不定它会以奇妙的方式出现在附近啾？
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a playful child who loves playing pranks on others to get attention. The <color=#dbc291ff>Flamboyant Mr. Teacup</color> is of its creation! Who knows, it may show up nearby surprisingly?

C: 让我想想…对了，有个爱解密的孩子在<color=#dbc291ff>小房间中布置了一系列谜题</color>，正等着第一位挑战者呢~客官要不要试试？据说还有宝藏呢啾~
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a child who loves puzzles and has <color=#dbc291ff>laid out a series of riddles in a small room</color>, waiting for its first challenger! How about it giving it a try? There may be treasure involved, tweet!

C: 啾！多亏了客官，大家才能安全团聚，人家一定会报答您的啾！
E: Tweet! Everyone was only reunited safely thanks to you. I will definitely repay you, tweet!

C: 关于折纸小鸟…
E: Tell me about the origami birds...

C: 嗯哼，够爽快，不愧是本公子看中的帮手啾~
E: Mhmm, quick decision. I wasn't wrong about you being a good helper tweet!

C: 我帮你揍人。
E: I'll help you beat people up.

C: 不愧是闪亮的黄金公子啾…
E: No wonder he's the shiny Young Master Gold, tweet...

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 毕竟，梦境中没有真正的鸟儿。
E: After all, real birds do not exist within the Dreamscape.

C: 咔，演出开始啾！
E: *clack* The show is about to begin, tweet!

C: 我都藏得这么努力了，怎么还是能被找到啾……
E: I've tried my bestest to hide myself, and you still found me, tweet...

C: 我算看出来了，你就是故意来消遣本鸟的，根本没打算点单啾。
E: I can see it now. You're just here to make entertainment out of me and have no intention of placing an order, tweet.

C: 小鸟可是钟表小子的好朋友，是贵宾中的贵宾啾！
E: I'm a good friend of Clockie's, so I'm the VIP of VIPs, tweet!
Ah, you...

C: 很宏伟。
E: It's magnificent.

C: 呼呼，看来你已经猜中了，答案就是「不知道有多少镜子」啾！
E: Ho-ho, looks like you got it right: The answer is "I don't know how many there are," tweet!

C: 太可怕了！
E: That's horrifying!

C: 啾…露馅了…露馅了…快跑啾！
E: Tweet... It's been exposed... exposed... time to dash, tweet!

C: 有什么事？快说啾！
E: What's going on? Speak, tweet!

C: 小鸟币可不卖给大人啾。
E: Bird coins are not for sale to adults, tweet.

C: 折纸老鸟啾~
E: Origami old bird, tweet!
Ahem...

C: 好事做尽，拔掉杂草。
E: Keep doing good deeds, and pull out the weeds.

C: 我就说诚哥怎么不在「老地方」…果然是你干…果然是你！你就是那个「内鬼」！
E: No wonder Brother Cheng wasn't in his usual spot... It was you... You are the mole!

C: 档案和证明都没有，谁知道你是云骑？
E: Hah! You don't even have official documents! Who'd believe that you're truly a Cloud Knight?

C: 我看你是痴心妄想！你既已伤害了诚哥，怎么还好意思要我放过你？我是放过你了，可你有放过诚哥吗？
E: This is ridiculous! You hurt Brother Cheng, and now you're asking me to show you mercy? Why didn't you show him any mercy!?

C: 不怕你这样的化外民笑话，丹鼎司内除了医典专著之外，还封存着一些「禁忌书典」。它们原本应该是小心保存的，如今却不小心「失窃」了。
E: Please forgive me for this awkward situation. Actually, in addition to medical texts, we also keep some "forbidden tomes" here in the Alchemy Commission. They are supposed to be carefully preserved, but now they've been stolen.

C: 该怎么说呢…总觉得能意识到这个问题很愚蠢，已经不是普通谛听能做到的事了……
E: How do I even... Being able to realize how simple this question is... That's already beyond the capabilities of an ordinary Diting...

C: 可是你都变得这么聪明了……
E: But you've become so smart...

C: 这声音是…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！好久不见了！你怎么在这里？我在和丹枢大人聊天呢。她说要带我来她工作的地方看看。
E: This voice... It's you, {F#miss}{M#mister}! It's been a while! What brings you here? I was talking to Lady Dan Shu, and she said she wanted to show me where she worked.

C: 我算到您这次无论如何都不会抽到凶签了。老板，您要相信我若月的本事啊！
E: Don't worry. I've foreseen that you'll definitely not get a "Woe" this time. You should have faith in me!

C: 你决定将这墓碑上的一切熟记在脑子里，于是你认真研读起来，但你始终参不透结尾的这句「需选用高筋面粉」是什么意思。
E: You decide to commit everything on this tombstone to memory, and so you begin your careful study — but no matter what, you're unable to figure out what the final sentence means: "This requires high gluten flour."

C: 「祝你和我一样拥有精致睡眠。」从碑文来看，墓主人一定是个和善的人。
E: "Wishing you an exquisite sleep just like me." Judging by the inscription, the grave occupant must be a very kind person.

C: 没想到，这么长的时间过去，琴师收获了这么多的知音。
E: I never expected the guqinist to have made so many new soul mates after all this time.

C: 唔…没别的观众…你这小孩，说话真是不客气，噎到我了。
E: N—No other audience... Kid, you don't have to be so rude. I'm choking up here...

C: 你想起你的那位岁阳师父，准备在下节课上给你安排一场「实战演练」。
E: You think of your heliobus master, who is planning on giving you "Practical Training" during your next session together.

C: 没拍好。
E: Not yet.

C: 确实不是你的错。是我，和我熟悉的那一整个世界，都已经过时了。
E: Really, it's not your fault. It's all me — and that world of mine I once knew, it's all obsolete.

C: 言归正传——咱们要学唱的这段，正是这出戏里最吓人的桥段。
E: But let's get back on track here... the part that we are learning is the scariest scene in the whole opera.

C: 真的吗…虽然有些缺乏创意，但为什么别人用过的出场方式我就不能再用呢？
E: Really...? I might be lacking for creativity then, but why can't I use the same entrance as someone else for myself, too?

C: 好好拿着我的礼物吧，拜拜！
E: You enjoy that gift, okay. Bye!

C: 太好了，这份恩情在找到我朋友之前，我是不会忘记的。
E: Great. I will never forget this show of kindness... until I get to my friends.

C: 我原本还准备了<unbreak>900</unbreak>个谜题给你的，但是我现在不想了……
E: I had over <unbreak>900</unbreak> puzzles prepared for you, but I don't feel like it anymore...

C: 你让我想通了这么大一件事，应该我请你才对。
E: You really helped me think things through. I should be treating you.

C: 哈，要是开车的家伙自己反倒被撞醒了，估计要在入梦池里气个半死吧。
E: Ha, if the person driving somehow got knocked awake, they'd probably be steaming mad in the Dreampool.

C: 我太了解这帮家伙了。能在匹诺康尼开这种车的都非富即贵，钱对他们来说就是数字而已。
E: I know these guys all too well. If you can afford to drive that kind of car in Penacony, then money is just a number to you.

C: 还赔偿？你看是他身上的坑大还是我车上的坑大？我才是受害者好不好！
E: Compensation? Is the dent on my car is bigger, or is the dent on him bigger? I'm the victim here, okay?

C: 你、你真是不可理喻！
E: Y—You are just beyond reason!

C: 总之，感谢您为我们提供线索。这是家族承诺的奖励，之后我们会为案情做出结论。
E: Anyway, thank you for giving us some clues. Here's that reward The Family promised. We'll reach a verdict on the case soon.

C: 哎…局里玩不过我，就想着耍盘外招。看来美梦的主人水准也不过如此，世风日下啊。
E: *sigh* They can't beat me in a game, so they resorted to underhanded tricks. I see this is the level of the masters of this beautiful dream, this world is really going to hell.

C: 你看，顶端实际是中空的，里面藏有极微型的发信器。奥洛能在扭蛋机上百战百胜，靠的就是这个，他从远处就能操控得到的图案。
E: Look, the tip is completely hollow, with minuscule transmitters inside. The reason that Oro could play that random-item machine and win every time is all thanks to this. He was able to control which pattern he received from a distance.

C: 在斐迪南德的废弃零件堆中，你发现了某个似曾相识的物品。
E: You discover an item inside Ferdinand's scrap metal heap that seems somehow familiar.

C: 某次星际航行途中，我们的舰船遭遇了极为凶险的蛰虫群袭击。我虽侥幸躲过劫难，家父与家母却身躯残破，伤重昏迷，最终仍旧不治……
E: During an interstellar voyage, our ship was attacked by a swarm of ferocious stinging insects. I was fortunate enough to escape disaster, but my mother and father were maimed and sustained severe injuries. They collapsed from their heavy wounds and soon passed away...

C: 对不起，我没那么多钱。
E: Sorry, I don't have that much money.

C: 离开前，能否请您带我去梦境各处逛逛，呆得久了，临走时竟还有些舍不得。
E: Before we leave, can I ask you to take me to walk around the dreamscape? I have been here so long now, I am almost a little reluctant to leave.

C: 果然，我早就猜到了。
E: Sure enough, I guessed it.

C: 当然是「热砂的时刻」特产的白柠檬片。不止和你的杯身很搭，和我的酒浆颜色也非常相称。
E: The lemon slices from Moment of Scorchsand, of course. Not only does it go well with the design of your glass, but it also matches with the color of my liquor.

C: …我…我不知道…该说些什么。
E: ...I—I'm not sure... what to say.

C: 真见鬼，我们怎么变成了这副模样？
E: This is ridiculous. How did we end up looking like this?

C: 退钱！你这个导游，明明最开始的时候说自己有影城的VIP通道，结果带我们钻小洞入园不说，里面还全是怪物。
E: I want a refund! As our tour guide, you told us you had VIP access to the theme park, but we ended up having to sneak into the park. And what's worse, the park was filled with monsters!

C: 大家都冷静些…
E: Lets all calm down...

C: 英雄，多亏了你，让我看清了它们两个的真面目，今天你就来评评理，谁才是最香醇的酒。
E: Hero, thanks to you, I have seen their true natures at last. Today, you must be the judge and decide which of us is truly the finest of wines.

C: 啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
E: Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!

C: 哈！这酒酒劲强韧，宛如有位格斗家一拳轰在了我的脑袋上。
E: Hah! This wine has a ferocious strength, drinking it is like a punch to the face from a great fighter!

C: 赶紧回屋吧，昨晚他那下水道音乐闹腾得，我现在都还困着，气儿都跑没了。
E: Let's head back home. Last night, his terrible gutter music was so loud, I'm still exhausted. I've lost all my fizz.

C: 别查案了，去玩吧。
E: Don't worry about the case. Just go and play.

C: 你还真是锲而不舍。但黑塔就是黑塔，你明白她是怎样的一位奇女子……
E: You sure are persistent. But, Herta is Herta. You know what kind of quirky lady she is...

C: 电话始终无人接听。看来她那副棺材隔音真的很好。
E: The call was never answered. Her coffin must be really well sound-proofed!

C: 阿兰…
E: Arlan...

C: 看啊，桶王听到了我们的赞美，祂正在注视我们！
E: Look, the King of Cans heard our praises for THEM. THEY are gazing at us!

C: 所以，为什么一定要执着于铁桶这个元素？
E: Then again, why must these people be obsessed over the idea of iron cans?

C: 同学，考试的时候不要掏手机出来！
E: Students should know there ain't no playin' with phones durin' an exam!

C: 我和对手的差距太大了，那点愤怒补充的气泡根本不够。
E: The gap between my competition and me was far too big. I did not work up anywhere near enough rage bubbles.

C: 你来啦，骂人宗师，一起来庆祝巨星苏乐达的诞生吧！
E: You're here, master of insults! Let us celebrate the birth of a new SoulGlad Superstar together!

C: 不，这张是…限量版。{RUBY_B#梦星娱乐}发行商{RUBY_E#}当年赠给我以示纪念，但我想它或许对哥哥更有纪念意义，就写上祝福语转赠给他了……
E: No, this is a... limited edition. The {RUBY_B#Dreamstar Entertainment}distributor{RUBY_E#} gave it to me as a commemorative souvenir, but I thought it would mean more to my brother, so I wrote some kind words on it and gave it to him...

C: 啧，还真是冥顽不灵。罢了罢了，我再去找其他人。
E: Tsk, how pigheaded. That's fine. I'll just find someone else.

C: 好吧，谁叫你是知更鸟的忠实歌迷呢。还是那句话——为热爱做出牺牲，不丢人。于是你果断采取了行动……
E: Alright. You sure are a big fan of Miss Robin. Just like before — there's no shame in making a sacrifice for your passion. And so, you take your decisive action...

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 接下来，我就不打扰诸位了，请好好享受吧。如有需要，随时喊我，我就在门外恭候。
E: If there's nothing else, I'll take my leave now. Please enjoy yourselves. Feel free to call for me anytime if you need me. I'll be right outside.

C: 错了！是4盏！冥差大人，{F#她}{M#他}是假的。
E: Incorrect! It's 4! Your Honor, {F#she}{M#he} is a fake.

C: 我只知道她们都很喜欢我。
E: I only know all three of them like me a lot.

C: 会不会是狱卒留下的？
E: Perhaps it was left behind by a prison guard?

C: …我不认识你。这对你而言，是件好事。
E: ...I don't know you. That's a good thing for you.

C: 虽然你可能不在意，但是不妨告诉你吧，周围好像没有人盯着你。
E: You might not care, but I'll tell you this anyway: No one seems to be looking at you.

C: 嗯哼…再声明一次，登上传送带是一件不安全、也不符合法律法规的事情。竞锋舰的安保人员不推荐任何人、以任何理由，登上传送带。
E: Ahem. I repeat: Climbing onto the conveyor belt can result in bodily harm and is against the law. The Skysplitter security team does not recommend climbing onto the conveyor belt under any circumstances, regardless of who you are.

C: 你下意识明白这俩人并无恶意，只是他们求你办的事需要些时间。
E: You subconsciously realize that while these two mean you no harm, what they want from you will take up a lot of time.

C: 难道不是你认为无名客干坏事都很难被发现吗？或者是被发现了，上面也不责怪吗？
E: I thought you said if the Nameless were up to no good, they'd never be found out. Or even if they were, the higher-ups would never hold them responsible?

C: 你只管狠狠地发射，办法由老白来想。
E: You just focus on firing those cannons and let me take care of the rest.

C: 我就知道。
E: I knew it.

C: 我列车煤气忘关了。
E: I forgot to turn off the gas on the Express...

C: 别胡说八道了！你…你不过是虚张声势罢了！
E: Enough nonsense! Y—You're just blowing hot air!

C: 那你们虚构叙事有难咯。
E: Then you might have some problems with Pure Fiction.

C: 画风怎么开始玄幻了？
E: When did this take a turn for the mystical?

C: 你目瞪口呆地看着灵活的皮皮西如同土拨鼠那般，从一个个空位上冒出头，用迥然相异的嗓音和语气熟练地签着到。
E: Flabbergasted, you stare at the lively Pepeshi. As if he is a groundhog, he's popping his head up from various empty seats, skillfully answering the roll call in completely different tones and voices.

C: 嘘！小、小点声，老师又看过来了……
E: Shhh! P—Pipe down! The teacher is looking over here again...

C: 各位演员的特色都相当明显啊，在开拍前，导演有什么想说的吗？
E: Each actor's got their own unique traits. Is there anything the director would like to say before we start shooting?

C: （「阿红」相当专业，目前没发现什么问题。）
E: (Reddie's pretty professional. I haven't noticed any problems yet.)

C: ——全剧终。
E: ...The end.

C: 刻法勒在上，请赐予我全知全能的力量吧！
E: Kephale above, please grant me the power of omniscience!

C: 你只好发挥自己的聪明才智，结合「高温区」的提示，判断出眼前的装置或许是加热池水的开关。
E: You can only rely on your own wits and deduce whether the device before you is for heating the pool based on the high-temperature area's indicators.

C: 怎么是你？！
E: You! How!?

C: 不必意外，亲爱的{NICKNAME}乘客，在我设计之初，「关心乘客的身心健康」就被设置为了最首要的功能。
E: No need to be surprised, dear passenger {NICKNAME}. "Passengers' physical and mental health care-giver" was originally designed as my prime priority.

C: 已将您的偏好记录在册。
E: Your preference has been recorded.

C: 又来了，「开拓梦游」！所以说这到底是什么科学原理啊？
E: Here we go again, "Trailblaze sleepwalking"! What on earth is the science behind this?

C: 问问缇宝她们的意见？
E: How about asking Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne?

C: 再想想吧。
E: Let's think about it.

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 吼？没想到，居然答对了…既然如此，本狮就勉为其难地表达下赞赏吧。但你也要感谢，本狮用这种方式为你揭示了一个道理吼。
E: Ho? I didn't think you'd get it... In that case, I will bequeath you with paltry praise. But you must also be thankful that I taught you a precious life lesson in such an interesting way.

C: 战场上更是如此，悬锋城的军法就是为整顿纪律而设立的。狮子，满意了？
E: It is even more so on the battlefield. Castrum Kremnos' military code was established to instil order. Satisfied, lion?

C: 吼？！…是遐蝶小姐？别把手伸进来吼！本狮绝对不想咬您吼！
E: Ho!? ...Miss Castorice? Don't put your hand in! I absolutely don't wish to bite you!

C: 还未自我介绍，在下「超智能病毒」。生而为病毒，我很抱歉。
E: I forgot to introduce myself. I'm the Supersmart Virus. I'm sorry for being born as a virus.

C: 哈哈！《超级开拓小子》还是这么好玩！让人想起之前那些无忧无虑的炎炎夏日，空调房、西瓜…刚放假的小朋友，被电脑里的我暴打。
E: Haha! Super Trailblaze Kid is still such a fun game! It reminds me of those carefree hot summer days in air-conditioned rooms with watermelon... Beating up those gamer kids who just got the summer off from school.

C: 列车锅上贴了一张便签：昨天晚餐没吃完，在你这里寄存一下。——列车长
E: There is a note posted on the Express Special: I couldn't finish this last night. I thought I'd store it here for a little while. — Conductor

C: 嗝，好撑。
E: Burp... So full...

C: 丹恒老师，怎么连你也往我的冰箱里乱塞东西……
E: Master Dan Heng, even YOU are sticking random stuff into my refrigerator? How could you?

C: 看起来就像个普通垃圾桶。
E: You are just an ordinary trashcan.

C: 我自己就已经是垃圾桶了，你还让我去翻别的垃圾桶——你想累死我！？
E: How can you tell me to do that when I'm a trashcan myself? Do you want to see me die of exhaustion!?

C: 太不礼貌了！正确的做法是四指并拢、掌心向上…你，不合格！
E: That's rude! The correct way is to bring your four fingers together with your palm facing upward... That's a fail!

C: 你来得正好。我们兄弟俩原本准备了个大杀器，打算在庆典中夺冠…没想到这地方强者如云，我们只能放弃。
E: You've come just in time. We initially prepared a major killer move to get the trophy for the festival... but who knew there were so many stronger contenders, so we had no choice but to give up.

C: 看来是老夫多虑了，我看此地如此繁华，几乎能与先皇的王宫比肩，又怎会出现这般无法无天的恶徒。
E: Looks like I was worried for nothing then. I see that this place is prosperous, almost on par with the palace of my former emperor. I'm sure lawless ruffians would not appear here.

C: 怎会如此…你对事物本质的理解如此透彻，正符合「桶哲学院」的入学要求！
E: How is this possible... Your profound understanding of the essence of matters makes you a perfect candidate for Can Philosophy Academy admission!

C: 让我先歇歇。
E: Let me take a breather first.

C: 寂静，漫长的寂静。两只小海豹观察着彼此的破绽，仿佛两位对峙的刀客。它们的对对碰之力想必登峰造极呀！
E: Silence. A long, tense silence. Two baby seals lock eyes, each scanning for an opening, like duelists ready to draw their blades. You can almost feel the weight of their impending clash.

C: 嗷呜！
E: Awooo!

C: 嗷舒服嗷！
E: Awoo... Feels so comfy!

C: 让我瞧瞧…嗯…孩子们都在茁壮成长。这样人家也能放心啦。
E: Let me see... Hmm... Looks like they are all growing healthily. That puts me at ease.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 啊，水面有动静了！快快，把鱼竿提起来，拜托啦！
E: Look, ripples! C'mon, reel it in! Please!

C: 这不就是「我」？
E: That's me.

C: …算啦，这也是你的特质。据说只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
E: ...Never mind, that's just how you are. Word has it that only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.

C: 呼~好凉好凉。
E: Phew~ It's refreshing.

C: 好舒服的风呀，真希望生活每天都能像海面一样平静。
E: Wow, the breeze is so pleasant! I wish every day was as peaceful as the surface of the sea.

C: 只要陪着你，我就会很耐心。
E: I'm willing to be patient as long as I'm with you.

C: 我想到自己丢失的是什么了。跟我来吧，{NICKNAME}，我们一起去找到它。
E: I recall what I've lost. Follow me, {NICKNAME}. Let's search for it together.

C: …你怎么穿着悬锋城的盔甲？
E: ...Why are you wearing the armor of Castrum Kremnos?

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 红色确实帅。
E: Yeah, red would've been pretty cool.

C: 古老的言语还在耳畔回荡，但活窗已然合上。恍神间，你似乎看到木马的周身亮起微光，像是无形的门扉正在开启，难以用言语描述的空洞感忽地涌上心头。
E: The ancient words linger in the air, but the sliding window has been sealed shut. In your daze, you notice a faint glow around the wooden horse, as if an invisible portal opens — an ineffable emptiness suddenly grips your heart.

C: …这？我怎么又回来了？
E: ...What? How am I back here again?

C: …愿它的门扉仍旧敞开。
E: ...May its door remain open.

C: 悬锋人是必须争取的盟友，可完成使命的难度也极高，不仅要提防灾厄的侵袭，还要直面「纷争」的怒火…希望它们能平安返回。
E: While the Kremnoans are crucial allies, the mission there poses grave challenges — facing both the calamity's strike and Strife's fury... May they return unharmed.

C: 全都不见了…晴天明净的灰白色，雨后天空的浅灰色，乌云淤积时分的铅灰色，全都沉进了最深、最浓的黑暗里……
E: All of it is gone... The pale white of clear skies, the light gray after the rain, the leaden gray of gathering storm clouds, all have sunk into the deepest, densest darkness...

C: 你的眼睛…
E: Your eyes...

C: 哈哈，是啊…谁说不是呢。
E: Haha, yeah... Who wouldn't agree?

C: 我和那位希拉女士是同一个科室的科员——法政科。
E: I came from the same department as Ms. Sheila, the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: {NICKNAME}青年才俊，久仰久仰。明德有失远迎，切莫怪罪。
E: {NICKNAME}, I have heard good things about you. Please excuse me for this informal reception.

C: 而我，将会为你拨开这层心灵上的迷雾。这也是我能为黑塔大人，做出的微小贡献。
E: And I will clear the uncertainty in your heart. This is the least I can do for Madam Herta.

C: 嗯。作为卡波特大人的秘书，必须对他的日常行止负责。要是因为我的个人疏忽，损害了他的公共形象，我可就有麻烦了……
E: Yeah. As Master Capote's secretary, I must be responsible for his daily activities. If my personal negligence damages his public image, I will be in trouble...

C: 有没有什么我可以帮到你的？
E: Is there anything I can help with?

C: 除此以外，我偶尔也会协助艾丝妲小姐处理一些事务。不过我不太擅长文书类的工作，这方面我还需要想办法提升，这样才能帮到小姐。
E: I'm also kind of a personal assistant to Lady Asta. That said, I'd need to improve my writing skills to be of more help.

C: 是有什么事情要问我吗？艾丝妲小姐吩咐过了，我会尽力配合你和列车组工作的。
E: Ask me anything. I'll do my best to help as per Lady Asta's request.

C: 成天窝在这里真没意思，这里的一切都没意思…呃，呜呜伯除外…还有…婷婷除外。
E: It's suuuuper boring to be cooped up here all day. Everything here is boring... Um, except for Wubbaboo... and Wendy.

C: 它认真地闻了闻你衣角的味道，不满地皱起了眉头。
E: It gives the hem of your clothing a serious sniff and frowns disapprovingly.

C: 我得调整下对空间站科员的认知了，他们的智商似乎也没有比我高多少…看来我也可以当科员，我有这实力，绝对够。
E: I should probably change my perception of the space station researchers, they don't seem to be that much more intelligent than I am... Looks like I have what it takes to be a researcher too.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 你认得我？
E: You recognize me?

C: 你好，鲜少有人会拨打这个号码。是，某位天才俱乐部会员？还是…空间站的科员？
E: Hello. People rarely dial this number. Are you a member of the Genius Society? Or a space station researcher?

C: 无人不知，无人不晓啊！
E: Everyone knows, and all are aware!

C: 好嘞！您这么果断，定是瞧出了什么端倪吧。愿扎格列斯眷顾您！
E: All right! You must've noticed something if you're that certain. May Zagreus favor you!

C: 有个坐垫吸引了你的注意力，在周围的环境中，它的存在是那么的不合时宜。
E: A single cushion catches your attention. Its presence seems clearly out of place with its surroundings.

C: 我们从未见过刻法勒的真身，却笃定它为奥赫玛支撑起了天地；我们不理解欧洛尼斯的话语，却执着相信命定的预言；我们都未经历过死亡，却假定塞纳托斯的存在。
E: We have never seen the true form of Kephale, yet we are certain that they support the world for Okhema. We do not understand the words of Oronyx, yet we stubbornly believe their prophecy. We have never experienced death, yet we assume the existence of Thanatos.

C: 要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
E: If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?

C: 我可以雇佣你吗？任务很简单，陪我出城一趟，用你的能力调查一些事情，酬劳好说。
E: Can I hire you for something? It's an easy job: Accompany me around town and use your powers to investigate a few things. We can haggle about compensation.

C: 此处位置偏僻，他们留下的东西基本还保持着原样。
E: We're really remote, and everything that's been left behind here is basically still in its original state.

C: 赫卡忒与你对视一眼，将你们在营地的发现一五一十地讲给德墨忒尔。
E: Hekate shoots you a glance and recounts to Demetria everything you discovered at the camp.

C: 宁芙…我们讨论过很多次了，这样太危险。等我未来有更大的成就，我们就可以……
E: Nympha... We've been over this a lot already. It's too dangerous. Once I earn a few more achievements in the future, then we can...

C: 我可以走了吗？
E: All good if I bounce?

C: 都用传信石版了，还卖报纸？
E: We all use teleslates nowadays. What are you talking about newspapers for?

C: 您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
E: What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?

C: 竹筐里摆着几块劣质宝石、一盏拼贴起来的碎陶器、以及其它各种零碎…又多又杂，像是鸟儿拾来筑巢的枝条。
E: Inside the bamboo basket lies a few cheap gemstones, a pieced-together porcelain vase, and various other loose items... So many things, all mixed together, like birds building up a nest.

C: 辛苦你了……
E: Thank you for all this...

C: 从小我就羡慕你的黄金裔身份，一直踩着你的脚印前进…你怎么能倒在这里！
E: I've spent my whole life chasing your shadow, looking up to your golden blood... Don't you dare give up now!

C: 反正你买都买了，就凑合着用呗，实验可耽误不得。
E: Anyway, you've bought it, now so just put it to use. This experiment cannot wait.

C: 怎么样，没受伤吧！
E: Are you hurt? Tell me you're alright!

C: 昨天的我要减肥，和今天的我有什么关系？
E: What does my wanting to lose weight yesterday have to do with what I feel today?

C: 这个二手辐射仪卖吗？
E: Is this second-hand radiometer for sale?

C: 听城门口的卫兵说，那头失恋的大地兽最近疯跑的频率越来越高了，还吓到了不少客人。所以，您想到什么好法子了吗？
E: The guards at the city gate mentioned that the heartbroken dromas has been running wild more frequently, scaring plenty of visitors. So, have you thought of any solutions?

C: 大地兽疯跑了几圈后，慢悠悠地回到了工坊……
E: After a few laps, it leisurely returns to the workshop...

C: 嗡嗡！呜嗡嗡嗡~
E: Grumph! Grumphhh~

C: 科可波三世，你一定要幸福啊……
E: Kokopo III, you must be happy...

C: 而如今我又惨遭陷害，亲手杀害了心爱的妻子，啊！我的手上满是悔恨的鲜血！
E: And now, I've been entrapped, forced to murder my beloved wife! Ah! My hands are soaked in regretful blood!

C: 我看过这种文艺作品…
E: I've seen this kind of avant-garde work before...

C: 这样，双方都能接受。
E: That works for both of them.

C: 首先声明，我不打白工的。
E: But first, let me be clear — I don't work for free.

C: 创造者若投来的是爱，造物便会回应爱。若创造者投来的是遗忘，造物便会回应遗忘。
E: When a creator offers love, their creation responds with love. But if the creator casts them aside, the creation answers with oblivion.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 真的吗？谢谢你！
E: Really? Thank you!

C: 对不起，{F#女士}{M#先生}…刚才有点没忍住。
E: Sorry, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... I lost my composure just now.

C: 交给柯库翁。
E: Leave it to Glykon.

C: 对你刮目相看了！
E: I must say, I'm truly impressed!

C: 这就是——
E: This...

C: 搞笑角色血条一般都很长。
E: Comedic relief characters tend to live longer.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你来得刚好，能帮我作个证吗？他们都不相信我说的话。
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, perfect timing! Can you vouch for me? They don't believe what I said.

C: 但现在情况危急，圣城卫队抽调了一大批人去抵抗黑潮，这里只留下了小部分卫兵负责维护治安、疏散公民。
E: But the situation is critical. The holy city guards transferred a bunch of people to hold back the tide. There's only a small group left here to maintain order and evacuate the civilians.

C: （咳咳，是啊…幸亏我路上先清扫了一遍……）
E: (Ahem... Yeah... Thankfully I cleared out the roads first...)

C: 都瞒不过你啊，小机灵鬼…
E: You're hard to fool, you witty thing...

C: 小维吉妮娅也被吓到了，很久没敢和他搭话。但在相处以后，才知道阿波罗尼是个格外温厚的家伙。
E: Little Verginia was also scared and didn't dare talk to him for a long time. But after getting to know him, she discovered that Apollonius was actually an exceptionally gentle fellow.

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}阁下，抱歉，我想事情的时候会有些入神。
E: Ah, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, my apologies. I tend to get lost in thought sometimes.

C: 小维吉妮娅，在过去的很长一段时间里，我都以含而不露的理性自居。
E: Little Verginia, for a long time, I've prided myself on my subtle and restrained rationality.

C: 它是在那千年的歌谣被唱诵前，由海瑟音大人亲手创制封装的。
E: Lady Hysilens personally created and sealed it, long before anyone had ever heard that ancient ballad.

C: 我切实收下了。
E: I'm honored to receive this.

C: 熟悉的味道，虽并非真品，但却能从中感受到——那位「海洋」半神努力尝试复现时的真切心意。
E: The taste is familiar. Even though it's not the real thing, I can feel the sincerity of the demigod of Ocean in trying to recreate it.

C: 瓦赫…如果你也能像我一样，站在这列车里，从太空中眺望雅利洛-Ⅵ……
E: Vache... if you had the chance to stand here and watch Jarilo-VI from afar...

C: 想看看雅利洛-Ⅵ之外的世界……
E: I really want to see the world outside of Jarilo-VI...

C: 多多来列车看看帕姆吧。
E: Come see Pom-Pom on the Express more often.

C: 唔…虎克可没说这个。
E: Uh, that's not what Hook said...

C: 嗯，就像电影…不对，克拉拉看过的电影里也没有出现过这样的场景……
E: Mm-hmm, it's just like a movie... Actually, I've never seen a movie with views like this before...

C: 再看一眼留声机……
E: Another look at the phonograph...

C: 唔，要是跟着你们就能见到这么多新奇玩意…那我要不还是一起走算了？
E: If I'd known there were so many high-tech wonders on the Express, I probably would've insisted on going with you guys.

C: 跟我来就好。
E: Come with me.

C: 其实…是我带了些礼物想要给你。
E: Actually... I brought you a few things.

C: 我带了些礼物给你们，就当赔礼吧。
E: I brought you all some gifts. Hope I didn't cause too much trouble.

C: 放松是没有标准的！
E: Start anywhere you like!

C: 你说得没错。老是考虑用标准衡量问题，是没有办法以休闲的态度参观列车的。
E: You're right. I won't enjoy myself if I turn it into another safety inspection.

C: 之前我一直都在思考：防卫科还能做些什么，才能防止「军团」入侵那样的恶性事件再次发生……
E: When I got the invitation I was completely caught up in Security Department affairs — how to prevent another Legion invasion, that kind of thing...

C: 什么？！将军不会已经算到我会乘坐星穹列车逃跑了吧？
E: What!? Does that mean the general knows I'm trying to escape on the Astral Express?

C: 反正凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
E: Doesn't matter how much the Alchemy Commission racks its brain, they'll never guess where I've gone.

C: 有什么推荐的书吗？
E: Do you have any books to recommend?

C: 重新做人是有点困难的。
E: It's a bit hard to start over again.

C: 现在的我，已经不需要扮演那个家伙的私人秘书了。虽然目前还在适应阶段，但我相信之后一定会做得更好的。
E: I don't need to play the role of that man's personal secretary anymore. It takes a bit of time to adjust, but I know I'll get better at it.

C: 现在重新将自己解放了出来，就好像第一次来到空间站的时候那样，看什么都是新崭崭的，觉得自己的未来有好多种可能。
E: Now that I'm free, I feel like I'm a newcomer at the space station once again. Everything seems so new and the future is so full of possibilities.

C: 因为平时和他们来往颇多，彼此也算是互相了解。经过引荐内推之后，也通过了几个研究项目的面试。大概之后，就会以「科员」的身份和你打招呼啦。
E: We knew each other because of our frequent interactions before. They got me to apply for some internal positions, and I managed to pass the interviews for a few projects. I'll probably be a "researcher" by the next time we meet.

C: 你是个很有勇气的女孩。
E: You are a very brave person.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 原本我还想着能多问几句的……
E: I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...

C: 你看见什么了？
E: So, what caught your attention?

C: 但为什么是星球仪？这也太奇怪了吧……
E: But why the armillary sphere? That's so odd...

C: 这下登上列车的理由又多了一个……
E: Now I have one more reason to board the Express...

C: 没有？这可不行啊……
E: No? That won't do...

C: 我还听说，董事会甚至考虑过花大价钱包下星穹列车，让它成为公司业务的一环…但所有的提议都被果断拒绝了。
E: I've also heard that the board once considered spending a fortune to buy out the Astral Express and to make it part of their business... However, all their offers were quickly declined.

C: …「翡翠」找我？请她稍等，我5分钟后联系她。
E: ...Jade is looking for me? I'll contact her in five minutes.

C: 那个，{NICKNAME}…这杯咖啡我有点喝不下去了。但我不想惹姬子小姐不快，你能不能……
E: {NICKNAME}... I don't think I can get through this whole cup of coffee, but I don't want to hurt Himeko's feelings. Would you mind—

C: {NICKNAME}，听我说！我已经决定好了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I've decided!

C: …我还没说是什么呢，别着急啊。
E: ...Hold your horses. I haven't said anything yet.

C: 一点心意……
E: Just a little gesture...

C: 今天终于踏上了星穹列车，我特别高兴…感觉就像回到了家一样！
E: Yes! I can't believe I finally got to come aboard the Astral Express. It almost feels like home!

C: 没错，我也曾是「客人」之一。
E: Yep, I was also a guest at one point.

C: 仙舟确实是一个生机勃勃的世界。
E: The Xianzhou is indeed an ancient place, but one full of vitality.

C: 这副改造的身体其实挺耐用的，很少掉链子。可能是列车太安全，让它放松了戒备。
E: This cyborg body is actually pretty sturdy — it rarely breaks down. Maybe the Express is too safe, so it let its guard down.

C: 说得好棒！所以是哪首歌？
E: Well said! So which song was it?

C: 等等，你是怎么上来的？
E: Wait, how did you get in here?

C: 等等等等，你上哪儿去？别走啊！
E: Wait, hold up, where are you going? Don't leave!

C: 我看到了星辰的指引。群星的光芒在漆黑的夜空中闪烁，比月亮更为耀眼。魔术师高举奖杯，木桌上是金色的徽章。
E: I see the guidance of the stars. Their radiance shines in the jet-black night sky, even more dazzling than the moon. The magician raises the trophy high, and on the wooden table is a Golden Badge.

C: 根据播报中的描述，我确定我与他曾有过一面之缘。
E: According to the description in the news, I'm certain I once encountered him.

C: 太好了！那就…请你收下它们吧。
E: Awesome! Then... please take them.

C: 她一定会很喜欢的。
E: She's gonna love it.

C: 来拍大合照吧！
E: C'mon, let's snap a group picture!

C: 我说我说！别生气嘛，不要这么冲动…是这样，我发现自己从来没得到过某样东西，我很想得到它，希望你能帮助我。
E: Alright, alright! Calm down, there's no need to get antsy... Here's the thing — I realized there's something that I've never had but always truly wanted. I hope you can help me.

C: 嗨，算不上有钱，将将够用而已。
E: Oh, I wouldn't say I'm rich. I'm... comfortable.

C: 我看看…欸…我觉得这人的文笔还不错呀？
E: Let me see... Hmm... This person is quite a good writer, huh?

C: 对了，正巧跟你聊着，我这里还有一段，你帮我听听——
E: By the way, I've got another line, listen to this:

C: 不不不！我只是请您帮一个小忙…我可是正规出版社的编辑，有上岗证的，怎么会做出违反行业道德的事情呢！
E: No, no, no! Think of it as me asking for a favor... I am a certified editor from a reputable publishing house. I won't engage in anything unethical!

C: 哦对了，为了表达诚意，这本《贝洛伯格七大不思议》就送给您作为见面礼吧！
E: Ah yes, as a gesture of goodwill, I'll give you The Seven Wonders of Belobog as a gift!

C: 我们还是聊聊作品吧…
E: Let's talk about your works...

C: 达米尔带着阿尔乔姆回到了自己的家乡，在这里他们结识了新的伙伴，阿尔乔姆帮助达米尔解开了他家乡神话背后的秘密……
E: Dalmir takes Artem back with him to his hometown, where he meets some new companions. Artem helps Dalmir uncover the secret behind a myth in his hometown.

C: 你应该也听闻了吧？贝洛伯格最近发生了不少大事，这座城市正在迎来变革…但我想，不仅仅是它，我们这行也是时候做出改变了……
E: You've heard the news, haven't you? There are big things happening in Belobog these days. This city is about to experience a transformation... But I think it's not just the city. It's also about time for this industry to make a change...

C: 嗯，它生有八片花瓣，瓣尖有白色斑点，就像雪花。听老人们说，在很久很久以前，每年的第一场雪叫做初雪，象征着丰收和喜悦。
E: The flower has eight petals with white spots at each tip, just like snowflakes. A long time ago, the first snow of the year was called first snow, symbolizing harvest and joy.

C: 刚才提到的…
E: The one you just mentioned...

C: 那要恭喜你啊。
E: Congratulations!

C: 全都是部队里的烦心事…不方便透露太多。
E: It's about the guards... I'm in no position to talk about it.

C: 负责采购的那帮人又在做什么啊…真是的，气死我了！这些破零件全都是残次品！他们真就没把我这执行顾问放在眼里吗？！
E: What the heck is the Procurement Department doing? These parts are all defective! Man. They really know how to grind my gears! Am I nothing to them!?

C: 我老爹他在铆钉镇的「淬火工坊」做过很长时间工，我对机械的兴趣就是从那时开始培养起来的。
E: My dad worked for a long time at the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town. That's when my interest in mechanics began to develop.

C: 嘿，你瞧我这脾气…我光盯着这行字就难受！
E: Hey, look how riled up I am... Just glancing at this headline is more than I can take!

C: 那你很有可能就是「深蓝骗局」的受害者。
E: You are likely a victim of the "Dark-Blue Scam"!

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 这个怎么样？——「黑衣人来到波瓦大臣身旁——只说了一句话，大臣便神色紧张地离开了宴会。到底发生了什么？」
E: How about this one — What did the man in black tell Mr. Bova, the minister, that made him leave the party in a hurry?

C: 你知道吗，科鲁泽去世了。
E: Did you hear? Kluzer passed away.

C: 这地下的大环境就是这样——富贵险中求啊！你要是想挣大钱，要么自己把命搭进去，要么让别人给你卖命……
E: That's how things are down in the Underworld — it's high risk, high reward! If you wanna make it big, you have to either stake your life on it, or stake someone else's life on it...

C: 咦，原来{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}没有准备礼物啊……
E: Oh, so you didn't bring a gift...

C: 呼噜…嗯？谁啊？
E: *snore* ...Hmm? Who is it?

C: 哪个没长眼的又来——哎哟，怎么又是你？我、我可没骗人啊，只是正好路过，我这就走！
E: What the heck... you again? I'm not selling anything. I just happened to be passing by. See you!

C: 我说…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}不会是认错人了吧？
E: Hey, did you mistake me for someone else?

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，谢谢你告诉我这个消息。我会做好准备的！但首先要照顾好老爹，让他的身体好起来……
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, thank you for telling me this news. I'll be ready! But first, I have to look after my dad and make sure he's healthy...

C: 我们「地火」，就、就是自发组织起来，维持地下治安的…奥、奥列格是我们组织的老、老大。
E: Wildfire i—is a self-organized group for maintaining order in the Underworld... O—Oleg is the leader of the group.

C: 我不光是饭店老板，还是这儿的厨师长哦！很多客人都是冲着我的手艺来的。
E: I'm the owner and also the chef of the hotel! Many people come here because of my cooking.

C: 而在暴风雪来临之前，贝洛伯格的科技水平要比现在高得多——贝洛伯格居民一般就把那段时期称呼为「古代」。
E: Before the snowstorm, Belobog's technology level was way much higher than it is now. Belobog residents call that "ancient times."

C: 我最近在读一本叫《斯维特兰娜战术集》的书，军事相关的——里面有一句话让我印象深刻。
E: I've recently been reading a book called "Svetlana's Stratagems" about military strategy... There was one phrase in there that left a deep impression on me.

C: 听说这里有演出？
E: I heard there are gigs here sometimes?

C: 好啊，正好我手头没什么事。
E: No problem. I just so happen to be free right now.

C: 军队里连弹琴都不让吗？
E: Music isn't allowed in the military?

C: 杰帕德看见琴，就问：「这琴是谁的？」刚说完，萨克雷就第一个站出来喊：「报告长官，是我的！」
E: When Gepard saw the guitar, he asked, "Whose is this?" Right after speaking, Zackery stepped forward and said: "Sir, it's mine!"

C: 啊啊…！真是的，幼不幼稚啊——你都多大个人了！
E: Argh! How old are you? Stop acting like a kid!

C: 听起来似乎不包括整理书架…
E: It sounds like your job scope doesn't include organizing bookshelves.

C: 总之，非常感谢你——能有你这样的朋友，我感到很荣幸。
E: In any case, I am truly thankful and honored to have such a friend as you.

C: 别找借口啦。
E: Aww, stop deflecting.

C: 这里虽然不像矿镇那么繁华…但基本的生活起居还是可以满足的。
E: This place isn't as bustling as a mining town, but we're still quite content with how we live.

C: 机械聚落是个怎样的地方？
E: What sort of place is the Robot Settlement?

C: 算了，不想了！虎克就随便说几个吧。
E: Forget it! I'll just name a few.

C: 某种程度上，我觉得她跟可可利亚年轻的时候很像——相信我，这绝对是在夸她——只是布洛妮娅的身上少了一分阴沉，多了些真诚。
E: To a certain extent, I feel like she's just like when Cocolia was younger, and trust me, that's definitely a compliment. Except that Bronya's less glum, and more sincere.

C: 想听一首悲凉的歌…
E: I want to hear a sad song...

C: 孤独的孩子看头顶的月，冷漠的城市飘冰冷的雪
E: Light of the moon over city of snow, kid down below gazing up all alone

C: 我可不想欺负伤员。
E: I have no interest in bullying someone who's injured.

C: 您看起来心情不错。
E: You look like you're in a good mood.

C: 那什么，你可千万别跟其他人告状啊…之前在下层区闹事的小队可被托帕总监罚的不轻…何况我只是个修手机的，没做什么伤害居民的坏事啊。
E: Just please don't tell anyone... Director Topaz threw the book at those troublemakers in the Underworld... I'm just a phone tinkerer who hasn't done anything to put the residents in harm's way.

C: 不过按照大家的话说，她是个热爱工作、善于交际的人，而且还心地善良。
