E: But according to everyone, she's sociable, loves her work, and more importantly, has a kind heart.

C: 好吧，再见。
E: All right. See you next time.

C: 扑满看上去还很精神。人不能把有限的精力投入到无限的玩弄扑满中去。
E: The Trotter still looks full of energy, but people can't afford to put all of their limited energy into endless play sessions with Trotters.

C: 和冰原熊幼崽玩耍。
E: Play with the arctic bear cub.

C: …是音乐剧啦，音乐剧！
E: ...it's a musical! A musical!

C: 哎，我还想看新美食专栏呢。
E: Ah, I still want to read the new food column.

C: 啥啥啥，你们说的这都是啥？
E: Huh, what? What are you guys talking about?

C: 不好意思啊，我不感兴趣……
E: Sorry, I'm not interested...

C: 现捕现杀，锁住新鲜！
E: Caught and swiftly killed to lock in the freshness!

C: 这天气喝茶，就该坐外边……
E: Drinking tea in this weather should be done outdoors...

C: 请把我的晚餐从红肠换成别的东西吧…什么都可以……
E: Please change my dinner from sausages to something else... Anything at all...

C: 这小子不会还在睡觉吧……
E: Don't tell me that punk is still asleep...

C: 水产冷盘，调味佳品！
E: Fresh seafood with great seasoning!

C: 哎，全完了……
E: Oh, it's all over...

C: 我就说他不行吧。
E: Told you he's no good.

C: 咱只是来买个吃的…
E: I'm just here to get some food...

C: 幸会幸会，我是博物馆的文物修复员鲍里斯！刚才没能认出来，实在是不好意思啊。
E: Pleased to meet you, I'm the museum's artifact restorer, Boris! So sorry for not recognizing you earlier.

C: 原来禁区里还有这种大家伙…
E: Never thought there's something that big at the restricted zone...

C: 您看「二狗」如何？
E: How about "Noob"?

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 仙舟人为什么不喜欢修理旧物？
E: Why don't the Xianzhou people like to repair old things?

C: 给我看看货吧…
E: Show me the goods...

C: 好了，说回正事吧，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你来找我是做什么的呀？
E: Alright, let's get down to business. {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, what do you want?

C: 后来，我就被调任到这里来做执事官了。这里虽说没有什么生死别离，但是工作也不算轻松。虽然我不知道自己在忙什么，总之就是很忙。
E: So they transferred me here to be an officer. There's no life-or-death situations here, but it ain't easy work. I don't know exactly what I'm doing, but I know that I'm busy.

C: 为什么要斗智斗勇？
E: Why are you always squabbling with them about things?

C: 只能说冷清得很，平时抓个麻雀玩儿都绰绰有余。为了讨生活，我就必须主动出击，四处流窜，兜售我的宝贝了。
E: Well, it's so deserted that I even have time to feed the pigeons. I have to take the initiative and run all over the place just to make a living.

C: 他…今天怎么也没出现？
E: He... He hasn't shown up again today, either.

C: 有什么不对的吗？我在家都是这么说话的，爹娘反应也没你这么大啊。
E: Is something wrong? This is how I speak at home, and I've never gotten a reaction like yours.

C: 宝饵堂里值钱的家伙，我没有带在身边…不过你可以随便询问，像是「冥想遗忘治疗仪」之类的王牌产品，闭着眼睛买准没有错。
E: I don't have any NutriTreasures products on me right now... But you can ask anything you want. Famous products like the amnesic meditation therapy device are so reliable that you can buy them with your eyes closed.

C: 你不是说自己是勤务吗？
E: Didn't you just say that you were an orderly, though?

C: 不好意思，想不到。这人谁啊？你不会是拿我寻开心的吧？
E: Sorry, I'm drawing a blank here. Who is he? You're not making fun of me here, are you?

C: 哎，只可惜这新名字的信用也快要透支了。我还得想想怎么办才好哩……
E: Ack, it's just a shame that all the credit I've built up around this name is about to be completely overdrawn. I have to figure out what to do next...

C: 不好意思，我刚才收到最新的消息说「客栈清洁工」不招闲人，看来是我唐突了，差点儿给你安排了一份困难的差事，请包涵。
E: Sorry, I just got notified that the Inn doesn't just hire any idlers for cleaners. I was too rash and nearly put you in a very difficult situation. Please forgive me.

C: 我觉得这故事还挺有意思的呀。我给侄女讲这个故事的时候，她听得可专注了，一直追问我雪狮子的故事。
E: I find it rather fascinating. When I told my niece this story, she listened intently and kept on asking me about the snow lion.

C: 那你是不是也快消失了？
E: Does that mean you are "getting vanished" as well?

C: 无论是太卜来代行将军之责，还是我手头积压的工作，这都说明——对于神策府而言，不把最后一个药王残党缉拿归案，这就还称不上是结束。
E: The master diviner acting as the general and my backlog of work show that things aren't over for the Seat of Divine Foresight until the very last Disciple of Sanctus Medicus is arrested.

C: 可是将军大人一直不肯放卑职走，说找不到能替代卑职站岗的人。就这么拖了好久，直到整件事告一段落，卑职都没去成前线。
E: However, he was reluctant to let me go, saying it was hard to find someone to replace me. My request was delayed for a long time, and I did not make it to the front line in the end.

C: 姐，人家说得对，我们是在神策府谈公事，别再拿我们的血缘关系套近乎了。
E: Sis, they're right. We're talking business here in the Seat of Divine Foresight. Let's not bring our family connection into this.

C: 算啦！不跟你抱怨啦！有什么事要找老夫吗？
E: Forget it. I'm not going to vent my frustrations out on you! Anything I can help you with today?

C: 你平时都做什么？
E: What do you usually get up to around here?

C: 所以…穷观阵能否预测未来？能。准确吗？以太卜司每日巨量的占算次数来说，还不够准。
E: And so... Can the Matrix of Prescience divine the future? Yes. Is it accurate? Based on the voluminous calculations run daily by the Divination Commission: Not accurate enough.

C: 这可不是什么光荣的称谓，我实在是高兴不起来。
E: It isn't a glorious title, so I simply couldn't be happy about it.

C: 我没有别的事情要咨询了。
E: I've nothing else to inquire.

C: 立国千年…咳咳…我们已经拥有了十七个恒星系，幅员辽阔、物产丰茂…所以，国家需要我这种人——「法官」。
E: About a millennium has passed since its foundation... *cough*... We've already seen seventeen star systems, with a vast territory, and rich products... That's why our nation needs someone like me: A Judge.

C: 我们现在「决斗」的传统，就是来自普朗克可汗。他觉得人类的尊严就应该在一个人与另一个人公平的「决斗」中彰显。
E: Our modern tradition of "dueling" comes from Planck Khan. He felt that human dignity should be demonstrated via a fair "duel" between two individuals.

C: 你来了，我还没拿到商会批文呢，你现在有空吗，要不咱们再聊一会？
E: You're back. I haven't been approved yet. Are you free now for a quick chat?

C: 所以你提到的那位「带着棺木的行商」既是行商，那棺木里多半就是商品了。
E: So if the "traveling merchant with a coffin" you mentioned is a traveling merchant, there should be goods for sale stuffed inside the coffin.

C: 那位辛克莱老爷总觉得我要害他，我是怀着恶意来抢他的生意的。我提供一个报价，他就把价格压低，我再提一个，他再压低……
E: Master Sinclair always thinks I'm out to get him, and that I'm this evil mastermind stealing his business. When I offer a price, he lowers it, and so I put out another price. And he lowers it again...

C: 有的卜官没有那个能力，非得要做做样子。做事缺乏前瞻后顾，张口便说「可以做、可以做」。等到该验收工作的时候，又会说「我觉得这个没有必要」……
E: Some managing diviners lack this capacity though, and so they just go through the motions. Completely lacking in foresight or retrospection, just blindly saying "Yes, okay" to everything. But when it comes time to turn the work in, they'll say, "I don't think that's necessary"...

C: 但云骑将军不过是「阳世」威权罢了，十王司统管长生种生死、罪咎、魔阴身等诸般事宜，不受其节制，论地位吾等更在其上。
E: But the Cloud Knights are merely the authority on matters of the mortal world. The Ten-Lords Commission governs various long-life species' concerns such as death, sins, being mara-struck, and so on. We are unrestricted by the Knights' authority, and are certainly above them in terms of status.

C: 好的，再见。当下时局尚不安定，请阁下务必注意安全。
E: That's good. So long. The current situation is not a stable one, so please take precautions.

C: 从军的时候我发誓保卫联盟，退伍返乡我成了「护珠人」，发誓护卫同胞蜕生转世。事到如今回头看，我到底保卫了什么呢？真是…寿多则辱。
E: When I signed up with the armed forces, I took an oath to defend the Alliance. After retiring I became a Pearlkeeper, vowing to protect my compatriots during their hatching rebirth. But looking back, what did I actually protect? Truly... longevity is a curse.

C: 唉…如果那天她在鳞渊境，也许持明能少受不少损失吧…只可惜，很多事情都容不得「如果」……
E: Alas... If she'd been at Scalegorge Waterscape on that day, perhaps the Vidyadhara wouldn't have suffered such terrible losses... It's a real shame how many "what ifs" there are out there...

C: 唉…接下来可怎么办才好啊…哎呀，您来了？今天有什么事吗？
E: Sigh... What should I do next... Hey! What brings you here today?

C: 我听说药王秘传残党在闹事？
E: I heard that the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are causing trouble here.

C: 到底什么事啊？呜呜，为什么都没人告诉我——你要是知道的话记得第一时间跟我分享分享。
E: What on earth happened? *Sob* Why has no one told me about it? If you find anything, please share it with me as well.

C: 你是犯了什么事被关进来？
E: What did you do to get locked up in here?

C: 不过又所谓「真正的大师永远怀着一颗学徒的心」，我这不是也来幽囚狱学习深造了么。
E: Although, it is also said that: "A true master always maintains the heart of an apprentice." That is precisely why I have come to The Shackling Prison — to further my craft.

C: 那我继续越狱了。
E: Then I'll get back to my jailbreaking.

C: 如果当时司部收到了报告，又会是怎样的结果呢？哎，卜者不应谈论「如果」。
E: What would happen if the commission received her report back then? Alas, I shouldn't be talking about the what-ifs as a diviner.

C: …自意识过剩？那不是形容小孩的词语吗？
E: ...Too self-conscious? Isn't that a term used to describe kids?

C: 真的有人会买吗？
E: Will anyone really buy your stuff?

C: 哼～下次搞不好我都逃出幽囚狱了～
E: Hmph! Maybe I'll have escaped by then~

C: 你为什么说罗浮针对持明？
E: Why do you say the Luofu is targeting the Vidyadhara?

C: 我看现在还是有很多无机生命…
E: But there are still a lot of inorganic beings around...

C: 假如我装上了躯干与手脚，你想象不到的麻烦就会接踵而来。
E: If I had my body and my limbs, I'd be immediately facing troubles beyond your wildest imagination.

C: 「别的版本」。
E: "Another version."

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 不打扰你啦。
E: I'll leave you alone, then.

C: 如果从商业上来评价的话，公司毫无疑问是成功的。
E: Well, from a business point of view, the IPC is definitely a success.

C: （向克利欧隐瞒陶德的下落）
E: (Don't tell Cleo what happened to Todd.)

C: 毕竟学会里已经尝试过无数次，摊到我们课题上的经费捉襟见肘，人手也远远不够…怎么想都是不可能完成的事。
E: After all, the Guild had tried many times, but to no avail. We had only meager funds and scholars for the subject... I was convinced that the subject was impossible.

C: 不细心呵护，这些物件我怎么敢放心交到顾客手里呢。
E: How am I supposed to deliver these priceless treasures if I don't take good care of them?

C: 杂技是什么？
E: What's acrobatics?

C: 嘿嘿～阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务～
E: Hehe, the Arma Correctional Group is glad to be of service!

C: 此象得主身处黑夜之中，不见光亮。对于你所问之事——夜明之前，伸手不见五指，一切化为泡影。但你已处在天明之前，昨日之事不可留，明日的希望就在你心中。切记不要放弃希望。
E: The receiver of this omen is currently in thick darkness devoid of light. As for the question you asked — this darkness shall remain thick and impenetrable until the sun rises, and all shall fade as a shadow. However, you are near the break of dawn. The bygone worries of yesterday should not be kept, and the hope for tomorrow beats still in your heart. Remember not to give up on that hope.

C: 没啥要事，就是想找你聊聊天。
E: Not really. I just want to have a chat with you.

C: 不过…学问上的事还是别来问我了。之前遇到过几个仰慕仙舟历史文化的游客，他们懂得比我还多，我只能不说话装高手了……
E: Don't ask me about cultural stuff, though. I once met a few travelers who were super into Xianzhou's history and customs. They knew way more than I did. So I had to keep my mouth shut the entire time, trying to act like I knew what they were talking about.

C: 看来你学艺不精啊…你这不是在主动往自己身上揽活儿嘛。
E: Seems like you have not learned the gist of the art... If you say that, you'll be taking up extra work on yourself.

C: 当然，要是有空的话，你带我随便去逛逛吧！
E: Of course, if you're free, please take me out to a stroll!

C: 懂了，你们是电子宠物。
E: I see. You're a virtual pet.

C: 不必道歉，是吾的玩笑不够有趣。
E: There's no need to apologize. I should have made a funnier joke.

C: 这次洪炉破碎后，能造成威胁的「燎原」分灵已经被尽数收回。其中最危险的分灵——
E: Since the furnace broke, all of the "Ignamar" spirits that could pose a threat have been recovered. The most dangerous spirit among them—

C: 雪衣大人没事儿吧？
E: Is Madam Xueyi okay?

C: 我就是{NICKNAME}！
E: I am {NICKNAME}!

C: {NICKNAME}大人虽是化外民，可没少和十王司打交道…您认识雪衣大人、寒鸦大人、还认识刚上任的藿藿大人，见过几个冥差也不稀奇。
E: Though you are an Outworlder, {NICKNAME}, you have had many dealings with the Ten-Lords Commission... You know Madam Xueyi, Hanya, and the newly appointed Huohuo. Having met a few spiritfarers along the way is to be expected.

C: 还是换个话题吧…这个话题有点不太愉快，哈哈哈。
E: Let's change the subject... This is getting a little too dark. Hahaha.

C: 绥园以前是什么样的？
E: How was Fyxestroll Garden like in the past?

C: 在下可以讲一下被称为「无罅飞光」云骑剑首…但奈何篇幅过长，仅是讲讲苍城仙舟被游星罗睺摧毁之事，便要上三天三夜。
E: I could tell you of the Cloud Knight Sword Champion known as the Transcendent Flash... but it's far too long. Just the chapter about the Roaming Star Rahu destroying the Xianzhou Cangcheng takes three whole days and three whole nights.

C: 「闭嘴！」一旁负责押送的云骑军对这铁皮囚犯十分不满，他刚才在抓捕行动里折了两根肋骨，现在还隐隐作痛。
E: "Shut up!" A Cloud Knight transporting him barked, obviously upset. He had had two ribs broken during the capture operation, and could still feel the throbbing pain.

C: 小仙？本仙？
E: Celestial?

C: 我很害怕啊，就把实话都和他说了。我说我是天外来客，来自一艘在天上航行的大船，我们这些船上的人都不会死……
E: I was so afraid, so I told him the truth about me being a visitor from beyond, that I came from a star-faring ship in the sky, that those on the ship wouldn't age...

C: 闭着眼睛选一杯不就好了吗？
E: May as well just close my eyes and pick out one at random, right?

C: 我就只能说到这种程度了，希望你见谅，哈哈哈哈。
E: That's about as much as I can say on this. Hope you forgive me! Hahaha.

C: 再见！咱继续去找神仙姐姐啦，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也一定能在仙舟上实现愿望的！
E: Bye-bye! I need to keep searching for the celestial lady. {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, your dreams will certainly come true as well in Xianzhou!

C: 我也不是死脑筋，要是真没有机会，我会走的。
E: I'm not that obsessed with the notion. If it's really not possible, I'll just leave.

C: 听说这浥尘客栈的老板说，以前这家店的前身叫作「游云逆旅」，很少有人能完整念对，结果那家旅店就因为这名字开倒闭了。
E: I've heard from the Petrichor Inn owner that this shop used to be called the "Cloud-Striding Hotel for Travelers Near and Far," and it eventually went out of business because its name was such a mouthful.

C: 等等，我对你有些印象。「仙舟的重要客人」、「景元将军钦点的大善人」…从夕葵我这么一个小秘书的角度看起来，你可是位重要的大人物呢。
E: Hold on, I remember you. "An important guest of Xianzhou," "General Jing Yuan's appointed savior"... From the perspective of an insignificant secretary, you're a major character.

C: 不过嘛，我对自己的姿色还是有点自知的，所以我也相信你是真诚的。谢谢你，你也非常可爱，是姐姐喜欢的类型。
E: Then again, I've always been confident in my looks, which is why I believe your words are sincere. Thank you, and you are very cute too, totally my style.

C: 和仙舟人做生意，这些化外民的小心思真是越来越多了。
E: The Outworlders are getting shrewder when trading with Xianzhou.

C: 所以你是在教仙舟做事？
E: So you're educating Xianzhou about what to do?

C: 「仙舟用情绪和神话掩盖了银河现状，你们应该将着眼于现实，看清楚到底是谁守护了银河。」
E: "Xianzhou has tried to cover up reality with sentiments and myths. You should face the truth and see who truly defends the cosmos."

C: 现在没什么想买的。
E: I don't want to buy anything right now.

C: 呃…你抓住了事物的本质，但你可以不用把话说的那么直白。
E: Argh... You've grasped the essence of it, but can't you not say the unspoken out loud?

C: 呜呜呜…你知道吗？我居然和彦卿大人拥抱了！还合了影！这合影就是我的传家宝了！
E: *sob*... Did you know? I actually hugged Master Yanqing! We even took a photo together! This photo is going to be my family heirloom!

C: 我向彦卿大人道歉。
E: I apologize to Master Yanqing.

C: 我会一直等你的…
E: I'll always wait for you...

C: 时间过得真快啊…
E: How time flies...

C: 那里有什么特产？
E: What do they have there?

C: 卷起来有什么厉害的。
E: What's so amazing about rolling something up?

C: 人都被扬成灰了，还工作个啥？
E: They can't. They're all ashes.

C: 演武仪典什么时候召开啊？
E: When will the Wardance be held?

C: 然后，你猜怎么着，那小孩双脚就像是烧焦了一般疼痛，但最后也没有吸取教训。
E: And guess what happened next? The kid's feet were in excruciating pain, as if they had been burned, but in the end, he still didn't learn his lesson.

C: 这预测说的都是废话。
E: This prediction is a load of bull.

C: 你能给我表演个才艺吗？
E: Can you show me some tricks?

C: 看在你先前打的那么用力的份上，让人家想想…
E: Mm, you certainly pummeled me hard enough before, so let me think...

C: 比赛开始后，上一世的「我」还没摆完造型，就被他一记上勾拳直接打出赛场。致使上一世的「我」饮恨离世。
E: When the match started, before the previous "me" could even get his pose ready, he was sent flying out of the ring by a vicious uppercut. Because of this, the previous "me" died with a heart full of regret.

C: 我是不信世上有鬼的…
E: I don't believe in ghosts...

C: 大家喜欢就好…
E: I'm glad you like it...

C: 我听说你家宝贝走丢了。
E: I heard your fur baby got lost?

C: 这日子是没法过了！
E: I'm sick of this!

C: 看着我的拳头，说人话！
E: Then take a look at this fist, and start talking more like a mortal!

C: 这样的计算靠谱吗？
E: Is it reliable, though?

C: 可能吧，传说里确实是这样说的…仙舟人的「无尽形寿」来自建木的果实。要不是这个传说，你们这些化外民也不会千里迢迢赶来啊。
E: Possibly, I mean that's what the legends say... The Xianzhou native's endless lifespan comes from the fruits of the Ambrosial Arbor. If it weren't for this legend, you Outworlders would never bother coming here.

C: 我给您看看…哦，这个幻戏分级是<unbreak>200</unbreak>岁以上的……
E: I'll check... Oh, this one is restricted to <unbreak>200</unbreak>-year-old and above...

C: 「公司」的报价你看了吗？
E: Have you checked IPC's offer?

C: …能不能让我清净会儿。
E: ... Can you just pipe down for a bit?

C: 生命的尽头，会有什么呢……
E: I wonder what lies at the end of life...

C: 皮还薄，馅还大。好面好馅不要怕。
E: The filling is generously wrapped in just enough skin. Don't worry about the quality of the ingredients.

C: 我听说，你最近又被人点名批评了？怎么回事啊，你不是才进丹鼎司没多久嘛……
E: I heard you've been criticized again recently. What happened? Haven't you just joined the Alchemy Commission for a short time?

C: 确实…不过我在丹鼎司也混了些年头，病患见了不少，现在都有些见怪不怪了。
E: Indeed... However, I'm not surprised by it. After all, I've dealt with all sorts of patients over the years at the Alchemy Commission.

C: 我还会来庭院做客的。
E: I'll come visit the courtyard again.

C: …对了，你还没和我说你这段时间的经历呢，怎么人家都喊你「大表演家」「穿着华服的大地兽」？我好好奇呀！
E: ...Oh right, you still haven't told me about what you've been up to lately! How come everyone's calling you "the Great Performer" and "a dromas draped in finery"? I'm so curious!

C: …唉，重视彼此的人，通常会把对方不成熟时的样子记得很清楚呢。
E: ...Ah, people who care about each other tend to remember very clearly what the other was like in their immature days.

C: 不…这个词…是「幸福」。
E: No... this word... is "felicitous."

C: 有点肉麻了哦？
E: Getting a bit mushy, aren't we?

C: 可以挥着菜刀上战场了。
E: Time to charge into battle with a kitchen knife.

C: 我看看怎么个事。
E: Let me see what's going on.

C: 人们为何期盼着明天呢？
E: Why do people look forward to tomorrow?

C: 这是个很长的故事…我会慢慢讲给你们听。
E: It's a long story... I'll tell you all about it slowly.

C: 我家这小子，一定让你费心照顾了！快，我做了些蜂蜜烙饼，千万别客气。
E: This kid of mine must have been quite a handful! Here, I made some honey suncakes. Please, help yourself!

C: 怎么会，我想念哀丽秘榭的菜好久好久了！
E: No way, I've been craving Aedes Elysiae's food for ages!

C: 别留下心理创伤了。
E: Don't let it traumatize you.

C: 很好，那就先教给你与小大地兽拉近距离的第一步：把手伸给它们，让它们凑近了嗅一嗅，对你的味道产生熟悉感……
E: Good, then let me teach you the first step to getting close to little dromases: hold out your hand, let them come over and sniff it, so they get used to your scent...

C: 很久以前，我曾收殓过一枚大地兽的骨片，用它做了一只骨笛，吹奏起来的声音很是低沉忧伤，仿佛轻轻触碰到了大地兽的灵魂。
E: Long ago, I came across a bone fragment from a dromas as a mortician and crafted it into a bone flute. When played, it produced a deep, melancholic sound, as if softly brushing against the very soul of the dromas.

C: 如果是小大地兽，我说不定还可以把它们抱起来，这算不算一种更用力的「拥抱」呢？
E: If it's a baby dromas, I might be able to pick them up. Would that count as a more... forceful kind of "embrace"?

C: 给我满上！
E: Fill 'er up!

C: 三个饱，两个倒。
E: Just three meals provided, proper naps and rest.

C: 不是很懂你们追星的人。
E: I don't get your fandom at all.

C: 就是获得第一啊。这你都不知道什么意思？
E: It means to win. To be number one. You don't even know what means?

C: 名厨定制餐饮。
E: Customized catering from famous chefs.

C: 「Woooh～」你和幽囚狱深处不断一呼一应。
E: "Woooh~" You constantly hear the echoes from the depths of the Shackling Prison.

C: 拟态海螺。
E: The conch mimic.

C: 《生长》系列其一
E: Part one of the Growth series

C: 《生长》系列其三
E: Part three of the Growth series

C: 鸟笼，看起来不太宜居。这可能正是你在其中找不到鸟的原因。
E: A birdcage that does not look very comfortable. That might be the reason why you can never find birds inside it.

C: 撤退！保存有生力量！
E: Retreat! Preserve our remaining forces!

C: 这只快递箱声称自己装着「玩具」。它最好是。
E: The label on the package shows that it contains some toys. It better be.

C: 你看看这是什么？
E: Take a look at this.

C: 都记住了么？
E: Got it?

C: 好酷啊！想要粉色涂装！
E: That's so cool! I want a pink paint job too!

C: 就是就是！贝洛伯格万岁！
E: That's right, that's right! Glory to Belobog!

C: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
E: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

C: 教练你放过我吧！
E: Please go easy on me, coach!

C: 通常用于运输各种货物，但有时也会载着奇妙的人和事出现。
E: It is usually used to deliver goods, but it will sometimes carry special people and appear along with special events.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 这尊狮形雕塑其实并非石头，但他们都叫它「石狮子」。狮子们并不喜欢这个称呼，这显得它们与外面的便宜货似乎毫无差别，很掉价。
E: This lion-shaped statue is called a "stone lion" although it is not made of stone. The lions loathe the name, thinking it is humiliating to be equated with the second-rate ones outside.

C: …到底落在哪了？
E: ...Where did I lose it?

C: 我收下了！
E: I accept!

C: 你想了想，决心把时间浪费在更有趣的事情上，转身离开了箱子。
E: Having decided to spend your time on more interesting stuff, you turn around and walk away from the package.

C: 但你未能献奏此曲。你耳闻惊才绝艳的饮月君沦为叛逆，你愤怒地掷琴在地，任由它发出碎玉之音。你发誓此生再不作曲。
E: However, you did not get to perform this song in public. After hearing about the talented and brilliant Imbibitor Lunae becoming a rebel, you flung your lute to the ground and left it broken. You vowed to never write another song in your life.

C: 一个女人落在孽龙额顶，一线冰冷的光辉握在她掌中，刺下。间不容发的瞬息，你瞧见遮住女人双眼的黑纱飘落。她嘴唇微微翕动，你仿佛听见了她说「对不起」。
E: A woman lands on top of the abominable dragon's head. Her palms hold a ray of frosty light that she stabs downward. In a split second, you see the black veil covering her eyes falling off. Her lips move slightly, and you can faintly hear her utter the word "Sorry."

C: 在仙舟的幻戏中，有太多大侠吃下药丸脱胎换骨，力大无穷。「药丸」拯救的并不是病人，是无计可施的编剧。
E: There are way too many heroes in Xianzhou's immersia who end up taking miracle medicine to gain incomparable power and strength. These "miracle pills" are not saving any patients - They're more likely to heal playwrights with a writer's block.

C: 不得不说，这本册子从头到尾都充满了熟悉的气息。或许你应该仔细调查一番……
E: You can't help but notice that this notebook seems extremely familiar. Perhaps you should take a closer look...

C: 你写完了习题册，顿觉自己神清气爽。虽然仙舟俗语说「人无再少年」，但就在刚才，你认真答题的样子，真的很青春靓仔。
E: You complete the exercise book and instantly feel refreshed. There is a Xianzhou saying "none can become young once more." However, when you were immersed in answering those questions, you were the very image of youth.

C: 这是…学院代表来赶人了？
E: Huh... The academy's rep is here to eject them?

C: 你决定将小家伙送去地衡司，他们会为谛听找个妥善的安置之处。
E: You decide to send the little dog over to the Realm-Keeping Commission. They will find a fitting home for this Diting.

C: 看起来「信仰质量理论」的确是当世显学，用它赚来的津贴一定不少。
E: It seems that this "faith mass theory" is indeed a popular scientific discipline. People must have used it to earn many a large grant...

C: 做人好还是做岁阳好？
E: Is it better to be human or to be heliobus?

C: 你怎么这么迷信呢？
E: Why are you so superstitious?

C: 灯笼静静漂浮在夜色中，周身散发着温暖的光芒，平等地为所有人照亮回家的路——换句话说，你要是跟着走，不一定会回自己的家。
E: The lanterns silently float in the night sky, each emitting a warm glow, equally lighting the way home for all. In other words, you may not necessarily return to your home if you follow the lights.

C: 存放来宾贵重物品的金库，整个酒店里最安全的地方。考虑到大堂氛围不该太过严肃，设计师在它的门上额外安装了一张唱片。
E: The vault that stores all of the VIP guests' most valuable belongings, the safest place in the entire hotel. Considering that they did not want too stern an atmosphere in the lobby, the designer installed a record around the door.

C: 这处花坛里种的是三日卷柏——闻名宇宙的复苏植物。
E: This flower bed has three-day spikemosses, known across the universe as the plant of resurrection.

C: 凝视深渊之人，必将被深渊凝视。而你选择与深渊对视……
E: If you gaze into the abyss, the abyss gazes also into you. And if you choose to meet the abyss' gaze...

C: 厄皮洛斯服装秀场的分店，仅为VIP会员提供服务。店面不大，恰好能容下那些口袋阔绰的贵宾。
E: Branch outlet of the Epirus Apparel Fashion Show that only caters to its VIP members. The shop isn't spacious — just enough to host distinguished customers with deep pockets.

C: 桌上的茶杯空空如也，里面的液体已经干涸。看来这里已经荒废了很长时间。
E: The teacups on the table are empty, the liquid inside long dried. Looks like they have been abandoned for a long time.

C: 9-<unbreak>15</unbreak>-7…保险箱旁不知被谁刻了这样一组数字，你试了试，金属锁扣岿然不动。
E: 9-<unbreak>15</unbreak>-7... Someone carved these numbers into the side of the safe. You try the combination, but the metal lock still won't budge.

C: 如今，「开拓」的道路再次分散出千百种可能性，是时候重新踏上旅途了。无论你选择去往何处，楼顶的这片天空都将永远映在你的梦中。
E: Now, the Path of Trailblaze is once again brimming with countless possibilities. It is time to embark on a new journey. No matter where you're headed, the sky above the building will always be etched in your dreams.

C: 回过神来时，你感觉怒火已经填满了胸膛。
E: When you come to your senses, you feel like rage is exploding from your chest.

C: 恍惚中那蓝色蝴蝶向你飞来，翅膀挥动间洒下艳丽却致命的鳞片。
E: The azure butterfly flits towards you, its wings scattering splendid, fatal scales.

C: 行李飞向天空，如同骏鹰挣脱枷锁。
E: The suitcase flies into the sky, like a hawk breaking free of its fetters.

C: 你尝试着打了一杆。啪——黑球应声入洞。看来你此前苦练出的技术还未生疏。
E: You try your hand at a bat. Whack! The black ball goes into the hole. Looks like you haven't lost your hard-earned skills.

C: 我不小心迷路了。
E: I just happened to lose my way.

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 惠特克爵士微微点头，似乎默认了你的说法。
E: Sir Whittaker seems to acknowledge your words with a slight nod.

C: 惠特克爵士微微点头，似乎默认了你的说法。
E: Sir Whittaker seems to acknowledge your words with a slight nod.

C: 希望你对人的情绪足够了解，当心玩火自焚。
E: I hope you know enough about human emotions, or you'd be playing with fire.

C: 匹诺康尼不是梦想之城吗…我、我也有自己的梦想啊！
E: Isn't Penacony supposed to be the city of dreams...? I, I also have my own dreams!

C: 到底是什么地方…突破口在哪……
E: Where exactly is that place... What am I missing...

C: …你终于意识到了不对劲？
E: ...You only just realized something isn't right?

C: 不要怀疑路灯小姐的名气，没看见这个招呼打得…非常吉利吗？
E: Do not doubt Miss Street Lamp's fame. Didn't you see the way she greets you? Don't you think that's... a good sign?

C: 这就是我最用心的训练对象，「美梦剧团」未来的新星，匹诺康尼人见人爱的脆筒舞者——现在，动起来吧！
E: I've trained this item with all my effort. It is the future star of Sweet Dreams Troupe and Penacony's beloved Cone Dancer. Now, show us your moves!

C: 抱歉了客人，等我把它调教完成后再为您表演吧。
E: I'm sorry, Customer. Allow me to complete its training before it performs for you again.

C: 先这样吧
E: That's it for now.

C: 或许你更适合其他口味。
E: Perhaps you prefer other flavors.

C: 这里很危险。
E: It's very dangerous here.

C: 家人…到底意味着什么呢？
E: Kinship... what exactly does it mean?

C: 同僚？
E: Fellow craftsman?

C: 然后，他顺着那边的餐桌爬上了柜台，结果刚站稳就晕了过去…你知道是为什么吗？
E: He climbed up on the counter using that table over there, but as soon as he stood still... he passed out. Can you guess why?

C: 没有不好笑的段子，只有不会讲笑话的演员！
E: There is no such thing as bad jokes, only lousy comedians who can't deliver them!

C: 你明白，此刻已再没什么能够搅扰他了。
E: You realize that nothing can break his immersion now.

C: （给他一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Give him 1 Aideen Token)

C: 生意难做啊…再这么下去，我怕不是真的只能去跟人推销「豆汁儿口味苏乐达」了……
E: It's tough doing business here. If things keep up like this, I might end up hawking mung-bean-flavored SoulGlad to others...

C: 喏，这些你先收着吧，就当是我的一点心意。
E: Here, keep these. Take it as a token of my appreciation.

C: 当然当然，我就喜欢跟年轻人聊天……
E: Absolutely, I love chatting with young people...

C: 好、好，有空记得再过来啊。
E: Sure, sure. Come by again when you're free.

C: 我曾经很享受这个过程，每个世界都会给我带来新的感触，让我看到不同的艺术表现形式…但不知从何时起，用工具代替乐手的行为开始在宇宙中蔓延。
E: I used to enjoy this process, every world brought me new emotions and allowed me to see different forms of artistic expression... But at some point, the replacing of musicians with automated instruments started to spread throughout the universe.

C: 呵呵，但也无所谓，我们演奏家并不是为你这种人工作的——我们的演奏只为满足那些尊重音乐的人，还有取悦我们自己的灵魂！
E: Heheh, but it doesn't matter. We musicians don't play for people like you — we only perform for those who appreciate music, and to sate the yearnings of love that our souls crave!

C: 真正的演奏艺术，是乐器、旋律、乐手一同合作的艺术品，蕴含着一个音乐人对艺术的感悟和他的灵魂！
E: The essence of true performance art lies in the harmonious collaboration of musical instruments, melodies, and musicians — a fusion that encompasses the musician's interpretation of art and their soul.

C: 不喜欢的话，店里还有其他款式。您可以慢慢挑选。
E: If you don't like it, there are other models in-store. Take your pick.

C: 结果…给我们的是仓库里积压了好几年的老型号。不仅驾驶系统早就过时了，需要全部重新安装，就连表面的喷漆都开始变色，尽是怪味……
E: In the end... we were given an outdated model that had been sitting in storage for years. Not only was the driving system obsolete and needed to be replaced, the paint was discolored, and it also had a strange odor...

C: 不知道当时，柯柯娜是怎么撑下来的…她既然选择离职，肯定找到了更好的去处吧。
E: I have no idea how Cocona even endured this ordeal... If she chose to resign, that must mean she found something better.

C: 你望向钢琴，最先看到的却是那双手——
E: When your gaze falls on the piano, the first thing that captures your attention is a pair of hands...

C: 原来那种感受叫做*孤独*。
E: *Loneliness*, that is the emotion that resonates within you.

C: 哎，这不是…那位{M#先生}{F#女士}嘛，再见到您真是太高兴了！
E: Hey, if it isn't... that kind {M#sir}{F#lady}? Great to see you again!

C: 再见，祝您在匹诺康尼度过一个愉快的假期。
E: See you next time. We wish you a pleasant stay in Penacony.

C: 「星辰的时刻」又是什么？
E: What is the Moment of Stars?

C: 首先声明，在我这里出售的梦境，百分之百都经过了梦境主人的授权——当然，不包含那些年代过于古早、或梦境主人早已逝世的存货。
E: First and foremost, all the dreams available here have been authorized by their owners, except for cases where the dreams are too old or the owners have passed away.

C: 好吧，期待您的下次光顾！记住，爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！
E: Well, I'll look forward to your next visit! Remember, Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!

C: …爱买买，不买滚！
E: ...Buy it or leave it!

C: 啊这…这太急功近利了！路上明明有那么多景色不容错过。
E: Well... what's the rush? You'll miss out on the scenic view along the way.
Agh...

C: 直到现在，还没有敌人能入侵这里。所以我们每天也就是做些惯例的巡逻，偶尔帮着招待一下客人什么的…平淡的日常啊。
E: No one has ever succeeded in breaking into this place, so we just patrol the place every day and occasionally assist in entertaining the guests... That's a pretty uneventful routine.

C: 干脆就这样冲上云霄吧，突破天际！
E: Why don't I just soar through the clouds and traverse across the sky like this!

C: 星际冒险是严肃的、郑重的，我需要提前做出完备的计划，等待一个完美的时机，这才能表现出我对这件事的重视……
E: Interstellar adventures are serious and solemn. I must make flawless preparations and wait for the perfect timing to show how serious I am about this...

C: 那些地方充斥着毫无特色的建筑、乏味过时的娱乐、矫揉造作的景观…甚至还不如匹诺康尼呢！
E: They're all just filled with unremarkable buildings, outdated entertainment, and artificial scenery... They can't even measure up to Penacony!

C: 能和他们成为兄弟真是太好了，滴答！
E: I'm so happy I became brothers with them, tick-tock!

C: 说得有点多了。祝你在影城玩得开心，陌生人。
E: I have talked a bit too much. I hope you have a wonderful time in the theme park, stranger.

C: 梦里嗓子不会干。
E: You don't get thirsty in a dream.

C: 知道我最讨厌什么吗？我最讨厌的就是那些自命不凡的本地人！
E: Do you know what I hate the most? I hate those arrogant, self-important natives more than anything!

C: 虽然酒吧里生活的都是怪物，可它们远比那些宾客要更加亲切和友善，也比宣扬谐乐的家族要更温暖。
E: It may just be monsters that live here, but they're a lot kinder and friendly than those visitors. They're a lot warmer than that harmony-touting family, too!

C: …那自动乐团呢？
E: ...So, how about the automated orchestra?

C: 看啊，它们是如此般配，如此的令人歆羡。
E: Look, they are such a perfect match! I can't help but admire and envy them!

C: 您不觉得很有趣嘛？性格迥异的奇特生物，封闭的梦境空间，黑暗中逐渐发酵的复杂心绪…呀，光是谈到这几个关键词都忍不住开始浮想联翩了。
E: Don't you find it fascinating? Strange creatures with contrasting personalities, sealed inside a Dreamscape together as complex emotions start to ferment in the darkness... Ah, just these little tropes alone get my mind racing!

C: 你是这家酒吧新招来的调饮师？听说最近都是你在照顾那群怪物，效果挺好的，它们都很信任你，愿意把想法和你分享，看来你在沟通方面很有一套嘛。
E: Are you the new drinksmith here? I hear that it's you that has been looking after those monsters lately? I hear it's going well, and they trust you a lot, that they are willing to share their thoughts with you. It seems you're quite the adept communicator.
(Meow?)

C: 列车长…呵，看来是真货——恭喜，你的嫌疑被洗清了。
E: The conductor... Ha, looks like you are the real deal — Congratulations, you are no longer under suspicion.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 期待与你的再会。
E: I look forward to meeting you again.

C: 我住在公司提供的集体宿舍里，和几个室友挤在一起，但她们人都很好，每天我们都一起到「黎明的时刻」上班。
E: I live with a few people in a cramped dorm room provided by the IPC. They're all nice though. We go to the Moment of Daybreak for work every day.

C: 我们总是形影不离、总是共同在诗歌与雕塑的美中遨游；我们无所不谈，契合如同灵魂的侣伴，直到……
E: We were thick as thieves, meandering through the splendor of poetry and sculptures together. There was nothing we would not talk about, as if our spirits were in perfect synch, until...

C: 我以鸽血石为腐肉、羊脂玉作骸骨，以黄金铸魔鬼、白银造妖巫；腐黑曜为坏疽，败翡翠作流毒…这亲手打造的华庭，我将其命名为「审判的幻景」。
E: I used pigeon blood rubies as carrion, suet jade as bones, forged demons in gold, and created wights in silver. Putrid obsidian as gangrene, flawed jade as poison... This court built with my own hands, I will name it the "Illusion of Judgment."

C: 亲爱的，你可曾听说过「欧福里翁」？
E: Darling, have you heard of Euphorion?

C: 我们不能继续走老路了！机会只有一次，我们必须唱出风格，唱出水平，给鸢尾花家系那帮*古典名家*一点小小的现代震撼！
E: We can't keep going on like this! You only get one shot, and we have to use our style and our talent to rock that fusty old classical Iris Family a rockin' good shock!

C: 托斯卡尼乐团现在正在中场休息。你想聊聊吗？
E: The Toskani Orchestra is taking a breather right now. Do you want to have a chat?

C: 就拿我的故乡——朋克洛德来举例，那里曾举办过一场声势浩大的线下寻宝活动，完美融合了冒险游戏和现实谜题，可以称得上是完美的设计。
E: Take my homeworld for example: Punklorde. We once put on an enormous offline treasure hunt that perfectly integrated adventure gaming with real-life puzzles. The design was perfect.

C: …呜呜呜？
E: ...*boohoohoo*?

C: 咳、重新介绍一下——我是《逐梦客时讯》驻热砂分会场的记者，目前正制作一期关于新晋冠军，也就是你的节目。
E: Ahem, let me reintroduce myself real quick — I'm a reporter from the Dreamchaser Bulletin's Scorchsand Hall section. I'm putting together a piece about the new champion. That's you.

C: 也辛苦你啦，{NICKNAME}——那么…既然已经到了下班时间，我能以粉丝的身份请你喝瓶苏乐达吗？
E: And thanks to you, {NICKNAME} — so anyway... seeing as it's the end of my shift, can I treat you to a bottle of SoulGlad, as a fan?

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: That's all I wanted to talk about.

C: 算了，早点退圈也好，有这个时间和精力不如去做一些更有意义的事，何必为了这些浪费生命……
E: Whatever. It's good to get kicked out early so that you can put that time and energy into doing something a little more meaningful. Why waste your life just for that...?

C: 不用你说，每个牛仔都会找到最适合自己的生存方式！
E: Of course I'll have a happy journey. We cowgirls always find the style of life that suits us best!

C: 后来没过多久，他们另派了人过来照看我。这帮人的说法又变了…他们说那片诡异的梦境是个*普通*的「负面情绪回收站」…哈、哈哈……
E: Not long after, they sent people to come and look after me. These people said something completely different... They said that strange Dreamscape was just a normal "recycling center for negative emotions"... Ha. Haha...

C: 好、好在我逃出来了…逃到了这片流梦之地。美梦并不安全…美梦就是个谎言！
E: F—Fortunately, I escaped... escaped to this land of Dreamflux. Dreams are not safe... Dreams are a lie!

C: 我觉得不行…
E: I don't think that's okay...

C: 哈哈…一个人在外面漂泊这么久，搞得我都变得多愁善感起来了。
E: Haha... All this roaming the world alone has made me soppy and sentimental...

C: 现实也是一样。有些事情，不把脚踏进泥里，就永远无法做成…越是参加劳动，对这样的道理感悟也越深刻。
E: The real world is the same. There are some things that you will never be able to achieve if you don't get your hands dirty... The more you get involved in real labor, the more you will understand this truth.

C: 我可以加入吗？
E: Can I join, too?

C: 你怎么知道？
E: Wait, how did you know?

C: 再见，愿我们都能在彼此的旅途中见到壮美的风景。
E: Goodbye. May we all see magnificent scenery on each other's journeys.

C: 我听不懂他们颠来倒去的法律术语，我只知道钟表小子不是他们手里的牟利工具！
E: I couldn't grasp the twisted legalese they were using, but one thing was clear: Clockie isn't a tool they should use for personal profit!

C: 这种生活在冰川深处的巨型节肢动物，以部落的孩童为食。每到长夜降临，人们都会把孩子藏进地窖里，直到第九颗星星升起为止。
E: These giant arthropods live deep in the glaciers and feed on the children of the tribes. When the long night falls, people hide their children in cellars until the ninth star rises.

C: 实际上，冰川并不允许巨型动物的生存，所谓的怪物，不过是远古时期冰川另一端敌对部落的图腾。
E: Yet the truth remains that the glaciers pose an insurmountable obstacle to the megafauna's survival. These so-called monsters are merely symbolic totems of the rival tribe situated on the other side of the glaciers from time immemorial.

C: 但你知道吗？我仍记得他们的面孔，记得他们讲的笑话与夜晚的吵闹，可就只是记得而已。
E: Do you know? I can still remember their faces, the jokes they told, and their playful voices at night, but that's all I can do.

C: 我理应…也必须能尽己所能，为我的「家人」做些什么…对吧？
E: I should... no, I MUST do everything I can for my "kinsmen"... right?

C: 他最会用钟表小子来讲故事，有时啊能把整个屋子的人都逗笑，可惜…他已经不会再来了。
E: He'd tell the best stories using Clockie as the medium, and sometimes he'd have the entire room in stitches laughing along. But unfortunately... he won't be coming back again.

C: 虽然我们也算老店了，但固步自封只能被时代淘汰。
E: We might be a trusted old brand, but if we remain stuck in our old ways, we'll soon be obsolete.

C: 这种东西吃多了会把自己的味觉搞坏的！但那些不知情的年轻人只能买他们的廉价菜饭裹腹，这样吃下去他们的精神状态怎么会好？
E: Eating this stuff will break your taste buds! Those unsuspecting youngsters gorge themselves on that cheap stuff. How are their spirits going to fare if that keeps on?

C: 嗯…折纸小鸟会跳舞吗？我不知道，但有只爱跳舞的鸟总在<color=#dbc291ff>高处的广告牌附近</color>练习，说是能借着广告牌的灯光打节拍呢。
E: Hmm... Do origami birds know how to dance? I don't know, but a bird that loves dancing is practicing <color=#dbc291ff>near an elevated billboard</color> — something about using the billboard's lights to time the beat.

C: 吼吼，那能说的可就多了啾。
E: Ho-ho, I've got plenty to talk about then, tweet.

C: 人家就打了个盹儿，小鸟们就跑没影了啾。
E: I dozed off for a moment, and the birds were nowhere to be seen, tweet.

C: （听不见）
E: (Pretend not to hear)

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 嗯哼，这下人家就能想起来了啾……
E: Uh-huh, now I can remember what happened, tweet...

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子对表演很感兴趣，在<color=#dbc291ff>舞台外围</color>帮了演员们很多忙啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that's interested in performing, and it's helped out many an actor <color=#dbc291ff>on the periphery of the stage</color>, tweet!

C: 这是人家一点小小的心意，客官可千万不要嫌弃啾。
E: This is a token of my appreciation, I hope you won't scoff, tweet.

C: 为了这样的未来，我会工作至生命的最后一刻。
E: I will work to my final breath to realize such a future.

C: 被开除的员工可以获得三个月的月薪…等价的艾迪恩代币，能肯定能供他们玩到有新工作为止。
E: Dismissed staff will get three months' pay... in Aideen tokens. That will be more than enough to entertain them till they find new jobs.

C: 苏乐达集团正处在关键的发展节点，我们还没有成为宇宙中最赚钱的汽水品牌…也没有实现苏萨先生的理想呢！
E: The SoulGlad Enterprise is at a pivotal development phase. We still haven't become the richest soda brand in the universe... nor have we fulfilled Mr. Sousa's ideal!

C: 对吧，用这样的说法果然能够让你们有机生命更好理解。
E: I know, right? I was quite certain organic beings such as you would understand the concept more easily if explained this way.

C: 你真是好人。
E: You're such a good person.

C: 你好，无名客。
E: Hello, Nameless.

C: 我是名摄影师，眼睛就是我的镜头——无论字面意义或是比喻意义都如此。
E: As a photographer, my eyes serve as the lens of my camera, both literally and metaphorically.

C: 我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 是的，一位，我所使用的量词准确无误。
E: You heard me right. Precisely one person, who was the epitome of beauty.

C: 唉…也不用那么看着我，最近是有些…时运不佳。
E: Ugh... You don't have to look at me like that. It's just that I've encountered... a spot of bad luck recently.

C: 还有相当一部分，即使经历了整整一生的积蓄，也不足以发出一瞬的光芒——它们实在太过微小了嘛。
E: There were some who couldn't produce a glimmer of light even after a lifetime of trying. They were just too, too small.

C: 我托关系，调出了我朋友的法院判决书，原罪名「以食用为目的走私星际保护动物」不知何时被篡改为了「涉嫌谋杀」。
E: I pulled some strings and got my hands on my friend's court document. At some point, their crime was mysteriously changed from "smuggling with the intent of consuming protected interstellar animals" to "suspected homicide".

C: 我想了解一下顶级牛排。
E: I'd like to know more about the premium steak.

C: 靠这种甲虫，你活着走出了原始森林。在你的推介下，银河又多了一样绝美食材。」
E: "With the help of this beetle species, you've made it through the forest and introduced a novel delicacy to the cosmic culinary landscape."

C: 我该怎么称呼您…呃…前辈？就前辈吧……
E: What should I call you? Hmm... Senior? I guess I'll go with senior.

C: 现在的时代，讲究的是流量为王！哼！我不过是配合托马斯演两下，真把我当没脑子的蠢货了？
E: These days, popularity is everything! Hmph! I'm just doing my performance for Thomas, and they have the nerve to think I'm a simpleton?

C: 哎…不甘心啊，人和人之间的差别怎么就这么大呢？
E: *sigh* It's so unfair how people end up leading such different lives!

C: 托马斯朝你眨了眨眼。一道思绪刺入你的脑海，似有若无，转瞬即逝。
E: Thomas winks at you, and a thought flits through your mind, elusive and fleeting.

C: 后来，我告诫自己，工作的事归工作，不要太投入。不然我不去工作，事务所上下这么多人，我的家人，谁来养活呢？
E: Later on, I made it a point to compartmentalize my work and to never get overly invested in it. What else could I do? If I were to stop working, who's going to pay the employees at the law firm? How's my family going to survive?

C: 只要我嘴巴够严，我不说，又有谁知道我知道呢？
E: As long as I keep my lips sealed, who's going to know what I know?

C: 看看这些精挑细选的树枝、色泽艳丽的石子…虽然品味尚不及人家，但也相当不错了啾！
E: Look at these carefully selected twigs and gorgeous stones... Although his taste might not be the best, it's still better than most people's, tweet!

C: 船长，又见面了，是特意来看我的吗？还是说有什么事吗？
E: Captain, we meet again! Have you come specially to see me? Or is anything the matter?

C: 你在卖我的周边？
E: You're selling my merchandise?

C: 船长周边是什么？
E: What is the captain's merchandise?

C: 我是船长，就不能免费拿？
E: I'm the captain. Can't I get them for free?

C: 什么情况？
E: What's wrong?

C: …算起来，玩音乐整整十年了，坚持了这么久真的要放弃吗？艾克索说得对，把速弹的臂力浪费在摇晃水杯上，真是浪费。
E: ...Thinking back now, I've already been making music for a good ten years. Should I really be giving up on it after holding out this far? Axel's right, it's a complete waste busting my guns on these shakers instead of shredding the bass.

C: 我想给空艇更名并换涂装。
E: I want to rename the airship and change her livery.

C: 当年我的乐队小有名气，在人才辈出的谐乐学院也称得上是头号新星。
E: Back when my band was still quite popular, I was considered one of the top rising stars of the talent-filled Charmony Academy.

C: 下周末有个超酷的派对——一年一度的折纸大学球笼赛预热派对，全折纸大学的风云人物都会到场，猜猜谁没有被邀请——
E: There's going to be a super cool party next weekend — the annual Paperfold University Spheroid race warm-up party! All the big shots of Paperfold University are going to be there. Why don't you make a guess who didn't receive an invite—

C: 但你确实是皮皮西人。
E: But you ARE a Pepeshi...

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 所以偶尔我会想，我和他…是否有共同前行的可能？
E: So I sometimes think to myself... maybe he and I could find a common thread?

C: 哈哈哈，你别当真，只是无谓的思绪罢了。不管再怎么努力，我始终…不属于那个世界。
E: Hahaha, ignore me. They're just pointless thoughts... No matter how hard I work, I... I will never belong to that world.

C: 那些为了好看，用发光忆质建造住宅的人，就该让他们自己住进去，等被天花板晃得睁不开眼的时候，看他们怎么后悔！
E: Those people who use sparkling memoria to construct residential buildings should have to move into them themselves. They'll regret their choices when the ceilings end up blinding them!

C: 理论上来说是该管。但实际上——你不能因为一所学校建在「美梦」里、并且以「美梦多彩，理想自由」为校训，就真指望它能「完美」得像个梦似的。
E: Theoretically, they should care about it. However, in reality... you cannot expect a school to achieve the "perfection" of a dream simply because it is built inside a dream and has the motto: "Color your dreams, free your ideals."

C: 后来我才发现，生活根本没有我想的那么浪漫。我在筑梦学院念书，为了生计，学的也是筑梦师的本事。
E: Only later did I realize that life was not so romantic. I study at Dreamweaver Academy, and I major in Dreamweaving just so I can hope to make a living.

C: 将我的美好回忆，弃置于此——
E: I'll leave my precious memories here.

C: 其余成员不都还在嘛。
E: But the other members are still here.

C: 跟着乱破忍首修行的那段时间，就像是画面定格了那样，始终在记忆里循环…我和乐队同伴们站在舞台上，向所有人宣告我们的名号。
E: While I was training with Head Ninja Rappa, it was like time stood still, and the memories of that time still swirl in my head... Standing on the stage with me and my bandmates, declaring our name to everyone.

C: 别开这种玩笑啦——能跟盛会巨星还有乱破同学搭戏，这么难得的事我可是会记一辈子的！
E: Stop joking! Being able to act alongside the Festive Superstar and Rappa is such a rare opportunity, I'll never forget it for the rest of my life!

C: 大家都很喜欢我的甜品…真是太好了……
E: Everyone loves my desserts... I'm so glad...

C: 没什么。
E: It's nothing.

C: 事实证明，不管是不是心理作用，大号的音响用着是要爽快些。
E: The evidence shows that irrespective of whether it's psychological or not, a big speaker offers a more satisfying experience.

C: 陈酿了数百年的气泡水，足以撼动任何有机生命的味蕾。
E: Soda that has been stored for centuries, potent enough to shake any organic's taste buds.

C: 陈列架上为你留有不少空位，但你除了高尚的品德之外一无所有——但那东西太沉重了，恐怕会把架子压垮。
E: There is plenty of empty space left for you on the shelf, but you have no possessions beyond your noble morality — a thing that's so heavy that it would probably collapse the shelf.

C: 高空飞行还是要注意安全…
E: Stay safe when you're flying...

C: 偷渡是违法的！
E: Smuggling is illegal!

C: 根本看不到…
E: I can't read them at all...

C: 或许我就不适合做梦…
E: Maybe dreaming isn't my thing after all...

C: 地理位置不给力啊…
E: The location is just terrible...

C: 看啊，好多飞车！
E: Look, so many flying cars!

C: 不知道代币够不够…
E: I wonder if I have enough tokens...

C: 二者对我而言并没有什么区别…不过，你还喝得下吗？
E: They are all the same to me... By the way, can you drink anymore?

C: 嘿，这游艺机…长这么大我还是头一回见！
E: Hey, this slot machine... I've never seen anything like this before!

C: 因为不够浪漫。
E: Because it was not "romantic" enough.

C: 真巧，我也是来借钱的。
E: What a coincidence! I'm here for a loan too.

C: 等到《寻星顽童》重映吧。
E: Let's wait for the Urchin Starhunters to come back on.

C: 你也很欣慰吧，亲爱的？
E: Are you happy too, my love?

C: 每天九个系统时的练习…
E: They're training for nine system hours every day...

C: 说起来…你那些「都市传说」是不是也还没调查完？
E: Speaking of which... Have you finished with your detective work on those "urban legends"?

C: 从这里看~
E: Look at it from there!

C: 我们又在一起听歌了…
E: We're listening to songs again together...

C: 你是想要？
E: You want one?

C: 展品还没送到吗？
E: Has the exhibit not been delivered yet?

C: 我问你，你有家人吗？
E: I'm asking you if you have family.

C: 拉倒吧，别说咱们这些外地人受不了，那玩意在仙舟也不怎么受待见。
E: Forget it. Not only do we outsiders find it hard to stomach, it's not even well-received on the Xianzhou.

C: 艾迪恩先生也有意气风发的岁月——但说实话，比起苏乐达，这张海报或许更适合用来销售牙膏。
E: Mr. Aideen was also once a spirited youth — However, compared to selling SoulGlad, the figure in this poster might be more suited to selling toothpaste.

C: 啾啾！那我们就开始正式合唱了！
E: Tweet tweet! Then let us begin the chorus in earnest!

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
E: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

C: 几封广告，几封账单，几封不知所云的垃圾邮件……
E: A few advertisements, a few bills, and some incomprehensible spam...

C: 喵~
E: Meow~

C: 睡大觉！
E: Sleepy time!

C: 我这是…重生了吗？前一刻，我还被绑于黎明机器之上，接受我亲生哥哥的判决。眼前的面孔逐渐清晰，只听男人一声令下，顷刻炼化了我体内的泰坦之血……
E: Did I experience... a rebirth? Just moments ago, I was bound to the Dawn Device, facing my brother's judgment. His visage grew fierce as he uttered the command, instantly eradicating the Titan blood from within me...

C: 再说一遍，我已经结婚了，所以请不要再试图给我介绍伴侣了。
E: Let me be straight: I'm already married. So, please stop trying to set me up with someone else.

C: 一刻钟后，一个拼盘被端到你面前。盘中的菜肴分为内外两层：外层半圈是切好的蛋卷、半圈是齐整的肉排；内圈是去皮的苹果块，上面淋着琥珀色的粘稠酱汁。
E: A quint later, a platter is served before you. The dish is presented in two layers: Egg rolls and flank steak bisect the outer edge in half, while peeled apple chunks doused in a rich amber sauce sit in the center.

C: 眼前一黑。
E: Everything goes black.

C: 离开。
E: Leave

C: 欢迎光临…哎呀，你就是白厄阁下带回来的外邦客人吧？看起来可真讨人喜欢。
E: Welcome... Hey, you must be the outlander brought back by Lord Phainon, right? You seem like quite the charming one.
...*burp*

C: 混了什么？「混了云羊肉。」混了多少？「一半一半。」一半是多少？「一条鱼，一只云羊。」
E: "What else did you add?" "Just some cloudsheep." "How much?" "Half and half, that is." "What do you mean by half?" "One fish, one cloudsheep."

C: 不忙，等你饿了，再来找我，保证好吃。
E: No duties. Come to me when you're hungry. I'll cook something yummy.

C: 当然，如果刻薄一点…整个{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}恐怕也没有几个人算是真正地活着。只是…黄金裔们还在这里。所以我不会这么去说。
E: To be a bit more strict... there might be only a handful truly alive in {RUBY_B#the entire world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}. However... the Chrysos Heirs are here, so I'll hold my tongue on that.

C: 可我的贵宾特权…
E: But my VIP privileges...

C: 这是一种浴池添加物，据说能让使用者经历类似于黄金裔「领受神谕」时的体验。另外，好像…只剩最后一件了，是个难得的机会呢，客人。
E: This is a type of bath additive that is said to grant the user an experience equal to the time when the prophecy was bestowed upon the Chrysos Heirs. Also, it appears that... this is the last in stock. A most rare opportunity, my good guest.

C: 自从归还火种，成为人们口中的半神，曾经刻骨铭心的感触都已如烛烟袅袅散去，这颗承载着世界命运的心也愈发冰冷。兴许不久后，连沐浴都不能使我欢欣了。
E: Since returning the Coreflame and becoming what people refer to as a demigod, sensations that were once deeply engraved on my heart have faded away like candle smoke. This heart that bears the destiny of this world has also grown cold. Perhaps soon, not even bathing will bring me joy any longer.

C: …无缺的英雄。时至今日，我也只能如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。
E: ...The perfect hero. To this day, that is the only opinion I have ever been able to make of Phainon. As the most perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 缇宝老师，我想学「百界门」！
E: Master Tribbie, I want to learn how to use the "Century Gate"!

C: 好，决定了，*我们*来教你使用百界门，来创造奇迹吧！
E: Alright, it's decided. We will teach you how to use the Century Gate! Let's create some miracles!

C: 现在它已陨，再无战争！
E: They are dead now, and there will be no more wars!

C: 你们会想家么？
E: Do you folks miss home?

C: 平时喜欢做些什么？
E: What do you like to do normally?

C: 奥赫玛的居民都挺怕你的。
E: The people of Okhema seem to fear you.

C: 我还有事，先不聊了。
E: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 可以，不过你得先说是什么？
E: Of course, but you have to tell me what you need first.

C: 太好了！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你真是个热心人，长得俊不说，这心肠也是艾格勒照耀过的，愿艾格勒祝福你！
E: Wonderful! {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you are truly kind. Not only are you strikingly attractive, but the light of Aquila also shines on your heart. May Aquila bless you!

C: 用这种香料植物制作的肥皂，就像您闻见的这样，香气四溢、回味悠长，坚持使用还有护肤养颜的功效呢！
E: As you've just experienced, soaps made from this plant have a rich diffused scent and lengthy aftertaste. Long-term use is also good for your skincare regime, too!

C: 哥，这碰瓷打劫的技巧过时啦。
E: Bro, these kinds of blackmail scams are really out of fashion these days.

C: 一方面，这里有些人会为香水和香油到底算瑟希斯还是法吉娜的赐福而争吵不休；另一方面，又有一些人认为自己没见过的香料必定不受泰坦的祝福，哪怕只是闻到都会有碍虔诚。
E: On the one hand, some people here bicker and argue about whether their perfumes or essential oils have been blessed by Cerces or Phagousa. On the other hand, some people believe that spices they've never seen before can't have been blessed by a Titan, and merely smelling them can compromise piety.

C: 你这问题问得…瑟希斯在上，难道你没看到这其中的潜力吗？
E: You're asking that...? For the love of Cerces, can't you see the potential in this?

C: 开个玩笑——我既不是泰坦也不是黄金裔，代表不了那许多人。清醒时人们自己做主，但生活乏善可陈；做梦时冒险精彩纷呈，可梦中人又无法自己掌控命运。
E: Just kidding... I am neither a Titan nor a Chrysos Heir. I cannot speak on behalf of that many people. When awake, people are masters of their own fate, but life is unremarkable. When dreaming, one can set out on a marvelous adventure, but will no longer be master of their own destiny.

C: 为难？等上了战场再思考这些就晚了。我从不在胸有成竹之前做出行动，所以大家都叫我「狡猾的」尤利克赛斯。
E: Hard on them? They need to think about things before they step out onto a real battlefield. I always have a plan in mind before I act. That is why they call me "Ulixes the Cunning."

C: 好，贪多容易嚼不烂。
E: Very well. We don't want you biting off more than you can chew.

C: 尼卡多利可不像那些懦弱的神祇。它的祭品不是鲜花、泥土和美食，而是纷争中流下的鲜血。
E: Nikador is unlike those cowardly deities. It demands tribute not in the form of flowers, soil, or food, but fresh blood flowing from strife.

C: 你怎么看待祭典？
E: What do you think of the festival?

C: 老希的格言就是——「利衡币够，天长地久」！只要有需求，记得来咱这铺子打听打听，老希负责把您的利衡币变成解决问题的思路！
E: My mantra is — with enough Balance Coins, everything lasts forever! If you've got a request, be sure to swing by to check us out! I will guarantee your hard-earned Balance Coins turned into solutions!

C: 太荒谬了！我并非什么高贵之人，若如你所说…这简直是对法吉娜大人的一种玷污！
E: Preposterous! I am not someone so noble. If it is as you say... it would be an absolute affront to Phagousa's repute!

C: 入口的秘酿消散得悄无痕迹，如吞入迷雾，你的思绪飘至另一个空间——
E: The ambrosia dissipates without a trace on the palate, like swallowing a mist. Your thoughts drift into another space...

C: 再听听其他的天外之音。
E: Listen to the other celestial echoes.

C: 真是伟大的发现啊！
E: What a great discovery!

C: 大块头没说话，但鼓了鼓掌。
E: The big guy doesn't talk, but he claps.

C: 我的房子，很重。背到城外，很累。为了更好执勤，值得。
E: My house, heavy. Moving outside city, tiring. Necessary for, better duty.

C: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
E: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

C: 毕竟，我与她只有一面之缘。她在得知我眼睛的缺陷后，单独跟我聊了几句，具体内容有些记不清了，大概就是——
E: After all, I've only met her once. She spoke to me briefly after learning about my visual impairment. I can't recall everything she said, but it was something like—

C: 他有些生气地质问这帮年轻人，对方却说这是祭拜塞纳托斯的仪式，叫什么「涤死课」，让他不要打搅……
E: He got annoyed and challenged the youths, who said they were conducting a ritual to honor Thanatos, dubbed "Death Cleansing," and asked not to be interrupted...

C: 我有倒立泡澡机。
E: I have an upside-down bath machine.

C: 你问大家迷恋健身的原因？这么深奥的事情我哪答得上来，我又不是什么历史学家。
E: You're asking why everyone is so obsessed with fitness? That's too profound for me to answer — I'm not a historian.

C: 你果然是个有趣的人，朋友——难怪从见到你的第一眼起，我就觉得咱俩特别有缘呢。
E: I knew you were interesting, friend. From the moment I first laid eyes on you, I knew we had a special bond.

C: 我听到了你的「愉悦」。
E: I can hear your joy.

C: 奇怪，我是在哪里听过这句话吗…为什么如此耳熟？
E: Strange, where have I heard this line before... Why does it sound familiar?

C: 再会——散步有助于清醒地思考，有机会记得尝试一下啊！
E: Farewell. A walkabout helps with clearing your thoughts. Try it out when you get the chance!

C: 不过我会尽量从中选取一些实用性比较强的展示出来，这样才对得起我亲爱的顾客们嘛。免得买了一堆无用的垃圾，浪费钱不说，还影响心情。
E: But I'll try to pick some more practical ones to demonstrate. It's the least I can do for my beloved customers, lest they end up buying something useless, wasting their money and souring their moods.

C: 聊聊你的发现？
E: Can you tell me what you've discovered?

C: 至于稿费嘛，绝对亏待不了你。
E: And don't worry about the fee, we won't shortchange you.

C: 咦，你又来听小女子开嗓啊，还是说有什么其他的事吗？
E: Hey, are you here to hear this young lady sing again, or is there something else?

C: 你跟塔米拉还有联系吗？
E: Are you still in touch with Tamila?

C: 那…那我该怎么做呢，祭司大人？
E: Then... Then what am I to do, Lord Priest?

C: 不是假货吧？
E: They aren't counterfeit, are they?

C: 哦哦，冷静而知性的少女，她尽责的信念实在让人感动…多么伟大的人物啊！
E: Oh, such a calm and intelligent young woman. Her dedication to duty is truly inspiring... What a remarkable individual!

C: 不打扰你了，再会啦。
E: I won't bother you anymore, farewell.

C: 但只有你被称为救世主。
E: But you're the only one called the Deliverer.

C: 其实我还是不认识你…
E: Actually... I still don't know who you are.

C: 这是留在神悟树庭附近的贤人墓——
E: This is engraved on a sage's tomb near the Grove of Epiphany —

C: 帮我向遐蝶问好。
E: Say hi to Castorice for me.

C: 我平日里都在侍奉刻法勒，很少到外面去，因此对奥赫玛其他地方的情况，我了解的不多。
E: I spend most of my days serving Kephale and rarely venture outside, so I know little about the rest of Okhema.

C: 你手里被硬塞了一把硬币。
E: A handful of coins is stuffed into your hand.

C: 罢了，就当是一位衣匠的呓语吧。
E: Never mind. Just consider it the ramblings of a garmentmaker.

C: 这位伤患……
E: The patient is...

C: 换成风堇小姐，一定能够把他救回来吧。要是我的医术能够更精湛一些就好了……
E: Miss Hyacinth would definitely be able to save him if she were here. If only my medical skills were more advanced...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，不必过于悲观。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, don't be too pessimistic.

C: 一个退役士兵，总喜欢讲些遇见黑潮的古怪经历。我一直以为他在编故事，拿我家人所遭遇的不幸当谈资……
E: A retired soldier, always talking about strange encounters with the black tide. I always thought he was just making up stories, using the misfortunes my family went through as material...

C: 克帖西芬姐姐说，识的字越多，越有希望在来世成为大司铎、替大家解读神谕…虽然我不觉得神谕需要专人解读，但我会往那个方向努力的。
E: Ctesiphona says literacy improves one's chances of becoming a High Priestess in the afterlife to interpret the prophecy... Though I don't see why edicts need interpreting, I'll still try my best!

C: …那倒也是有趣。
E: Now that would certainly be interesting...

C: 身子感觉好多了，精神更是好得不得了！
E: Physically, I'm much improved, and my spirits couldn't be higher!

C: 若真有来世，愿世界依偎在{RUBY_B#法吉娜}它{RUBY_E#}的{RUBY_B#海洋}摇篮{RUBY_E#}中……
E: If there really is an afterlife, I hope the world will rest in {RUBY_B#Phagousa's}their{RUBY_E#} {RUBY_B#Ocean}cradle{RUBY_E#}...

C: 嗯…有位织者好为人师。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>描绘着壁画的长廊上</color>，等待为过路人解惑呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is eager to teach others. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>the corridor with murals</color>, waiting to enlighten passersby.

C: 嗯…有位织者在艾格勒的怒火下幸存。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>通往黄金池的廊道</color>边，怕是在暗自庆幸吧。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who survived Aquila's wrath. The golden threads brought news, it is now <color=#dbc291ff>by the corridor leading to the Golden Pond</color>, probably secretly relieved.

C: 眼下我们当然没有胜利的消息，只有一座逐渐瓦解的城市……
E: But now, we have no victory to report. Only a city slowly crumbling to ruin...

C: 把种子埋进土里，等待它发芽，开出软软的花，就像是在守候一个小小的奇迹。
E: Planting a seed in the soil, waiting for it to sprout and its soft flower to bloom... it's like nurturing a tiny miracle.

C: 使劲地拔幼苗…
E: Yankin' seedlings with all your might...

C: 你又闯什么祸了？
E: What trouble have you gotten yourself into this time?

C: 来，尝尝我今早刚熏的肉干——涂了野蜂蜜，香得很，年轻人应该都喜欢。
E: Here, try some smoked meat I made this morning — coated it with wild honey. Smells amazing, perfect for young folks like you.

C: 一种粉百合，之前打猎的时候在林子里见过，昔涟听说了，就拜托我给她带些回来。
E: Pink lilies. Spotted them while hunting in the woods. Cyrene heard about it and asked me to bring some back for her.

C: 怎么全是刺刺球？
E: Why is it all Quillorbs?

C: 听得我肚子迷迷叫了迷！我也好想吃香喷喷的菜肴。
E: Now you've made my tummy rumble, memi! I wanna eat something warm and delicious too.

C: 哼哼，看来大家都想要偷偷练习，在舞会上惊艳所有人迷。
E: Hehe, looks like everyone's sneaking in some practice, all hoping to wow the crowd at the dance party, memi!

C: 感觉你一直坐在这里。
E: I notice you're always here in this same spot.

C: 这么悠闲，没问题吗？
E: Are you sure it's alright to be idling?

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 就连我的爵位，也是亲手挣得的。用武器指着君王要求赐爵，除了我之外，全翁法罗斯也找不出第二个了吧？
E: Even my title, I earned it with my own hands. Pointing a weapon at the monarch to demand a title, there's likely no second soul in all of Amphoreus who's done the same, is there?

C: 无双…万军取首！
E: Unparalleled... One takes the head across an army ten-thousand strong!

C: 我还有事，回见。
E: I still have things to do. See you around.

C: 话题，话题偏了，本狮还要接着抱怨…呼嗝~救世主阁下，你要不，要不带瓶蜜酿过来，咱们边喝边聊……
E: I—I've gone off tangent, I still have more to complain about... Burp~ Great Deliverer, how about you bring some honey brews over, and we can chat over drinks...

C: 讲讲蜜酿的历史？
E: Tell me about the history of honey brew?

C: 霎时间，海洋化作至圣的琼液，引得军士们忘记敌我，就地设宴，酣饮了三个日夜吼！
E: The ocean instantly turned into fine wine, tempting the soldiers to forget their animosity and feast for three days and nights!

C: 昔涟已经与你一同离开哀丽秘榭，开启了由你作为救世主的第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次回归。
E: Cyrene has already left Aedes Elysiae with you, beginning the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th return with you as the Deliverer.

C: 昔涟从海边找到的一枚缎带，看上去有些磨旧，缝埋着岁月的低语，还有少女的一句轻笑——
E: A ribbon Cyrene found by the sea, worn and weathered. It feels as if it was stitched together by the whispers of time and the soft laughter of a young girl—

C: 我怀疑，不可能单单凭运气。那些黄金裔一开始也是普通人，他们一定掌握了某种不为人知的方法……
E: I suspect it's not just sheer luck that'll get you there. Those Chrysos Heirs were all ordinary people when they were born. They must have grasped some secret method to gain that status...

C: 这是哀悼，也是祝福，所为他们领受的，「所有人的遗忘」。
E: This is both lament and blessing, for what they have received, is "being forgotten by all."

C: 可不是，那些教章的石板都快把我家桌子压垮了！花了几个月去学去记，第五次的成绩还是压线过的……
E: Right? Those rules carved into the stone tablets nearly crushed my desk! All these months of hard work, and I finally made it on my fifth try, though by a tiny margin...

C: 快快，讲讲…
E: Quick, tell me...

C: …老…呼…老师…我们已经、绕着云石天宫…跑了二…二十圈了……
E: ...S—Sir... Phew... We've—We've already done... t—twenty... laps around the... Marmoreal Palace...

C: 最后的最后，能请你…为我实现一个心愿么？
E: Just one last thing. Can you... grant me one wish?

C: 果然常识是有极限的！
E: So common sense has its limits, does it not?

C: 我有什么可以帮你的吗？
E: Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 但任凭你如何询问，希拉的回应只有「<unbreak>159</unbreak>号脑部系统正在升级，给您带来的不便还请见谅！」。
E: But no matter what questions you ask, Sheila's reply is always the same, "No. <unbreak>159</unbreak> is currently going through a brain update. We apologize for any inconvenience caused."

C: 好久不见，年轻人。这次有什么事儿吗？
E: Long time no see, kiddo. How can I help you?

C: 但如果只是一些皮毛，那还可以说说。
E: But I can tell you something less important.

C: 不会吧……我再审查一遍好了…要是这次又出错，我肯定完蛋了……
E: I can't be... let me check again... If I make another mistake, I'll be dead...

C: 倒也不打扰。来个人和我说说话，换换心思也好。
E: You didn't bother me. It's good to have someone talk to me and distract me.

C: 我当年可是修了它足足三次，三次都是从濒死边缘把它救回来……
E: I fixed this thing three times. Three times I managed to bring it back from the brink of death ...

C: 我还有些问题想问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 这条路很长，但她的信徒，绝不会因此放弃！
E: The road ahead is long, but their followers will never give up because of it!

C: 诶呀，都是过命的交情了，您不会还在乎那点版权费吧？柯库翁先生可是连半个利衡币都没跟我们要呢！
E: Oh come on, we've been through thick and thin together! You're not still hung up about those royalty fees, are you? Mr. Glykon didn't even ask us for half a Balance Coin!

C: 唉…虽然我有意保持低调，但既然两位真心实意地想表达感谢，总不好拒绝…唉，都怪我这该死的魅力！
E: *sigh*... Although I try to keep a low profile, I can't really turn down your sincere gratitude... *sigh*, curse my irresistible charm!

C: 你？不是不行，但先排队等着吧，来找我商量的人可多着呢。
E: You? Well, it's not impossible, but you'll have to get in line. I've got plenty of people wanting to talk business with me.

C: 放心吧，命运的泰坦们，一定如同我们的圣女大人那般温柔！
E: Fear not! The Titans of Fate are surely as gentle as our Holy Maiden!

C: 趁此机会，阿波罗尼娅女士，之前提到关于密铺的改进——
E: Speaking of which, Ms. Apollonia, about those improvements to the tessellation mentioned earlier—

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: ——不要转移话题迷！
E: ...Hey, don't change the topic, mem!

C: 不过，蜜花盛开后会凋落，田地会逐渐荒芜，就连鹅卵石也会在漫长的等待中磨成粉末。但宝贵的回忆，永远不会褪色迷！
E: But honey-producing flowers wither after they bloom, fields gradually turn barren, and even pebbles crumble to dust as time drags on. Yet precious memories never lose their shine, mem!

C: 说不定还有一些失传的悬锋古语？悄悄多学几句，下次就知道怎么应对他了。
E: Maybe there are some lost Kremnos sayings? If I secretly learn a few more, I'd know how to deal with him next time.

C: *我们*可以用阿雅的万帷网，来收集大家想要的东西。
E: We can use Agy's World Wound Web to find out what everyone wants.

C: 在战胜铁墓后，我在来时路上独自走了很远很远。
E: After defeating Irontomb, I walked alone for a long way back on the path I came from.

C: 我会把你留在记忆里。
E: I will keep you in my memories.

C: 呀。这火漆印，怎么是带栅格反光效果的，迎着星光看的话……
E: Huh. This wax seal... why does it have a grid-like reflective effect? When you look at it under the starlight...

C: 从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
E: Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...

C: 嗯…有位织者遍历大地，找寻最美的乐章。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>无人奏响的琴边</color>，为那流溢的琴音啧啧称奇呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who roams the land, searching for the most beautiful melody. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>unplayed harp</color>, marveling at the overflowing music.

C: 嗯…有位织者受到古老的传说指引。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>可以升降的树桩前</color>，等待着传说应验呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's guided by an ancient legend. The golden thread brings tidings: They're waiting <color=#dbc291ff>in front of an ascending tree stump</color>, for the prophecy to come true.

C: 「于英雄撰写的神话中，亦有通往神话之外的路。当三束光芒汇聚，缝隙便会为光敞开。」
E: "In the myths written of heroes, there lies a path to the Exomyth. When three beams of light converge, the rift shall open to their radiance."

C: 「浴血战端」。
E: The Bloodbathed Battlefront.

C: 至于这件礼物，如果觉得有些奇怪…不，没什么，希望你能中意。
E: As for this gift, if you find it a bit strange... No, never mind. I hope it's to your liking.

C: 唯一能保护你关心的人的方法，就是与之战斗。
E: The only way to guarantee complete protection of someone you care about is through combat.

C: 那老头子能力很强，可惜脾气不好，倔得很。遇到悟性高的徒弟还好，但是现在不是没遇到嘛…就只能请你想办法帮帮他了。
E: That senior mine cart operator is very capable, but he has a bad temper and can be very stubborn. Things would be good if he had a gifted apprentice to begin with, but that's sadly not the case right now... So please find a way to help him.

C: 有经验的矿车工可以通过合理布线将控制器与轨道相连，从而使用操作杆调整轨道方向。
E: Experienced mine cart operators can adjust the track direction using the operating lever, after connecting the controller to the track through an appropriate wiring arrangement.

C: 哎，坏了，我好像忘记装卸地髓了。
E: *sigh* Darn it. I forgot to transfer the geomarrow over.

C: 滴、答…我这么笨、这么蠢、这么难看，肯定演不好钟表小子的……
E: Tick, tock... I'm so stupid, so dumb, and so ugly. I'll never play a good Clockie...

C: 我会做些力所能及的事，为小镇添砖加瓦。
E: I'll do things within my power to contribute to this town's growth.

C: 喔，对了，「星芒战幕」的关卡可不止一个，而且每种关卡都适配了三种难度——您如果感兴趣的话，不妨再多挑战几次。
E: Oh yeah, that's right — there's more than one stage in Stellar Flare, and each stage has three difficulty levels. If you want, you can keep playing it.

C: 是陷阱吧？
E: Is it a trap?

C: 「另外，这个游戏需要多人协作。为了帮你找些场外援助，我以你的名义给全空间站的人发送了邀请函，试着和大家一起合力攻克难关吧。」
E: "Also, this is a multiplayer game. So to give you some help, I used your account to send out an invitation to everyone aboard the space station. Try and see if you can conquer this challenge together with everyone's help."

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 星核猎手的事我自有打算，你就别操心了。需要你知道的时候，我自然会告诉你。
E: I have my own plans for the Stellaron Hunters, so don't worry. When I need you to know, you'll know.

C: 「对，正在屏幕那边和你实时对话。」
E: "Yep, I'm talking with you on-screen in real-time."

C: 喔？你来了啊。这次是准备收集<color=#dbc291ff>「贝洛伯格风景画」</color>，对吗？
E: Oh? Hi there. You're here to collect <color=#dbc291ff>Belobog Landscape Paintings</color>, right?

C: 哈哈哈！英雄所见略同！
E: Haha, great minds think alike.

C: 您好，我是来催稿的。
E: Hello, I'm here to chase up the commission.

C: 《黄金歌剧院》。
E: Golden Theater.

C: （这应该就是藏宝图上的物件了…把它带回去吧。）
E: (This should be the item in the treasure map... I'll bring it back.)

C: 所以，我就想到了你——听说你在下层区的人望极高，甚至连那位「史瓦罗」都愿意承认你的身份……
E: That's why I've thought of you — I heard you've made quite the name for yourself down in the Underworld, and even that Svarog is willing to sing your praises...

C: 没想到大守护者还有这样的故事……
E: I had no idea the Supreme Guardian had gone through this...

C: 空无一人的搏击俱乐部似乎也别有一番风味。但那里真会有没人的时候吗？
E: When empty, Fight Club has a different ambiance to it. But has it ever been empty?

C: 一款老式台灯，地髓能源应用于日常生活的重要标志。
E: A primitive table lamp. It is an important symbol of application of geomarrow energy to everyday life.

C: 你猜花束标本是新放进去的，真正的古董只有这个瓶子。
E: You surmise the bouquet was newly placed inside. The only antique is the bottle.

C: 家人，看破不说破嘛。
E: C'mon fam, don't point it out like this.

C: 据我所知，有不少哦！
E: From what I know, there were many!

C: 我们还是一起行动吧！
E: It's better for us to go together!

C: （就在这附近找找幽灵星槎的线索吧……）
E: (Search the clues of the phantom starskiff nearby...)

C: 同心火铃响动起来，驭空转头看向了你，眼中闪过一丝疑惑。
E: The Harmonic Chime rings, and Yukong turns her head to you, a hint of doubt flashing across her eyes.

C: 嗯，连晴霓小姐这样亲近的人都能察觉到她性情大变，多半是因为这古怪的事情吧。
E: Yeah, for someone as approachable as Miss Qingni to detect a change in her personality, it's likely due to an unnatural phenomenon.

C: 电视，在看，人类，等等。
E: TV, watching. Human, wait.

C: 哈哈哈哈，这不过是我的归乡感受罢了。
E: Haha, maybe I'm just nostalgic.

C: 那还真是挺可惜的。
E: Oh, well, that's regrettable.

C: 太好了。
E: Great!

C: 太好了，你平时有空的话，请到码头上来找我。
E: Now that that's settled, please come see me at the dock when you have time.

C: …我了解。{NICKNAME}肯出手帮助这儿，已经让我很感动了！
E: ...I understand, {NICKNAME}. But even then, it's impressive that you are willing to step up and help!

C: 你少在那里装糊涂了，这不是都怪你吗？
E: Don't feign ignorance — isn't that all by your own design?

C: 难道就不应该选择能挣钱的那一方吗？
E: Shouldn't people choose the side that can earn them money?

C: 师傅，还有什么活要做？
E: Anything else I can help you with?

C: 你对商会有什么不满吗？
E: What's your issue with the Merchant Guild?

C: 可是在公司承诺的未来里，同功坊还会存在吗？
E: But is your shop part of the future that the IPC promised?

C: 他们曾在码头上与公司代表据理力争，我看到了商会变化的可能。
E: They made a lot of good points when arguing with the IPC at the dock. I do see possibilities for the guild to change.

C: 时间能说明很多事情，年轻人。
E: There are many things that only time can tell, young one.

C: （这句话好像不太对劲……）
E: (I sense a hole in his logic...)

C: 金人巷是人的金人巷，只要人还在变化，金人巷就应该变化。
E: Aurum Alley should embrace change, as its residents do.

C: 金人巷！
E: Aurum Alley!

C: 我每次提的你又不用。
E: But you hated the ones I came up with.

C: 我的理想是将金人巷打造成「金字招牌」，一个所有人都叫得出来的名称。
E: A brand so fancy that everyone will remember it.

C: 我总不能在那个时候退缩呀，再说了，我们不是赢了嘛。
E: I couldn't have backed down, could I? Besides, we got him good.

C: 我其实也是发现码头闹事才去凑热闹的。
E: I don't blame her. I got excited when I heard people arguing at the dock... and the rest is history.

C: 嘿！就喜欢你这样的敞亮人！放心好了，等你回来，我一定不会亏待你的！
E: Hey! I like open-minded people like you! Don't worry. You'll be handsomely rewarded when you get back.

C: 仔细一看，你不是云骑士兵。
E: Wait a sec, you are no Cloud Knight!

C: 你这个人也太容易信任别人了，穿着「云骑」衣服的，难道就是「云骑」吗？
E: You are too trusting of other people. Is everyone wearing the "Cloud Knight" armor in fact a "Cloud Knight"?

C: 你尽管放心，那位不是真的云骑，神策府不会找你的麻烦，而是我雇来的「演员」。
E: Don't worry. That person wasn't a real Cloud Knight, so the Seat of Divine Foresight won't be looking for you. They were just an actor I hired.

C: 啊，刚才那个扣肉不要了，给我换成脆皮仔猪，再来点古藤百草饮，中杯。
E: Mmm, actually scrap that purple taro with pork. Give me a crispy suckling pig instead, and a medium cup of herbal tea.

C: 再加上商会无力支付租金，我方认为商会应该主动放弃码头经营权，并支付额外赔偿。
E: Coupled with the Merchant Guild's inability to pay the rent, we believe the Guild should voluntarily relinquish operating rights to the dock and pay additional compensation.

C: 呃…这…十年？二十年？{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我、我也说不上来。
E: Uh... ten years? Twenty years? Psst, {NICKNAME}, what should I say? Is twenty about right?

C: 再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
E: Besides, I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!

C: 商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
E: By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 我已经学会了机巧鸟各种情景下遭遇事故的方式，并且又从刚才的实践中采集了一些物理参数，至此，我已经彻底理解了交通事故。
E: I've mastered the various ways a cycrane encounters accidents, and collected some in situ physical parameters just now. So I now thoroughly understand traffic accidents.

C: 码头仓库已经开始积压了…快发货吧！
E: The dock's storage is starting to overflow... Hurry and start shipping!

C: 还有，刚才给你带路的那个好心人呢？人家好心给你指路，你把人家甩在后面了？还是说你把人给跟丢了，你说你，能不能有点职业道德啊……
E: Also, what about that kind-hearted person who just gave you directions? How could you just leave them behind like that? Please be more professional and don't just lose track of people like that...

C: 又腐烂又肉味的，到底是什么味儿，你能给我们先捋清楚吗？
E: "Stench of rotten meat." Can't you just tell us what exactly was in that package?

C: 目前已经很前沿了…
E: You are pretty "avant-garde" already...

C: 不过严谨那都是基础，最关键的还得是创新！从此科研领域，就要留下世玲的大名了！
E: But rigor is just the foundation. The most important thing is innovation! Henceforth, the name "Shiling" will be forever etched into the field of science!

C: （踢踹售货机）
E: (Kick the vending machine)

C: 要不…踢它两脚？
E: What if... we kick it?

C: （猛踹雪堆）
E: (Kick the Snow Drift)

C: 钥匙会放在那里？当然是最顺手的位置！这个道理看来无论在何处都很适用。
E: Where would the key be? Obviously, wherever that is the most convenient! That seems to be a universal rule.

C: 呜…不过家里也没有别的东西吃了。
E: *pouts* But then again, there's nothing else to eat in here.

C: 嗯嗯…好复杂。
E: Ah... it's so complicated.

C: 哦没错！还有这条——参与活动即可获得多份实体化的匹诺康尼美食，你可以将它直接寄给自己在其他星系的好友，让他们也体验一下梦境特色风味。
E: Oh, that's right! Here's another one — participating in the event earns you various materialized Penacony delicacies. You can have them shipped directly to your friends in other star systems, allowing them to savor the dream-inspired flavors.

C: 在某个饥寒交迫的夜晚，卖不掉酸梦糖的小女孩决定以糖果充饥，她吃了一颗又一颗，极致的酸甜让她眼前产生了幻觉：华丽的房间、温暖的壁炉、香气四溢的大餐，她忍不住向幻觉伸手，然后……
E: On a particularly cold and hungry night, the young girl who couldn't sell her Sour Dream soft candies decided to satisfy her hunger with the candies. She ate one after another, and the extreme sweetness and sourness created hallucinations before her eyes: A magnificent room, a warm fireplace, and a delicious feast. She couldn't resist reaching out to the illusion, and then—

C: 无数伟大的脱口秀都源于其表演者上台前喝下的那一小口美妙甘露——没错，今天的活动餐品正是匹诺康尼的传奇饮料，「经典苏乐达」！
E: Countless great stand-up comedy acts have been born from a small sip of divine nectar imbibed by the performer before going on stage — yes, today's featured item is Penacony's legendary drink, the Classic SoulGlad!

C: 你在干嘛？
E: What are you doing?

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 哈努老大说，这次事件是个意外，但它并不能击败我们。
E: Boss Hanu said this was an accident, and it couldn't defeat us.

C: 我好像收到了你的短信…
E: I got a message from you...

C: 这些积木是怎么来的？
E: Where did these building blocks come from?

C: 滴答，好的，祝您在梦里玩的开心！
E: Tick-tock, okay! I wish you a wonderful time in the dream!

C: 正义的化身降临在了梦境。
E: The avatar of righteousness has descended unto this Dreamscape.

C: 脑补的部分太多了。
E: You've filled in a few too many blanks.

C: 您看上去好像还很精神…真佩服您的体质。
E: You, on the other hand, look refreshed as all heck... I'm impressed by your constitution.

C: 直接说正事吧。
E: Let's cut to the chase.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！奇迹的复活！
E: Whoa whoa whoa! I've been miraculously revived!

C: 不少吗？我原本就无依无靠，好不容易找到个安稳的地方，现在还要欺负我……
E: What a world. I had nowhere to go, and now that I've finally found a peaceful place, they want to bully me...

C: 汪汪！我先去做准备！调查舒翁可能会在的地方哇！
E: Woof! Let me make some preparations and figure out where Siobhan might be!

C: 另外，答应的我的事…会做到的吧？对吧对吧？
E: Besides, you will fulfill... what you promised me, right? Right?

C: 你的关注点总能是这么奇怪吗？别在意这么多啦～
E: Do you always fixate on the strange things? Never mind these trivial details~

C: ——还有比这更棒的「银河强手棋」吗？
E: ...There's a better version of Cosmodyssey than this?

C: 这是玛姬寄给你的「银河强手棋（没有奖励版）」。它果真没有奖励吗？也许只是玛姬希望你玩桌游时别有太多的负担——喜欢就玩，累了就休息！
E: This is prizeless version of Cosmodyssey that Mag mailed to you. Does it really have no rewards? Maybe Mag hoped that you could play a board game without any stakes — play it if you like it, take a break if you're tired!

C: 一个肉体已经死掉，但意识还活在梦里的罪人。
E: A criminal whose body's long moved on but his mind's still kicking in the dream.

C: 哦，瞧瞧我最强大的好伙计——刀枪不入的「钢铁鳄鱼」！
E: Oh behold! My strongest buddy — the invulnerable Steely Gator!

C: …那我就要被艾迪恩先生开除了！
E: ...Then I'd be fired by Mr. Aideen!

C: 对了，您不要太在意刚刚那位女士的话，我们只是碰上了一点…小小的经费问题，克劳克影业不会这么轻易就被打垮的——呃，应该不会。
E: By the way, please don't mind what the lady said just now. We're just having a... minor budget issue. Clock Studios will never go under that easily... I think.

C: 宾客，为了钟表小子的未来，如果您有「钟表匠」的消息或<color=#dbc291ff>了解「钟表匠」故事的人</color>，请一定要告知我们！
E: So, dear guest, for Clockie's future, please keep us posted if you know anything about the Watchmaker's whereabouts or someone who's <color=#dbc291ff>familiar with his story</color>!

C: 真的，不骗你。
E: I'm telling the truth.

C: 我不太了解，祝你好运。
E: I don't really know. Good luck.

C: 在票房的资金支持下，隐夜鸫彻夜施工，「虚无」的气息逐渐从天空中消散了……
E: Supported by the box office's earnings, the Nightingales work through the night, and the Nihility's miasma gradually fades from the sky...

C: 影城的修复也快要完成了，相信我们马上就可以在这个大荧幕上播放《美梦往事》的故事了，想想就令人高兴！
E: The refurbishment of the theme park is also close to completion. I believe we'll be able to play Dreamjoy Memoir on the big screen soon. I'm excited already just imagining it!

C: 贵客……
E: My distinguished guest...

C: 「但美梦必须向前开拓，也必须向后回望——所以我提起了笔，让从小陪我长大的老朋友来保留，保留这些珍贵的『 记忆』。」
E: "However, a pleasant dream must always move forward in a trail of blazing flame and look back. And so, I put my pen to paper and rely on my childhood friends to keep these precious memories for me."

C: 现在想来，我们那时原来是在铭刻匹诺康尼的历史…我理解「钟表匠」先生为什么要隐瞒这一切了，如果大家都抱着这样的压力创作，作品又怎能带来这么多的欢乐？
E: Now that I think about it, we were actually engraving the history of Penacony... I understand why Mr. Watchmaker chose to hide it from everyone. After all, how could the creation of this work bring so much joy if everyone was under such pressure to create it?

C: 这就完事了？
E: That's it?

C: 算下来一共花费…不行，预算超了，哪里还能调整一下……
E: So the sum of expenses is... No no, we've exceeded our budget. Where can I shift things around...

C: 「哈努兄弟，你准备好了吗？」
E: "Brother Hanu, are you ready?"

C: 「此处的守卫被完美击退！不愧是美梦小镇的英雄，哈努兄弟！」
E: "The guards here have retreated! All thanks to the worthy hero of the Dreamville, Brother Hanu!"

C: 或者…是那瓶最最传统，但也最受欢迎的「经典苏乐达」啾？
E: Or maybe... It's the most classic, yet loved by all, the Classic SoulGlad, tweet?

C: 好嘞，演员到齐，咱们开拍！
E: Okay, actors at the ready, let's roll!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>差强人意</color>吧。这个镜头过了。这场还有一个镜头。
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>Could be better</color>. This scene is over. There's another scene coming up.

C: 谢谢导演，我可以继续打盹了——这份故事送给您了啾！
E: Thank you, director. I can continue my nap now — here's the story for you!

C: 你先别急。
E: Hold your horses.

C: 「银河中充满危险，也充满了奇遇。某日，一位小小的勇者踏出家乡，前往征服群星的道路…」
E: "The cosmos is full of danger and adventure. One day, a teeny hero left their home world to conquer the stars..."

C: 这是什么情况？
E: What is happening?

C: 时间紧急，我们边走边吃吧！
E: Time is of the essence. Let's eat while we walk!

C: 虽然通过了考验，但我们还是快走吧…星核要紧。
E: We've passed the test, but we ought to hurry up... The Stellaron is at stake.

C: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然倒下了！各位，快快回到战场，向恶棍们复仇吧！
E: Oh no, the not-so-unstoppable Hanu has actually fallen! Quickly, return to the battlefield and seek revenge against the bad guys!

C: 怎么回事，终点怎么一个人都没有…你看，那里好像放了一盘录像带？
E: What's wrong? Why is there no one at the finishing line... Look. It looks like there's a tape there?

C: 你是最终BOSS？
E: So, you're the final boss?

C: 你不该把它留在这里。
E: You shouldn't have kept it here.

C: 你说得对…还有更重要的事情等着我们。
E: You're right... There are more important matters waiting for us.

C: 我游走于每个文明湮灭的瞬间，循迹无数灭亡世界的讯息。而爱德华医生则更看重这些来自踪迹带来的…「商业价值」。
E: I travel between civilizations at the moment of their obliteration and track down intelligence from countless annihilated worlds. As for Dr. Edward, he attaches more importance to the... "commercial value" of these traces.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 在刚才的某个瞬间，我确实地捕捉到了祂的呢喃。祂说，你{RUBY_B#已}将{RUBY_E#}与祂同行。就在{RUBY_B#不远的过去}不久的将来{RUBY_E#}。
E: At some point in time earlier, I definitely caught THEIR murmuring. THEY said you {RUBY_B#had joined}would join{RUBY_E#} THEM in THEIR journey {RUBY_B#not too long ago}in the near future{RUBY_E#}.

C: 当然，它现在的名字，应该是—— 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号。
E: But of course, its current name is — The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 既然三月小姐已经到位，那我们就开始今日的教学吧。
E: Alright, now that you're in position, Miss March, let's get this lesson started.

C: 哈——？！噢，真是吓死我了！大侠您莫不是想用这对小铁片子来取我性命吧？
E: Huh...? Oh, that really scares me! Come on, you're not seriously trying to take my life with that piece of... scrap metal, are you?

C: 误服灵丹妙药？
E: Accidentally consume a divine elixir?

C: 你看，连三月七也嫌你唠叨。
E: See? Even March is getting bored of your rambling.

C: 他做得很周全，早早联系了地衡司，提交了「武术交流活动」的审批…还将比斗地点选在金人巷，看来那里与他也算是颇有渊源吧。
E: He's made thorough preparations, contacting the Realm-Keeping Commission and getting approval for a "martial arts exchange event"... He even chose Aurum Alley as the venue. Seems like he has some connections there.

C: 呜呜，呜……
E: Wooh, woooh...

C: 你…你怎么这么突然！
E: Wh—Why are you being so blunt?

C: 那个汤里有泻药。
E: There was a laxative in that soup.

C: 对吧？就算彦卿师父说这剑器里暗藏有助于切割的机关…但它真的能切开敌人的机甲吗？
E: Right? Even if Master Yanqing says there's a mechanism in this sword that helps with cutting... can it really slice through a mech?

C: 但是，请别担心，我能帮助您获得胜利，因为我更厉害。
E: But please don't worry. I'll help you secure the victory because I actually am amazing.

C: 那多没仪式感啊！我不但要写信，还要手写！这样别人才知道我真的在仙舟～
E: That lacks a sense of propriety! I'm not just writing a letter. I'm writing a handwritten letter! I've gotta show them I'm really on the Xianzhou!

C: 你们看，虽然斯科特会道歉，但他是真心实意地感到愧疚吗？
E: Well, here's the thing. Even if Skott apologizes, do you think he'd actually feel sorry for what he did?
Huh!?

C: 斯科特，选择权就在你手上。
E: Yes, Skott. You do have a choice.

C: 咱们上次见面时约好的，鄙人会带来你想要的药，你可千万不能拒绝呀……
E: We agreed in our previous meeting that I would bring you the medicine you requested, please do not refuse...

C: 你当着椒丘和三月七的面，将瓶中的「赤龙血」一饮而尽。
E: You drink the Crimson Dragon Blood in one swig in front of Jiaoqiu and March 7th.

C: 仇恨、委屈、嫉妒、耻辱…人类有太多复杂的情绪，怎么可能用「你打败我，我打败你」的方式就轻易解决了呢？要是「打斗」能解决一切，现实就没那么多烦恼了。
E: Vengeance, grievances, envy, shame... Humans have many complicated emotions. Do you really think things in the real world are as simple as "I defeat you, you defeat me"? If "fighting" could resolve everything, there would be nowhere near as many worries in the real world.

C: 别别别！早些整理完书目，我们四个凑一桌打牌好了。
E: No, no, please don't! Let's just get these books sorted, and we can all play a nice game of jade together.

C: 灵砂大人，这就是拯救书中故事的方法！
E: Master Lingsha, this is how I can rescue their story!

C: 我打算从长生种的离散忆质开始研究，进一步拓展心理治疗。也许总有一天，我能破解仙舟人所谓魔阴身的秘密。
