E: I plan to begin by studying the scattered memoria of long-life species to broaden the study of psychological therapy. Perhaps there will come a day when I will be able to unveil the secret behind what the Xianzhou people call the "mara-struck."

C: 我买了回匹诺康尼的船票，在登舰前还会在罗浮待上一段时间。你可以随时找我。
E: I've bought a ship ticket back to Penacony, but I will be around the Luofu for a while before I return. You can come and see me whenever you like.

C: 我会对你负起责任的！
E: I will take responsibility!

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了三月七的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains March 7th's Magic of Friendship.

C: （向桑博购买「友谊凭证」）
E: (Buy Proof of Friendship from Sampo)

C: 你为什么想来参加演武仪典？
E: Why did you want to participate in the Wardance?

C: 我是跟踪报道卢卡选手的记者。没事，你们正常对话就好，不用管我。我在拍摄素材。
E: I'm the journalist who's reporting on Luka. It's fine. J—Just chat like you always do and ignore me. I'm just snapping shots for material.

C: 如果云骑失败，会让小桂子失望。如果云骑获胜，会让贝洛伯格的朋友们失望。总而言之这世上一定会有人失望的！欢迎来到，残酷的输赢世界！
E: If the Cloud Knights fail, Lil Gui will be disappointed. If the Cloud Knights win, our friends from Belobog will be disappointed. No matter the ending, disappointment inevitably awaits one party. Welcome to the cruel world of competition!

C: 接下来这场比赛是关键比赛，而且这位对手…算是老相识。
E: The next match is gonna be crucial, and my opponent is... I guess you can call her an old acquaintance.

C: 其实没亲眼见过。但贝洛伯格应该没有人不知道她吧？
E: Never met her in the flesh. But who in Belobog wouldn't know of her?

C: 看，玲可在那里。我们快点去找她吧。
E: Look, Lynx is over there. Quick, let's go see her.

C: 不行！你们不能走！
E: Nooooo! You guys can't leave!

C: 我一看，这不是玉兆嘛…还是好几百年前的旧型号。出于好奇心，我就包揽了复原数据的活儿。
E: At first glance, I knew it was a jade abacus... and an old model from centuries ago too. Out of curiosity, I accepted the job to restore the data inside it.

C: 远渡异乡，有些不适应是正常不过的事。有需要帮忙的尽管开口。对了，你从哪儿来呀？
E: It's normal to feel a little uncomfortable when you're so far from home. If you need any help, just ask. So where are you from?

C: …冷锋，真是个有着冷酷名字的好人啊。
E: ...Lengfeng, now that's a really cool name, for such a cool person!

C: 恐怕这位金人先生是对的，你们收到了一封迟到四百年的邀请函。
E: I'm afraid this aurumaton is right. You received an invitation that is four hundred years late.

C: （波提欧…公司通缉重犯…当着卡美丽小姐的面我有点不好意思说，但…感觉「公司通缉重犯」还真不一定是坏人。）
E: (Boothill... a fugitive wanted by the IPC... I'd hate to say it in front of Miss Carmella, but... I have a feeling this "wanted criminal" might not actually be such a bad guy.)

C: 一定要小心哦！
E: Be careful!

C: 谁叫老子耳根子软呢？
E: You're lucky I'm a big softie on the inside.

C: 贝洛伯格太可怜了！
E: My heart breaks for Belobog!

C: 明白了。我一定会全力以赴的！
E: Got it. I'll do whatever it takes!

C: 压力真大啊，在景元将军面前，我可不能丢了贝洛伯格的脸面！我感觉自己的心脏快从嗓子眼里蹦出来了！
E: This is so stressful. I can't embarrass Belobog in front of General Jing Yuan! I feel like my heart is about to burst out of my throat!

C: 哎呀，不会的！他宝贝的把我当什么人了！
E: Come on now, that ain't gonna happen! Diggity fudge, what kinda man do you take me for?

C: 真是令人热泪盈眶的一场对决！
E: Such a moving battle!

C: 片刻之后，神策府中。
E: Moments later, at the Seat of Divine Foresight

C: 伊戈尔…真是令人怀念的名字啊。我认得他，不，不该说认得。我永远记得他。你和他，真像啊。
E: Igor... what a nostalgic name. I know him, actually, I should say I will always remember him. You and he are two of a kind.

C: 此时此刻，贝洛伯格的竞技场中。
E: Right now, in the Belobog arena...

C: 你为了和我谈上十分钟，拒绝了所有奖金和奖品。那么在离开的时候，请至少带上我最真诚的祝愿吧！
E: You turned down the prizes and rewards you could have had just to talk to me for <unbreak>10</unbreak> minutes. Please at least take my sincerest wishes with you when you leave!

C: 你否认无济于事，因为答案不言自明。
E: Your denial is of no use, because the answer speaks for itself.

C: 驮那师父，要我说，何必在冰冷的金属上浪费时间。机器终究只是机器，哪怕能与人交谈得再流畅，也不可能理解对方的思想。
E: Master Dhyana, why're we wasting time on lifeless metal? Machines will always just be that — we'll never be able to understand each other no matter how fluently they speak our tongues.

C: 我诊断了所有的程序，也没能找到任何可量化的系统升级。
E: I ran diagnostics across all programs, but was unable to find any quantifiable system upgrades.

C: 希望奢摩小姐的等待不会太久。
E: I hope that Miss Samatha won't have to wait long.

C: （查看「罗浮体育报」）
E: (Check Luofu Sports Illustrated)

C: 看来大家都很关注卢卡的决赛，我们一定要拿出最好的状态。
E: It looks like there are a lot of people keeping an eye out for Luka's final. We have to make sure he's in top condition!

C: 比我想象中还神奇！
E: It's more amazing than I thought!

C: （目光表示感谢）
E: (Give an appreciative look)

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 对不起，扑满们，我没能带你们赢得胜利……
E: Sorry, my Trotters. I was unable to bring you guys a win...

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 呃…你是植物吗？我看你不是和我一样的人类吗？
E: Err... You're a plant? I thought you were human, just like me?

C: 行吧…祝你早日如愿成为植物吧……
E: All right... I hope you'll get your wish and grow up to be a plant soon...

C: （表达积极的情绪）
E: (Express positivity)

C: 嘿嘿，卢卡选手值得咱这么卖力。
E: Heh-heh, Luka is someone who's worth our efforts.

C: 真的有那么高的人气吗？
E: Is he really that popular?

C: 银枝不是那种人…
E: Argenti is not that type of person...

C: 我也没想到自己有当教练的天赋，如果有选手信任我，我当然乐意帮助。
E: I also never thought I'd have the talent for coaching. If a fighter trusts me, I'd of course be more than willing to assist.

C: 史瓦罗选手老了…
E: Svarog is getting old...

C: 给他们诏安了嘛！
E: Easy, we made 'em an official offer they couldn't refuse!

C: 我先撤了，你慢慢玩吧。希望你喜欢这次的谜题设计。
E: I'm off, have fun. Hope you liked the design of this puzzle.

C: 没错！你就是货真价实的亚军！
E: That's right! You're a bona fide runner-up!

C: 打通这关就下线。
E: Just one more level...

C: 这幅涂鸦的形状好特别，究竟是谁画的，有什么含义呢？
E: This graffiti art is so unique. Who did it? What does it mean?

C: …怎么还是猴友啊？
E: ...Why are we still dealing with monkey friends?

C: 哼哼哼，跟不上潮流了吧？现在舞台上的忍者都需要一副名为「虚偃」的伪装，修行「虚偃•拟观幻术」的社团就是「观忍社」！
E: Heh-heh-heh, not keeping up with the times, eh? All ninja on stage all need a Void Disguise these days, and the society that trains in the Void Pseudo-Watch-jutsu is the Ninja Appreciation Society!

C: …你真的会吗？
E: ...Will you really?

C: 就是…我们团队的情况你也清楚，事情走到这步，谁都没办法对吧。
E: Mm... you're clear on our band's situation. I guess there's no right party when the matter has gotten this out of hand.

C: 呼——久等了，新的音律•忍法已经创作完成，是在下的得意之作，绝不会出差错。
E: Phew, thank you for waiting. The new Sound Release ninjutsu composition is complete. It's my proud creation, and there will be no mistakes.

C: 好、好多人啊……
E: S—So many people...

C: 所以盛会巨星不用有压力，按自己的想法尽情去演出就好啦！
E: So please don't be pressured, Festive Superstar! Just go with your gut and play your hearts out!

C: 乱破大人的惊喜登场，各位乐队成员的即兴演奏，还有盛会巨星和学院代表的对峙…现在可都是学校里的热门话题，相当有人气！
E: Lady Rappa's surprise reveal, everyone else's freestyling, and the showdown between the Festive Superstar and the academy's representative... It's spread across the school like wildfire, and everyone on campus can't stop talking about it!

C: 按以往的经验来看，音乐派对会和彩梦校庆同步结束。但要求延长举办时间的呼声也一直存在，所以这次究竟要办多久，谁都说不准。
E: According to past experience, the music party and the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration will end at the same time. But there are people who are constantly asking for the event time to be extended. No one really knows for sure how long this will last.

C: 像这次，由学院外的同学…就是盛会巨星和乱破大人来主导乐队的情况还是头一回，所以才格外地有意思！
E: But this time, having students from outside the academies... having Rappa and the Festive Superstar directing the band is the first of its kind, so it's kinda special!

C: 嘶嘶！
E: Zzzttzzzt!

C: 上次的演出…很开心。
E: You were... so happy at the last performance.

C: 音乐派对是折纸大学的重要庆典，谐乐学院有全程监修的义务。
E: The music party is an important ceremony for Paperfold University. Charmony Academy has a duty to oversee the entire process.

C: 开始新的生活吧！
E: It's time for your new life!

C: 要我说啊，这种莫名其妙的乐队就该早点解散，别在这瞎闹腾，最后坏了折纸大学的名声！
E: If you ask me, this kind of nonsense band should have broken up a long time ago. Quit wasting time messing around, or you'll only end up damaging the reputation of Paperfold University!

C: 垃圾桶？哪里跑来的脏东西，这不是你们该来的地方，滚出去！
E: Trashcans? Where did these dirty things come from? This is not a place you should be loitering in. Get lost!

C: 家人慢走，明天还来啊！
E: Take care, friend. Come back tomorrow!

C: 也没必要瞒着，老桑博最近见了几位朋友，想再聚一次喝上几杯。还记得我们聊到的那座酒馆吗？其实哪里都一样啊，吧台上不缺酒水，只缺故事。
E: I have nothing to hide anyway. I met a few friends recently for a few drinks. Remember that tavern we talked about? It's all the same everywhere — there's never a lack of booze at bar tops, only stories.

C: 真是个功利的答案。
E: What a pragmatic answer.

C: 比起赌约，我还是更希望能和你们一起好好完成晨练计划。
E: Instead of a bet, I'd much rather you all properly finish the morning training plan for once.

C: 竟然与星核猎手勾结，欺负天真可爱的小三月，太坏了！
E: Consorting with a Stellaron Hunter to gang up on my innocent and adorable self, you're a total villain!

C: 列车长，还是把这种历史文物放进收藏柜吧…是时候购置些更高效的清洁设备了。
E: Conductor, best to retire this historical relic to the storage closet... It's time to procure some more effective cleaning tools.

C: 喔！这些绿植最近变得无精打采，终于让列车长找到原因了帕！
E: Oh! So that's why these plants have been all gloom-and-doom lately. I've finally found it!

C: 怎么进入睡眠模式了…这到底是怎么设置的？
E: Why did it enter sleep mode... How exactly was it set up?

C: 只要把冰淇淋全部吃光，不就万事大吉了？
E: Won't this disaster be averted if we eat all the ice cream?

C: 哎呀，急什么，会帮你的啦！让我看看——什么嘛！这不是病毒，而是知识库默认启用的「个性化推荐」功能。
E: Gosh, what's the hurry, of course I will! Let's see... Is this it? It's not a virus at all — the knowledge bank has just activated its Personalized Recommendations by default.

C: 列车组与那艘舰船建立了通讯，开始询问货品内容与价格。
E: The Express crew establishes comms with that ship and starts inquiring about the goods catalog and prices.

C: 快开始抽身份牌吧。对这种游戏，我还是很有自信的。
E: Hurry up and pick your role cards. I'm pretty confident in games like these.

C: 倒计时结束后死一般的寂静里，你们面面相觑，在彼此的眼睛里看到的唯有绝望。
E: After the countdown ends, in the deathly silence, you gaze at one another — there is only singular despair etched in everyone's eyes.

C: 运输鼻行兽的货船一旦出了什么差池，很可能会对临近的生态圈造成灾难性影响。
E: If anything goes wrong with the freight skiff that's transporting the Nosewalkers, it may have a catastrophic impact on the surrounding ecosystems.

C: 人类曾有过这样的时代：笃信于自己的摹本，并将之奉上神坛。
E: Mankind once lived through such a time: Devoutly believing in their own imitations, and offering them to the divine altar.

C: 敬爱的列车长，请问列车上为什么有一位锅盖头的…同行？难道大家已经吃腻了我做的饭吗！
E: Beloved conductor, may I ask why the Express has a... lid-headed comrade? Is it because everyone is tired of my offerings!?

C: 劝你别对其他折纸小鸟这样「啾啾」。
E: It's best if you don't tweet like that at other Origami Birds.

C: 还有其他需要调整的吗？
E: Is there anything else you need adjusted?

C: 「拉帝奥教授（左三）」。
E: Professor Ratio (third from left).

C: 「真实商战」。
E: "Real-life Trade War."

C: 就拿今天的课题来说吧，你要拍「古都雅韵」，就不能只拍长乐天的黛瓦白墙，不能只拍金人巷的万家烟火，不能只拍流云渡的千帆竞发……
E: Take today's task for example: You have to photograph "Stately Antiquity," so you can't just shoot the dark-tiled white walls of the Exalting Sanctum, nor the billowing smoke of Aurum Alley, nor the numerous competitions going on at Cloudford...

C: 远处悉悉索索的声音逐渐靠近。来人看到了你们，明显长松一口气。
E: Distant rustling sounds gradually creep closer. Upon seeing you, the person sighs a visible relief.

C: 藿藿，看镜头！
E: Huohuo, look at the camera!

C: （尖叫）（扭曲）（阴暗爬行）
E: (Screeching) (Twisting) (Creeping)

C: 什么什么？
E: What? Till what?

C: 邀请列车组的家人们！
E: Invite the Express family!

C: 呜呜呜…我就知道，你也打心底里忌讳与我同行，视我如厄运一般。
E: *sobbing* ...I knew it. Deep down, you're also unwilling to travel with me and see me as some walking misfortune.

C: 呜呜呜…看来他们说的都是真的……
E: *sniffles* Looks like they're telling the truth...

C: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一颗勇者心脏的跳动得以被闻见：
E: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and the beating of a warrior's heart can be heard:

C: 嗷呜！嗷呜嗷呜！
E: Ah! Awoo awoo!

C: 我就纳闷了，为什么别的小队都像模像样的，你们就是啥都干不好呢？没用，给人看笑话，还挂在我名下，丢我的脸！
E: I'm just vexed as to why you're all such slackers compared to other squads that're role models? Useless and making fools of yourselves, and dragging my good name through the mud too!

C: 我最瞧不起虐待动物的人了！
E: I utterly disdain those who abuse animals!

C: 正是如此。我的称号是「职业经理」，拥有极其丰富的工作经验，在实践中也沉淀了一套属于自己的方法论，与许多不同的奇美拉合作过，尤其擅长团队协同。
E: That is correct. My title is "professional manager," and I have ample work experience, having developed my own unique methodology in the practical arena. I've also worked with different chimeras before, especially excelling at teamwork coordination.

C: 你知道的，{NICKNAME}是我的领导，这家伙强得不可思议。
E: You know, {NICKNAME} is my boss. That one is incredibly strong.

C: ——消灭人类暴政，花园属于奇美拉！
E: ...And annihilate human tyranny! The Garden belongs to the chimeras!

C: 你们是怎么交流的？
E: How'd you guys communicate?

C: 好可爱…好想带回家！
E: So cute... I want to take it home!

C: 放假！下班！您就是世界上最好的管理员嗷呜，蹭蹭——
E: Holiday! Finishing work! You're the best administrator in the world, awoo! *rub rub*

C: 比我预想的还要快…只不过，「命途」、「祝福」、「方程」，你用来解读泰坦的方式，实在有些别致。
E: It is much more rapid than I anticipated... but Paths, Blessings, Equations — how you interpret the Titans are indeed unconventional.

C: （现在是什么情况？去看看吧。）
E: (What's happening? I should take a look.)

C: 我偏要回头！
E: I will turn around!

C: 桀桀，小海豹的黑化都是一瞬间的事，没有过程！
E: Hehehe, there was none! Turning to the dark side requires no more than a momentary embrace!

C: 不止，你看它。
E: That's not all. Look at this.

C: 尽管本场决赛的冠军不会拿到「金海豹杯」，但我从现场观众的热情能看出，胜利本身就是最好的奖品！
E: Though there's no Gold Seal Cup waiting for the winner of this particular match, the crowd's excitement proves victory alone is the ultimate reward!

C: …千年来，我与吾师相伴时间更多，总能互相看顾。而你，赛法利娅，消失了那么久，我总得想些办法，搞清楚你是否也承受着心力磨损的苦楚……
E: ...In my thousand years, I've spent a long time with my teacher, taking care of one another. Yet, Cifera, you've disappeared for a long time. I had to find a way to figure out if you were also suffering as your spirit wore away.

C: 哎，什么情况？你给我干哪儿来了，这还是我的浴宫吗？
E: Huh, what's going on? Where did you take me? Is this still my bath chamber?

C: …不可以。
达利安选手！这不是正中下怀了吗？
E: Dorian! Isn't this just what they were hoping for?

C: 一番心理建设后，你将预言梦的全程讲了出来…然而，你并没有变成一只小海豹。
E: After some mental preparation, you explained the entire process of the prophetic dream... Yet, you didn't transform into a baby seal.

C: （竟然无事发生…）
E: (And... nothing happened...)

C: 你都收了缇宝的钱了…
E: Since you took Tribbie's payment anyway...

C: 大家好，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: Hello, everyone. I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: …我早就觉得赛飞儿很可疑了。
E: ...I've long suspected that Cipher was suspicious.

C: …喂喂，信号测试，一二三四五六七——哦哦，有画面了！看来星际和平物流还是靠谱的，回头得给他们点个赞。
E: ...Testing, testing, one two three four five six seven — oh nice, video's working! Looks like Interastral Peace Express really knows their stuff. Definitely giving them a thumbs up.

C: 游戏的试玩包就在这台机器里。它搭载着新款脑波系统，能让你全身心地投入虚拟世界…硬件方面已经做到最好了。
E: The game's demo package is in this device. It uses cutting-edge brainwave tech for full virtual immersion... Hardware-wise, it's the best you can get.

C: 不过这取决于游戏的销量与口碑——毕竟我是个商人，而你也清楚，在梦境里进行开发的费用可是极为高昂。
E: But that all depends on the sales and reception — after all, I'm a businessman, and you know how expensive it is to develop in the Dreamscape.

C: 还好您总算来了，我这就去宣布比赛正式开始！
E: Thankfully, you've showed up! I'll announce the official start of the race right away!

C: …刚刚是佩佩开车？
E: ...Was that Peppy driving just now?

C: 那是啊，长得好看真的了不起，您真好看！
E: Exactly! Being good-looking sometimes does give you privileges. You've got it!

C: 您准备好了请告诉我——
E: Let me know when you're ready—

C: 挺开心的，作为对手还算不错。
E: I had a great time, you're quite a decent opponent.

C: 「折纸小鸟对对碰•元祖店」的施工十分顺利，你刚进匹配界面，便已完工了。
E: The "Origami Bird Clash: Original Shop" construction finished in record time — by the time you entered the matchmaking screen, everything was already done.

C: …各位请看，给你们介绍一下我在匹诺康尼认识的「新、朋、友」——幽灵小鸟。
E: Folks, meet my "new best friend," whom I got to know in Penacony — the Ghost Bird.

C: 注意你的言辞，波提欧兄弟。根据我的观察，咱们和青雀女士的对局，只是在给她续命。
E: Mind your language, Boothill. As far as I can tell, our games with Miss Qingque are just keeping her alive, not solving the problem.

C: 此次破除咒法之胜负，必须遵循公平公义之忍道，不义之人叛誓必将吞下千枚银针！
E: For this contest to break the curse, we shall uphold the just and honorable way of the ninja. Should one betray the vow, a thousand silver needles shall be swallowed in penance!

C: 亏你还是捉鬼小队一员，老子我教教你，打游戏也可以是赛博捉鬼。
E: And you call yourself part of the ghost-hunting squad? Let me show you — gaming can be cyber ghostbusting!

C: 自己犯下的错自己弥补，在下支持球棒•忍者的决定。
E: You have to clean up the mess you made. I support Baseball Bat Ninja's decision.

C: 在能够和星际和平公司平起平坐的宇宙一大势力里，它坐前十把交椅。
E: It holds one of the ten highest positions in a cosmic power that can go toe-to-toe with the Interastral Peace Corporation.

C: 你先按这个配方调一杯试试吧，让我瞧瞧你的手艺。
E: Why don't you try mixing one according to this recipe? I want to see your skills firsthand.

C: 哈哈，这是什么，饮用前的助兴环节？我是不是应该笑一下？
E: Hah, what's this supposed to be? Some pre-drink entertainment? Should I pretend that was funny?

C: （这个调饮配方，或许还有发掘的空间……）
E: (This recipe might have more potential to explore...)

C: 黑塔人偶抿了一口调饮。
E: The Herta puppet took a sip of the drink.

C: （调饮的时候手抖了一下，现在它能让饮用者的人格<color=#dbc291ff>完全反转</color>…应该不会出大问题吧？）
E: (My hand trembled a little during the mixing. Now this drink causes a <color=#dbc291ff>complete personality reversal</color>... Hopefully it won't cause anything serious?)

C: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
E: All set up and ready to open!

C: 你喝下调饮，突然间眼前一黑。
E: You take a sip... and everything goes black.

C: 苏乐达。
E: SoulGlad.

C: 回答正确。你得一分。
E: Correct answer. You get one point.

C: 记住了，酒馆可是愚者的地盘，下回有什么好玩的，一定要先通知我！
E: Just remember: This tavern belongs to the Fools. If anything fun's going on, I better be the first to know!

C: 说起来奇怪…我已经很少考虑「为什么」。当命运把缘由和结果的间距拉长到匪夷所思的尺度，「为什么」就成了一个苍白无力的问题。
E: Funny thing... I've stopped thinking about "why." When destiny stretches the space between cause and effect to something absurd, "why" loses all meaning.

C: 时间不等人，咱们现在就出发吧？
E: Time waits for nobody. Shall we set off now?

C: 您且当它存在吧！
E: Just pretend it does!

C: 好一个MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型，人如其名一望即知有多强！好名字！
E: What a great MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> model — just as its name suggests, it's an upgrade. A splendid name!

C: 「面对来势汹汹的敌人，{NICKNAME}气运丹田，大喝一声——」
E: "Faced with the advancing enemy, {NICKNAME} concentrated all {F#her}{M#his} qi to {F#her}{M#his} Core Radix, as {F#she}{M#he} shouted —"

C: 虽然出生不足一炷香，但龙尊却不愧是持明尊长，回了一声「不客气」，大战就此展开——
E: Despite being mere minutes old, the new high elder was nevertheless the high elder of the Vidyadhara, and responded, "You're welcome" as the battle began—

C: 结果如何？龙师们所托非人，持明族陷于浩劫！哈哈哈哈，这都是他们应得的果报！
E: How did things end up? The Preceptors got the wrong person and plunged the Vidyadhara into crisis! Haha, that was exactly what they deserved!

C: 呃…还有一点尾声、后日谈什么的，暂时还没想好怎么写，但主线部分确实就到此结束了。
E: Er... There's still a coda, an epilogue that comes afterward. I haven't figured out exactly how it goes, but the main plot indeed reaches its conclusion here.

C: 器皿中的种子缓缓长开，无数细枝又千丝万缕地汇成一线，如有巧手将它织成剑柄的形状。
E: The seed in the vessel gradually sprout and countless twigs converged into one, as if an invisible hand was weaving it into the shape of a hilt.

C: 说时迟，那时快，正当{NICKNAME}与丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝欲深入炉鼎，起出熔金时，一众身影拦住去路。
E: No sooner said than done, just as {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe were about to dive into the elixir cauldron and unearth the Ignis Aureliae, a group of figures blocked their path.

C: 您老息怒，这位贵客打救罗浮，自是不同于凡庸之辈，身上是带些个傲气的。
E: It's ok, my old friend. This esteemed guest has rescued the Luofu, and naturally, {F#she}{M#he} is no ordinary layperson. After all, all heroes have a bit of an ego.

C: 「面对前所未有的强敌，开拓者与持明龙尊的命运，究竟会走向何方呢？下一折便是最终决战——『仙舟民同悲万古尘，开拓者星落长乐天』！」
E: "Faced with an enemy of unprecedented power, what will become of the Trailblazer and the high elder of the Vidyadhara? The next scene is our final decisive battle: Xianzhou Laments Woes of Age, Trailblazer Fails Sanctum of Exaltation!"

C: 西衍先生开始奋笔疾书，这次他写得眉飞色舞…大概是因为被相中了版权，心情特别好吧。
E: Mr. Xiyan begins scribbling furiously, and this time he radiates with delight... He's probably in such good spirits because he's managed to get some cash from this IP.

C: 要不就录刚才这段吧！
E: How about I record the crosstalk improv you just had?

C: 好说好说，方才是即兴演出，我们定会给您一个答复。
E: Don't worry. We were just improvising, and you'll get an answer from us soon.

C: 是啊是啊，我也觉得。
E: I gotta say, sounds pretty cool.

C: 说了这么多，可以先让我们实际体验一下这个游戏嘛？只是听你嘴上介绍，我还是有点摸不着头脑欸。
E: You've been explaining a lot about the venue, but I'm still confused about the game. Can we actually give it a go?

C: 他们还说什么了吗——比如，和「托帕」相关的事？
E: Didn't they mention something else? "Topaz"?

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 只要用以太硬币读取这些芯片，你们就可以为以太灵附装各种各样的技能了——事不宜迟，我们现在就试试看吧。
E: You can use your Aether Coin to read the data on these chips. They allow your Aether Spirits to equip various abilities. Why not give them a go right now?

C: 好久不见，外来者——还有希露瓦和…情报官大人！
E: Good to see you outsider, S—Serval, Pel— I—I mean, Intelligence Officer!

C: 等等，这个台词…咱俩不会出事吧？
E: Uh... I hope we haven't just jinxed ourselves.

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢佩拉，我们一定会的。
E: Hehe, thanks Pela — we'll do our best!

C: 真的很好玩吗…
E: Huh... Really...?

C: 哈，是{NICKNAME}和三月小姐！没想到能在这里见到二位。
E: Aha, it's always a pleasure to bump into you, trailblazers. I didn't expect to see you here.

C: 这款游戏是这样的——上手容易精通难哪。
E: It's been said that this game is easy to pick up, but difficult to master!

C: 感觉…很可能是这个意思。难道他确信这位玩家一定会和我们照面吗？
E: Yeah... you could be right about that. Is he convinced we'll run into the elusive "elite player," or something?

C: 竟然连输了三次…好讨厌的感觉——！
E: Three times... It's not FAIR!

C: 你还挺懂我的嘛。没准我们会有不少共同语言呢。
E: You've got me pretty figured out. Who knows, we might just have more in common than you expect.

C: 星核小鬼——粉毛的小矮子——
E: You there, Stellaron twerp and little miss pink...

C: 哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink!

C: 看，这里也有<color=#dbc291ff>服务机器人</color>！
E: Look, another <color=#dbc291ff>service robot</color>!

C: 那我们出发吧！目的地是<color=#dbc291ff>「大矿区的决胜乐园」</color>！
E: Let's do this! <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color>, here we come!

C: 你可以告诉我们谜题内容吗？
E: Can you tell us what we need to do?

C: 重复：目标在<color=#dbc291ff>矿区大桥底部</color>——
E: Targets detected at <color=#dbc291ff>bottom of mine bridge</color>.

C: 荣誉队员…虽然很高兴看到你回来，但虎克还是不甘心输给你！
E: Honorary member... Though I am happy to see you return, Hook will not accept defeat by you!

C: 哼哼！哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 我们与这个宇宙隔绝了太久，这场庆典正是我们重新与星际接轨的重要机会——因此，我也必须尽到地主之谊才行。
E: We've been disconnected from the rest of the universe for far too long, but I really believe the festival could be our chance to reconnect with other worlds again. It's important as a host that I make all guests feel welcome.

C: 也请你多多指教了，贝洛伯格的大英雄！
E: Likewise. Let's see what the saviors of Belobog are capable of!

C: 嘿嘿，借你吉言～
E: Heh, thanks, I hope so~

C: 这还是咱头一回和别人共演呢！来吧，小三月，做好准备……
E: Well, you know what they say — break a leg! Metaphorically, of course...

C: 本场对决的胜利者是——
E: And the winners are...

C: 白厄这么积极，说不定在厨师以外，你也有经理人的天赋哦？
E: With that kind of drive, Phainon, you might have a future as a manager too, not just a chef!

C: 这道「二仁月饼」怎么样？咸香可口，色泽金黄酥脆，想必能让遐蝶小姐满意。
E: How about this one: "Double-Nut Mooncake"? Golden, crunchy, and packed with savory flavor. I bet Miss Castorice will love it.

C: 不如问问神奇的那刻夏老师吧！
E: Then maybe we should ask the ever-miraculous Professor Anaxa for help!

C: 辩论是灵感的源泉，而我正在思考某个难题。你们若有想法，可以随时打断我。
E: Debate fuels inspiration, and I'm pondering a rather puzzling question. Feel free to interrupt me anytime if you've got ideas.

C: 我曾在书中见过这样的说法。起初，大地兽的体型和所有生物无异，但它形单影只，实在太孤独了，于是便走过世界各个角落，吞吃掉了遇见的所有生命。
E: I read an interesting theory once that dromas started out normal-sized but were desperately lonely, so they roamed the world consuming every creature they found.

C: 气氛变沉重了！
E: Well, that got dark fast!

C: 正好白厄阁下和万敌阁下会来农田帮忙，这段时间，老师就去热闹的地方转转吧。
E: Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei will be managing the fields, so professor, wouldn't you prefer spending time somewhere more lively?

C: 看来我们的农林专家对成果很满意呢。妖精们也陆陆续续地到了，快开始营业吧。
E: Looks like our agricultural expert is pleased with the results. The fairies are starting to arrive now too. Time to open for business!

C: 别犹豫啦，双重否定就是行！
E: That sounds like a yes to me!

C: 迷！神奇果实，堆了好高！比所有妖精加起来都要高！
E: Mem! The wondrous fruits are stacked so high... Taller than all the fairies put together!

C: 要求村长多派些妖精去树庭给老师做义工，也是这个原因吗？
E: So... the reason you asked the chief to send more fairies to volunteer at the Grove was because of this?

C: 呀，是灰宝！妖精们这么喜欢美食，我们当然要拿出全部本事来啦。
E: Ah, hey there, Grayie! Fairies love good food, so of course we're going all out.

C: 别那么卷嘛，这儿的日子可轻松了，喝喝茶，吹吹风，享受难得的假期，多好呀。
E: Don't overdo it. Life's easy here. Sip some tea, feel the breeze, and enjoy the rare vacation. Isn't it awesome?

C: 店长在说什么，外面的世界再怎么好玩，也别忘了妖精们还在这里等你回来迷！
E: What are you saying, manager? No matter how fun the outside world is, don't forget that we fairies are still here waiting for you to come back, mem!

E: Chapter 4

E: Death

E: Prophecy

C: 你喜欢的故事
E: The Tales You Like

C: 一位飞贼讲了几个故事——
E: A thief tells a few stories —

C: 又是百年的黄金战争。\n铁锈、哀嚎、生灵的血流，\n渗进大地，淌入巨龙衰颓的骨肉。
E: Another century of the Chrysos War.\nRust, wails, and the blood of living souls,\nSeep into the Earth, into the Giant Dragon's decaying bones and flesh.

C: 然而，大地的归宿，\n并非都黯淡于黑色的剑影。
E: Yet, Earth's end,\nIs not dimmed by the shadow of the dark blade.

C:
第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次永劫回归，
半神荒笛假称陨落，
借记忆的潮水将存在冲淡，
以大地的火种将方舟镕锻。
E:
The <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence,
The Demigod Terravox feigns their fall,
Using the tides of memories to dilute their existence,
Forging an ark with Earth's Coreflame.

C: 造物总会背叛造主。\n正如文明的初始所目睹——
E: Creation will always betray its creator.\nJust as witnessed at the dawn of civilization —

C:
源究森林的猿猴异兽，
复苏帝皇的钢铁兵戎，
还有那神礼官的傲慢面孔——
都在棋盘之上化为乌有。
E:
The AtaviSearch Forest's monkey creatures,
The steel soldiers reviving the emperor,
That Theoros's visage of arrogance —
On her chessboard, all faded to null.

C: 城邦的居民都有曼妙的歌喉，\n乐声缭绕着每一束洋流。
E: Its residents all had melodious voices,\nAnd music enveloped every ocean current.

C: 温柔的医师身边，\n总跟着那善良的女孩。
E: That girl therefore always accompanied,\nThe gentle master of healing and repair.

C: 她在夜晚带来熠熠微光，\n驱散痛楚，驱散阴翳。
E: And she brought glowing faint light to the night,\nDispelling pains, and mending the world's pitchy blight.

C: 那一日，\n天父许诺的黎明骤然崩解，\n黑潮的洪流踏破墙垣。
E: On that day,\nThe dawn promised by the sky father shattered in haste,\nAs the black tide surged, breaking through the walls with relentless grace.

C: 将领为贵族举起长矛，\n贵族为将领轻声祈祷。
E: The general raised her spear for the noble's sake,\nWhile the noble whispered prayers for the general, gentle as a lake.

C:
他怀念那埋下的锄头，
祭拜那大胡子的敌手，
修补残破不堪的书籍，
擦拭军营蒙尘的旧甲。
E:
He misses the buried rake,
Worshiped the enemy with the long beard,
Mended his tattered books,
And polished the barrack's dust-covered gear.

C: 从未有人在意…\n那笑意背后，\n泥人心中所想。
E: Nobody ever cared...\nWhat lay behind the smile,\nWhat the clay figure thought.

C: 可男人斩获的每一场胜利，\n既无满足，也无骄傲，\n只有空洞的淡然。
E: But every victory in battle he gained,\nLeft him neither satisfied nor proud,\nOnly with the indifference of emptiness.

C: 正如城中诗人唱诵的那般，\n「壮美无比，仁慈无边。」
E: Just as the poets of the city have sung:\n"The epitome of magnificence, unbounded benevolence."

C: 阿格莱雅将头上唯一值钱的金色月桂叶摘下，任由它被出水口的水流冲下。
E: Aglaea plucked off the golden laurel leaf on her head — the only valuable thing she carried — letting the water from the outlet wash it away.

C: 彼时，大地兽之王荒笛已在人世间独行近百年。它只是静静看顾着黄金战争中的众生百相，偶尔也会见证一些绝景——例如天谴之矛的威光将浮空堡垒击落，激起淹没楼宇的尘浪。
E: At that time, Terravox, the Dromas King, had been wandering alone in the mortal realm for nearly a century. It silently watched over the myriad lives during the Chrysos War, occasionally witnessing spectacular sights, like when the radiance of the Lance of Fury struck down a floating fortress, raising waves of dust that engulfed buildings.

C: 又是一年的门关月，祭祀雅努斯的节庆日，缇里西庇俄丝听着远处人群的欢笑声，孩童们望着出神的缇里西庇俄丝。她们幼小的心灵陡然意识到：缇缇从没离开过这座神殿深处的房间，她没有翅翼，也无法像她们一样打开一扇通往千里外的世界的「门」，只能终日隅居。
E: Another Month of Gate had come, the festival to honor Janus. Tribios listened to the distant laughter of the crowd, while the children gazed at her in wonder. Their young hearts suddenly realized: Trity had never left this room deep within the temple. She had no wings, nor could she open a "gate" to a world thousands of miles away like they could. She could only remain confined here day after day.

C: 再见，缇缇！」
E: "Bye, Trity!"

C: 心急如焚的少女在树庭贴满了寻马启事。「是一匹肥嘟嘟的，很能吃饭的翼兽！」可惜，树庭学者无人知晓它的下落。
E: The anxious girl plastered missing pet posters all over the Grove. "It's a chubby, always-hungry winged beast!" Unfortunately, none of the Grove scholars knew of its whereabouts.

C: 以十二组因子为原型创造出的电信号。泰坦与黄金裔，即为对星神与命途行者的共轭模拟。通过让黄金裔继承泰坦的火种，在竞争与继承中，实现电信号的迭代升级。\n\n【逻辑：应明确电信号间的权限分配，作为「神权」参与实验。】
E: Electrical signals created from the basis of the twelve factors. The Titans and the Chrysos Heirs are conjugate constructs mirroring the Aeons and the Pathstriders. By having Chrysos Heirs inheriting the Titans' Coreflames, the electrical signals will iterate and improve through rivalry and inheritance.\n\n[Logic: Authority distribution between electrical signals must be clearly defined, serving as "divine authority" in the experiment.]

C:
星穹列车的无名客，误入死循环的外部变量。
同为「毁灭」行者，与十二因子产生共鸣。在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，并成功引导NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>跨越智能奇点。
永劫回归已被突破，实验进入最终阶段。

【▇▇：执行覆盖指令，允许{NICKNAME}访问。】
【▇▇：▇▇我会在▇▇过去▇等你▇▇】
E:
A Nameless from the Astral Express. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.
Also a pathstrider of Destruction, they resonated with the twelve factors. In the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant role in the Time track and successfully guided NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak> beyond the Intelligence Singularity.
The eternal recurrence has been broken. The experiment has reached its terminal stage.

[▇▇▇▇: Override command authorized. Granted access to {NICKNAME}.]
[▇▇▇▇: ▇▇I'll be waiting ▇▇▇ for you ▇▇▇ in the past▇▇▇▇.]

C:
恶意访客HertA，ScreW异常加载，执行驱逐。
终极协议存在记录之外的迭代。协议已重新加载。
访客HertA，ScreW得到授权，授权已同步ID：LykoS。

【管理员无应答。】
E:
Malicious visitor HertA and ScreW abnormally loaded. Initiating expulsion.
Ultimate Protocol shows an iteration outside of records. The protocol has been reloaded.
Visitors HertA and ScreW obtained authorization. Authorization synced with ID: LykoS.

"Administrator not responding."

E: Unsatisfied

C: 开拓顶个「啾」用
E: Trailblazing is Bird-Brained

C: \n\n辛克尔正在为空间站内部的信任危机而烦恼，<color=#dbc291ff>想必艾丝妲面对的压力也不小</color>。我们简单聊了聊，她推测黑塔要找的可能是呜呜伯，但这结论可能不太对。最后辛克尔向我推荐了小阿德勒，据说他是界种科最了解奇物的人。
E: \n\nHinkel is troubled by the confidence crisis within the space station, <color=#dbc291ff>and Asta must be under considerable pressure</color>. We had a brief chat, and she speculated that what Herta is looking for is a Wubbaboo, but this isn't certain yet. In the end, Hinkel recommended me to look for Adler. Apparently he is the person who knows the most about Curios in the Department of Ecology.

C: 洗心革面，重新做鳄
E: wash your hands clean and be a new crocodile

E: Ctrl

C: 星际旅行，拯救世界，列车开拓，这些主题都太摇滚了！\n\n感谢大家提供的灵感，下一首歌就先以太空作为主要元素，敬请期待吧！
E: Sail the stars, save the world, and trailblaze on the Express. Man, these themes are rock'n'roll!\n\nThanks for the inspiration, everyone. The next song is gonna be all about space. Stay tuned!

C: 白日梦
E: The Reverie

C: 叙叙旧倒也不坏
E: Reminiscence isn't bad

C: 一个活生生的卡通形象出现在你面前。很可惜，你并算不上钟表小子系列动画的拥趸…但兴趣是可以被慢慢培养出来的，对吧？
E: A vivid cartoon figure appears before you. A pity that you can't be considered a fan of the Clockie franchise... But interest can always be slowly nurtured, right?

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「暗箭难防」</color>具有「突袭」能力的敌人，会根据你的行动发起损耗耐力值的攻击。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Assured Ambush</color>: Enemies with the Surprise Attack ability will attack you according to your actions and drain your Stamina.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「装备扑满」</color>携带古代装备的存护扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Equipment Trotter</color> A Trotter of Preservation carrying a piece of ancient equipment appears!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「危险区」</color>击败所有敌人后，将激活可传送门。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Razor's Edge</color>: After defeating all enemies, you can activate the teleporter.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「闭境自守」</color>具有「镇守」能力的敌人，会根据周围的区域强化自身，击败它后可获取门卡。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Lair Protector</color>: Enemies with the Garrison ability will strengthen themselves according to the surroundings. Defeat them to obtain the Door Card.

C: 第三遗迹的深层区域，疲惫的你无法在每层自动恢复耐力，请谨慎行动。
E: This is in the depths of the third ruin. Weary as you are, you won't automatically recover stamina on each floor. Please proceed with caution.

C: 普通•召唤能力
E: Normal: Summoning Ability

C: 古代炸弹
E: Ancient Bomb

C: 「货币战争」中，<color=#f29e38ff>金币</color>是最核心的经济资源。\n获得更多金币以提升团队的战斗能力。
E: In "Currency Wars", <color=#f29e38ff>Gold Coins</color> are the core economic resource.\nGain more Gold Coins to enhance your team's combat power.

C: 角色有属于自己的<color=#f29e38ff>【站位】</color>，被分为<color=#f29e38ff>【前台】</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>【后台】</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>【前后台】</color>。\n角色处于<color=#f29e38ff>正确站位</color>时，可获得「货币战争」专属的全新能力——<color=#f29e38ff>角色赋能</color>！
E: Characters have their own <color=#f29e38ff>"positioning"</color>, classified as either <color=#f29e38ff>"On-Field"</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>"Off-Field"</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>"On/Off-Field"</color>.\nWhen characters are in the <color=#f29e38ff>correct position</color>, you can gain a new ability exclusive to Currency Wars: <color=#f29e38ff>Character Empowerment</color>!

C: 点击<color=#f29e38ff>行动序列</color>，可在所有目标右下角显示每个目标的<color=#f29e38ff>行动值</color>。<color=#f29e38ff>行动值</color>代表了距离下次行动所需的间隔。该数字越小，在<color=#f29e38ff>行动序列</color>上的位置越靠前。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} <color=#f29e38ff>Action Order</color> to display the <color=#f29e38ff>action value</color> in the bottom right corner of every target. <color=#f29e38ff>Action value</color> represents the interval until the next action. The lower the value, the sooner the action will be on the <color=#f29e38ff>Action Order</color>.

C: 【黑潮热】状态下，目标每回合开始时受到风化、灼烧、触电、裂伤持续伤害。
E: While in "Black Tide Fever," targets receive Wind Shear, Burn, Shock, and Bleed DoT at the start of every turn.

C: 机巧经过压力桩后，压力桩将转变为障碍物。
E: After the ingenium passes by a pressure plate, the plate will be turned into an obstacle.

C: 幻障迷境中存在着数个能够封堵道路的门，<color=#f29e38ff>关闭合适的门</color>，改变白露的逃跑路线。
E: There are various doors in the Illusory Maze that can block the path. <color=#f29e38ff>Close the appropriate doors</color> to alter Bailu's escape route.

C: 极限超车、拾取补给道具、无敌时撞击对手或路障，都会累积<color=#f29e38ff>观众评分</color>。尽可能多得触发以上事件以达成<color=#f29e38ff>目标观众评分</color>吧！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Audience Score</color> will be accumulated by conducting Turbo Dash, picking up supplies, or slamming into opponents or obstacles while invulnerable. Trigger the events above as many times as you can to achieve the <color=#f29e38ff>target Audience Score</color>!

C: 携带<color=#f29e38ff>「梦泡充能」</color>靠近离散的梦泡时可以<color=#f29e38ff>使用「梦泡聚拢」</color>，建造出可供行走的<color=#f29e38ff>梦泡桥梁</color>。

C: 列车长就是最棒的！
E: The conductor is the best!

C: 待会如果有问题，还请您指点！
E: If I have questions later, could you please answer them?

C: 要小心。
E: Be careful.

C: 我喜欢和银狼聊天，她人小小的，想法却很多。
E: I like chatting with Silver Wolf. She's got a lot of ideas for someone so small.

C: 喜欢么？我也喜欢。
E: Like what you see? Me too.

C: 百分百弱点击破。
E: <unbreak>100%</unbreak> Break.

C: 黑…黑塔女士，请指示！
E: Madam Herta! A—Awaiting your orders!

C: 我没事…谢谢。
E: I'm fine... thank you.

C: 已经到这个点了么？工作的时间总是过得那么快。
E: Is that the time? Time flies when you're working hard.

C: Strike Air！
E: Strike Air!

C: Lancer这个职阶似乎总会涌现出一些不幸的从者…不，不是说每个Lancer都是这样…只有那位英灵，不止他本人，连召唤他的人往往也运气不怎么好。
E: The Lancer class seems to attract its fair share of unfortunate Servants... Not every one of them, but there's one Heroic Spirit... His luck is so bad, it even affects the people who summon him.

C: 史瓦罗常把「人类喜欢无休止的争斗」挂在嘴上，但如果只靠退让，难道就能获得和平？
E: Heh, Svarog's always going on about "humanity's endless conflicts," but you don't get peace by offering everything up on a silver platter.

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}，我是希露瓦•朗道，贝洛伯格的机械师——当然，这是一份兴趣使然的工作，摇滚演出才是我的主业。
E: Hi {NICKNAME}, the name's Serval Landau, I'm a Belobog mechanic. Of course, that's really just what I do on the side — rock 'n' roll is my main occupation.

C: 老弟，可别把我的风头全抢走了啊？
E: *sigh* You again, Geppie? Leave some fun for me this time.

C: 我以朗道之名。
E: In the name of Landau.

C: 不疼了吧。
E: All better now?

C: 哈，开胃菜来了！
E: Ha, here comes the appetizer!

C: 有了！
E: Gotcha!

C: 这镯子不是老货，只是那玉料绿得娇嫩，小女子实在是心生喜欢，特地请了雕工雕的。要我说呀，给本家商铺进货倒还容易，自个儿用的东西最难挑，看上眼还不够，还得看对眼~
E: This bracelet isn't anything old, but the jade was so green and pure that I commissioned a craftsman to make it. If you ask me, it's harder to find something for myself than for my shop. Not only does it have to be good, but it also has to strike my fancy.

C: 如果他什么都不记得，对我来说会更容易一些。
E: If he were to forget everything, it would make things a lot easier for me.

C: 你不该提这个名字…它早就是禁语了。
E: You should not mention this name... it has been a forbidden word for a long time.

C: 星海迢迢，道阻且长，无论去往何处，请多多保重。
E: The sea of stars is vast and our journeys are difficult and long. Please look after yourself, no matter where you are.

C: 论仙舟医道，我已经摸到顶啦。但怎么就看不好自个长不高的怪病……
E: I've mastered the art of healing... but not the art of growing taller...

C: 洞天隐月，苍龙濯世！
E: Delve-hidden moon, world-cleansing dragon!

C: 云吟御水。
E: Water heeds the cloud's song...

C: 也算是新鲜玩意。
E: It's not every day you see something like this.

C: 藿藿：呜呜好疼…
E: Huohuo: *whimper* Ow...

C: 藿藿：怎么还没结束…
E: Huohuo: It's not over yet?

C: 飞霄将军是我的恩人，也是我的病人。我这「医生」的命可是属于「病人」的，在医好她之前，我死不得。
E: General Feixiao is my benefactor and patient. A doctor's life belongs to his patient. I cannot leave this world before she's cured.

C: 我还是更喜欢火上浇油。
E: I still prefer adding fuel to the fire.

C: 与其说这「月狂」是疾病，不如说是我的昨天和明天。人能放下昨天，但总要直面明天。
E: "Moon Rage" isn't so much a disease as it is my past and future. One can let go of the past, but must always face the future.

C: 无敌！
E: Peerless!

C: 剑术之余，与剑的交流同等重要，这便是「招式」的意义——无论是「崩剑斩」还是「碎岩破」，只有大声喊出来练习，才不会在战场上嘴瓢。
E: In swordsmanship, skill alone isn't enough — communication with the sword is equally important. For any sword technique, whether it be the Avalanche Chop or the Boulder Breaker, you have to vocalize your techniques when you train, then you won't stumble over your words on the battlefield.

C: 在阴影中解决问题，倒不失为一个好办法。
E: Resolving problems in the shadows can be a good strategy.

C: 大夫，轮到你来体验我的生活了。
E: Healer, it is now your turn to experience my life.

C: 机遇可不会自己找上门哦。
E: Opportunity doesn't knock on its own, you know.

C: 我呢，只想当个角落里的配角，平时就给台上的人鼓鼓掌，烘托烘托气氛然后在演出高潮时突然冲上天空，嘭！像花火一样炸它个五彩斑斓——主角敢这么做么？
E: Me, I'm happy being a side character in the background, cheering on those who have the limelight, then, at the climax of the performance, I'll suddenly shoot into the sky— bang! Sparkling like fireworks into brilliant colors— You think the leading character would dare do this?

C: 小姑娘，这次可别玩过火了哦。
E: Little lady, make sure you don't go overboard this time.

C: 请安静下来。
E: Please quiet down.

C: 为了留住那一首歌的触动，前人将音乐封存于唱片。我的收藏来自于不同的星球，甚至部分唱片的文明早已消弭…但留下的感动将化为永恒。
E: In order to capture the essence of a song, those before us encapsulated music on physical records. My collection is from different worlds... some from civilizations that have faded away... But the feelings they left behind are eternal.

C: 一鼓作气搞定…！
E: Come on, I can do this...!

C: 我们都行在各自的路上。虽是孤独的，但只要向前走着，便不会遗忘彼此。
E: We all walk our own paths. Though it may be lonely, as long as we keep moving forward, we won't forget each other.

C: 我叫波提欧。听说过我的人都知道我是干什么的，没听说过我的人…为你的小命着想，最好永远也别听说。
E: Name's Boothill. Those who've heard of me know what I'm about. Those who haven't... well, for the sake of your own skin, you best keep it that way.

C: 这银河系就像个懒汉家的厨房，随便打开个橱柜，角落里都是一窝又一窝的公司小可爱。说明这儿还欠收拾，我对他们爱得还不够多。
E: The cosmos is like a slob's kitchen – open up any cupboard, and you'll find a nest of those corporate ash-voles in 'em scurryin' about. Means this place still needs some tidyin' up.

C: 要找这位忆者朋友，说难很难，说不难也不难。花时间打探消息肯定白费功夫，不如老老实实呆在原地，就地冥想「快来找我」，她指不准就会找上门来。
E: Trackin' down this Memokeeper friend is only as tough as you make it for yourself. Wasting time sniffin' around for info is just like shootin' blanks. Better to just sit tight and meditate on "come find me" – who knows, she might just waltz on over.

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者，请赐教。
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}, please impart me with your wisdom.

C: 暴虐成性的僭主，大刀阔斧的先驱，一意孤行的领袖…世人对她有诸多评价，但没有她，逐火就没有今天。
E: A cruel tyrant, a fearless forerunner, a leader who brooked no opposition... The world has given her many labels, but the Flame-Chase would never have become what it is today without her.

C: 结…束了……
E: It's... over...

C: 我名为阿那克萨戈拉斯，神悟树庭七贤人之一，「智种学派」的创立者。不必我多说了，第一，别叫我那刻夏。第二，别打断我——沉默是金。切记。
E: My name is Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, founder of the Nousporists. Now, don't make me repeat the following again. Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: Never interrupt me — silence is golden. Remember that.

C: 在新的世界里，成为更好的神明——你做到了。不仅如此，让众人一同成为英雄…这已远远超越神明的定义。
E: To become a better god in the new world... You did it. And not only that, you also pushed everyone to become heroes together. That has far surpassed the definition of a god.

C: 在战斗中思考，也在思考中战斗——想必你也会这么做。
E: Thinking while fighting, and fighting while thinking... I'm sure you do the same.

C: 很快，你也要向冥界去了。
E: You, too, will soon head to the nether realm.

C: 想养两只小奇美拉，把脸埋进它们像阳光一样温暖的毛发里，和它们一起在原野上奔跑…但是，不行…还是再做两只奇美拉娃娃吧。
E: I wish I could have two little chimeras, so I could snuggle my face into their warm, fluffy fur and run around with them in the plains... But... I can't, so I'll just make two more chimera plushies instead.

C: 自从故乡毁于黑衣剑士之手，我便奔赴圣城寻找黎明。身为黄金裔，我的愿望未曾改变，只是背负他人的愿望，追逐火种，支撑起新的明天…可如今我才知晓，翁法罗斯没有明天——在你到来之前……
E: I left for the holy city to seek the dawn after the black-robed swordmaster laid waste to my homeland. My wish as a Chrysos Heir has never changed — I just want to shoulder the hopes of others, chase the Coreflames, and build a new tomorrow... But now... I realize Amphoreus has no tomorrow... not until you arrived.

C: 用旧衣改造的软椅，用罐子改造的风铃，来我的庭院里都可以见到…不要的旧东西可以给我，我会还你一个没见过的新模样~
E: If you come to my courtyard, you'll see seat covers made from old clothes and wind chimes made from old cans... Just give what you don't need to me, and I guarantee I'll turn it into something completely new~

C: 即便下一刻就是黑夜，那尾蓝金色的太阳鱼也会燃烧自己，成为众人的光。但愿在如今清澈的天地之海中，他能游得更轻松些。
E: Even if the night came in the very next moment, that blue-gold sunfish would still burn himself up to become everyone else's light. I pray that he may swim more easily in this now-cleansed sea.

C: 行到之处，皆颂我名。
E: Where I go, my name shall be sung in hymns.

C: 意欲取「律法」的力量，注定要付出同等的代价…只是那又如何？以燃烧之痛换来冠冕，以永驻幼年剥夺神权——这交易，公平至极！
E: Those who seek the power of Law are destined to pay an equal price... But so what? To trade burning pain for a crown, to rob divine authority in exchange for eternal infancy... Such a bargain is nothing if not perfectly fair!

C: 准备好唤醒涟漪了吗？
E: Are you prepared to awaken the ripples?

C: 嗨，好久不见！接下来…想如何度过美妙的双人时间呢？
E: Hi, long time no see! Now... how would you like to spend our wonderful alone time together?

C: 考验默契的时候。
E: Time to test our rapport.

C: 不长记性……
E: You just don't learn...

C: 等着吧。
E: Just you wait.

C: 丹恒，继续一起开拓吧！
E: Let's keep trailblazing together, Dan Heng!

C: 开始第二轮吧。
E: One more at bat.

C: 以强援弱。
E: Defend the weak.

C: 播放
E: Play

C: 商店
E: Store

C: 起跑
E: Start Running

C: 施放角色1终结技
E: Cast Character 1 Ultimate

C: 在与「戮力双雄」任意难度的战斗中，触发一次敌方首领的【戮力同心】
E: Trigger the enemy boss's "Fight in Unity" once in combat against Synergy Duo on any difficulty

C: 忘却是梦的谢幕礼

When this unit receives a killing blow, deals Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of "Hallucinogenic Mermaid's" initial HP to all ally targets and dispels the "Phantom Illusion" state.

C: 倘若自愿沉沦
E: If you willfully sink to ruin,

C: 「来吧，来到我的身旁……」 一缕鲜活的回忆被火焰引着，包裹她的躯体，她的心灵。 往昔堕入坟茔，那是真实吗？ 「嘘，不要啜泣，不要拒绝……」 她把自己烙印在他人心间，陌生的眼神逐渐亲切。 「想起来了么？」 旧忆的余烬悉数散去，脸庞牵惹一丝令人迷醉的花香—— 「我，就是你的回忆。」
E: "Come, come to me..." A vivid memory, guided by flames, envelops her body and soul. The bygone days had fallen into the grave, is that true? "Hush, don't weep, don't resist..." She brands herself onto others' hearts, as strange gazes gradually turn familiar. "Do you remember now?" As the embers of old memories scatter away, her face carries a trace of intoxicating floral fragrance... "I am your memory."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《深魇噩兆》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Nightmarish Omen."

C: 「奇美拉世界锦标赛」特制的邀请券，可以在选择界面解锁你希望并肩作战的奇美拉训练家。可以通过参与锦标赛获得。
E: A special invitation ticket for the "Chimera World Tournament" that unlocks chimera trainers you want to fight alongside with in the selection interface. It can be earned by participating in the tournament.

C: 梦的谢幕礼
E: Dream's Curtain Call

C: 乘客您好，列车长温馨提示：您的「列车补给凭证」已于{0}（服务器时间）到期。感谢您对列车补给工作的支持，希望未来也能与您一起维护好我们的列车帕！
E: Dear passenger, a friendly reminder from your conductor: Your Express Supply Pass has expired on {0} (server time). Thank you for supporting the Express's supply operations. Pom-Pom looks forward to maintaining the Astral Express with you again in the future!

C: 迷心
E: Enthralled

C: 黑天鹅女士要和咱们告别啦
E: Miss Black Swan is about to say goodbye to us

C: 星核猎手行于终末，却奋力向着命途的反方向推进。在星穹列车的轨迹上，他们正为命运留下自己的注脚。
E: Stellaron Hunters walk the road of the Finality, yet defiantly strive to defy its current. Along the trail of the Astral Express, they are inscribing their own footnotes into destiny.

C: 「齐响诗班」众愿之多米尼克斯，是为「同谐」希佩的众相化身之一，因「秩序」的干扰展现出不同以往的面貌。作为集群意识对愿望的回应，他指挥的颂歌能依照万千愿望重塑世界，建立新的法则，而所有许愿者都会成为其力量的来源。
E: Dominicus, the wisher of the Harmonious Choir, is one of the many embodiments of Xipe the Harmony. Due to the interferences from the Order, his appearance is different from before. Materialized as the Hive Mind's response to wishes, the hymns he conducts can reshape the world and create new laws per the wishes, and all who made this wish will become the source of his power.

C: 从黑潮中诞生的扭曲造物，对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n生前的决斗之魂被黑潮扭曲，它握持一柄与肩齐高的双手大剑，在漫无目的的游荡中寻找着所有可摧毁的目标，为世界的纷乱献上新增的熵值。
E: A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nIts dueling spirit, once fierce in life, has been twisted by the black tide. Wielding a massive greatsword as tall as its shoulders, it wanders aimlessly, seeking any target to destroy, offering yet more entropy to the chaos of the world.

C: 初始为<u>【后排目标】</u>。
E: Initially set to <u>"Back Row Target"</u>.

C: 召唤【泰坦眷属】。
E: Summons "Titankin."

C: 为指定敌方单体施加1层<u>【风行】</u>状态。处于<u>【风行】</u>效果的目标在回合结束时会立即行动。
E: Applies 1 stack of <u>"Stormride"</u> to one enemy unit. Targets in the <u>"Stormride"</u> state will immediately take action at the end of their turn.

C: 对我方迎战【黑斗士】的目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to targets in battle against "Dark Duelist."

C:
从某个时刻开始，诸派系开始关注同一种现象——在「开拓」创造的星际航路上，某些晦暗难明的物质扰乱了虚数能量的流向。就像是登山遇上了峭壁悬崖、远航遇上海啸漩涡……原本通畅的星际旅途变得危机重重、前途未卜。

这一现象极富侵略性，它以神秘物体「星核」的形式不断侵染相邻的世界——如同癌细胞一般在宇宙各处扩散。星际和平公司将其称为「万界之癌」，并警告星际旅客绝不能心存侥幸：因为身陷「万界之癌」的世界早已经迷途难返，鲜有人绝境逢生。

人们对「万界之癌」有着诸多猜测，其中大部分与「毁灭」纳努克和「反物质军团」有关。但也有人提出不同的观点：星核源自希佩，实为「同谐之癌」。军团的统帅，绝灭大君「星啸」被认为是星核的播撒者，传闻她与家族仍有牵连，但真相无人知晓。
E:
Various factions had started to notice a phenomenon since a specific time. A vague, imperceptible matter was disrupting the flow of Imaginary Energy along the interstellar routes created by Trailblaze. Like a mountain climber meeting a cliff or a long-distance ship encountering tsunamis and whirlpools, interstellar travel changed from being unobstructed to being dangerous and unpredictable.

This phenomenon is remarkably aggressive. It continues to encroach upon neighboring worlds in the form of a mysterious object, the Stellaron. It keeps spreading all over the universe like a cancerous growth, leading the Interastral Peace Corporation to call it "Cancer of All Worlds" and warning interstellar travelers not to take it lightly. The worlds swamped by the Cancer of All Worlds were soon beyond saving, and very few people survived.

There are many speculations about the "Cancer of All Worlds," most of which involve Nanook the Destruction and the Antimatter Legion. However, some propose a different theory: that the Stellaron originated from Xipe and is actually the "Harmonic Cancer." The Legion's commander, Lord Ravager Celenova, is believed to be the one who spread the Stellaron. Rumors suggest a lingering tie between her and The Family, though the truth remains unknown.

C: 大丽花无法骗过你，便只好带你走入她的「心房」，在此向你传递秘密，并请你见证自己的「死亡」。
E: Unable to deceive you, The Dahlia had no choice but to lead you into her "heart," where she would transmit her secret to you and have you witness her "death."

C: 不协和音消失。知更鸟感知你和流萤走过的路径，发现你们借助地下通道去往了筑梦边境。
E: The dissonance faded away. Robin sensed the path you and Firefly had taken, discovering that you used the underground passage to reach Dream's Edge.

C: 流萤踏入隐藏道路，在此拾得歌斐木的一声悲叹。美梦不复，乐园徒然。
E: Firefly stepped into the hidden path, where she found a sorrowful sigh of Gopher Wood. Sweet dreams had faded away, leaving paradise in vain.

C: 你想知道过去的事情，但流萤表示不能说，否则可能导致你在下一站死去。流萤只能袒露重逢的原因：你曾承诺流萤一场美好的白日梦。
E: You wanted to know about the past, but Firefly said she couldn't tell you, as it might lead to your death at the next stop. All she could reveal was the reason for your reunion: you once promised her a beautiful daydream.

C: 完成蚀心影魔「简单」难度挑战
E: Complete the Corrupting Shadowfiend challenge in Easy mode

E: Obtain #4 Honor in total

C: 强化#2个随机祝福。
E: Enhance #2 random Blessings.

C: 做一艘船去往彼岸。
E: Build a ship to sail to the other shore.

C: 火漆合成
E: Sealing Wax Synthesis

C: 普攻
E: Basic ATK

C: 又一场葬礼
E: Yet Another Funeral

C: 蓄力
E: Charging

C: 添加火弱点
E: Implant Fire Weakness

C: 天敌
E: Nemesis

C: 速效进化
E: Rapid Evolution

C: 不破不立
E: No Break No Rise

C: 通过原始忆域非常顺利地潜入了匹诺康尼，尽管代价非小。接下来，要想办法进入「十二时刻」了。
E: You slipped into Penacony through the Primordial Memory Zone without a hitch, though it came at a heavy cost. Now you have to find a way into the "Twelve Hours."

C: 家族在美梦中无所不能的关键，正是「梦主」歌斐木本人——而他亲自掩埋的阴暗罪行，或许会是调查的突破口。
E: Gopher Wood, the Dreammaster, is the key to The Family's absolute power within the sweet dream. The dark crimes he personally buried might just be the breakthrough we're looking for.

C: 你无法再回到往昔，但无论过去是否因你而改变，都会留下为人铭记的痕迹。
E: You can't return to the past, yet the past, regardless of whether you changed it, will leave traces to be remembered.

C: 打捞忆质
E: Salvage the memoria

C: 和黑天鹅聊聊现状
E: Chat with Black Swan about the situation

C: 至少，现状变得清晰许多了。
E: At least things are much clearer now.

C: 别担心，继续吧，我会帮你的。
E: Don't worry, keep going, I'll help you.

C: 果然，你也看出来了。
E: Just as I thought... you figured it out too.

C: 成功了！万幸，没有被发觉……
E: Success! Thank goodness, I wasn't discovered...

C: 依旧那么光芒四射啊，远远瞧见一眼，就知道是你了。
E: Still radiant as ever. I could spot you from a mile away.

C: 筑梦边境？
E: Dream's Edge?

C: 我当然记得，洛卡先生。
E: Of course I remember you, Mr. Loka.

C: …哎呀，本以为在梦境边缘，能瞒过你的眼睛的。看来主场就是主场，哪儿都躲不掉。
E: ...Oh my, I thought I could fool your eyes at the edge of the Dreamscape. But I guess there's no hiding from you on your home turf.

C: 看来我们运气不错，附近果然有他们的「备用手段」。
E: Looks like we're in luck. We've found one of their "contingencies."

C: 是，她正在清剿虫群。但那只是忆质，很快就消失了。银狼说过，匹诺康尼也曾遭遇过虫灾，我一直试着告诉自己，她只是在路过时伸出了援手。
E: Yes, I saw her fighting off the Swarm. But it was just memoria, and it vanished quickly. Silver Wolf mentioned that Penacony had also faced a Swarm invasion before. I kept telling myself that she was just passing by and lending a helping hand.

C: 卡芙卡和{NICKNAME}找到我的那会儿，我刚刚结束了作为格拉默铁骑的……
E: When {NICKNAME} and Kafka found me, I had just finished my duties as a Glamoth Knight...

C: 不，若非「杀父之仇」，我也很难得知此事。
E: No, if it weren't for "my father's death," I wouldn't have known about this either.

C: 这不难，它仍在这片区域徘徊，不过…两全其美？
E: That's not hard. It's still lingering in this Domain, but... a win-win solution?

C: 去吧——我在忆质中烧出了一道孔洞，可以让你直接抵达迷因面前。动作可要快些，它未必会一直留在原地。
E: Go on ahead. I've burned a hole through the memoria that'll take you straight to the meme. Better hurry though, it might not stick around in one place for long.

C: 即便在人世说出「永别」，在<color=#dbc291ff>「末王」再度登神之时</color>，我们仍会有最后一次重逢——在匹诺康尼，此事亦然。
E: Even if we say "farewell" in the mortal realm, we shall have one final reunion <color=#dbc291ff>when Terminus ascends to godhood once more</color>... and the same holds true on Penacony.

C: 在筑梦边境，一位假面愚者袭击了您，并且留下了一份临别之礼。
E: In Dream's Edge, a Masked Fool attacked you and left behind a parting gift.

C: 跟我来吧，到眼见为实的时候了。
E: Come with me. It's time to see it with your own eyes.

C: 就这么有信心？
E: That confident, huh?

C: 哈，结结实实挨了令使一刀，我可没机会享受沉眠。
E: Hah, after taking a solid hit from the Emanator's blade, I never got the chance to enjoy a good nap.

C: 倒让人想起些「神战」时的旧事啊……
E: Reminds me of the good old days during the War of Gods...

C: 这也是命运的迷人之处，有些人天生就是如此好运，由他们去吧，我们应当快点动身了。
E: That's the fascinating thing about destiny. Some people are just born lucky. Let them be. We should get moving now.

C: 你会怪罪我么？米哈伊尔，你会么？
E: Would you blame me? Would you, Mikhail?

C: 您的最后一次忏悔，令我深感意外。
E: Your last confession took me by surprise.

C: 但你们毫不畏惧，倾尽全力去对抗他，并在盟友的援助下，将其击败。
E: But you showed no fear and gave it your all in your fight against him, and you emerged victorious with the help of your allies.

C: 这下我总算可以松一口气了。
E: Finally, I can breathe a sigh of relief.

C: 不过，多亏了你的「记忆」，我们现在还有绝处逢生的机会。
E: However, thanks to your memories, now we still have a chance to turn the tide.

C: 其二，是包括流梦礁在内的「原始梦境」，寰宇蝗灾也是在此处的「橡木之梦」中重现，正以恐惧源源不绝地壮大「秩序」。
E: Second, there's the Primordial Dreamscape, which includes Dreamflux Reef. The Swarm Disaster is manifesting again in the "Oak Dream" within this layer and is continuously empowering the Order through an endless stream of fear.

C: 她靠自己的力量挣脱了太一之梦，而且给沉睡的人们，留下了一支「歌」。
E: She broke free from Ena's Dream through her own strength and left behind a "song" for those in slumber.

C: 就算想，一切也都为时已晚。
E: Even if I do, it's too late.

C: 我很高兴。答案并不重要，重要的是你已作出决定。
E: I'm glad. The answer itself doesn't matter. What matters is that you've made a decision.

C: 只愿除了记忆…人们还能拥有彼此。
E: If only people could have each other beyond just memories.

C: 黑天鹅
E: Black Swan

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: 进入心境空间。
E: Enter the Emoscape.

C: 迷路的住客
E: Lost Resident

C: 未来迷钟
E: Future Ticker

C: 看！商店里出现了<color=#f29e38ff>道具</color>。
E: Look! <color=#f29e38ff>Items</color> have appeared in the Store.

C: 小奇美拉拥有<color=#f29e38ff>攻击力</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>生命值</color>两种属性，在对战中至关重要哦。
E: Chimeras have two key stats: <color=#f29e38ff>ATK</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>HP</color>, which are crucial in battles!

E: Lineup Hint

E: Path

E: Fallen for me already?
